Comment: Near rear. Clipped heels and knuckled near 600 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield rounding home bend. Found no extra closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back steadily from 4th early straight. Weakened close home.
Led early, then held 2nd to straight. Sustained effort final 300 M to re-gain advantage 100 M out.
Prominent early. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M.
Midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 5th. Kept on same pace in straight.
Soon 5th. Severely checked near 800 M, dropping to midfield. Unable to recover thereafter.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon last. Made up some ground 650 M. Ran on from 11th at 400 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Midfield early, soon in touch. Quickened up to become 2nd turning in. Kept on but found no extra closing stages.
Pushed along to take lead passing 1000 M. Held on until headed inside 150 M. Unable to quicken.
Mostly 6th until improving slightly to 5th final turn. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Checked 800 M. Kept on moderately to make up some ground final 200 M.
Always in last few.
Began well and always well there. Disputed lead into straight. Just denied closing stages.
Always wide and rear throughout.
Niggled along just behind pace. Found no response in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Virtually made all. Fought on well to defy challengers in straight.
Tailed-off throughout.
Sluggish at start. Soon recovered to midfield. One-paced in straight.
Began fairly then gradually outpaced.
Never far off behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening but only one-paced and could not match pace of leading trio.
Lost considerable ground at start. Never in contention.
Soon emerged to prominent position from difficult draw. Improved to join leaders turning in. Failed to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Dropped out upon straightening.
Never a factor. (Hung out throughout.)
Always there. Became unbalanced near 200 M. Kept on.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M. (Hung out badly.)
Made no show.
Jumped awkwardly, last to straight. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Led field to 250 M. Unable to quicken.
Midfield. Improved from outside final turn to be 3rd 300 M. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or behind throughout.
Better than midfield. Weakened inside 200 M.
Held 2nd to 400 M where he hung out and was difficult to ride out.
Behind midfield. Ran on in straight to assert authority 100 M. Held on.
Left awkwardly and shifted out at start, soon made ground to be 4th 1200 M. Further improved to 2nd final turn, taking lead briefly 250 M. Kept on when headed 100 M out.
Better than midfield. Gradual progress rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight.
Prominent to straight and faded.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Behind runners in early 100 M of home straight. Made steady headway closing stages.
Held up behind midfield. No room early in straight. Quickened well between runners inside final 200 M to snatch victory short of line.
Began well. Settled in midfield and wide throughout. One-paced in straight.
Settled just better than midfield. Found no room on rails the length of straight.
Missed the start slightly. Travelled just off midfield. No clear passage early in straight. Produced late impression closing stages. (Lame.)
Chased leader to straight then dropped out.
Attempted to make all. Came under strong pressure to maintain the 1L advantage in straight but caught final strides.
Settled at the back. Made modest progress down centre of straight without threatening.
Slowly away. Remained in rear to straight. Made up ground down centre of track. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well. Prominent before steadied to midfield approaching 1000 M. Quickened upon straightening holding some chance but could find no extra closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on quite well in straight.

Just in front of midfield after being hampered in early stages. Lost ground when awkward on heels at 900 M and was midfield turning in. Had difficulty getting run early in straight then finished strongly final 250 M.
Wide behind midfield. After straightening did not respond and gave ground.
Midfield. Improved to be in front of midfield after 1000 M. Asked for effort on straightening and responded well enough to suggest place chance then found no extra final 150 M.
Behind midfield. Made a little ground early in straight but found no extra final 200 M.
Near rear. Same into straight then experienced some difficulty when trying to make run through field. Finished strongly final 200 M when the bird had flown.
Prominent. Remained same into home straight then one-paced until finding no more after 200 M.
Taken back to be with rear. Remained at rear turning in then into clear final 200 M and finished strongly to be making ground in run to line.
With rear. Improved around field from 800 M and was wide in midfield turning in. Made gradual ground under hard riding in straight to be closest at finish.
Followed leader. Gained run entering home straight and soon went to clear second. Kept on fairly but unable to hold quinella placing final 100 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped to be near rear turning in and gave no response afterwards.
Just in front of midfield. Dropped to midfield turning in and failed to make any impression afterwards.
Led. Went clear on straightening and won unchallenged.
Wide in midfield. Made home bend wide. Hard run took its toll and showed no response in straight.
Behind lead. Travelled 3 wide most of race then gave ground soon after straightening.
Midfield and 3 wide. Remained same into home straight then found no extra and gave ground shortly afterwards.
Near rear. Remained same into home straight then had difficulty getting run early in straight. Made slight headway when in clear final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Unbalanced approaching first turn. Remained behind midfield into home straight then early in straight had difficulty getting clear run. Did best work late when in clear.
Taken back to be with rear from outside draw. Waited with until after straightening. Made strong run through field near rail final 300 M to be closest at finish.
Midfield. Asked for effort after straightening and kept on one-paced until giving ground final 200 M.
Prominent but 3 wide without cover. Remained same until straightening then gave ground quickly.
Prominent. Taken into clear after straightening and responded strongly to reach lead at 200 M then kept on well to score comfortably.
Near rear and wide. Taken to extreme outside after straightening and then responded fairly and continued to make steady ground in run to the post.
Followed leader. After straightening was shifted out from behind tiring leader and when in clear responded well but winner had established too bigger break.
With rear. Crept closer along rail from 700 M to be behind midfield on straightening. Unable to obtain run for major part of straight and was not properly tested.
Midfield. Asked for effort on straightening and failed to quicken. Over final 200 M made some headway without ever looking likely.
4 wide without cover in midfield. Remained same into home straight then effects of hards run set in at 400 M and gave ground quickly.
Led. Under pressure after straightening and kept on one-paced until giving ground final 200 M.
Worked forward to be outside lead at 800 M. Kept on well after straightening and endeavoured to make run with winner. Unable to match efforts of placegetters final 200 M.
Always well there. Led from course proper. Kept on well until headed 100 M out. One-paced thereafter and lost 2nd place close home.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish without threatening the winner.
Midfield. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Thereabout to course proper. One-paced.
At rear. Never a factor.
Led or disputed lead early and then remained well there. Kept on well until no extra close home.
Mainly midfield on stands rail. Failed to make any impression final 400 M.
Close up to 100 M. One-paced thereafter.
Ridden along to be in touch. Took lead 100 M out and kept on well to win comfortably.
Always in touch. Kept on without threatening final 400 M.
Tardy start and remained at rear. Never a threat.
Jumped awkwardly but soon recovered to be well there. Weakened final 200 M.
Behind the leading pack. Kept on until effort not sustained close home.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Never a threat.
Made running. Headed at 300 M, kept on one pace.
Never far off. Kept on one-pace in home straight, tired closing stages.
Settled better than midfield. Ran on well from 400 M to hit the front 200 M out. Kept on well.
Always close-up. Kept on well in the straight.
Chased leader, held every chance 300 M out. Outsprinted by winner but kept on well for second.
Settled at rear. Made up some ground from 200 M. One-paced close home.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit from 800 M. Tailed off in the straight. (Irregular heart beat.)
Midfield throughout. Unable to quicken in home straight.
Towards rear. Made only moderate progress from 300 M, one-paced close home.
At rear. Made up some late ground.
Began well from widest barrier, steadily dropped towards rear at 1400 M. Made up some ground from 200 M, one-paced close home.
Towards rear early. Gradually improved to midfield at 1300 M. Short-lived effort from 400 M to 200 M. Found no more thereafter.
Slowly away, steadily improved midfield at 1300 M. Did not quicken in the straight and was crowded near the 200 M.
Behind midfield throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Waited with near rear. Asked for effort from 400 M, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear, never in contention.
Prominent, steadily dropped to midfield at 900 M. Kept on same pace in home straight.
Hard ridden to lead early then sat behind leader from 1000 M. Responded well final 200 M to challenge for lead. Found winner too strong.
Settled at rear. Made up some ground final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Accelerated well from 300 M to take lead 100 M out. Kept on well to the line.
Mostly in touch. Weakened final 100 M.
Slowly away, at the back. Made gradual ground final 200 M.
Niggled along to take up running from 1000 M, steadily shifting across to the rail. Headed inside 200 M, kept on until beginning to tire close home.
Prominent briefly, gradually dropped towards rear at 900 M. Made steady ground final 200 M.
Prominent to 300 M, dropped out.
Midfield. Ran on well final 200 M, but proved difficult to ride out to the line after hanging in throughout the race.
Mostly 3rd to straight. Found little when asked 250 M.
Was midfield when severely checked approaching 800 M, losing ground. 2nd last into straight where he renewed effort and ran on quite well close home.
Led field to 150 M where he was one-paced.
Among rear group to straight where he ran on strongly inside final 200 M to snatch 2nd placing short of line.
Well there to straight where he kept on same pace.
Midfield most of way.
About 5th approaching home turn. Unable to make any impression on leaders in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and reluctant to stretch out. Always last.
Worse than midfield before staying on strongly to take command 150 M. Won readily.
Always prominent. Found winner too strong and lost 2nd final stride.
Towards rear, going well, to straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight where he made steady progress to line.
Towards rear on outside from widest draw. Steady progress 400 M to be just behind midfield early straight. Ran on quite well 250 M but no match with the winner.
Rear. Made up some ground along rail in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up good ground from outside final 250 M.
Jumped well, settled 3rd. Effort final turn to take control 200 M out. Won going away.
Never in contention.
Remained in 5th or 6th throughout.
Led field soon after start until headed final turn. Kept on but lost minor placing closing stages. (Hung in.)
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Faded 200 M. (Bled.)
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped out in straight.
Soon 2nd. Took lead briefly final turn. Kept on same pace when headed near 200 M.
Mostly 4th. Kept on well to gain 3rd close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Never far off to straight then dropped out.
Well back to straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Made no show.
Well there to 200 M then weakened.
Attempted to made all. Unable to sustain effort and caught closing stages.
Settled just better than midfield. Shaked up upon straightening and quickened to claim victory closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Held up in 3rd behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening but tightened on rails over 200 M out. Switched for a run but only kept on to the line.
Settled just behind midfield. Made swift progress passing Rock but wide rounding home bend dropping back to midfield into straight. One-paced.
Mainly in midfield. Took closer order 600 M out and shared 3rd into straight then only kept on one pace.
Soon led. Held 2Ls advantage early straight. Dropped out when headed 150 M out.
Around midfield throughout.
Made no show.
Mostly 4th. Kept on while tightened passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Improved on inside while hanging in early straight. Held on.
Held 5th to straight. Kept on well to claim 3rd close home.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Prominent. Widest turning in. Weakened.
Led early, then sat outside leader to straight. Re-gained advantage briefly passing 200 M, however effort not sustained.
Midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on well from 4th 200 M to take command 100 M.
Prominent to 200 M then weakened.
Always well behind.
Towards rear throughout.
Held up in rear. Made swift progress going up Rock joining leaders into straight, then soon found no extra.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Mainly in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend, disputing lead into straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Midfield throughout.
Raced in 4th position just better than midfield. Lost position at Rock and unbalanced turning in. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Soon took up running then never headed. Hung on under pressure.
Midfield and 3-wide throughout. Ran on to be nearest at finish but failed to get up on line.
Crowded at the start and then chased along to spear through to lead. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Always tailed off.
Wide and midfield throughout. Then never ran on when placed under pressure.
Early pace to be just behind leaders. Began to wreaken from 400 M. Went backwards after straightening.
Began quickly to lead early but then another runner improved to its inside.
Just behind leader early but had to steady to give up position at 600 M. Obtained run on straightening. Unable to hold off winner.
Good early speed to be off pace early. Given every chance in straight.
Allowed to settle in midfield position. Checked at 400 M. One-paced thereafter.
Beaten for early speed to be midfield. Struck interference at 400 M and then made good ground.
Good early speed to be wide. Then eased to be handy with cover. Improved out wide in the straight to win well.
No early pace to be at rear of field. Made run widest in straight to finish off impressively.
Not much early speed to midfield on rail. One-paced in the straight.
Rear after being slow to begin. Waited with until after straightening. Taken to outside and made a little ground without ever looking a hope.
Checked at start then improved to midfield. Responded well when asked to improve after 400 M. Was checked when crowded at 200 M. Kept on fairly afterwards. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield after being checked at start. Remained towards inner on home bend. Made ground early in straight then one-paced final 100 M.
Ridden hard early to be outside lead. Went to lead on straightening. Held on until 200 M then unable to find any extra.
Prominent early. Despite being hard ridden failed to hold position after 700 M and dropped to midfield. Made slight improvement in straight but never raised supporters hopes.
Midfield. Hampered on 1st turn. Failed to respond when asked for effort at 600 M. Not persevered with in straight.
Near rear. Placed under pressure on straightening and responded well. Continued to make ground in run to post to be nearest at finish.

Near rear after being checked at start. Improved quickly around field from 700 M to be wide in midfield turning in. Continued forward after straightening, shifted in and contributed to crowding at 200 M, kept on strongly.
In front of midfield. Into clear on straightening and responded well despite shifting out and contributing to crowding near 200 M. Went on to score well. Only ridden out hands and heels.
Led early then steadied at 1000 M to take trail. Into clear on straightening and kept on fairly but not able to match finishing efforts of placegetters.
In front of midfield and 3-wide. Remained same into home straight then effort took its toll and commenced to give ground.
Outside leader early. Went forward to clear lead at 1000 M. Maintained lead until straightening then gave ground quickly.
Handy. Faded from 200 M.
Worse than midfield. Some progress from 1000 M. Did not quicken in straight.
Well back. Dropped to last at 800 M. Wide into straight, made ground steadily final 200 M.
Hard ridden to be behind leader. Hung in from home bend. Equal lead from 400 M, weakened steadily final 100 M.
Slowly away, at rear. Steady progress from 700 M to be midfield and wide turning in. No further progress in straight.
Settled in midfield. Kept on well final 200 M.
Around midfield. Crowded and checked near 200 M when making ground. Did not recover.
Always well there. Hit the front 100 M out but was outsprinted by the winner closing stages.
Worse than midfield. Not persevered with final 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led field to 200 M where beginning to tire and was crowded. Dropped out gradually.
Soon towards rear with cover. Improved through field from 200 M to lead close home. Comfortably.
Mainly in touch. Dropped back a bit rounding home turn. Ran on again from 200 M, soon one-paced.
Raced 6th along the outside rail. No improvement.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon led until headed 350 M. One-paced.
Always there. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Never far off. Moved up from 600 M to assert authority 350 M. Won readily.
Jumped awkwardly and shifted out. Always well there and reached front momentarily around 400 M. No match with the winner.
Rear. Dropped out from halfway.
Prominent soon after start. Joined the front runners course proper. Found no extra 250 M. (Slightly lame.)
Behind midfield and was unable to quicken.
Broke well. Hard ridden to maintain early speed. Remained prominent rounding home bend but carried wide into straight. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Wide in last few throughout.
Well there to 200 M then weakened. (Bled.)
Midfield. Behind leaders turning in. Not clear passage final 200 M.
Began slowly. Quickly recovered to midfield but remained wide. Faded from approaching home turn.
Broke well and remained wide from poor draw. Took lead and crossed to rails home bend. Headed closing stages.
Sluggish at start. Midfield when hampered and lost position coming out of back straight. Improving when forced to steady inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Chased leader until lost position coming out of back straight. Hung out home turn and soon weakened.
Soon in rear.
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened into straight and ran on well to hit front closing stages.
Settled around midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never in the hunt.
Settled behind midfield. Dropped out upon straightening.
Soon led. Faded out of contention when headed 250 M out.
Held 3rd soon after start. Ran on steadily in straight to be 2nd 250 M. Unable to reach the winner.
Slightly behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Well there. Was 1-1/2L 2nd turning in. Sustained effort to take over 250 M out. Held on well to finish.
Midfield. Made ground while hanging in 400 M. Kept on to share 3rd at finish.
Towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear throughout.
In the front early, soon dropped back to the 5th. One-paced in straight.
Better than midfield. Slightly improved to 4th passing 1100 M. Moved to inside and ran on along rail in straight.
Always midfield. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Ran on steadily 250 M, never nearer.
At rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, never in contention.
Led until overhauled over 200 M out.
Sluggish at start. Last few throughout.
Settled at the back. Ran on in straight doing best work at finish.
Niggled at early. Prominent to straight then weakened.
Given reminders early and steadily improved far side joining leaders home bend. Gradually weakened in straight.
Midfield. Wide into straight. Made moderate progress under pressure. No extra close home.
Held up towards rear. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Held up in rear position early. Last rounding home bend and into straight. Ran on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide and in midfield to straight then weakened.
Never far off leaders. Kept on under pressure without quickening in straight.
Held up in midfield. Commenced move entering straight. Quickened well in straight for a commanding victory.
Broke well. Held up in prominent position and travelled 3-wide. Ran on steadily down straight but not match speed of winner.
Restrained behind leaders. Just better than mid-division turning in. No clear passage early in straight. Produced late impression closing stages.
Midfield throughout. Kept on.
Began quickly from inside gate to lead at stable bend. Never quickened.
Slow to begin to be rearward. Made good ground from a long way back in the straight.
Four wide equal lead racing out of straight first time. Raced wide thereafter to weaken from 400 M.
No early speed to be at the rear. Chased along from 800 M to be midfield. Made run around field to make good ground.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Never a threat.
Slow into stride. Settled rearward. Asked for effort from 600 M, to make good ground.
Very wide out of straight first time but eased shortly after to obtain cover. Improved from 600 M, for good win.
Began quickly to be outside leader at stable bend. Raced forward and then one-paced in the straight.
Restrained to be forward of midfield. Followed winner from 600 M but unable to match the winner.
Four wide equal lead at stable bend. Eventually took lead. Overtaken from home bend.
Raced midfield on the rail. Made up only moderate ground in the straight along the rail.
Behind midfield going into stable bend. Made steady ground in the straight.
Three wide equal lead at stable bend, then eased to be just behind leaders. Improved from home bend to make good ground.
Raced on rail behind leader in early stages after blundering at stable bend. Dropped out from 400 M.
At rear after being slow to begin. Waited with into home straight then made strong run down outside to just fail to gain quinella placing.

Behind midfield. Shifted wider at 800 M and then hard ridden to improve. Swept up 5 wide to take clear lead on straightening. Still held clear advantage at 200 M but unable to hold off winner last bit.
In front of midfield. Taken into clear on straightening and responded with well timed run to win going away.
Midfield and wide. Remained wide throughout. Hard run took its toll and gave ground from 600 M.
Ridden hard to go forward and sit inside leader. Early effort took its toll and commenced to give ground at 400 M and was crowded for room. Found no extra afterwards.
Near rear. Made home turn wide and failed to make any impression afterwards.
Ridden hard to lead. Effort used to lead was felt at 400 M and commenced to give ground. Was crowded at 300 M but was gone at the time.
Near rear. Remained on inner around home bend then made a little ground but never looked likely.
Followed leaders. Moved up to issue challenge on straightening and kept on fairly early in straight. Was crowded at 300 M and then one-paced afterwards.
In front of midfield and 3 wide. Moved up 4 wide to issue challenge after 400 M. Kept on fairly until one-paced final 200 M.
Midfield. Asked for effort on straightening and responded by continuing to make gradual ground in straight without ever looking likely.
Behind leaders. Into clear at 400 M and moved up to join lead. Kept on early in straight but one-paced final 200 M.
In front of midfield. Remained on fence making home turn then shifted out into clear after straightening. Responded fairly and continued to make ground in run to the post.
Near rear early. Checked on first turn. Improved along rail to be midfield at 900 M. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Well back. Hung out approaching and rounding home turn. Made up good ground from 300 M, one-paced closing stages.
Jumped best, ridden to dispute lead early. Remained in touch until dropping out of contention from 300 M.
Lacked early pace, towards rear. Made gradual ground final 300 M, was brushed by the winner right on the line.
Better than midfield, wide along back straight and on home bend. Ran on a bit in straight, no extra and weakened final 100 M.
Hard ridden to lead from 1000 M. Headed closing stages.
Midfield. Steadied at 800 M. Gave ground steadily from 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly. Ridden from behind. Raced ungenerously when being settled early. Trailed field, only ran past beaten horses final 200 M.
Midfield. Became unbalanced near 800 M. Under pressure from 700 M, hampered when weakened after the 200 M.
Pushed forward early to be handy. Gradually weakened from 150 M.
Forward of midfield throughout. Unable to quicken.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily from 300 M, no extra close home.
Dropped to the rear from wide barrier. Ran on well towards outside final 300 M to snatch victory closing stages.
Prominent, brief lead near 1200 M, then sat outside leader. Held some chance in straight but proved very difficult to ride out and shifted a lot of ground. Kept on.
Worse than midfield. Made up some ground from 200 M, soon one-paced.

Slowly away. Midfield briefly before dropping back towards rear 1600 M out. Under pressure home bend and took closer order along rail turning in. Quickened well 200 M and gained upper hand closing stages.
At rear. Never a factor.
Soon dropped to the rear. Widest turning in. Ran on a bit final 300 M until finding no more close home.
Always in touch in 3rd or 4th place. Ran on in straight until effort not sustained close home.
Soon midfield or better. Ran on well from 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled at rear. Slight progress from 800 M. Ran on steadily in straight until not quickened close home.
In touch early before settling in front of midfield from stable bend. Progressed from 800 M to be 4th or 5th turning in. Ran on until crowded 100 M out. Not a threat thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly. At back. Unbalanced at 800 M. Ran on a little final 250 M only to be hampered 200 M out. Never recovered.
Towards rear. Improved from 900 M to be behind midfield but got trapped wide turning in. Made up some ground final 300 M until one-paced close home.
Well there. Took lead from stable bend. Kept on upon straightening. Headed 300 M out. Weakened badly final 100 M.
Led to stable bend before settling in 2nd place. 3rd from 800 M. Ran on in straight until no extra 100 M out.
In touch early before settling in front of midfield from stable bend. Kept on in straight until hampered when giving ground 200 M out. Not a threat thereafter.
Midfield. Ran on a bit final 300 M but was checked when crowded inside 200 M. Never recovered.
Never far off. Improved from 900 M to sit outside the leader rounding home bend. Took lead 300 M out. Kept on well but was outsprinted by the winner in the closing stages. (Whip broke.)
Settled forward of midfield. Ran on well from 300 M to be closest at finish, was inconvenienced on the winning post.
Settled last. Made up good ground standside from 400 M, jumped a patch on the track 50 M out.
Steadily dropped to the rear. Never on terms, tailed off inside 200 M.
Soon chased the leader from widest barrier. Took over from 900 M, kept on gamely to the line despite shifting out.
Never far off. Made gradual ground from 300 M. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Worse than midfield. Wide into straight, did not quicken.
Settled towards rear. Made up some ground from 400 M, one-paced final 200 M.
In touch. Ran on steadily from 300 M, just failed to peg back the winner.
Towards rear after being crowded at start. Gradually improved to midfield at 1100 M. Dropped out inside 400 M.
Pushed forward to lead, headed at 900 M. Kept on until commencing to give ground 200 M out.
Jumped awkwardly, ridden along to be midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Behind midfield. Had tendency to lay out near 800 M. Made up a little late ground.
Made running to 200 M. Found no extra close home.
Soon in midfield and remained there to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Well there before giving ground 250 M out.
Midfield to straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Mostly 5th to straight where he ran on nicely to lead and dash clear passing 200 M. Won comfortably.
Settled in rear to home turn. Kept on steadily along rails in straight.
Settled in rear before making up some ground in straight.
Never far off to straight. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
Made no show.
Always prominent. One-paced under pressure inside 150 M.
At back to straight. Never nearer.
Never better than mid-division.
About 8th or 9th approaching home turn. Ran on well to claim 2nd close home.
Towards rear when steadied 800 M, losing ground. Never a factor.
In touch. Dropped back slightly rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Never a factor.
Was checked shortly after start, remained in midfield until dropping out inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made ground from 2nd last 200 M, never nearer.
Always prominent. Sustained effort in straight to take lead 100 M. Just held on.
Near midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Ran on steadily to hold some chance passing 200 M. Just beaten narrowly.
Led field to final turn. Weakened final 200 M. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Held up on the rail inside 200 M and was not properly tested out.
Well there. Gained slender advantage final turn. Kept on same pace when headed 100 M out.
Towards rear. Improved along rail home bend to be 5th or 6th turning in. Was checked passing 200 M, no extra.
Behind midfield. Made ground passing 200 M to claim 3rd at finish.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Widest home turn with only modest progress in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. 5-wide turning into straight. Unable to quicken.
Midfield. Unbalanced when checked passing 600 M and again at final turn. Made up some ground while hanging in in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Lost a few lengths at start. Tailed off to home bend. Made up late ground final quarter.
With leaders till hung wide home bend. Shifted ground early in straight then faded.
Made all. Won readily.
Settled in 6th just better than midfield. Improved to dispute 3rd turning in then no further impression.
Settled in midfield. Ran on down straight to reach 2nd closing stages without troubling winner.
Broke well. Close up. Carried wide home turn. Kept on without quickening.
Jumped fairly but soon dropped to rear. Never nearer.
Always thereabouts.
Checked at start but soon in midfield. Ran on in straight but missed placing narrowly.
Prominent to Rock. Gradually weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Soon outpaced.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground moderately final 200 M.
Towards rear. Gradual progress from 600 M and was 6th turning in. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd closing stages.
In touch early. Dropped back to midfield or better when unbalanced approaching stable bend. Remained similar until running on in straight to obtain a minor placing.
Mainly 3rd to straight. Sustained effort to take control 200 M. Held on to the line.
Led field from winning post the first time. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Pushed along from widest draw to be outside leader. Kept on until failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Midfield. Widest turning in. Unable to quicken. (Hung out throughout.)
Always thereabouts. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Checked at 1000 M. Never a factor.
Rear. Crept closer order along rail turning in. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Not far off, soon towards rear. Dropped out in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped to the rear group rounding home bend.
In touch early, remained midfield or slightly better far side. Given reminders passing 600 M, one-paced.
Midfield most of way. One-paced.
Settled towards rear. Gained midfield into straight. Ran on doing best work at finish.
Broke well. Held up behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening hitting front shortly afterwards but unable to sustain effort inside 200 M.
Well there. Came under pressure home bend and weakened.
Settled towards rear. Snuck up on rails turning in gaining 4th. Produced good late finish closing stages to snatch 3rd place.
Took up running stable bend. Led until narrowly headed early in straight. Fought on doggedly for 2nd.
Began awkwardly. Travelled mainly in midfield. Commenced run home bend. Ran on well from 3rd into straight. Led inside 200 M and hung on well.
Raced wide and just better than midfield. Gave ground home bend before hampered turning in.
Mainly first few. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Hampered at start and always last few.
Ridden to first few. Weakened from 400 M.
Midfield early. Dropped behind midfield far side. Wide turning in. Kept on one pace.
Trailed field to 400 M. Made up late ground.
Rear to straight. Ran past beaten runners.
Worked forward from wide gate to race outside the leader. Kept on well but could not hold off challengers.
Jumped well to lead at first bend under restraint. Quickly past on straightening and then one-paced.
Good early speed but restrained to be on rail behind leader. Gained inside run on straightening for good win.
Beaten for early speed to be midfield but wide. Made wide run on home bend to make good ground.
Ridden along early but did not show speed to be rearward. Made only moderate ground when placed under pressure.
Began quickly from outside gate but caught very wide without cover. Checked when weakening at the 200 M.
Began well to be right behind leaders into first bend. Never improved when asked and weakened badly from 200 M.
Settled just behind leaders but 3-wide without cover. Remained thereabouts in home straight.
Raced in handy position with cover. Awkward on heels on straightening and then made moderate ground.
Began well from inside gate but eased to be midfield. Improved out wide in home straight.
Slightly slow to begin then crowded to be at rear. Always tailed off thereafter.
Began quickly but allowed runners to cross, to be racing handy on the rail. One-paced in the straight.
Near rear. Dropped to be with rear turning in. Took time to gather momentum in straight. When pressure applied final 200 M made good ground late.
Behind leaders. Into clear after straightening and responded well. Held good chance when reaching lead after 200 M. Unable to hold off quinella pair.
Prominent 3-wide. Remained wide making home turn then kept on well to continue to make gradual ground in run to post.
Around midfield. Remained on inner around home bend but failed to quicken. Made no improvement in straight.
Led. Remained same until giving ground quickly final 200 M.
Outside leader. Kept on fairly until not finding any more final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Shifted out into clear after straightening and responded well when making run with winner but just failed to match its effort.
Near rear throughout.
Restrained to rear. Waited with until after straightening. Eased into clear and sprinted quickly at 300 M. Made sustained effort to score strong win.
Behind midfield. Didn't quicken when asked after straightening. Made some ground in closing stages.
Around midfield. Remained same into home straight then had some difficulty getting clear run until after 200 M. Made some ground late.
Behind leader. Took run through on inside on straightening and reached lead momentarily near 200 M. Kept on strongly but not able to withstand challenges of fast finishers.
Midfield or worse. Steadied near 500 M and again round home turn. Made up little ground in straight.
Led from wide draw and virtually made all.
Towards rear. Made home turn awkwardly. Did not obtain clear run until approaching winning post.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Well there. Tended to lay in middle stages. Weakened after 200 M.
Checked after the start. At the back throughout.
Well there to 100 M. Rider concerned with action of horse and ease horse down.
At back. Some inconvenience near 500 M and round home turn. Caught wide entering straight. Ran on strongly.
Mainly better than midfield. Kept on well.
Worse than midfield. Hung out round home turn. Made up some ground in straight.
Mainly midfield. Obliged to travel wide throughout and mostly without cover. Not a factor after 300 M.
Midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Prominent to 800 M then behind the leaders. Bumped near 600 M. Weakened from 200 M.
Midfield early and caught wide. Progress from 1000 M to be joint leader near 600 M. Weakened steadily from 150 M.
Midfield or behind. Steady progress rounding home bend. Ran on 400 M to reach front briefly 200 M. Unable to match speed with the winner.
Jumped awkwardly and was last early stages. Made ground from 1250 M to be midfield home bend. Dropped to rear early straight until making some progress 200 M.
Lost position soon after start, towards rear throughout.
Remained in touch from widest draw. Progressed to 2nd far side. Kept on until failing to hold place soon after straightening.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside in straight to claim 3rd closing stages.
Better than midfield. Progressed to 3rd 700 M. Weakened final 300 M.
Prominent. Gave ground from 5th early straight.
In the front early, raced 4th far side. Kept on well early straight. Found no extra when steadied 250 M.
Rear. Ran on final 300 M.
Midfield. Unable to improve when finding no clear run soon after straightening.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Dropped back to the rear group turning in. Ran on steadily inside 250 M.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well from 9th early straight to assert authority 200 M. Won unchallenged.
Better than midfield. Became midfield on inside home bend. Held up early straight and unable to feature.
Prominent. Took lead near 1700 M. Maintained advantage until headed 200 M out. Found no extra.
Broke well. Led until headed passing 300 M. Beaten when hampered at about 200 M.
Niggled at and prominent early. Lost position and raced in 5th some 3Ls off the pace home bend. Kept on in straight.
Mainly in mid-division. Came under pressure turning in but only one-paced. Kept on at the same pace.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on in straight.
Always travelled behind leaders despite minor interference approaching home bend. No clear passage early in straight. Shifted in for a run at about 200 M and finished off race well.
Slow away. Remained well behind. Made significant progress down straight to grab 2nd close home.
Tracked leader. Took over inside 300 M. Easily.
Wide throughout. Midfield early. Took closer order home bend. Close-up 3rd turning in. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
Midfield far side. Dropped to last few home bend.
Settled in last few. Made no show in straight.
Soon in rear. Never nearer.
Never far off. Was steadied upon straightening. Kept on without quickening.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield rounding home bend. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Missed the start and was at rear. Held up on the rail early straight. Ran past a few tiring horses closing stages.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Midfield. Made progress home bend to be 2nd while hanging in final turn. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Prominent, checked at 300 M when weakening.
Led field to approaching 200 M. Kept on but unable to fight back.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear and was difficult to settle. No significant improvement. (Bled.)
Midfield or better. Kept on well early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Always well there. Made sustained effort in straight to take command 200 M out. Held on well to the line.
Towards rear. Inconvenienced 800 M. No progress.
Around midfield. Dropped back a bit when finding not much room final turn. Ran on when in clear. Hung in close home.
Jumped awkwardly from widest draw, last to straight. Made up good ground from outside, never nearer.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Always in rear. Kept on past beaten runners in straight.
Wide and prominent to straight. Fading when hampered early in straight.
Began slowly. Remained in rear. Produced good late impression closing stages.
In similar position throughout. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Held up in Midfield. Wide throughout. Dropped to rear into straight.
In similar position throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Towards rear early. Took closer order home bend. Wide into straight. Made moderate progress early on.
Settled behind midfield. Last into straight. Finished well to miss narrowly.
Prominent to 300 M then gradually weakened.
Always well there. Quickened to hold every chance in straight but unable to draw level throughout closing stages.
Settled in midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Made all. Fought on under pressure to defy challengers close home.
Prominent to straight, then dropped out of contention.
Settled in midfield. Made only steady ground when placed under pressure.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Clear running from home bend and did not respond.
In forward position early then crowded and clipped heels at 800 M and lost position. Went backwards on straightening.
Allowed to settle in early stages to be rearward. Sustained long run around the field from 600 M but couldn't catch leader.
Slow into stride to settle worse than midfield. Never quickened in the straight.
In forward position on the rail. Received crowding near 800 M. One-paced when placed under pressure.
Jumped best to lead from inside gate. Held lead until 200 M.
With leaders until eased to sit with cover behind leader at 1000 M. Held up in straight until 200 M.
Ridden hard in early stages from wide barrier to settle outside the lead. Unable to hold off challengers in straight.
Slow into stride to be at rear of the field. Made good ground from well back in the straight.
Began well but restrained early to be forward of midfield. Out wide on home bend and never quickened.
Began well and went forward from wide gate to be three wide at first bend. Raced there until driven to lead at 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Never made up any ground in the straight.
Bounded at the start and lost ground to be rearward. Improved to be handy but 4 wide. Always wide and weakened from the turn.
Rear. Placed under pressure at 400 M and made strong run through field to just miss placing. Doing best work in concluding stages.
Midfield throughout. Did not quicken final 400 M and failed to make ground final 400 M.
In front of midfield. When asked for effort at 400 M, kept on one-paced.
Prominent. Kept on fairly to remain prominent until giving ground final 100 M.
Midfield. Kept on until finding no extra final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped to rear at 400 M. No improvement afterwards.
Behind midfield. Ridden patiently in early stages. Shifted towards outside of field at 500 M. Made gradual improvement final 400 M but was unable to quicken sufficiently when asked for effort.
Midfield after being slow to begin. Kept on one-paced until giving ground in concluding stages.
Near rear. Moved closer after 600 M. Raced towards stand side and kept on one-paced final 400 M.
Near rear. Into clear at 400 M and responded strongly when asked for effort. Continued to make ground in run to post.
Behind lead. Asked to improve after 400 M and kept on strongly without making any headway on winner.
Behind midfield. Placed under heavy pressure after 400 M but failed to show any response.
Midfield. Gave ground gradually from 400 M.
Led throughout. Kept on strongly final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. At back. Responded well 300 M out and took charge final 100 M. Held on. (See Racing Incidents.)

Midfield early before settling towards rear from 1000 M. Steadied 900 M and hung out onto heels 700 M. Ran on steadily upon straightening until held up 200 M but recovered well to be nearest at finish final 100 M.
Niggled along but soon towards rear. Steadied at 600 M. Progressed along rail to behind midfield rounding home bend. Ran on steadily final 300 M without threatening placed horses.
Ridden forward and led briefly before tracking the leader. Took lead upon straightening. Headed 100 M and dropped quickly out of contention.
In touch to 200 M before dropping rapidly out of contention.
Never far off. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Jumped well but soon dropped towards rear. Ran on well final 300 M and held narrow advantage before being outsprinted by the winner 100 M out.
In touch early before settling forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight until effort not sustained close home.
Soon midfield or worse. Caught wide early and middle stages. Kept on in straight until weakened badly final 100 M.
Soon midfield or better. Hung out and checked near 800 M. Awkward on heels early straight. Ran on well final 200 M without threatening the first pair.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Made up good ground on the outside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield or worse. Made up steady ground in straight despite having to steady twice around the 200 M when denied clear running.
Soon led. Headed upon straightening. Weakened badly from the 200 M.
Jumped well before settling in midfield or better. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Settled midfield. Progress home bend. Kept on well in straight.
Raced keenly without cover until 1000 M. Led from 400 M and kept on quite well to the line.
Led field to 400 M where beginning to tire. Dropped out gradually.
Worse than midfield to straight. Failed to make any impression after straightening.
Better than midfield until straightening. Found nothing when asked and dropped out of contention final 200 M.
Steadily dropped to worse than midfield from wide draw. Cruised to forward of midfield round home bend. Sprinted clear when asked 250 M out to win easily.
Settled in handy position. Weakened steadily from 400 M.
Settled worse than midfield. Did not quicken in straight.
Midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled in midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Towards rear. Last turning home. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Soon at back. Made up some ground from 300 M.
Waited with near rear. Commenced move upon straightening and responded well to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Ran on well from 250 M though not able to threaten the first pair.
Began very awkwardly and raced ungenerously early near rear.
Settled in midfield. Made move at 250 M to hit the front 100 M out. Kept on gamely to the line, always holding the challenge.
Well back. Crept a bit closer rounding home bend. Made further progress gradually from 250 M until one-paced closing stages.
In touch to 400 M. Dropped out from 300 M.
Ridden to lead from 1600 M. Every chance 200 M out. Swamped inside final 100 M.
Towards rear. Made moderate headway late.
Soon last. Made up some ground final 200 M, having to change course to avoid a weakening runner near the 100 M.
Handy to 300 M, dropped out.
Worked forward from widest draw, gradually shifting across to sit outside at 1600 m. Gave ground from 200 M.
Midfield. Made gradual ground from 350 M. One-paced closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Shaken up after straightening and ran on steadily final 300 M. Just failed to peg back the winner and was brushed by it right on the line.
Settled in rear. Made steady ground from 300 M. Same pace close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well away, over-racing early. Steadily dropped towards rear at 1500 M. Failed to quicken in straight.
Took up running from 1200 M but was beaten approaching 200 M.
Always there, having every chance under pressure closing stages.
Never far off to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Towards rear till effort on outside rounding home bend. Kept on well to challenge inside final 250 M.
Midfield to home bend. Improved on straightening but did not sustain effort closing stages.
Among rear group into straight. Stayed on till finding only one-paced close home.
Among rear group to home turn. Quickened early straight to lead 200 M. Kept on till finding winner too strong near finish.
Never better than mid-division.
Pulled hard to home bend and was close up turning into straight. Ranged up with leaders 250 M, keeping on well under pressure.
Worse than midfield of closely bunched field into straight. Did not get a clear passage until passing 200 M where he ran on quite well to lead final strides.
Towards rear before making up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear and was last entering straight. Made up good ground from the 250 M, doing best work at the finish.
Well there before giving ground passing 200 M.
Midfield to straight where he kept on to the 200 M. No extra close home.
Maintained 3rd throughout. Held on.
Prominent. Joined lead from 600 M. Faded upon straightening.
Held 4th soon after start. Progressed to 2nd early straight. Kept on well but without threatening the winner.
Towards rear until making up some ground inside 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Soon last. Never a factor.
Tardy start, towards rear. Shifted to the rail and made up some ground turning in. Kept on in straight.
Settled at rear from widest draw. Ran on well final 150 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. No improvement in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on.
Jumped well, soon behind midfield. Made up a little late ground 100 M out.
Midfield. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Soon led. Was joined 600 M. Sustained effort final turn to win comfortably.
Midfield. Weakened in straight.
Mainly behind midfield to straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Settled at the back. Made modest progress in straight.
Prominent early. Mainly in midfield far side. Faded in straight.
Always last few.
Soon in last few. Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well and restrained to hold narrow advantage. Quickened upon straightening but quickly caught by winner passing 200 M, then dropped out.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced wide just better than midfield till weakened home bend.
Soon ridden to dispute lead. Gained upper hand inside 200 M then never threatened.
Checked to rear early. Remained to last few before taking closer order home bend. Sustained good progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight and weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Went wide into straight. One-paced.
Prominent. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Midfield. Made ground steadily in straight to snatch 3rd near finish.
In touch. Dropped to midfield turning in. Inconvenienced at 200 M, never recovered.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Was 4th turning into straight. Ran on well to take control inside 150 M. Held on well.
Led field to inside 150 M. Just failed to hold a minor placing.
Midfield or slightly better. Unable to quicken in straight.
Settled at rear from widest draw. Ran on under pressure inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on from outside final 200 M to claim 2nd close home.
Towards rear. Moderate progress final turn to be midfield turning in. One-paced in straight.
Prominent. Found no extra closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Remained in similar position throughout.
Chased leader to 200 M. Weakened.
Never far off to straight and faded.
Midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Always well behind.
Midfield. Ran on for distant 4th in straight.
Towards rear and wide. Some late impression.
Jumped outward. Well back. Took closer order home bend. Kept on.
Nearly made all.
Settled in striking distance. Ran on steadily to just get up on line.
Towards rear. Wide home turn. Kept on in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Settled behind midfield. Never a danger.
Behind leader to straight then weakened.
In forward position but wide at stable bend. Every chance from home bend to be nearest at the finish.
In leading division at stable bend. Placed under pressure from 500 M but one-paced thereafter.
Slow into stride out wide. Always at the rear thereafter.
Worked across from alley to lead at stable bend. Always there until straightening. Weakened shortly after.
Slow to begin. Worked forward out wide after 1000 M. Improved widest and dashed clear at 200 M but run down final 50 M.
Went forward from wide barrier to settle outside the leader. Checked at 200 M and shifted out to make steady ground.
Began well to be midfield at stable bend. Stayed there till home bend. Sustained fast finishing effort wide out.
Settled on the rail just behind leader. Every chance from home bend but one-paced.
Checked severely at winning post first time to be midfield. Held up slightly at about 200 M and then one-paced thereafter.
Worked across from widest barrier to be 3-wide equal lead. Weakened badly from the home bend.
Very wide into first bend in forward position. Always there until straightening but soon overtaken thereafter.
Checked at the start and then rearward. Improved along fence but held up near 200 M. Made little ground thereafter.
Behind midfield on settling. Made long run out wide from 600 M to miss placegetters.
In forward position just behind leader at stable bend. Eased out to make run on straightening but one-paced.
Rear. Remained same into home straight then taken to outside and responded strongly to be nearest at finish.
Little slow to begin then ridden forward when wide on the track to reach lead at 1100 M. Held same until after 200 M and then kept on fairly.
Around midfield and wide. Went forward passing 600 M and was 3-wide outside the lead turning in. Kept on until giving ground final 200 M.
Near rear. Remained same until after straightening. When placed under pressure made strong ground to be nearest at finish. Bumped another runner at 200 M.
Behind midfield and wide. Went forward from 600 M but remained wide. Was prominent turning in. Kept on fairly in straight after having tough run.
Near rear. Chased forward at 600 M and was around midfield turning in. Continued to respond after straightening and held good chance at 200 M. Reached lead but unable to hold off quinella pair.

Behind midfield. Shuffled back to be near rear turning in. Remained on inner and made strong ground after straightening. Was crowded at 200 M. Continued to make ground in the run to the post. Just failed.
In front of midfield. Remained same into home straight then didn't get clear run and wasn't properly tested.
Behind lead. Went up to join lead after 400 M. Kept on in the straight but unable to hold off placegetters.
Went forward from wide draw to lead early and was steadied to follow leader at 1000 M. Remained prominent until giving ground final 200 M.
In front of midfield. One-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Midfield. One-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Midfield. Waited with until after straightening then made strong run through near inner to reach lead in concluding stages.
Behind midfield. Dropped to near rear turning in. Failed to make ground when placed under pressure after straightening.
Jumped awkwardly, niggled along early but failed to muster speed. At rear throughout, tailed off from 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Did not quicken in home straight.
Behind midfield or worse. Wide in back straight. Ran on a bit final 100 M.
Settled better than midfield, made first turn awkwardly. Steadied and shifted out for running after straightening. Ran on well final 200 M but failed to peg back the winner.
Prominent, sat outside leader from 1100 M. Led from 250 M, kept on well to the line despite hanging in.
Always well there, kept on.
Worse than midfield throughout, never in contention.
Slowly away, at the back throughout, wide along back straight and around home bend. Never a factor.
Not far off to 200 M, gradually weakened.
Hard ridden to lead from 1100 M. Headed at 250 M, kept on until beginning to tire final 100 M.
Settled at rear to 250 M. Made up good ground final 150 M despite racing greenly and shifting ground.
Niggled along early to be midfield. Kept on quite well in straight until no extra close home.
Led or joined lead before going clear inside 200 M. Held on well to the line.
Around midfield throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Tailed off half-way.
Midfield. Stayed on final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on well 400 M but unable to reach the winner.
Joint lead to 200 M out. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Jumped very awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up considerable ground 250 M.
Soon in touch. Kept on strongly for a 3rd closing stages.
Towards rear soon after start.
Prominent. Unable to quicken 250 M.
Sluggish at start. Soon recovered to behind midfield. Finished well late to narrowly miss placing.
Just better than midfield to straight. Kept on same pace.
Prominent briefly but gradually dropped to rear.
Always last few.
Began well. Waited with. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all. No extra closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to snatch victory closing stages.
Better than midfield. Behind leaders into straight. Ran on to hit front briefly closing stages but found winner too good.
Made no show.
Tracked leader. Disputed lead home turn but found no response in straight.
Prominent to straight and weakened.
Ridden to muster early speed. Prominent till faded in straight. (Bled.)
Midfield when checked and lost position approaching home bend. Never recovered.
Mostly in midfield. No clear passage at crucial stages.
Towards rear. Checked around 1400 M. No progress.
In touch. Dropped back a bit far side. No improvement while hanging out home turn and in straight.
Missed the start badly, remained at rear. Moved up from 600 M to be midfield early straight. Ran on well along rail 250 M.
Behind midfield to straight. Ran on a bit 200 M out.
In touch early from widest draw. Dropped back to midfield 1200 M out. Made no impression from rounding home bend.
Rear. Crept closer order turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M, never nearer. (Lame.)
Better than midfield. Weakened 250 M out.
Always prominent. Kept on well in straight but unable to catch the winner.
Around midfield. Given reminders final turn. Made ground steadily from 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or better. Unable to quicken in straight.
Rear. Given reminder the first turn, improving from outside to be in touch home bend. Faded when turning into straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led field from 1400 M and never headed. Held on well to the line.
Midfield before progressing to 2nd or 3rd 1200 M. Remained prominent until failing to hold place 200 M.
Midfield. Came under pressure home bend. Kept on one pace.
Midfield. Improved to hold some chance on rails early in straight.
Midfield. Took closer order home bend. Weakened straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent till weakened home bend.
Led till headed into straight. Fading when hampered over 200 M out.
Travelled in last few. Made up ground down centre of straight.
Rear early. Made steady headway around field far side and home bend to join leaders into straight. Soon asserted authority and hung on well.
Settled in last few. Shifted out for a clear run early in straight. Ran on well.
Tracked leader. Hit front approaching home turn. Soon headed into straight and weakened.
Behind leaders. Badly hampered over 200 M out. Stayed on.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well down straight but without troubling winner.
Slow into stride. Towards rear. Commenced move home turn. Obtained clear passage over 300 M out. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Began very awkwardly losing ground. Remained in rear. Commenced run home turn. Ran on steadily in straight.
Began well to be in handy position. Always there until gaining split at 300 M to score impressive win.
Settled behind midfield. Began to lose ground quickly after 400 M.
Settled at the rear of the field. Always towards rear up the straight.
Trapped wide in midfield position at first bend. Carried very wide and then made no ground.
Began best to speed through to lead at first bend. Quickly headed on straightening.
Raced forward in handy position although wide. Pressured from home bend and then only one-paced.
Settled midfield although extremely wide at first bend. Always wide and then made no ground after home bend.
Began well to be on the rail just behind the leader. Held up slightly approaching 300 M. Battled on well thereafter.
Began well to settle just behind leader. Unable to match winner in the straight.
Began well but no early pace to be rearward. Eased out on straightening and made good ground out wide.
Settled at the rear of the field. Never made any ground after that.
Went forward from wide gate to be outside lead at first bend. Raced three wide until straightening then only one-paced.
Worked across to be three wide equal lead at first bend. Hit lead till 300 M then weakened quickly.
Settled in handy position with cover. Lost ground after 600 M and weakened badly.
Around midfield. Improved to prominent on straightening. Kept on fairly to hold position in straight without looking likely.
In front of midfield and 3 wide. Initially did not quicken when asked on straightening. Gradually quickened after 400 M and continued to make nice ground in the run to the post.
With rear. Gradually moved closer from 500 M to be around midfield on straightening. Responded well to continue making gradual ground in the run to the line.
Behind midfield. Remained near rear around home turn and then made good ground through field. Doing best work late.
Near rear after being checked at 1400 M. Remained wide in that position until straightening. Taken to outside at 400 M but only one paced. No more final 200 M.
Outside leader. Went to clear lead at 300 M then kept on strongly to score narrow win.
Midfield. Held same until giving ground final 300 M.
Followed leaders. Remained same into straight but when asked to improve was inclined to lay in and kept on only one paced.
Led until giving ground final 300 M.
Behind midfield. Failed to respond when asked for effort at 400 M.
Rear. Unable to obtain run early in straight after being waited with. When obtained run near 300 M responded by making strong run through field to just fail.
Midfield. Moved closer on straightening. Held strong chance at 200 M when moved up to challenge for lead. Run levelled out last bit.
Behind leaders. Remained same until straightening and then gave ground quickly.
Behind midfield and 4 wide from difficult gate. Remained racing wide without cover throughout. Kept on fairly early in straight but effects of hard run set in at 200 M.
Prominent. Steadied at 800 M when crowded by another runner. Unable to quicken from 150 M.
Behind midfield or worse. Never nearer.
Settled midfield. Kept on well final 200 M. Found quinella pair too strong.
Jumped awkwardly. Worse than midfield and kept wide rounding home bend. Made good ground at the final stage.
Towards rear and wide throughout. Made ground well on outer after home turn. Nearest at finish.
Better than midfield and wide from outside gate. Weakened from 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon led. Headed 250 M. Soon weakened.
Tracked leader. Hit front near 300 M. Held clear until close home.
Worse than midfield. Caught wide in back straight and rounding home bend. Found no more.
Mainly midfield. Weakened from 400 M.
Behind midfield. Wide along back straight. Made little ground towards finish.
Midfield. Tended to pull and accidentally clipped the heels of another runner after 800 M. Made ground after straightening until no extra inside 150 M.
At rear after missing the start badly. Closer to contention on home bend. Ran on strongly from 300 M and just picked up the runner-up close home. Hung in approaching winning post.
Led or disputed lead. Accelerated well final 250 M for a commanding victory despite hanging in.
Slowly away. At rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away and then got hampered but soon recovered to be in touch. Disputed lead 350 M out but was unable to match speed with the winner final 250 M.
Midfield or worse. Dropped towards rear from course proper. Not a threat thereafter.
At back and given reminders early. Midfield from course proper. One-paced final 200 M.
At rear. Never a threat.
Crowded at start. Towards rear. Ran on steadily final 400 M without threatening.
Soon in touch. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Always thereabout to 300 M. Weakened final 200 M.
Well there to 300 M. Unbalanced 200 M and not ridden out to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Disputed lead to 350 M. Kept on without threatening the first pair.
Midfield or better. Weakened steadily final 200 M. (Swollen lower off front leg.)
Soon towards rear. Made up a little late ground.
Mainly midfield or worse. Ran on steadily final 400 M until effort not sustained close home.
Began only fairly, worked forward to press leader from 900 M. Hit the front 200 M out, swamped by placegetters near home.
Ridden along but only managed to remain in mid-division throughout. Did not quicken in straight.
In touch. Inconvenienced on the home bend by a runner which hung out badly. Began to drop out before straightening.
Behind midfield, niggling along early. Moved closer rounding home bend. Made sustained run from 300 M to claim victory close home.
Mostly midfield, made only slight improvement in the straight.
Pushed along to take up running at 900 M. Joined rounding home turn. Steadily weakened final 150 M.
Prominent early, soon began to hang out and dropped to midfield. Ran on a bit in home straight, proving very difficult to ride out and was not properly tested.
Behind midfield or worse, trapped very wide until halfway. Never in contention.
Led briefly, then remained handy. Obliged to race wide on home turn and dropped back when inconvenienced by a runner which hung out badly. Not a factor in the straight.
Dropped steadily from difficult barrier to rear. Asked for effort from 450 M and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish, racing tight in the run to the line.
Knuckled on jumping, outpaced in rear. Ran on strongly from 300 M to just miss narrowly.
Midfield early, then dropped towards rear. Was checked when disappointed for running early in straight. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Not far off, commenced to hang out approaching 700 M. Hung out badly and covered a lot of ground on home bend, dropped out of contention after straightening.
Never troubled leaders despite staying on a bit in straight.
Always there. Quickened to lead 250 M out. Kept on till headed final strides.
Midfield most of way.
Never a factor.
Never on terms.
4th into straight where he kept on till finding no extra inside 200 M.

Soon improved towards leaders and was midfield entering straight. Was improving nicely along rails when severely checked approaching 250 M. Renewed effort and ran on well towards finish for an unlucky 3rd.
Rear early. Improved to be 4th 800 M but could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Made no show.
Ran well to 250 M where he dropped out steadily.
Soon led and made running to the 250 M. Faded quickly once headed.
5th or 6th into home bend. Ran on in straight to reach 3rd passing 200 M. No extra.
Towards rear before running on quite well from the 300 M. Never nearer.
Soon settled in rear and was worse than midfield into straight. Given reminders 300 M and ran on strongly to snatch victory near finish.
Settled behind midfield. Gradual progress rounding home bend. Ran on to tackle winner inside 200 M, just failed.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield final turn. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Midfield or better. Sustained effort in straight to take lead 200 M. Just held off runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Towards rear. Moved up steadily to be midfield halfway. Weakened soon after straightening.
Made no show.
Led field to around 1400 M. Remained prominent before re-gaining advantage 650 M. Kept on same pace when headed 200 M.
Towards rear. Made some progress home bend and early straight. However run ended 100 M out.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily home bend. Stayed on final 250 M.
Pulled to the front group, settling better than midfield. Made progress home bend to be 2nd turning in. Unable to quicken final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear early, moved up to be in touch far side. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Slowly away, in the rear group. Made up good ground from outside final 300 M.
Never a factor.
Prominent. Took lead passing 1400 M to 650 M. Weakened in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led or disputed lead early. Showed a great turn of foot inside 300 M and dashed clear.
Always well behind.
Never better than midfield.
Held up behind midfield early stages. Ran on inside final 300 M to reach 3rd closing stages.
Always in last few.
Well there to 400 M then weakened.
Midfield early. Gradually faded closing stages.
Midfield most of way. Kept on well for 5th.
Soon in rear.
Prominent to 200 M then weakened.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing closing stages.
Shared pace until course proper. Kept on though lost 2nd position closing stages.
Always prominent. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Tardy start, towards rear. Made progress to midfield home bend. Weakened closing stages.
Better than midfield. Kept on quite well in straight.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Dropped out in straight.
Soon led and never headed.
Prominent. Advanced to 2nd soon after turning in. Always held by the winner.
Prominent until weakening out of contention final 300 M.
Better than midfield. Made progress home bend to be 2nd or 3rd turning in. Kept on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Unbalanced when crowded approaching 200 M. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Difficult to settle early in prominent position. Soon raced just better than midfield. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Made no show on straightening.
Soon last. Was held up early straight when improving. Made up some ground when in clear.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on from outside final 250 M.
Began well and attempted to make all. Overhauled by winner closing stages.
Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Settled in rearward position and wide. Made steady headway in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Last when wide into straight. Finished well to grab 4th close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Began very awkwardly. Settled at the back. Kept on steadily in straight.
Prominent to 400 M then dropped out.
Held up mostly 3-wide in prominent position. Quickened upon straightening but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Towards rear. Kept on same pace in straight.
Just better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Around midfield, racing freely early. Found nothing in straight.
Never far off. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Gained upper hand closing stages.
Midfield to straight then dropped away quickly. (Heart irregularity.)
Niggled along early from inside gate to lead. Led up the straight but grabbed inside last 100 M.
Allowed to settle midfield with cover. Gained running on straightening, but never threatened.
Niggled along early to be midfield. Never quickened from home bend.
Allowed time to settle behind midfield. Last at home bend. Made up good ground out wide when placed under pressure.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Made long run around field from 800 M to be widest home bend.
Restrained from wide gate to be behind midfield. Made good ground along inside but never threatened winner.
Ridden forward early to settle outside leader. Soon passed after straightening.
Went forward to be racing just behind leaders. Weakened on straightening.
Went forward from wide gate to be handy but caught wide. Lost ground on straightening to weaken badly.
Allowed to settle in midfield from inside gate. Improved up on inside and sprinted when in clear to score good win.
Settled midfield and then lost position at 1000 M. Always behind midfield thereafter.
Began well to settle in forward position with cover. Always there and never threatened in the straight.
Restrained at the start to be at the rear. Very wide on home bend. Made only moderate ground in the straight.
Began well to be in handy position but wide. Without cover thereafter. Bit one-paced in straight.
Around midfield after being slow to begin. No response upon straightening and then dropped out.
Led. Held same until near 200 M. One-paced in straight.
Followed leader. Ground away in straight to hold down position without ever challenging placegetters.
Around midfield throughout. Made only slight improvement when asked for effort in the straight.
Slow to begin and at rear. Remained same into home straight. Made strong ground final 300 M.
Behind midfield. No response when asked for effort after straightening. One-paced.
Midfield and wide. Moved closer on home bend then responded well early in straight to look major chance approaching 200 M. Unable to match finishing effort of winner.
Near rear after being slow to begin. Remained same into home straight and then only passed tiring horses.
Around midfield. No response when asked for effort on straightening.
Behind midfield. Into clear on straightening and sprinted quickly to take lead after 200 M and go on to score comfortably.
Behind midfield. Free early. Near rear and wide turning in. Made strong ground down outside final 300 M but quinella pair had to bigger break.
In front of midfield. Moved up from 600 M to be 4 wide outside lead turning in. Kept on strongly in straight to reach clear lead near 200 M. Unable to hold off fast finishers.
Behind lead. Moved up from 600 M to be 3 wide outside lead turning in. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Outside leader. Asked for effort on straightening but no response and gave ground shortly afterwards.
Began awkwardly. Towards rear. Failed to make any impression in straight and had to be steadied when crowded 200 M out.
Led from 1600 M. Kept on well in straight to win comfortably.
Forward of midfield. Trapped wide along back straight and middle stages. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Led briefly before settling in 2nd place. 3rd turning in. Kept on in straight until weakened 150 M out.
Mainly forward of midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away but soon recovered to be in midfield or worse. Trapped wide early and middle stages. Clipped heels 400 M and then got held up for some distance. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield or behind. Unbalanced when awkwardly placed at 700 M. Dropped out of contention final 200 M.
In touch to 1100 M before settling forward of midfield. Kept on until weakened final 200 M.
Midfield or worse. Bumped at 700 M and dropped towards rear turning in. Ran on a little until weakened final 200 M.
Soon dropped to the rear from widest draw. Progressed from 800 M but was trapped widest turning in. Ran on until effort not sustained final 100 M.
At rear. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Behind midfield or just worse. Ran on final 400 M without threatening the first pair.
Behind midfield or worse. Lost running near 800 M and dropped to last turning in. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish without threatening the winner.
Soon in touch. 2nd turning in. Kept on well until no extra final 100 M.
Settled worse than midfield. Found no extra after steadied at about 300 M.
Close up early. Weakened badly final 200 M. Hung in badly throughout.
Ridden to be midfield early. Weakened steadily from 400 M.
Around midfield. Unable to quicken when asked for effort. Hung in throughout.
Handy early and then settled in midfield. Did not quicken in the final stages.
Shared lead until 350 M. Weakened steadily final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Niggled from halfway. Produced good late finish closing stages.
Midfield early. Handy 3rd passing 300 M. Kept on well to the line.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield early. Cruised to lead passing 300 M. Won readily.
Slowly away. Settled towards rear. Gradually improved to midfield before 400 M. Accelerated well when asked to go but found winner too strong.
Well back. Under pressure from 400 M and made up some ground at the final stages to be nearest at finish.
Never far off until 400 M when started to give ground.
Shared lead until 350 M and weakened badly final 200 M.
Midfield or worse throughout, caught wide most of the race. Failed to quicken.
Settled behind midfield. Made gradual ground final 300 M. No extra close home.
Well there to 500 M. Commenced to give ground on straightening.
Brief lead then sat behind tearaway leader. Kept on quite well until beginning to tire closing stages.
Within striking distance. Every chance 300 M out, faded from 200 M.
Forward of midfield. Ran on well from 300 M to look a chance near the 200 M. Run ended 100 M out, kept on same pace.
Better than midfield. Ran on quite well after straightening. Effort not sustained inside 200 M, steadily weakened.
Best away, outside leader before steadily shifting across towards rail to become tearaway leader from 800 M. Headed at 350 M, dropped out.
Settled around midfield. Responded well from 300 M to hit the front 200 M out, just pipped by the winner final stride.
Slowly away, niggled along early near rear. Made only moderate headway in home straight.
Jumped very awkwardly, tailed off throughout.
Slowly away, waited with at rear. Quickened well when put under pressure final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Dropped to rear. Switched wide after straightening and showed nice turn of foot final 300 M to snatch race on the line.
Settled in midfield. Attempted to improve near 300 M but was never able to obtain clear running throughout the straight.
Among rear group to straight where he ran on well to lead inside 100 M and look winner. Just caught short of line.
Midfield most of way.
Towards rear till improving along rails early in straight. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
