Mostly 4th to straight where he ran on resolutely closing stages to lead final strides.
Rear early and was midfield home turn. One-paced when checked 200 M.
Soon led and made running before finding the first 2 too strong close home.
Well there before giving ground approaching home turn.
Midfield when checked approaching home bend, losing ground. Renewed effort and ran on quite well inside 250 M.
Midfield into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Was 6th before making headway from 800 M, reaching 3rd into straight. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Prominent and held every chance 250 M. Soon weakened out of contention.
Made no show.
Always at the back.
Never better than midfield.
Rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Led field to 200 M. No extra.
Trailed the field throughout.
Held 2nd to final turn. Weakened.
Mostly 4th. Commenced to give ground when widest turning in. (Bled.)
Soon in touch, was 3rd stable bend. Effort final turn to take lead 200 M. Held on well.
Towards rear and wide early. Made progress to just behind midfield far side. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Made progress turning for home. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield or behind. Moderate progress rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on well in straight.
Hard driven in midfield. Hampered and lost position leaving Rock. Recovered good late ground inside final 200 M.
Around midfield to straight then faded.
Led or disputed lead on rails attempting to make all. Kicked 1L clear inside 200 M by unable to sustain effort near finish.
Disputed lead to straight then weakened. Beaten when hampered inside 200 M.
Travelled just better than midfield. Hampered and lost position at about 600 M. Not much room home bend. Shaken up upon straightening. Improving when met interference passing 200 M.
Wide and never better than midfield throughout.
Soon in rear. Kept on same pace in straight.
Lacked early pace. Remained well behind until producing good late effort closing stages.
Broke well. With leaders but kept wide. Settled for 3rd approaching home bend. Fought on doggedly inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Quickened well inside final 200 M to claim victory by the narrowest of margins while shifting ground.
Missed the start slightly. Settled in midfield. Saved ground on inside turning for home. Ran on final 200 M.
Wide in last few throughout.
Prominent. Unable to hold place in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Mainly 8th before running on from outside 200 M out to be 2nd close home.
Always thereabouts. Was disputing for lead in straight; however effort not sustained.
Midfield. Made progress 400 M to dispute for lead in straight. Unable to withhold challenges and lost the 3rd place close home.
Towards rear. Made progress 500 M. Ran on from 5th early straight to take lead closing stages.
Held 5th to 600 M. Dropped out.
Slightly slowly away, never a factor.
Held 2nd to straight. Kept on but unable quicken to challenge.
Around midfield throughout.
Led field until joined early straight. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Showed early speed. Narrowly headed at Rock. Regained advantage upon straightening but soon found no extra.
Settled behind midfield. Made up some good ground closing stages.
Trailed field most of way. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. Ran on in straight to hit front at about 200 M but caught in the shadows of the post.
Always last few.
Ridden for early pace. Quickly improved to take lead going up Rock. Folded up quickly upon straightening.
Travelled kindly within striking distance. Moved up swiftly home turn to hold every chance. Drifted about inside 200 M and yielded ground.
With leaders early. Settled in prominent 3rd to straight. Switched for clear run in vain upon straightening. Commencing to improve when inconvenienced inside 200 M.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. Quickened to hold some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Travelled towards rear. Improved on inside of straight to assert authority final strides.
Began well and went through to settle behind leader on rail. Never quickened when asked for effort.
Travelled towards rear until checked severely at 600 M. Never recovered after that.
Began well and went forward to sit outside lead. Every chance in the straight but could not hold off challengers.
Travelled keenly to be just behind leaders. Eased out on straightening to just fail.
Restrained from wide gate to be at rear. Improved from 600 M widest and finished very quickly out wide for good win.
Travelled midfield. Made some ground in the straight when asked for effort.
Began well from inside gate to lead early. Stopped shortly after straightening and weakened badly.
Ridden along early but behind midfield. Always there.
Ridden along from wide to be 3-wide equal lead. Hit lead but not able to sustain challengers.
Behind midfield 3-wide. Given every chance in the straight but one-paced.
Good early speed from wide gate to handy but 3-wide. Improved through field to make steady ground. One-paced in the straight.
Travelled rearward until severely checked at 600 M. Always tailed off thereafter.
Went forward from wide gate to lead early and then steadied to follow pace. Into clear on straightening but unable to go on with it.
Went forward from wide draw to lead. Rated nicely and held lead until 200 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off quinella pair.
Free early and would not settle so went forward to sit off leader passing winning post first time. Gave ground quickly from 500 M.
Prominent. Failed to quicken at 500 M and was midfield turning in. No response afterwards.
Near rear. Started to go around field from 600 M. Widest on the home bend in midfield. Responded strongly to take lead at 200 M and just failed to hold off winner.
At rear. Still behind midfield turning in. Responded fairly in straight and made gradual ground in run to line to be closest at finish.
Near rear. Went forward when wide after 900 M to be 4-wide in front of midfield at 600 M. Into clear on straightening and responded well to continually make ground in the run to the line.
Midfield. Edged a little closer turning out of home straight 1st time. Under pressure at 500 M and was midfield turning in. Once balanced after straightening responded well to just arrive in time.
With rear. Moved closer from 600 M to be midfield turning in. Responded fairly in straight and continued to make ground in run to post.
Midfield and 3-wide. Improved gradually after 900 M to 3-wide behind lead at 600 M. Remained prominent into home straight but gave ground shortly afterwards.
Midfield throughout. Kept on mainly one-paced in straight.
Near rear. No response when asked for effort after 600 M.
Always well there. Ran on to challenge leader from 200 M. Just prevailed after ding-dong battle.
Towards rear. Hit rail at 600 M. Made up a little ground in straight.
At rear. Wide in back straight and around home bend. Progress from 500 M. Nearest at finish.
Slowly away, lost a lot of ground, trailed field to 200 M. Only ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Well there, made the latter part of home turn awkwardly. Steadily weakened from 200 M.
Well back. Under pressure from 600 M. Ran on steadily in straight. (Made abnormal breathing noise pulling up.)
Pushed forward from widest draw to shift across to rail and dictate pace. Challenged by leader final 200 M, kept on well to just fail by the smallest margin.
Better than midfield. Ran on to hold some chance inside final 200 M until effort not sustained close home. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
In touch, caught wide on first turn. Dropped steadily to midfield from Rock. Kept on one-pace thereafter.
Prominent, proved very difficult to settle when wide without cover early and middle stages. Dropped out from 250 M.
Settled towards rear. Crept closer on home bend to be midfield into straight. Ran on well from 250 M until no extra closing stages.
Settled just behind midfield. Steadied and dropped out of contention from 600 M.
Slowly away, mostly 8th to straight. Made ground from outside to grab a remote 3rd close home.
Led field until headed passing 300 M. Kept on without quickening.
Soon 2nd. Disputed lead final turn, taking over 250 M out. Kept on final 200 M while shifting out to cause interference. (Finished 1st, placed 2nd.)
Held 3rd to straight. Ran on well while being carried out final 200 M. Objection sustained. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st.)
Towards rear early. Recovered some ground to be 4th rounding home bend. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Never a factor. (Hung out.)
Midfield. Improved to 4th early straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Made some progress rounding home bend. One-paced final 200 M.
Tardy start, towards rear throughout.
Around midfield. Kept on final 200 M.
Soon led. Headed over 200 M out. No extra.
Held up behind midfield. Ran on well in straight without troubling winner.
Took no part.
Midfield to straight then dropped out. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Never seen with a chance.
Soon in rear.
Wide throughout. Towards rear early. Improved to midfield approaching home bend. Faded upon straightening.
In last few to straight. Ran past beaten runners.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge upon straightening. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield. No clear passage early in straight. Made moderate progress inside final 200 M.
Settled within striking distance. Cantered to lead over 200 M out for a commanding victory.
Prominent. Came under pressure approaching home turn. Soon faded.
Held up in rear. Wide into straight. Ran past beaten runners.
Close up to straight then dropped out.
Soon prominent. Came to tackle leader early straight, gaining brief lead 200 M. Kept on closing stages.
Jumped well from widest draw. Soon in midfield or behind. Ran on solidly inside 300 M, just failed to catch the winner.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield 900 M. Weakened 250 M.
Better than midfield. Moved up 1000 M out to take lead near 700 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Held 4th to early straight. Weakened.
Led field to 700 M. Remained 2nd to early straight, then faded. (Saddle shifted early straight.)
Rear. Made ground from outside 300 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Gradual progress far side to be midfield turning in. Sustained effort to take lead passing 200 M. Held on.
Tardy start, near rear to 300 M. Made ground steadily to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield throughout.
Soon prominent. Made no show in straight.
Midfield early. Dropped back steadily to the rear group home bend. No improvement.
Near rear. Made progress from outside home bend to be midfield early straight. Ran on steadily but just failed to obtain a minor placing. (Dropped whip 50 M.)
Jumped awkwardly, remained midfield. Kept on steadily 250 M.
Midfield to 400 M then dropped out.
Wide in last few to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well back. Made up late ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Placed awkwardly behind runners home turn. Never nearer.
Distant 4th to home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
Never better than midfield. Placed awkwardly behind runner early in straight. Kept on closing stages.
Settled well back. Ran on in straight without threatening.
Settled better than midfield. Quickened well down straight to take charge near finish.
Led, going 2Ls clear over 200 M out. No response to winner's strong late challenge closing stages.
Soon in prominent position. Dropped out upon straightening.
Broke well then held up in 3rd. Found nothing in straight.
Mostly in midfield to straight. No extra.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Began best to be outside the leader on settling. Took lead on straightening to win well.
Slow to begin. Always at rear.
Midfield on settling. Under pressure from 600 M and one-paced.
Took time from wide gate to be forward but wide. Always there and onepaced in the straight.
Behind midfield on settling. Chased along from home bend but never ran on.
Slow to begin then wide at the rear. Always well back.
Began well to be right behind leaders. Given clear running and grinded away but never threatened winner.
Beaten for early speed to be in handy position. A bit one-paced in the straight.
Settled in forward position. Chased along on home bend but onepaced.
Began awkwardly and lost ground to be midfield on settling. Always wide thereafter. (Bled.)
Ridden along early stages but rearward. Made up very good ground out wide in the straight.
Began well to settle behind leader. Took time to quicken and made steady ground.
Ridden along but rearward of midfield. Remained there throughout.
Began well from inside gate to lead. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Behind midfield. Checked severely to avoid fallen runner at 600 M and checked again at 500 M. Was with rear turning in and remained on inner. Made a little ground but never looked likely.
Allowed to drop back to be behind midfield from start. Crept closer from 600 M and was prominent turning in. Kept on well under pressure but unable to match placegetters.

Improved to be forward midfield after being slow to begin. Was checked when crowded at 600 M and dropped to behind midfield. Hard ridden to follow leaders into straight. Kept on strongly and made ground.
In front of midfield and 4 wide. Lost ground when making turn at 600 M and was behind midfield turning in and then made only moderate progress.
Near rear after being caught wide on 1st turn from bad gate. Checked severely to avoid fallen runner at 600 M. Remained near rear until straightening and then made only moderate progress.
In front of midfield. Improved to be behind leaders at 600 M. Into clear on straightening and set sail after winner but despite keeping on strongly was unable to peg him back.
Prominent. Remained same into home straight then gave ground.
Ridden hard to go forward from wide draw but was caught wide in front of midfield. Hung out early and middle stages and home turn. Gave ground from 500 M.
Midfield throughout. One-paced when asked for response after straightening.
Sat off leader. Commenced to give ground at 700 M. Was checked at 600 M. Dropped out afterwards.
Allowed to drop to rear after being caught wide on first turn from outside gate. Checked to avoid fallen runner at 600 M. Made home bend wide and did not make any impression afterwards.
Travelled comfortably in midfield until breaking down and falling at 600 M.
Behind lead. Moved up to join lead on straightening and took clear advantage shortly afterwards. Kept on strongly.
Led until straightening then unable to raise extra effort when asked the question.
Tracked leader. Every chance 300 M out. Not quickened final 100 M. Hung out rounding home turn and in the straight.
Towards rear. Commenced move after straightening to make good ground. Just missed 3rd placing when shifted out abruptly near the line.
Handy. Failed to respond from 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Travelled at back. Responded well 250 M, unable to reach winner.
Midfield. Responded well in the straight to take lead 200 M out. Won comfortably.
Well there but proved difficult to settle in the early and middle stages. Made no show after 250 M.
Led until 250 M. Soon weakened.
Mostly forward of midfield. Hampered approaching 800 M. Ran on steadily final 200 M until steadied when crowded 100 M out.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Trapped widest turning in. Ran on strongly final 300 M but the line just came too soon.
Towards rear early before being ridden along to be in 2nd or 3rd place. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Always in touch. Was checked and shifted out approaching the 800 M. Ran on steadily in straight until not quickened close home.
Hard ridden early to keep in touch. Steady headway round home bend. Ran on well in straight and held narrow advantage 200 M out before being outsprinted for 4th.
Severely checked at start and clipped heels in the early stages. Never a factor at the rear.
Never far off. Kept on in straight until weakened steadily final 200 M.
Soon recovered from poor start to midfield. Ran on a bit without threatening in straight.
Midfield or better. Ran on determinedly in straight and gained upper hand 150 M out. Just held off challenge from 2nd horse on the line.
At back after checking severely at start. Took closer order rounding home bend to be in midfield turning in and then got held up for some distance. Made up a little late ground.
Ridden early to lead. Kept on upon straightening. Headed 200 M and found no extra inside 100 M.
Jumped well but soon outpaced to behind midfield despite being ridden along. Given reminder rounding home bend. Never a threat in straight.
Jumped awkwardly but soon in touch. 2nd from 800 M. Kept on in straight until weakened 100 M out.

Soon towards rear. Improved rounding home bend to behind midfield but had to be shifted out early straight. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish despite having to steady and shift in 100 M.
Held up in rear. Ran on well from 350 M to claim 3rd near finish.
Midfield or behind to straightening. Ran on well from 300 M until finding no extra and losing 3rd place concluding stages.
Worked forward to lead, then sat outside leader from 1150 M. Hit the front upon straightening. Headed 200 M out, gave ground final 100 M.
Prominent to 250 M. Steadily weakened.
Prominent, took up running passing 1200 M. Headed on straightening, faded from 200 M.
Knuckled on jumping, pushed forward from widest barrier but only managed to be midfield, trapping wide. Never near enough to figure in the straight.
Slowly away, remained near the back. Made no show in home straight.
Mostly behind midfield. Under pressure from 500 M but failed to respond.
Around midfield most stages. Steadily weakened 150 M out.
Always handy. Steadied near the 200 M, began to tire inside final 150 M.
Settled in midfield. Steadied and shifted out near 300 M before quickening well to challenge leader final 150 M. Doing best work at finish.
Niggled along to be just better than midfield, caught wide early stages. Asked for effort from 300 M to lead 200 M out. Kept on well to hold off challenger despite shifting out.
Jumped awkwardly and was crowded, dropping to the rear. Widest into straight. Unable to quicken.
Towards rear. Never on terms, eased down inside final 200 M. (Lame near side front leg.)
Towards rear before making up good ground under pressure in straight, having every chance.
Towards rear before making some progress in straight.
Made running to 250 M where he dropped out steadily.
About 7th 800 M and similar position into straight. Improved along rails but had to switch out for run 150 M. Ran on well towards finish.
Settled in 5th early. Headway into home bend and was upsides leaders swinging into straight. Hit front 150 M but unable to resist the first 3 close to finish.
Midfield to straight where he ran on a bit. Found no extra close home.
Was prominent before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Well there before failing to hold place inside 200 M.
In touch to straight where he made no show.
Worse than midfield to straight where he ran on gamely under pressure to lead near finish.
Last into straight where he made up considerable ground closing stages.
Never on terms despite staying on a bit close home.
Midfield. Faded soon after straightening.
Never able to feature.
Led field passing 1000 M to 450 M. Kept on 2nd without threatening the winner. (Hung in.)
In touch early. Dropped back steadily from 900 M.
Tardy start. At rear. Made up some ground 250 M out.
Rear. Ran on a bit in straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Led early stages. Raced 3rd until improving from first turn to re-gain advantage 450 M. Held on well to the line.
Better than midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Pushed forward to the prominent. Remote 3rd turning into straight. Weakened inside 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped out 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on moderately from 9th early straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on steadily in straight.
In touch. Unable to maintain position in straight.
Soon in last few.
Squeezed out jumping out. Never on terms.
Disputed lead. Saw it out at finish.
In similar position throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening.
With leaders to 300 M then gradually weakened.
Held up in midfield. Came to challenge inside final 200 M and reached 3rd late.
Held up better than midfield though never far off. Kept on well closing stages but lost placing late.
Always well behind.
Amongst leaders to 250 M then weakened. (Abnormal breathing noises. See Racing Incidents.)
Close up early. Gradually faded inside final 200 M.
Never nearer than midfield.
Began in rear. Produced late effort past beaten runners closing stages.
Always travelling well, gained narrow advantage over 200 M out. Caught in the shadows of the post.
Made no show.
Led field from widest draw. Hung in from home turn. Unable to quicken when headed 100 M out.
Never better than midfield.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order to 7th turning in. Moderate progress in straight.
Never in contention.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Held 2nd to 150 M. Found no extra.
Midfield. Ran on from 6th early straight to assert authority 100 M. Held on well to the line.
Started awkwardly, remained at rear. Ran past a few tiring horses 200 M out.
Settled towards rear from a wide draw. Ran on well from outside in straight to grab 2nd close home.
In touch, reached 3rd 1000 M out. Steadied for a run 250 M. One-paced thereafter.
Slowly away, towards rear. Kept on same pace in straight.
Remained 4th until failing to hold place 200 M out.
Always thereabout. Kept on but without threatening the winner.
Midfield early, soon towards rear. Raced ungenerously and unbalanced 800 M. No improvement.
Midfield early. Lost position home bend and last few into straight. Produced good late effort final 200 M.
Always last few.
Prominent to 400 M then dropped out.
Dropped out early. Made gradual headway on rails home bend. Made no show in straight.
Midfield briefly. Dropped out from approaching home turn.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Broke well and attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and caught passing 200 M.
Always prominent. Kept on without quickening under pressure.
Very sluggish at start. Never nearer.
Well back. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M doing best work at finish.
Close up far side. Midfield into straight. Finished well inside final 200 M to miss narrowly.
Broke well then travelled in first few. Gradually faded in straight.
Raced wide to hit front briefly passing 800 M. Close-up 2nd turning in re-gaining lead over 200 M out. Just held on.
Mainly in midfield. Made some late impression closing stages.
Settled midfield on the rail. Held up slightly on straightening and made steady ground.
Ridden hard early to be in leading division. Held up slightly on straightening, but then did not run on.
About midfield on the rail but overracing. Clear running in straight but unable to match winner.
Always well back.
About midfield till checked at 800 M. Eased out on home turn for good run out wide.
Sat outside leader early stages. Quickly overtaken on straightening.
Ridden very hard early to lead. Overtaken shortly after straightening and one-paced.
Raced midfield but trapped without cover. Placed under pressure on straightening but made no impression.
Little slow to begin then ridden hard to be behind leader. Eased out on straightening for impressive win.
Began well to be in forward position. Always there then one-paced when placed under pressure.
Began well to be in handy position. Made no impression in the straight.
Settled at the rear. Made some ground to 200 M then one-paced.
Restrained early from wide gate to be handy but wide. Began to weaken after the 600 M.
Always at the rear and wide.
Midfield. Remained same into straight then had some difficulty getting a run near 200 M but when in clear only able to make slight improvement.
Behind midfield. Asked for effort after straightening but only kept on one-paced. Was checked at 200 M when crowded.
Midfield and 3-wide. Asked for effort on straightening and responded well. Continued to make ground in run to line.
Led. Went clear on straightening and kept on strongly. Unable to hold off winner and was headed at 100 M.
Prominent. Remained on inner around home bend and gained nice run through. Responded well in straight and continued to make ground in run to line.
Near rear. Remained on inner after straightening and only made moderate ground in run to line.
Midfield. Eased out into clear on straightening and responded well to reach lead at 100 M and go on to score comfortably.
Began awkwardly and steadied back to rear. Same into straight then shifted to outside. Responded fairly but never looked like making the necessary ground.
Prominent. Remained same into straight then gave ground soon after. Was checked when crowded at 200 M.
Outside leader after being unable to obtain cover. Held position into straight. Kept on one-paced until giving ground final 200 M.
Near rear. Started to hang out making home turn and was wide near rear into the straight. While continuing to hang out in straight did make ground despite being difficult to ride out.
Behind midfield after beginning awkwardly. Near rear and wide turning in. Responded well final 400 M and continued to make ground in run to line.
Prominent and 3-wide after being difficult to settle early. Inclined to lay out on home turn. Commenced to give ground at 300 M. Was checked at 200 M when crowded.
Worked across to 3-wide outside lead from wide gate. Remained same into home straight then failed to quicken. Kept on one-paced. Was steadied to avoid heels at 200 M.
Behind leader to 300 M. Dropped out.
Settled wide in midfield from difficult gate. Responded well from 300 M to take charge inside final 100 M. Won readily.
Ridden along to be in touch. Unable to quicken in straight, steadily gave ground from 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly, trailed field to 300 M. Ran on steadily.
Always prominent. Found no more and began to tire closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed along to take lead, gradually shifting across to rail 900 M out. Had every chance until overhauled by winner passing 100 M. Kept on.
Niggled along early but lacked pace. Remained at rear until making some late headway final 200 M.
Well away, steadily dropped towards rear. Moved a bit closer rounding home bend where slightly inconvenienced. Not a factor in the straight. Caught wide most stages.
Tardy start, hard ridden and recovered ground to be better than midfield at 1200 M. Kept on one-pace in home straight.
Steadily dropped behind midfield. Not clear run after straightening until got into clear 200 M out. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield. Ran on steadily from 250 M, kept on.
Slowly away, towards rear. Slightly inconvenienced rounding home turn when under pressure. Failed to respond.
Forward of midfield. Faded from 250 M.
Never far off. Gradually weakened from 100 M.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight. Dropped rein momentarily 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, remained at rear. Was 2nd last early straight. Made up good ground to claim 3rd closing stages.
Led field to passing 150 M. Kept on but unable quicken to fight back.
Towards rear. Pushed along from outside 800 M. Widest in midfield turning into straight. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Tracked leader soon after start. Unable to hold place upon straightening and soon tailed off.
In touch to 500 M. Faded.
Behind midfield. Kept on early straight but found no extra inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield from a wide draw. Improved from 1400 M to be 3rd far side. Weakened inside 250 M.
Better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Rear. Dropped to the last rounding home bend. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Always thereabout, 1-1/2Ls 2nd turning in. Sustained effort to take lead passing 150 M. Held on well.
Midfield. Made good progress final turn to be 3rd inside 300 M. Kept on but lost the minor placing close home.
Midfield. Kept on in straight.
Midfield when hampered 1000 M out. Yielded ground from then on.
Raced very freely when restrained in prominent position far side. Dropped out upon straightening.
Badly hampered and lost ground at start. Quickly recovered to prominent position before home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Held narrow lead. Went clear upon straightening but collared inside 200 M.
Soon in rear. Made up good ground in straight doing best work at finish.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Hampered over 250 M out then kept on.
Always in last few.
Always well there. Kept on well.
Settled just better than midfield. Gained 3rd position on rails turning in but soon found no extra.
Settled just behind midfield. Quickened well in straight to win readily.
Broke well settling in prominent position. Soon weakened in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Made no impression.
Fly-jumped at start then raced at the back to straight. Produced for a run upon straightening and finished well to snatch 2nd place late.
Last to final turn. Made ground moderately on inside in straight.
Prominent. Followed leader from 1st turn before taking over turning into straight. Was headed passing 200 M, kept on for a 3rd.
Mostly 3rd. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
Tardy start, made no show.
Better than midfield. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Led field from stable bend until headed final turn. Remained prominent to 200 M, then faded.
Midfield on the rail. Ran on steadily 400 M to claim 2nd closing stages. Unable to threat the winner.
Well there early, dropping to the midfield when checked at stable bend. Ran on well in straight to take command 150 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Always thereabout. Kept on in straight.
Not far off early stages. Dropped to 10th when inconvenienced stable bend. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly 5th. Stayed on one-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Unbalanced early straight. Steadied 200 M and shifted in to make up some ground.
Led or disputed lead to 800 M then gradually faded.
Settled at the back. Produced late impression closing stages.
Led or disputed lead. Gained some 1L advantage early in straight. Faded passing 200 M.
Settled in rear. Finished well inside final 300 M to miss narrowly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Planted at start. Never in the race.
Held up behind leaders. Quickened to hit front briefly passing 200 M but soon headed.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Faded closing stages.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Midfield or worse on outside to straight. Made moderate progress.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well in straight to get up on line.
Given reminders early and soon moved up to take lead home bend. Headed passing 200 M but kept on for 4th place.
Midfield to 200 M then no extra.
Prominent, joining leaders briefly turning in. Soon weakened.
Began best to be straight behind leaders. Never quickened from home bend.
At rear on settling. Out wide from home turn and only made moderate ground.
Began quickly to be behind leader, overracing. Went backwards from after 600 M.
Handy position very wide out without cover. Made up little ground in the straight.
Midfield but very wide out early. Made up no ground in the straight.
Began very quickly to go straight to front. Soon overtaken on the home bend.
Overracing early out wide behind leaders. Always there and then one-paced in the straight.
Began best to be behind leaders. Gained clear run on straightening but could not catch winner.
Very wide midfield at stable bend. One-paced when under pressure.
Jumped well to be handy position on rail. Every chance in the straight but one-paced.
Went forward from wide gate to be outside lead. Took lead from home bend to score impressive win.
Settled rear of midfield. Saved ground along rail and made steady ground in the straight.
At rear early. Came from long way back on home bend to make up steady ground.
Settled about midfield and wide. Placed under pressure from 500 M. Made good ground out wide.
Behind midfield. Asked for effort on straightening and took time to pick up. Switched out for clear run at 200 M then made gradual ground. Hampered and carried wider final 200 M.
Near rear. Remained same into home straight. Made strong run through the field final 400 M and just failed to gain victory.
In front of midfield. Remained prominent into home straight then kept on fairly. Was hampered and carried wider over final 200 M.
Taken back to rear from outside draw. Waited with into home straight. Made strong ground through the field, was steadied at 200 M, then made further ground in run to line.
Taken back to be near rear. In that position on straightening then shortly after when checked clipped heels and knuckled. Didn't recover afterwards.
In front of midfield. Commenced to make some ground after straightening but was checked when disappointed for run at 200 M. One-paced afterwards.
Midfield. Moved closer on straightening. Responded strongly when asked for effort final 400 M but unable to match efforts of quinella pair.
Prominent. Asked for effort on straightening and responded well to reach lead near 200 M. Kept on strongly to score narrow win despite shifting out and causing interference final 200 M.
With rear. Same into straight when taken to outside. Made some ground after 400 M. Was hampered after 200 M but was not going to figure in finish.
Midfield. Remained same into home straight but found no extra afterwards.
Behind midfield. Shifted towards outside on straightening but did not respond.
Followed leader. Remained same into the home straight. Had some difficulty getting run near 300 M and was struck on head by whip. Once clear at 200 M made nice ground in run to line.
Led until finding no more last 200 M.
Behind lead. Joined lead at 500 M. Found no extra after straightening and gave ground final 300 M.
Bumped at start but soon sat outside the leader. Took lead from 1600 M. Headed rounding home bend. Ran on upon straightening and looked a chance until not quickened final 200 M.
Led from stable bend. Headed 1600 M. Regained lead rounding home bend. Kept on well until weakened badly final 100 M.
Soon at rear and was trapped wide rounding stable bend. Improved along the back straight to be in touch from 1100 M. Soon dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Jumped well. 3rd from stable bend. Dropped back to midfield briefly from 1100 M before recovering ground from 900 M. Ran on well 400 M out and hit front at 250 M. Headed 100 M when one-paced.
Towards rear. Swift headway from 1400 M to be in touch from 1100 M. Checked when crowded at 500 M. Never a threat in straight.
Soon at rear. Hampered at 800 M. Ran on a bit from 400 M but run ended 200 M out.

In touch early before settling in midfield or better rounding stable bend. Under pressure 800 M out and took closer order along rail turning in. Was checked when making a move at 300 M. One-paced thereafter.
At rear despite being ridden early. Improved steadily from 1200 M on the outside to be in touch turning in. Ran on steadily and held narrow advantage 100 M out before being outsprinted by the winner.
Very slowly away and remained at back. Made up a little ground upon straightening until effort not sustained 100 M out.
Towards rear. Improved wide around field 500 M out to be in touch turning in. Ran on steadily without troubling placed horses.
Midfield early before dropping back towards rear turning into the back straight. Ran on strongly final 300 M to take charge inside 100 M for a comfortable victory.
Jumped awkwardly. In touch briefly before settling around midfield. Checked at 500 M and soon weakened badly.
Mainly midfield or better whilst proving difficult to settle. Failed to make any impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well. Midfield from stable bend and dropped towards rear from 1300 M. Ridden forward from 900 M but was crowded and lost ground at 800 M. Made up steady ground without threatening in straight.
Prominent to 600 M, soon weakened. Tended to race greenly throughout.
Slowly away and knuckled. Gave ground badly inside 300 M. Hung in throughout.
At rear. Made up late ground and ran past tired horses closing stages.
Well there. Kept on well to miss the second placing close to the line.
Towards rear. Unbalanced at 200 M then shifted in to avoid heels. Ran past beaten horses towards the finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Always rearward.
Jumped well and cruised to the lead from 600 M. Kept on strongly to the line.
Prominent to 200 M, then weakened.
Midfield or better. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Midfield. One-paced.
Midfield or worse. Ran past beaten horses towards the finish.
Settled midfield. Responded well when asked for effort near course proper but was outsprinted by the winner.
Midfield on outside. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Worked forward to lead, then behind leader from 1000 M. Faded from 400 M.
At rear, only ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Just after the start became unbalanced and dipped. Settled around midfield. Made steady ground from 300 M, kept on same pace concluding stages.
At the back. Made up a little late ground.
Behind midfield. Under pressure from 500 M, made a little progress after straightening, effort not sustained 150 M out.
Waited with near rear. Found nothing in the straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well final 300 M though no threat to the winner.
Niggled along early to travel within striking distance. Asked for effort from 300 M, cruised to the lead 100 M out and won going away.
Prominent to 300 M, wide early stages. Dropped out.
Towards rear. Made gradual ground from 300 M, no extra close home.
Began fairly, niggled along to take lead at 1100 M. Headed 100 M out, kept on quite well.
Always well there. Found no more and tired final 100 M.
Midfield most stages, steadied after the 400 M. Tired close home.
Rear of midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Was last before making some headway in straight. One-paced close home.
At back to straight. Never nearer.
Was 6th before making steady progress from 1200 M, holding every chance coming into straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M.
About 9th 1200 M and similar position into straight. Stayed on a bit closing stages.
In touch, pulling hard. Held every chance 300 M but soon dropped out of contention.
Held wide in rear turning into straight where he ran on strongly to take command 150 M.
Prominent to straight where he faded rapidly.
Made no show.
Worse than midfield to straight. Kept on without threatening from 200 M.
Mostly 6th to straight where he moved up to lead briefly 200 M. Found winner too strong.
Led from 1200 M till challenged and headed 300 M. Found no extra.
Well there till failing to hold place soon on straightening.
Among rear group to straight where he kept on till steadied 150 M.
Midfield to straight where he improved a bit early on. No extra closing stages.
Midfield from widest draw. Improved a bit passing 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Rear. Progressed rounding home bend and was widest turning in. Unable to quicken.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Raced awkwardly among runners 200 M. Ran on a bit after.
Led field to passing 200 M. Faded.
Near rear. Made ground rounding home bend. Kept on in straight.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in touch before dropping to midfield far side. Faded from 450 M. (Hung in throughout.)
Prominent but difficult to settle, rider was unbalanced near 1200 M. Raced 4th along back straight. Ran on 300 M but unable to match speed with winner inside 150 M.
Prominent. Failed to hold place 200 M out.
Towards rear early, soon picked up to be better than midfield. Ran on well in straight to take control 150 M. Won readily.
Midfield. Ran on well early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Started badly, behind midfield. Lost position when unbalanced stable bend. Never able to feature.
Around 9th to final turn. Made ground steadily to just miss 2nd.
Missed at start. Raced in rear. Never nearer.
Ridden to muster race gaining slender lead far side. Gave ground quickly passing 400 M.
Always prominent. One-paced in straight.
Rear. Made up late ground past beaten runners closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out for a run early in straight and ran on well to snatch victory closing stages.
Never far off. Ran on steadily in straight to claim 2nd place closing stages.
Always thereabouts 3- or 4-wide. Ran on to hold every chance over 100 M out. Unable to sustain effort near finish.
With leaders. Hit front briefly inside 200 M before overhauled.
Never better than midfield.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M then faded gradually.
Jumped in air at start. Raced wide in rear. Took closer order at Rock. Midfield into straight then kept on steadily.
With leaders early. Midfield before hampered twice at Rock and approaching home bend dropping to last before straight.
Better than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Led field until joined 600 M out. Lost advantage to became 2nd or 3rd 400 M. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on well to win narrowly at finish.
Slowly away. Rear. Made up some ground final turn. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on along rail 250 M.
Prominent. Steadied home turn. Weakened in straight.
Well there to early straight. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon prominent, joining the lead 600 M. Gained upper hand 400 M, with 2Ls advantage turning in. Kept on until headed close home.
Midfield or behind. Dropped to the last when widest final turn. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground to midfield passing 600 M, advancing to 2nd along the rail turning in. Ran on under pressure final 200 M, just failed.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Dropped to 2nd last when wide into straight. Ran on final 200 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made ground steadily in straight.
Better than midfield. Hung out badly rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Wide in midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Led to 800 M. Dropped out from prominent position upon straightening.
Always thereabouts.
Well there. Took over going up Rock. Hung on well to defy strong challenges close home.
Settled in last few. Ran on quite well despite hanging in in straight.
Well there. No extra closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled towards rear. Kept on one pace in straight.
Began very awkwardly losing a few lengths. Settled at the back. Made up late ground down centre of straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well through field down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield and wide in straight. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up just better than midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runners early in straight. One-paced.
Settled towards rear. No clear passage on rails in straight.
Began best from inside gate to lead. Hung out badly from 500 M allowing winner to improve from home bend.
Went forward from wide out to be outside leader on settling. Inconvenienced after 500 M. One-paced.
No early pace to be rearward. Always there.
Eased early to be midfield. Never quickened.
Settled right behind leader on rail. There until leader hung off at 500 M. Improved through after this to score good win.
Behind midfield 3-wide. Never quickened when placed under pressure.
Handy position early then steadied when crowded to be midfield. Wide on home bend.
Began well and then eased to be handy position with cover. Every chance on straightening.
Quickly across from wide gate to be behind leaders. Weakened after straightening.
Raced midfield. Made ground along the rail on home bend and made steady ground thereafter.
Began well to settle behind leader. Always thereabouts.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Made little ground in the straight.
Forward of midfield. Briefly effort from 400 M to 250 M, gave ground steadily final 150 M.
Slowly away, near rear most stages. Never on the hunt.
Worse than midfield, became unbalanced near 800 M. Made a little late headway.
Led or disputed lead. Headed 100 M out, kept on until beginning to tire closing stages.
Rear of midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Began very awkwardly, then became badly unbalanced for few strides. Remained at rear until making up a little late ground.
Settled just in front of midfield. Was awkwardly placed from 400 M. Made gradual ground final 100 M when obtained clear running.
Around midfield to 400 M, caught wide without cover throughout. Dropped out after straightening.
Always prominent, kept on quite well.
Began awkwardly, waited with at rear. Under pressure upon straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always pressing the lead. Quickened to take charge 100 M out, kept on well.
Behind midfield. Tailed off 200 M out. (Tongue over the bit.)
Amongst first few throughout. Kept on well in straight though having a tendency to get head up and lay in.
Mostly mid-division. Ran on a bit close home.
Soon in midfield. Made progress from 500 M. Ran on well in straight until caught by the winner close home.
Soon well there from wide draw. Every chance at 200 M. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Inconvenienced on stable bend, soon better than midfield. Dropped towards the rear and wide in back straight. Progressed from 700 M to be midfield and wide into straight. Did not quicken.
Towards rear. Responded well from 300 M and ran through the field to win close to the line.
Slowly away. Mainly midfield. Tired final 150 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Tightened approaching winning post first time, then lost ground on stable bend when being eased. Soon behind midfield. Progress from 600 M, midfield and wide into straight. No further progress. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon led to 150 M. Weakened.
Towards the rear. Never in contention.
Always well there. One-paced close home.
Sat outside leader to straight. Steadily weakened.
Midfield throughout.
At back. Steadied at 700 M and again in early straight. Made up good ground from 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or worse. One-paced in straight.
Tightened approaching winning post first time and taken out on stable bend. Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Rear. Made up some ground closing stages.
Dropped to the rear soon after start and never able to feature.
Midfield. Improved gradually along rail to be 4th home bend. Remained there until running on well when obtaining clear run inside 200 M to assert authority close home.
Around midfield to straight. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Led field to early straight. Weakened out of contention inside 200 M.
Tardy start, towards rear throughout.
In touch. Dropped back to 5th when hanging out 800 M. Hung out again home turn when improving. Ran on to take lead 200 M but unable to resist winner's late burst close home.
Missed the start badly, remained at rear until making up some ground inside 150 M.
Never better than midfield.
Never a factor.
Prominent. Found no extra upon straightening.
Soon prominent. Came to tackle leader turning for home, gaining slender advantage early straight. Kept on without quickening when headed 200 M.
In touch early, soon in midfield. One-paced.
Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield most of way. Found no extra final 200 M.
Midfield far side. Lost position approaching home bend. Fought on for 6th.
Niggled at. Soon dropped back to midfield. One-paced when steadied 100 M out.
Led until joined into straight. Dropped out passing 300 M.
Outpaced early. Took closer order home bend saving ground on inside turning in. Shifted out for a run early in straight and ran on well final 200 M though without troubling winner.
Ridden in midfield early. Moved up to close-up 2nd outside leader home bend, sharing pace into straight. No extra and faded over 250 M out.
Settled behind pace. Strolled to lead over 200 M out. Won easily.
Held up around midfield. Weakened passing 800 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on in straight for remote 5th.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out upon straightening.
Knuckled badly at start losing ground. Travelled wide in last few throughout.
Never far off to straight. Shifted out early in straight then kept on steadily for remote 3rd.
Midfield briefly, settling at the back. Ran on down centre of straight to just miss placing.
Tardy start, behind midfield to straight. Ran on steadily from outside 300 M, never nearer.
Held 4th from a wide draw. Slightly improved to 3rd turning in. Kept on but lost a minor placing close home.
Led field to 250 M. Kept on.
Made no show.
Midfield. Kept on in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly, always among the rear group.
Soon 5th. Was checked twice when finding no clear run early straight. Recovered good ground along rail when in clear.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon prominent. Progressed to 2nd final turn. Ran on steadily to reach front 250 M. Held on well to the line.
Prominent. Tracked leader to 600 M when he became 3rd. Unable to hold place soon after straightening.
Slowly away, was last early. Recovered ground to be just behind midfield passing 1200 M. Ran on final 200 M to grab 3rd close home.
Prominent to halfway then gradually weakened.
Travelled in midfield. No clear passage early in straight. Ran on well to grab lead close home.
Attempted to make all. Caught close home.
Midfield to straight. Made some progress early on before one paced closing stages.
Began awkwardly. Travelled at the back. No clear passage early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Broke well. Settled behind midfield. Very wide into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Soon in rear. Carried very wide into straight. No progress. (Lame.)
Settled in rear. Ran on along rails in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to 200 M then faded.
Raced freely and wide in midfield to straight then weakened.
Raced freely in midfield. Commenced move and gained 3rd into straight when shifted out. Ran on to hit front briefly closing stages but caught close home.
Made no impression.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Settled behind midfield. Gained some ground on inside turning in. Ran on steadily.
Began awkwardly to be rearward. Eased out on home bend and made good ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
About forward of midfield. Made good ground when asked for effort.
Raced off the pace. Quickly passed soon after straightening.
At rear early. Eased out on home bend and made good ground out wide.
At the rear early. Made only moderate ground in the straight.
Worked forward to be outside leader. With leading division until final 200 M.
Began well to be with leader. With cover until eased out on home bend to score good win.
Restrained from start to be rearward. Saved ground along rail to make good ground.
Went forward from wide gate to lead. Held lead until 300 M.
Slow to begin to be rearward. One-paced in the straight.
Raced in handy position early stages. Never quickened when asked.
Well back early stages. Always there throughout.
Raced midfield. Making good progress in straight until steadied near 200 M.
Settled just off pace. Every chance in straight but could not match the winner.
Behind midfield after being severely checked at 1600 M. Remained near inner and made good ground early in straight then run evened out final 100 M.
In front of midfield and wide from outside gate. Remained same into straight then effects of hard run set in and found no extra.
Midfield. Asked for effort on straightening and responded by continuing to make gradual ground in run to line.
Midfield. Dropped to be near rear turning in and then only ran past tiring horses.
Rear early. Commenced to make some improvement from 1000 M but was still near rear turning in. Made some improvement in straight but never looked likely.
Worked forward from wide draw to reach lead at 1400 M. Remained same until straightening then gave ground quickly.
Behind midfield. Same into straight then found no extra when asked for effort at 400 M.

Began awkwardly, did not stretch out and settled near rear. Failed to respond when under pressure at 600 M. Noted the ring portion of the bit had shifted out of position and was wedged across the horse's nose.
Ridden forward from wide gate to be behind leaders. Remained same into home straight then tried to make run with winner but despite keeping on strongly was unable to match his effort.
Ridden to lead early. Allowed another to cross to lead at 1400 M. Went up to join leader prior to straightening then shortly after straightening gave ground quickly.

Midfield early. Dropped to be behind midfield at 800 M. Made ground along inner after 600 M to be midfield on straightening. Gained nice run through and kept on fairly without looking like catching quinella pair.
Near rear early then dropped to rear at 800 M. Remained same into home straight made run through field and continued to make ground without ever looking likely.
Began very awkwardly and settled with rear. Shifted wide at 1400 M and asked to improve. Remained wide behind midfield into home straight then one-paced afterwards.
Prominent. Followed leaders into straight, gained opening to reach lead at 400 M. Responded well to win strongly and managed to extend margin in closing stages.
Around midfield. Dropped out gradually passing 250 M.
At rear. Ran past beaten horses final stages.
Midfield or worse. Responded well when asked for effort near course proper. Snatched 2nd near the line.
Midfield. Did not quicken final 200 M.
Soon led to 250 M. Kept on quite well to the line.
Slow away. Soon midfield. One-paced closing stages.
Worse than midfield. Never a factor.
Always thereabouts. Unable to quicken final 300 M.
Midfield. Gave ground steadily inside 400 M.
Niggled to remain midfield. One pace till steadily weakened final 100 M.
Prominent. Quickened to hit front 250 M out. Kept on strongly to the line.
Midfield to 600 M, soon weakened and gave ground badly final stages.
Led briefly, then remained handy until 350 M. Unable to quicken final stages.
Settled around midfield. Quickened from 400 M. Kept on well in straight.
Jumped best from wide draw before settling in midfield. Improved to be in touch from 1000 M. Kept on one pace in straight.
Jumped well but soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Trapped wide turning in. Made up some ground towards finish.
Soon behind midfield or worse. Last turning in and dropped right out of the race. (Heart irregularity and un- coordinated behind.)

Jumped well from wide draw before dropping back to the rear. Took closer order along rail to be in midfield turning in. Ran on strongly final 250 M to be nearest at finish without threatening the winner.
Mainly midfield or better. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening placed horses.
Soon midfield whilst proving very difficult to settle. Weakened badly final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in touch. 2nd from 1000 M. Weakened badly final 300 M. Crowded near 200 M.
Soon led. Headed 1300 M and then sat behind the leader. Ran on well final 400 M and took lead 100 M out. Kept on well to win comfortably.
Began badly. Recovered ground quickly to lead from 1300 M. Kept on well in straight. Headed 100 M out and lost 2nd place when one-paced in the closing stages.
Tardy start. Soon recovered to be behind midfield. Ran on in straight but was crowded near 200 M. Not in contention afterwards.
Mainly midfield or worse. 5-wide turning in. Ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Soon behind midfield or worse. Kept on one pace in straight.
Forward of midfield. Crowded 1400 M when pulling wide most of the way. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Began awkwardly. Very difficult to settle early and dropped to the back. Ran on a little final 200 M.
Well back. Made steady ground from 250 M until no extra concluding stages.

Over-racing in midfield, became unbalanced when awkward between runners 1000 M out. Was obliged to race considerably wider near 800 M when hampered. Behind leaders into straight. Kept on until tiring 100 M.
Forward of midfield. Was severely checked after the 800 M when hampered. Ran on steadily under pressure final 300 M.
Held up in rear. Ran past beaten runners close home.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well final 300 M to claim a distant 2nd close home.
Midfield throughout, unable to quicken in straight. Not persevered with final 100 M, rider was advised to ride all his mounts out to the finish.
Midfield early, improved to be in touch near 1100 M. Kept on well in straight without progressing further.
Slowly away, was obliged to race wide when difficult to settle early. Steadily recovered ground to be close up 800 M out. Gave ground from 300 M.
Prominent. Broke down in near fore near 800 M and dropped out rapidly. Pulled up before straightening.
At rear throughout, never a factor.
Soon led, shifted across to rail near 1000 M. Headed inside 200 M, just lost 2nd place near finish.
Close up. Improved to be behind leader at 600 M. Faded from 200 M.
Tracked leader to 300 M. Dropped out.
Waited with near rear. Cruised to the front down centre of track passing 200 M to win unextended.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Made up some ground from the 300 M before finding no extra towards finish.
About 5th turning for home. Improved down centre of track to reach 3rd 150 M. One-paced near finish.
Settled midfield before staying on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Ran 3rd to straight where he kept on same pace.
Never troubled leaders.
Mostly 4th to straight where he ran on to challenge inside 200 M. Found winner too strong.
Among rear group to straight where he kept on till one-paced close home.
Never on terms.
Set strong pace to straight where he was 3L clear at the 400 M. Found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Tracked leader. Quickened straight to hit front passing 200 M, holding on under pressure.
Towards rear till making some headway inside final 250 M, despite not having much room.
Towards rear before running on a bit in straight.
Towards rear till making up good ground inside final 200 M, full of running at the finish.
Prominent, was 2nd far side. Ran along side with the leader in straight before gaining upper hand close home.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield passing 800 M. Continued to improve from outside but failed to obtain a minor placing.
Midfield. Weakened 200 M.
Started badly, last to 200 M. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
In touch early, dropped to midfield far side. One-paced.
Never able to feature.
Midfield or slightly behind throughout.
Prominent until weakening out of contention final 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground moderately inside 250 M.
In touch. Improved to 3rd turning in. Held on without threatening the quinella pair.
Slightly slowly away, 2nd last to straight. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Pushed along to take lead from widest draw. Kept on gamely while being challenged in straight. Was headed close home.
Led to 200 M. No extra.
Raced in better than midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Mainly in rear with short-lived effort passing Rock.
Never in contention.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Missed the start but soon in prominent position. Dropped out upon straightening.
Settled outside leader. Hit front under pressure 200 M. Caught close home.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield.
Wide towards rear. Took closer order going up Rock. Midfield into straight and one-paced.
Towards rear. Headway into straight. Ran on steadily to just miss placing.
Never far off. Commenced run home turn. Ran on well to take charge close home.
Wide and around midfield to straight. Faded.
Better than midfield. Kept on quite well in straight.
Always behind midfield.
Midfield early, soon prominent. 5-wide turning into straight and found no extra.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Made good progress along rail turning in. Ran on steadily but just failed to obtain a minor placing.
Slowly away, near rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, never a factor.
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Midfield. Improved to 4th at the Rock. Dropped back from 400 M.
Towards rear while hanging in badly early. Shifted to the outside final turn and made up good ground 200 M.
In touch early, soon dropped towards rear. Hung out badly home turn. No progress.
Made all. Held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Soon 2nd. Always held by the winner.
Always in touch on the rail. Kept on under pressure in straight.
Around midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Responded well in straight to assert authority close home.
Settled in rear. Improving when hampered 200 M out. Sustained progress. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in midfield. Made swift progress to hit front turning in. Caught close home.
Towards rear. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
In last few to straight. No clear run early on. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight. Soon dropped out.
Better than midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Mainly in midfield. Made moderate progress closing stages.
Never far off. Took closer order home bend to be close up. One-paced in straight.
Soon led settling strong pace far side. Dropped out upon straightening.
Midfield. Dropped out in straight.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Behind midfield early stages. Steadily improved from the 500 M.
Handy position early on the rail. Steady at the 600 M. Made no ground.
Very wide in forward position early. Weakened from home bend.
Midfield early but wide. Made no impression.
Sped through from inside gate to hold lead. Always there till sprinting clear on straightening for good win.
No early speed to be rearward. Made up good ground through the field in the straight.
Midfield early stages. One-paced.
Extremely wide in forward position. Caught wide throughout.
Began best to lead. Sat outside leader throughout but never quickened.
Eased out of speed battle to be handy. Every chance in straight.
Just behind leaders early. Made little impression on the winner.
Niggled along early but rearward. Always out wide and made good ground late.
Followed leaders. Made home bend awkwardly and shifted out. Only one-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Near rear. Improved gradually from 600 M to be the widest in midfield turning in. Made good ground in straight but unable to pick up placegetters.
Midfield. Same until checked on straightening. Once balanced made moderate progress in straight.
Behind leaders. Was keeping on only one-paced when severely checked after 400 M. No extra afterwards.
Sat off lead and 3-wide. Failed to respond after 400 M and commenced to give ground on straightening.
Led. Went clear on straightening and kept on to score strong win.
At rear after being checked in early stages. Remained same into home straight then once in clear made nice ground in run to the line.
Near rear after being crowded early. Improved from 600 M to be wide in midfield turning in. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Near rear. Remained on inner around home bend then responded fairly to continue making ground from long way back.
Slightly worse than midfield. Remained on inner around home bend and secured nice run through after straightening. Responded strongly to gain 2nd place 100 M out.
Sat off leader. Remained same into straight then kept on well until losing 2nd place with 100 M to go. Held on fairly after that for 3rd.
Around midfield and wide. Improved a little approaching home bend then only moderate response until giving ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Was checked before straightening and went back to near rear. Made a little ground in straight but never likely.
Around midfield. Commenced to improve from 400 M but crowded and carried wider on straightening. Once balanced made some ground up to the 200 M then once-paced.
Crowded early in midfield. Progress from 500 M and a bit wide into straight. Did not quicken.
Midfield, wide in early and middle stages. Dropped towards the rear after being crowded winning post first time. Not in contention afterwards.
Well there to 200 M, soon weakened.
Towards rear. Crowded early and again at 600 M. Made up good ground on inside final 200 M to just miss close home.
At back. Made up good ground from 250 M.
Behind midfield. Crowded early twice. Disappointed for running after the 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Became unbalanced stable bend. Awkward between horses at 500 M, never in contention.
Midfield mainly. One-paced.
Always prominent. Tired badly final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Quickened well after the 200 M to win on the line after ding-dong battle with 2nd horse.
Midfield. Inconvenienced stable bend and forced wide, then dropped to the rear. Progress from 600 M and wide into straight. Made up ground steadily.
Soon led, hung out early stages. Every chance final 200 M but caught on the line by the winner.
Slowly away, worse than midfield. Improved around home bend, kept on until no extra after the 200 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening.
Missed the start and was in midfield early. Made ground steadily to be 3rd halfway. Came to tackle winner 300 M but effort not sustained.
Led early. Was joined near 600 M. Lost advantage while hanging out 400 M. Kept on.
Around midfield. Found no extra closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back steadily from 400 M.
Soon prominent, joining the lead 600 M. Went clear passing the course proper. Held on well to maintain advantage to the line.
Never able to feature.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Made up some ground 400 M.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from halfway.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear early. Recovered ground to midfield 600 M and maintained similar position thereafter.
Behind midfield. One-paced throughout.
Prominent onto course proper then gradually faded.
Soon in rear. Produced some impression under pressure running past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled around midfield. Ran on under pressure inside final 200 M to claim 3rd place close home though ducked in.
Missed the break. Soon in midfield. Made no show closing stages.
Always thereabouts. One-paced without quickening closing stages.
Around midfield to halfway then faded.
Never better than midfield. (Bled.)
Sluggish at start. Given reminders and quickly recovered to prominent position. Fought on well to snatch victory near finish.
Midfield early. Led onto course proper. No extra when caught close home.
Broke well. With leaders to 400 M then kept on at the one pace under pressure.
Midfield early stages then faded under pressure.
Well back. Made significant progress inside final 200 M doing best work at finish.
Niggled along in the front early. Gradually faded coming onto course proper.
Always well behind.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield approaching 800 M. Ran on well 300 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Was crowded at start, towards rear. Moved up to midfield final turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Made all. Just held off runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Behind midfield. Kept on final 250 M.
Midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 5th upon straightening. Kept on but failed to quicken close home.
Midfield. Dropped towards the rear turning for home. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses 250 M.
Always at the rear.
Held 4th to early straight. Weakened steadily.
In touch from the widest draw. Dropped to the midfield home bend. Faded in straight.
Midfield. Moved up to the 3rd 900 M. Held on until weakened inside 200 M.
Tardy start, at rear. Checked at 700 M. Never able to quicken.
Behind midfield and was wide without cover throughout.
Soon 2nd. Unable to maintain position when one-paced 200 M.
Restrained in 2nd position outside leader. Gradually dropped out upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent in 3rd position to straight. No extra.
Settled at the back. Ran on in straight though without threatening leaders.
Settled at the back. Ran on in early part of straight then one-paced.
Midfield, racing freely far side. Attempted to shift out for a run upon straightening before hampered and lost ground. One-paced.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without making any impression on leaders in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off to straight. Kept on steadily before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well in straight to hit front over 150 M out but caught final strides.
Led to 200 M then dropped out.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down straight to just get up on line.
Midfield. Inconvenienced about 300 M out before running on to hold every chance closing stages.
In last few. Made modest progress in straight without threatening.
Broke well. Never far off in 4th or 5th. Ran on steadily to hit front inside 200 M but soon overhauled when tiring. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. No clear passage upon straightening before running on well to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Towards rear early. Made run from 600 M out wide to make steady ground.
No early pace to be rearward. Took off out wide from 600 M, but when asked made only steady ground.
Ridden to be forward but clipped heels at stable bend. Never in the race after and lost ground from 800 M.
Ridden along early to be in front of midfield but wide. Outside lead then until 200 M but then weakened.
At rear on settling. Always at rear and wide till home bend and then made up good ground out wide.
Three wide equal lead at first turn. Lost ground from 600 M and weakened badly in the straight.
At rear on settling. Kept on rails and in similar position throughout.
Behind midfield. Always there until asked for effort when steadily improved.
Ridden hard early to be in handy position. Behind midfield turning and then made ground.
Out wide early and midfield. In handy position on home bend but unable to quicken.
Wide into stable bend but midfield. Towards the rear from 1400 M and then always tailed off.
Began well to be behind leaders. There throughout and one-paced in the straight.
Began best to be equal lead at stable bend. Run off thereafter and remained in same position.
Began well to cross straight to lead. Led throughout.
Allowed to drift back to be near rear. Remained on inner around home bend but failed to respond when asked for effort after straightening.
In front of midfield. Over-raced early. Gave ground gradually from 300 M despite hard riding.
Midfield. Taken to centre of track to find clear run after 400 M and responded strongly in run to line to just fail to pick up winner.
In front of midfield and 3 wide. Responded fairly after straightening to make some ground in the run to the line but never looked likely.
Ridden forward to lead from wide gate. Well rated in front and responded strongly in straight to score solid win.
Behind lead and 3 wide. Gave ground from 500 M and then gave ground quickly after straightening.
Prominent. Remained on inner into home straight and kept on fairly.
Taken back to rear. Waited with until entering home straight. Made nice ground in straight without ever looking likely.
Behind midfield. Dropped to rear on straightening.
Midfield. Asked for effort on straightening and after initially being one-paced gave ground from 300 M.
Near rear. Ridden patiently into home straight. Made some ground over final 300 M and kept on in run to line despite being well beaten.
Behind midfield and 3 wide. Remained same into home straight then made strong run down centre of track but failed to pick up quinella pair.
Followed leader. Responded fairly early in straight but found no extra final 100 M.
Behind lead. Remained same into straight then kept on one-paced until finding no more final 150 M.
Towards rear from stable bend. Improved from 800 M to be in midfield turning in. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish without threatening the first pair.
Jumped well. Never far off. Under pressure rounding home bend. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Never far off. Ridden along and given reminders along back straight. Dropped back to midfield from 900 M. Never a threat in straight.
At rear. Awkwardly placed between runners rounding home turn. Never a threat.
Jumped well. Travelled wide throughout with no cover mostly forward of midfield. Weakened badly upon straightening.
Soon at back. Never a factor.
Slowly away. At rear. Never a factor.
Ridden forward and took lead from stable bend. Kept on in straight. Headed 200 M and soon weakened.
Soon at rear. Slight progress from 800 M. Made up good ground in straight.
Jumped well but was trapped widest rounding stable bend before settling in midfield or worse. Headway from 800 M. Ran on in straight until one-paced close home.
Jumped well. Made the first turn awkwardly and dropped to forward of midfield. 4th turning in. Ran on gamely final 300 M and was doing best work at finish but the line came too soon.
Led briefly before tracking the leader from stable bend. Under pressure from 900 M. Ran on well final 300 M and took lead 200 M out. Held off strong challenge from the 2nd horse.
Bumped at start. Soon midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight.
Always there. Sat outside the leader from 1100 M. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly, lost considerable ground and settled in a rearward position. Improved to a handy position along the back straight. Kept on quite well without threatening in the straight.
Midfield or worse. Unable to obtain clear running until 250 M. Ran on well.
Well back. Never a factor.
At rear. Never in contention.
Mainly near the rear. Pushed wide to commence a run rounding the home turn. Made little ground near the line.
Soon led. Headed 300 M and weakened badly final stages.
Settled midfield. Steadied near 700 M. Dropped worse than midfield before straightening. Into clear 250 M and ran on well to the line.
4th or 5th until 200 M. Weakened steadily final 150 M.
Better than midfield. Under pressure to maintain handy at 600 M. Moved up to lead 200 M out and kept on well to the line.
Midfield or better. Steadied at 200 M and ran on well afterwards.
Midfield. Weakened final 150 M.
Midfield. Found no extra final stages.
Tracked leader. Every chance in the straight but unable to quicken final stages.
Settled near the rear. Taken to outside 600 M out. One-paced closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Soon led and made running to 250 M where he dropped out quickly once headed.
Never troubled leaders.
Settled in rear to home turn. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Among rear group to straight where he made up some good ground inside final 200 M.
In rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Midfield to straight. Never nearer.
2nd last into straight where he made some progress final 250 M.
Always prominent. Cruised to lead 250 M, easing down towards finish.
Ran 5th to straight where he kept on to claim 2nd near finish.
4th to straight where he kept on to dispute for 2nd 250 M. Found no extra.
Well there before failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Made no show.
Last into straight where he stayed on quite well.
Prominent until fading out of contention after straightening.
In touch. Was 3rd turning in. Stayed on but unable to quicken.
Towards rear. Severely checked 1000 M. Unable to recover.
Midfield. Unable to hold position to become 9th or 10th final turn. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back slightly final turn to be 8th early straight. Kept on.
Towards rear. Severely checked 1000 M. No progress.
At rear throughout.
Always there. Advanced to 2nd 400 M out. Kept on until one-paced final 200 M.
Made most. Was headed final strides.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside 1000 M to be prominent approaching the Rock. Kept on well in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on from 6th early straight to grab victory near finish.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Midfield to straight then faded.
Rear. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Prominent briefly then steadied towards rear. Ran on in straight doing best work at finish.
Prominent to 200 M. Beaten when no room final stages.
Led to 300 M then dropped out.
Always at the back.
In last few. Commenced move into straight. No clear passage before ran on well close home.
Mostly 3-wide and prominent to halfway, then gave ground quickly.
Better than midfield. Headway home bend hitting front 200 M out. Caught in the shadows of the post.
Better than midfield. Commenced move 400 M out and ran on determinedly to just get up on line.
Settled behind midfield. Produced good late impression in straight.
Towards rear, was last turning into straight. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Stayed on a bit 250 M.
Last. Ran on from outside 300 M to claim 3rd close home.
Midfield. Dropped out in straight.
Led field until shared final turn. Weakened when headed 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made progress from outside 900 M to share the lead home bend. Unable to quicken when beaten 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Only moderate progress in straight.
In touch. Ran on from 4th early straight to take lead 150 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Around midfield. Made good progress from final turn. Just failed to catch the winner closing stages.
Held 2nd to the Rock. Dropped back steadily.
Mostly 5th. Kept on quite well inside 200 M.
Always there. Closed up to the leader home bend. Gained slender advantage briefly 200 M but soon found no extra.
Slowly away. Remained in 3rd last. Made some late progress in straight.
Outpaced early. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Began awkwardly and ridden along rails behind leaders. Fought on well for 3rd place.
Never on terms.
Always well there.
Prominent till hampered and lost ground about 500 M out. No further impression.
Wide, behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Prominent early dropping to midfield after Rock.
Always prominent in 3rd or 4th. Closed on winner steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide and better than midfield. Hampered about 800 M out. Some moderate late headway in straight.
Virtually made all. Hung on well.
Never nearer.
Ridden along to be 3-wide equal lead first bend. There until 200 M when one-paced.
Midfield one off the rail. Out wide in home straight but never a threat.
Niggled along and then overraced to hold lead. Held on until final 100 M to miss placings.
Settled behind leader on the rails. Every chance in the straight. One-paced.
Behind midfield on the rail. Improved on home bend and gained split inside 200 M.
Handy position with cover. Never a threat from the home bend.
Midfield on the rail. Improved on straightening but unable to hold off winner's challenge.
