Slow to begin and rearward. Only made up moderate ground in the straight.
Slow out and no pace to be at rear. Always at the rear.
Towards midfield throughout and then lost ground 600 M. Weakened badly after that.
Ridden along to settle outside leader. Overtaken from home bend and weakened.
Raced 3-wide in handy position. Lost ground badly in the home straight.
Midfield. Made home turn wide after hanging out. Responded well after straightening and swept to lead at 200 M. Kept on for comfortable win.
At rear. Remained near rear into home straight then responded well and made strong ground. Gave winner too much start.
Led. Joined at 700 M. Remained in lead until 200 M then gave ground.
Behind midfield. Dropped to rear after 600 M. Remained at rear but did make some ground late.
Behind midfield and wide. Able to obtain cover near 600 M but remained behind midfield into straight and then only kept on one-paced.
Prominent. Issued challenge after straightening and held good chance at 250 M. Run levelled out final 200 M.
Near rear. Asked for effort after straightening and responded fairly. Not able to be ridden out in concluding stages when awkward on heels.
Behind lead. Shuffled back a little before straightening then when in clear after straightening kept on mainly one-paced.
Near rear. Remained behind midfield into straight then made strong ground and just failed to obtain quinella position.
In front of midfield. Hard ridden at 400 M and gave ground after entering straight.
Behind midfield. Improved after straightening but was steadied when disappointed for run after 200 M. Not fully tested afterwards.
Followed leader. Went up to join lead at 700 M. Stayed same into home straight then kept on one-paced.
Prominent briefly. Dropped to midfield or worse from 1000 M. Wide in back straight. Steadied near 200 M. Made up a little late ground.
Led and disputed lead. Headed at 100 M. Kept on.
Midfield or worse. Never a factor.
Midfield. Checked near 500 M. One-paced straight.
Better than midfield. Ran on well in the straight. Winner too strong.
Tardy start. Towards rear. Steadied about 200 M. Made up a little ground.
Crowded at start. Midfield. Quickened well from 200 M and took command 100 M out.
Settled at back. Progress from 600 M to be midfield and wide into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Disputed lead to 200 M. Unable to quicken.
Never better than midfield.
Slowly away. At back. Never in contention.
Well there until 200 M. Steadily weakened.
Never able to feature.
Led field to 900 M. Remained prominent to straight. Ran on well while shifting out to cause interference 250 M and 100 M. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Better than midfield but was difficult to settle early. Ran on from 6th early straight to be nearest at finish. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
Never a factor.
Midfield or slightly behind. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always there. Kept on but was hampered 250 M and 100 M. Unable quicken to challenge.
Pushed along early stages to take lead 900 M. Maintained advantage until headed passing 200 M. One-paced.
Tardy start, last to 300 M. Just ran past a few beaten horses.
Well there. Steadied for a run near 300 M. Sustained effort to take lead closing stages.
Midfield. Severely checked 250 M while making ground from 400 M. Kept on without threatening thereafter.
Towards rear. Made some progress home bend to be midfield turning in. Soon found no extra. (Lame.)
Behind midfield hugging inside rails. Ran on stoutly under pressure to just get up on line.
Began fairly then settled behind midfield. Made up some late ground.
Missed the start slightly but soon prominent. Weakened passing 300 M.
Settled midfield. Made up good ground to miss narrowly.
Midfield to 200 M. Dropped out.
Well back. Produced strong late finish closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Well there to 200 M then found no extra.
Never in contention.
Always in last few. Kept on closing stages.
Well there early then took up running and led till caught final strides.
Broke well and led early. Always thereabouts.
Well there to halfway. Weakened.
Midfield early. Dropped out from halfway.
Midfield early, soon advanced to a prominent position. Unable to hold place inside 150 M.
Never far off. Made progress to 3rd passing 400 M. Every chance inside 200 M but effort not sustained.
Mainly midfield. Kept on well final 200 M.
Led field until headed passing 200 M. Found no extra.
Behind midfield to straight. Made ground steadily to be nearest at finish. Found not much room closing stages.
Started awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground steadily along rail in straight.
Around midfield to 300 M. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Dropped back a bit when steadied final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Tardy start, towards rear. Made up good ground 200 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily 300 M to gain lead briefly inside 100 M. Was just beaten marginally final stride.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Made progress on outside from 600 M. Ran on final 300 M to win narrowly in a ding-dong battle with the runner-up.
Last to 400 M out. Made up good ground inside 250 M.
In touch. Dropped back on straightening. Faded.
Prominent soon after start. Kept on very well in straight.
Better than midfield. Gave ground around home bend. Hampered about 300 M out. One-paced.
Always well there.
Prominent to 250 M then weakened.
Midfield far side. Dropped towards rear home bend.
Slow into stride. Last into straight. Finished well.
Better than midfield and wide to straight then gradually weakened.
Led to 250 M then weakened under pressure.
Midfield. One-paced when hampered inside 200 M.
Never far off. Quickened to lead over 200 M out and never headed. Won well.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace.
Held up in rear. Ran on strongly down straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in last few. Ran on gamely through field in straight. Lost 3rd place late.
Midfield and wide. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield briefly. Dropped towards rear by home bend.
Raced midfield. Made no ground in the straight.
Allowed to go forward and settle behind leaders. Clear running from home bend to take lead 200 M.
Strode to the lead at easy pace. Passed at the 300 M and weakened quickly thereafter.
Went forward to sit outside leader. Lost ground when placed under pressure.
In forward position early and steadied near 800 M. Wide on home turn. Never quickened.
Raced three wide midfield. Came wide on home bend but then one-paced.
Always tailed off.
Rear of midfield early stages. Took a while to wind up but then made good ground closing stages.
Settled behind leader on the rail. Gained run on straightening but unable to match the winner.
Very wide early without cover. Every chance from forward position but could not match winner.
Settled about midfield on the rail. Eased out in straight but never threatened.
Towards rear of field. Gained clear running but did not improve.
Behind midfield on the rail. Made steady ground along the rail.
Towards rear three wide. Widest on home bend to make up steady ground.
Near rear. Railed up to be midfield on straightening. Made some ground early in straight but run ended at 200 M and was one-paced afterwards.
Behind midfield and 5 wide without cover. Improved to be midfield and wide on straightening. Gave ground shortly afterwards.
Midfield. Quickened gradually after straightening but remained midfield until making strong ground final 200 M.
In front of midfield. Made some ground early in straight to be prominent at 200 M. Found no more final 200 M.
Midfield and 3-wide. Kept on one-paced to hold same position down the running.
Behind midfield and 4 wide. Taken to outside on straightening after dropping to near rear. Made no impression in straight.
Rear. Waited with until straightening then taken to outside but failed to make any real headway when placed under pressure after straightening.
Behind midfield. Remained same into home straight and then made moderate headway but never looked likely.
Behind lead. Didn't quicken when asked after straightening. Kept on mainly one-paced final 200 M.
Followed leader. Gained run through on inner after straightening to reach lead at 200 M. Kept on for strong win.
Around midfield after being checked at 1300 M and 800 M when free. Kept on fairly early in straight then found no extra final 200 M.
Led. Maintained same until 200 M when unable to hold off winner. Kept on well after having soft lead.
Taken back from start to be near rear. Remained same into home straight then had difficulty getting clear run until 200 M. Finished strongly when in clear.
Outside leader. Maintained same until giving ground after 300 M.
Soon led. Headed 200 M, one-paced afterwards. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon at back. Took to the outside to commence a run just before straightening. Made up good ground final stages to be nearest at finish.
Settled midfield or better. Made steady progress in the straight but unable to trouble placegetters.
Soon prominent. Every chance in the straight. Kept on well but just failed to maintain 2nd on the line.
Well there. Did not quicken when asked for effort in the straight.
Towards rear. Gave ground badly from 400 M.
Towards rear. Never a threat.
Settled midfield or worse. Headway 400 M out. Ran on well to the line.
Midfield or better. Kept on one-paced in the straight.
Midfield early. Steadily dropped towards to the rear before rounding the home turn. Ran on quite well from 400 M until no extra closing stages.
Niggled along early to maintain midfield. Caught wide rounding home turn and into the straight. Weakened 250 M out.
Midfield or worse. Ran on without threatening final stages.
Niggled early to be better than midfield. Commenced a move at 400 M and took the lead 200 M out. Kept on well to defy challenges close home.
Tracked leader. Unable to quicken in the straight. One-paced final stages.
Travelled kindly in 3rd or 4th position. Ran on in straight whilst hanging out and was just beaten for a place close home.
Midfield. Kept on in straight until weakened final 200 M.
Soon behind midfield. Towards rear from 1200 M. Widest and last turning in. Not a factor thereafter.
Soon led. Headed 1600 M. 3rd from 1000 M. Kept on in straight until effort not sustained final 100 M.
Always in touch. 2nd from 1000 M. Kept on well in straight until not quickened and swamped for a place close home.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit 200 M out until no extra in the closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up good ground 300 M out until one-paced in the closing stages.
Soon midfield. Stayed on without threatening final 300 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped back towards rear 900 M out. Ran on steadily in straight until weakened final 100 M.
At back. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon sat outside leader. Took up running from 1600 M. Kept on strongly final 400 M for a comfortable victory.
At rear. Improved to behind midfield or a little worse turning into back straight. Took closer order along rail turning in. Responded well final 250 M to grab 3rd place on the line.
Settled around midfield. Ran on steadily from 200 M, one-paced close home.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made only moderate headway final 300 M.
Always prominent, hit the front 200 M out. Overhauled by the first pair when found no extra near the line.
Midfield to 200 M, dropped out.
Midfield throughout. Steadied when crowded inside 100 M, not persevered with afterwards.
Soon last. Ran on strongly from 250 M to just miss pegging back the winner.
Midfield early, improved to forward of midfield at 900 M. Dropped out from 200 M.
Well away and led, soon shifted across to rails. Joined at 700 M, headed inside 200 M. Kept on until beginning to tire closing stages.
Near rear, crowded near 700 M. Made gradual ground from 250 M until no extra closing stages.
Crowded at start, ridden along to be behind leaders from 1200 M. Responded well under pressure final 200 M to get up closing stages.
Rear of midfield. Ran on steadily from 300 M, one-paced near home.
Towards rear throughout. Failed to quicken in straight.
At rear and wide from difficult gate. Made some late progress.
Driven along to press leader from 1000 M. Brief lead 400 M out. Effort not sustained and was swamped inside 200 M.
6th early. Improved to be 4th 1200 M and remained there into straight. Quickened and held every chance 200 M. Found one-paced towards finish.
Always well there. Ridden into straight to challenge inside final 200 M, having every chance.
Towards rear before running on a bit from the 250 M.
Towards rear till making up good ground inside final 200 M.
Always prominent. Quickened under pressure to challenge closing stages. Gained upper hand final strides.
Led field to 200 M where he dropped out steadily.
Never a factor.
Was 9th 1400 M and 6th 1000 M. Found nothing when asked 150 M.
Among rear group to straight. Kept on under pressure closing stages.
Ran 5th to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Slightly worse than midfield to straight where he came under pressure 250 M. Kept on till one-paced near finish.
Towards rear before improving a bit along rails coming into straight. Did not sustain effort 200 M.
Midfield to straight where he kept on steadily under pressure.
Mostly midfield, pulling hard to home bend. Unable quicken to challenge inside 200 M.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Ran on well 250 M to just miss near finish.
In the front, still holding 1L advantage 200 M. Kept on until headed close home.
Among front runners. Led from 800 M to 600 M. Weakened from 2nd inside 200 M.
Prominent. Dropped back to the 5th passing the Rock. Kept on well in straight.
Midfield. Made progress 400 M to be 4th turning in. Continued to make ground in straight while being hampered 150 M.
Towards rear, last rounding home bend. Made up some ground in straight.
Among the front runners, dropping back to 3rd passing 700 M. Kept on but was checked closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back upon straightening.
Slightly behind midfield. Became last on outside final turn. Made moderate progress 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Moved up along rail 300 M. Shifted out for a clear run 150 M to just obtain victory near finish.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent early. Steadied and lost position about 600 M out. Kept on one pace from midfield into straight.
Niggled along. Around midfield most of way. Shifted out for a run early in straight then kept on steadily.
Soon in last few.
Trailed field to straight. Finished strongly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in rear.
Towards rear. Commenced run turning in hugging inside rails. Ran on under pressure.
Soon led. Went clear into straight. Won confidently.
Prominent early then mostly in midfield.
Wide in midfield to straight then weakened.
Behind leaders. Kept on one pace in straight.
Midfield to 200 M then gradually faded.
With leaders to 400 M then gradually weakened.
Among leaders to straight. No extra.
Remained in similar position in midfield. Shifted out on straightening to stay on well in straight.
In touch. Moved up to be among the front runners passing 1000 M. Stayed on well until one-paced closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground rounding home bend. Ran on along rail early straight until finding no extra when steadied at 200 M.
Towards rear. Severely checked at 500 M the first time. Never recovered.
Moved up from a wide draw to midfield. Dropped back a bit when wide final turn. Ran on steadily to make up good ground final 250 M.
Always at the back.
Led field until joined 800 M out, sharing the lead before headed 200 M. Unable to quicken.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away. Never a factor.
Slightly behind midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Prominent. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Held 5th to early straight. Ran on steadily to gain lead 200 M. Held on well.
Mostly 4th until staying on well 300 M to hold some chance passing 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Behind midfield. Steadied at 500 M the first time. Found no clear run when making progress 200 M.
Settled behind leaders. Commenced move passing Rock, sharing lead into straight then soon faded.
Never on terms.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened well to hit front passing 200 M but caught in the shadows of the post.
Always well behind.
Just better than midfield to straight then faded.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily.
Wide in midfield. Made swift progress far side to be close up approaching home bend. Lost some ground turning into straight. Kept on.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Towards rear most of way.
Mainly towards rear with short-lived effort around Rock.
Never better than midfield. Went widest into straight. Kept on same pace.
Made most to 200 M then gradually faded.
Well back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on gamely in straight to snatch victory final strides.
Well there to Rock then gradually weakened.
Forward of midfield at stable bend. Wide from after 600 M. Never made ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear and wide at stable bend. Improved steadily out wide. Rider fined for stop riding.
Restrained from widest gate to be rearward. Worked to midfield at Rock. Saved ground along rails to finish off well.
Missed jump slightly and ridden along to be handy. Gained run on straight and brushed near 100 M.
In forward position but wide with no cover at stable bend. Always wide thereafter and one-paced in the straight.
Right behind leader on the rail at stable bend. Eased outside leader but did not quicken when asked.
Went fast early from wide gate to take lead at stable bend. Weakened on straightening.
Missed start slightly to be rearward. Eased out wide from home bend to be widest in straight to make steady ground.
Behind midfield. Always thereabouts.
Midfield on rails early. Held up slightly towards bend. Made steady ground after clear running from 200 M.
Eased out of speed battle to be handy position with cover. Remained there and made ground in the straight without threatening.
Raced keen early to be in leading division. Began to weaken from 300 M and lost ground quickly.
Began best and then eased to be behind leaders early. Eased out on home bend and gained lead towards 100 M. Shift in and brush another runner.
Behind midfield. Always there and then lost ground in the straight.
Around midfield. Shifted wider on track from 400 M to be in clear on straightening. Responded strongly after straightening and just failed to catch winner.
Led. Held big lead from 1200 M until joined at 700 M. Maintained narrow lead into home straight. Kept on fairly until finding no more final 200 M.
Wide behind midfield. Lost ground after 600 M because of being caught wide. Near rear turning in then made some ground final 250 M.
Near rear. Remained same into home straight then was steadied and shifted out to find clear run near 200 M. When in clear finished strongly.
Prominent. Ridden hard to hold position from 600 M. Gave ground from 400 M.
Midfield. Lost a little ground in middle stages to be behind midfield at 500 M. Was inconvenienced on straightening and dropped to be with rear, then taken to outside and finished strongly.
Behind lead. Carried up to join leader at 700 M. Remained outside leader until taking clear advantage at 200 M. Kept on strongly to score narrow win.
Midfield. Remained on inner around home bend then did not quicken. One-paced.
Taken back to rear. Waited with until after straightening. Made strong ground after 300 M hands and heels. Steadied at 200 M. Made strong ground again hands and heels.
Prominent. Responded only fairly when asked for effort after straightening and kept on mainly one-paced.
Near rear. Remained on inner around home bend but then didn't respond to riding.
Prominent and 3-wide. Remained same into straight then kept on one-paced until finding no extra final 150 M.
Taken back to near rear from start. Remained same into straight then ridden for luck but had difficulty getting clear run after making ground early straight. Not fully tested.

Taken back to behind midfield. Improved gradually from 500 M despite being carried wider. Lost footing in front and became unbalanced on straightening. Took time to regain momentum then finished well final 200 M.
Steadied at start and shifted across to rail at rear. Checked at 400 M, never in contention.
At back. Improved from 600 M and wide middle stages and into straight. Made good ground after 200 M.
Well there, kept on well.
Mainly midfield, closer order rounding home bend to be 3rd into straight. Kept on.
Mainly midfield. Wide entering straight. Hung in badly in straight and proved difficult to ride out.
Checked at start, at back to 200 M. Finished strongly to be nearest at finish.
Midfield, caught wide entering straight. No further progress.
At the back. Hampered near 400 M. Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly, ridden along from outside draw to sit behind leader. Every chance 100 M out, found winner too strong close home.
Well to straightening. Weakened badly.
Settled around midfield. Closer order rounding home bend to be prominent into straight. Kept on well in straight without threatening the first pair.
Settled behind midfield. Responded well after straightening. Went through the field to get up closing stages.
Towards the rear. Hung out on home turn. Made up a little late ground.
Soon led, headed inside 100 M. Unable to quicken.
Prominent. Joined the leader upon straightening. Weakened final 150 M.
Always thereabout. Remained in 4th most of his trip.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Steadied at 600 M. No improvement in straight. Hung in throughout.
Midfield. Kept on well in straight. Never nearer.
Never better than midfield.
Missed the start, was last early stages. Remained in the rear group until running on steadily in straight to take command close home.
Prominent early, settling 5th. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Prominent 2nd. Took lead turning in until 100 M out. Found no extra.
Remained in similar position throughout.
Better than midfield. Pushed along early straight to make up good ground inside 300 M. Took lead briefly 100 M out but was soon caught.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field to final turn. Faded rapidly. (Bled.)
Mainly in midfield or better. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Missed the start slightly. Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Rear early. Ran on inside final 200 M doing best work at finish.
Led to halfway then gradually weakened.
Midfield early. Ran on steadily closing stages.
Tailed off most of way.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily closing stages.
Never on terms.
Began awkwardly. Always well there. Kept on steadily while shifting about closing stages.
Behind leaders early. Gradually weakened from halfway.
Slightly slow into stride. Moved up to first few onto course proper hitting front over 300 M out. Hung on well.
Midfield throughout. Kept on.
Well there. Hit front briefly onto course proper but soon found no extra.
Settled at the back. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
In touch early, settled midfield. Ran on early straight to reach 2nd 200 M. Kept on but lost a minor placing close home.
Around midfield before dropping out soon after straightening.
Made all. Just held off placegetters' challenges closing stages.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground 250 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Not far off to home turn. Unable to quicken.
Jumped well from widest draw. Was in touch until weakening out of contention 300 M.
Rear. Ran on well from outside 250 M, doing best work at finish.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit 800 M. Made moderate progress final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Pushed along on the rail turning in. Ran on under pressure final 200 M, just failed.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Sat outside leader to straight. Unable to hold place when weakened 200 M.
In touch. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Broke well and led till closing stages. Fought on well for 2nd place.
Checked at start. Settled at the back. Ran on along rails in straight.
Sluggish at start. Remained well back. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Prominent early, settling in midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
With leaders briefly dropping to 4th home bend. Tightened early in straight then one-paced. (Lame.)
Ridden to join leaders early. Settled in 3rd around home bend. Found no extra upon straightening and soon overhauled.
Midfield to 300 M then weakened. (Bled.)
Prominent but wide far side. Gradually settled in midfield by home bend. Behind midfield when convenienced upon straightening. No further impression.
Settled in rear. Made up late ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield racing wide throughout. Quickened well to hit front 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and lost advantage on line.
Began from poor draw and remained wide throughout. Waited with till running on well in straight to get up by the narrowest of margins.
Towards rear. Made some headway early in straight but one-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. Dropped out upon straightening.
Given reminder to muster early pace. Chased leader to 300 M. Kept on for 4th without troubling first trio.
Eased out of speed battle to be handy with cover at first turn. Gained clear run at 400 M to score.
No early pace to be wide at the rear. Made up good ground from 600 M to just miss placegetters.
Always at the rear.
Midfield. Did not make any ground.
Began best and ridden hard early to cross to lead. There until 300 M when commenced to weaken.
Showed early pace to be behind leader early. A bit one-paced in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Just behind leader. Every chance in straight but could not match winner.
Rear of midfield early. Made no effort thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Right behind leader at first bend. Hit front at 300 M but not able to hold off winner.
Good early pace but eased from speed battle to be handy. Never in contention.
Rear of midfield in early stages. Always thereabouts.
3 wide equal lead until 400 M. Made no ground when asked.
Checked shortly after the start to be rearward. Never in contention.
Went forward to be outside leader. Began to weaken after 500 M.

Began awkwardly and then dropped to the rear from wide draw. Headway from 1200 M to around midfield. Hampered near 600 M. Made up good ground final 300 M despite being unbalanced and not ridden out near the post.
Dropped steadily from widest draw to the back. Inconvenienced about 400 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
In touch from 1200 M. Lost position 800 M and unbalanced 600 M. Never a threat in straight.
Niggled along and soon sat outside the leader. Kept on in straight until weakened badly final 200 M.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
In touch early before dropping back to midfield or worse from 1100 M. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Never far off. 3rd or 4th turning in. Kept on until weakened badly final 100 M.
Soon dropped towards rear. Ran on a little 200 M out without ever looking likely.
Ridden forward and led approaching 1200 M. Kept on in straight until one-paced and headed 100 M out.
Jumped best before settling forward of midfield. Ran on in straight until finding no more final 100 M.
Soon dropped to the rear. Inconvenienced about 400 M. Made up good ground final 250 M until not quickened close home.
Towards rear early. Midfield from 1000 M. Ran on steadily in straight until no extra 100 M out.

Jumped fairly before dropping steadily towards rear. Steadied after 1000 M. Shifted out for clear running on straightening and ran on well final 300 M. Took charge inside 100 M for a comfortable victory.
Ridden forward and led briefly before settling in 3rd place. Ran on determinedly in straight to grab 2nd in the closing stages but without threatening the winner.
Always well there. Took up running 900 M out. Headed turning in and soon weakened.
At rear. Improved whilst hanging in from 800 M. Made up some ground in straight.
Soon led before settling in 2nd or 3rd from stable bend. Re-gained lead turning in. Kept on until effort not sustained closing stages.
Began awkwardly. Mostly behind midfield or worse. Progressed around field from 800 M to be in touch turning in. Ran on steadily in straight. (Wide without cover throughout.)
Led briefly before settling in touch. Dropped back to midfield or better from 1000 M. Hard ridden from 900 M and got crowded when giving ground 800 M. Not a factor thereafter.
Midfield or better whilst proving difficult to settle in the early stages. Widest turning in. Ran on strongly final 300 M and just failed to catch the winner.
Soon midfield or better. Bounded in the air near the winning post. Awkward making the first turn. Took closer order turning in. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Given reminders early and settled in 4th place rounding stable bend. Raced awkwardly near 1200 M. Improved 600 M out and took lead from 300 M. Kept on strongly and just held off the 2nd horse.
Towards rear. Improved from 800 M. Ran on in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
Bumped at start. Went forward and led rounding stable bend. Headed 900 M. Gave ground quickly 500 M out.
Began awkwardly. Towards rear. Given reminder along back straight. Last rounding home bend. Never a factor.
In touch early. Awkwardly placed 1200 M and then settled forward of midfield. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Soon at back. Steadied when tightened 800 M. Shifted in abruptly 400 M out. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Mainly 4th or 5th. Ran on well after straightening to grab 3rd on the line.
Midfield early. Steadily moved forward to share the lead before 800 M. Took command turning into the straight until headed by the winner final stages.
Slowly away. At rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Midfield or worse. Never a factor.
Towards rear. Accelerated from 400 M. Made significant progress along inside to snatch the race final stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon worse than midfield. Never closer.
Slipped behind on jumping and was further inconvenienced. Never in contention.
Led early. Disputed lead before 800 M. Headed 600 M and weakened steadily after the 250 M.
Handy. Every chance at 300 M. Could not quicken final stages and lost 3rd placing close home.
Midfield or worse. Taken out near 800 M. Caught wide rounding home turn. Responded well in the straight but shifted out badly in the run to the winning post.
Midfield or better throughout.
Midfield. Under pressure near 600 M. Kept on in the straight.
Midfield throughout. No extra final stages. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Made up little late ground closing to the line.
Began very awkwardly, became unbalanced and dipped. At rear until attempting to improve from 400 M but was steadied at 200 M when disappointed for running, made gradual ground thereafter.
Near rear, made moderate progress final 200 M.
Behind pace early, checked near 900 M when inclined to pull and lost position to be rear of midfield. No clear run early in straight and was not able to quicken.
Pulled to the front then travelled in front of midfield from 900 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Well there early then dropped to forward of midfield at 900 M. Checked at 700 M and dropped further back.
Midfield to 600 M. Tailed off 200 M out.
Never far off, pulled hard middle stages. Kept on well though no threat to the first pair.
Began awkwardly, well back. Swift headway wide from 1000 M to be 4th rounding home bend. Effort not sustained on straightening and dropped out.
Prominent, dropped back slightly from 900 M. Remained well in touch into straight. Gave ground steadily inside 200 M.
Began fairly, ridden along to recover ground to take lead at 900 M. Headed 250 M out, kept on quite well.
Always prominent. Brief lead 1000 M to 900 M. Asked to regain lead 300 M out, just held on to refy challenger's late surge.
Held up in midfield. Ran on well from 300 M to just miss narrowly.
At rear. Made up some late ground on outer.
Jumped awkwardly, well there to 250 M, wide in back straight. Steadily weakened.
Settled at the back. Finished strongly down centre of straight to miss narrowly.
Settled in last few. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Wide in midfield early. Moved up to stalk leader home bend. Still in contention in early part of straight but overhauled nearing finish.
Never far off to straight then gradually faded.
Settled in midfield on inside rails. Baulked for a run home bend and in straight until 200 M. Finished well. (Lame.)
Mostly in midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Close up early. Dropped to just better than midfield home bend. Quickened in straight to hit front over 200 M out but caught close home.
Led until headed when no extra inside 300 M.
Never better than midfield.
Settled in last few. Obtained split about 300 M out and ran on to gain upper hand final strides.
Rear when hampered early. Never in contention.
Midfield early. Gave ground from home bend.
Well there. Hampered early in straight then never recovered.
Mostly 4th to straight. Ran on well to take command 200 M. Unable to match speed with the winner closing stages.
Led. Found no extra when headed inside 200 M. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Behind midfield. Made ground after turning in. Was inconvenienced 250 M. Kept on without threatening.
Remained 9th until running on strongly from outside final 250 M to win convincingly final 50 M.
Jumped awkwardly, recovered ground far side to be 3rd 1100 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly, last throughout.
In touch. Weakened from 150 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or behind. Unable to improve in straight.
Remained 6th or 7th throughout.
Sat outside leader. Kept on one-paced 200 M out.

In last few. Made up some late ground past beaten runners closing stages.
Jumped slowly. Always in last few.
Well back. Never nearer.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Jumped fairly. Held up in last few. Ran on steadily in straight.
Well there. Hit front upon straightening. Headed about 300 M out. (Lame.)
Broke well. Settled behind leaders. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Midfield to home bend and weakened. (Lame.)
Settled in midfield on rails after beginning from poor draw. Found no extra in straight.
Well back. Made up some late ground closing stages.

In touch. Made no show while hanging in badly in straight.

Led or shared lead to 250 M. No extra.
Led or shared lead until headed 150 M. Found no extra.

Behind midfield and wide. Never in contention.

Midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Held up in midfield. Carried wide entering straight. Found nothing.
Always prominent. Found nothing in straight.
Soon took up running. Held on well.
Always in last few.
Held up towards rear. Made no show.
Midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Made steady headway in straight.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Settled in last few. Kept on steadily past beaten runners in straight.
Very wide and behind midfield to straight, then faded.
Settled in better than midfield. Dropped to midfield into straight. One-paced.
Never far off. Gained 2nd turning in. Kept on steadily and lost position late.

In forward position early. Never quickened.

Went forward from wide gate to be outside leader at 800 M. Weakened from 300 M.
Right behind leaders to first bend. Eased out on straightening not able to match the winner.
Rearward. Made no impression.
Not far off leaders early stages. Weakened from 400 M. (Distressed.)
Behind midfield. Never quickened.
At rear early. Made moderate ground in the straight.
Handy position early stages. Clear run on straightening but a bit one-paced.

Outside leader. One-paced in straight until giving ground final 150 M.

Behind midfield. No response when asked for effort on straightening.
Behind lead. Kept on one-paced until giving ground final 100 M.
Led until giving ground quickly final 350 M.
Began awkwardly and was near rear until taken into clear on straightening. Continued to make ground in run to the line. (Lame.)

Behind lead and 3 wide. Responded well under pressure in straight but no match for quinella pair.
Behind midfield. One-paced in straight.
Near rear. No response in straight.

Around midfield. Unable to get clear run early in straight. Responded strongly when clear final 200 M.

Jumped well. Soon settled better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Midfield. Found nothing in the straight.

Prominent. One-paced in straight.
Settled midfield or worse. Wide in early stages. Never a factor.
Towards the rear. No further progress in straight.
Knuckled on jumping and soon at rear. Never closer.

Soon behind leader. Kept on steadily to the line but found the first pair too strong.

Disputed lead to 1000 M and then took up running. Kept on in straight. Headed 250 M and soon weakened.
Well there to 250 M and then dropped right out of contention.

In touch early before settling in midfield or better. Never a threat in straight.

Led briefly before dropping steadily back to forward of midfield. Ran on determinedly final 300 M and took lead 100 M out. Held on.
Jumped poorly and remained at rear. Last from 800 M. Made up good ground on the inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start but soon recovered to be around midfield. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Never far off, kept on well.
Slowly away, at rear on inner until shifting out to join main group 700 M out. Drifted back towards inner when driven along 500 M out, never in the hunt.
Mostly midfield to 200 M where beginning to tire.
Settled better than midfield. Shaken up from 300 M, hold some chance inside 200 M. Gave ground steadily from 100 M.
Best away, made virtually all to score convincingly.
Midfield on inner. Shifted out to join main group 600 M out. Dropped out from 300 M.
Always in touch, kept on well.
Near rear throughout, never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly and lost considerable ground to be rearward. Made ground steadily from 300 M to be nearest at finish.

Around midfield towards inner. Shifted out to join main group 700 M out. Kept on without quickening.
Always well there, kept on well, just failed to obtain 2nd place final strides.
Within striking distance after lunging forward marginally before the start and opened gates. Steadied at 200 M, gave ground gradually.
Slowly away, well back. Under pressure from 600 M, only ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Never near to challenge.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield into straight where he stayed on steadily.
Made steady headway from rear home bend to be midfield into straight. Ran on quite well inside final 200 M despite not reaching winner.
Made no show.
Mostly midfield to straight where he kept on without threatening.
About 6th or 7th rounding home bend. Found nothing under pressure closing stages.
Well there to straight where he soon came under pressure. Found nothing.
Was last 1200 M and remained there to straight. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Never far off and ran 2nd into straight. Kept on till finding no extra passing 150 M.
Well there to straight where he soon gave ground.
Took lead 1200 M and made rest, keeping on well under pressure close home.
Never better than mid-division.
Led. Set strong pace far side. Faded upon straightening.
Behind midfield. Kept on 200 M out.
In touch. Midfield 1100 M. Dropped out from 700 M.
Jumped very awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on from 9th 200 M to grab lead near finish.
Midfield. Made progress early straight. Kept on without threatening.
Mostly 3rd. Kept on in straight until one-paced close home.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress soon after straightening.
Midfield. Became 5th far side. Ran on steadily from outside 300 M. Never nearer.
Held 4th to 200 M. Made no show thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Remained 2nd until taking over turning in. Held on but was caught final strides.
Soon last. Ran past 3 beaten horses in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield and wide. Commenced run home bend sharing pace into straight. Kicked 1L clear 200 M out then kept on under pressure.
Settled behind leaders. Hampered and lost position approaching home bend. Ran on in straight.
Slightly sluggish at start. Ridden to contest early lead. Took 1L advantage far side. Headed soon after straightening.
Led briefly. Settled behind leaders. Faded in straight.
Towards rear to straight. Finished strongly.
Raced just better than midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Amongst leaders early, then restrained behind pace far side. Soon weakened in straight.
Mainly behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Midfield. Ran on in straight.
Always in last few.
Began badly. Never nearer.
Towards rear. Checked 450 M out. Recovered some ground early straight. Soon found no extra.
Well there. Sat outside leader until gaining upper hand 200 M. Unable to resist challenges and was headed close home.
Towards rear. Made progress 450 M to be in touch turning in. Kept on when under pressure 250 M.
Tardy start, remained at rear, severely checked to avoid faller near 500 M.
Midfield from a wide draw. Progressed gradually to 4th 600 M. Ran on without threatening the first pair.
In touch. Steadied along rail rounding home bend. Checked and knuckled near 500 M. Never recovered.
Behind midfield. Made some progress final turn. Kept on in straight.

Soon led. Headed 200 M. Unable to quicken close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch. Eased down 600 M. (Lame.)
Midfield and wide. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Broke well then held up in 3rd behind leader. Took over home bend. Headed about 200 M out but kept on under pressure. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden to take up running from poor draw. Dropped out home bend.
Raced freely in midfield with short-lived effort far side. Gradually faded in straight.
Rear till running on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Held up in 4th. Gave ground gradually from 600 M.

Well there. Hit front briefly about 200 M out. Kept on.

Never better than midfield.
Settled at the back. Ran on strongly down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide behind midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Well back. Ran on well to snatch victory on line.
Went to lead from wide gate. There until 300 M then weakened.

In leading division first bend. Never quickened from home bend.

Slow to muster speed from wide alley behind midfield. Always there.

At rear. Never likely.

Near rear after beginning awkwardly. One-paced in straight.

Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Faltered at start. Settled behind midfield. Ran on inside 250 M without threatening.
Midfield most of way.
Soon in rear. Never nearer.
Soon in rear. (See Racing Incidents.)

Settled towards rear. Produced some late impression running past beaten horses closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily.
Began awkwardly. Always in last few and never nearer.
Well there. Weakened onto course proper.

Always at the back.
Always thereabout. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.

Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)

Always in rear.

Began best from inside gate to lead. Overtaken on home bend. Weakened thereafter.

Always prominent, wide on first bend. Challenged leader from 250 M to hold every chance 100 M out. Found winner too strong concluding stages.
Slowly away, soon recovered to be in touch. Dropped out from 300 M.
Behind pace, caught 4-wide on first turn. Dropped back a little from 600 M. Remained same in home straight until beginning to give ground 100 M out.
Niggled along early but always at rear. Switched widest rounding home bend and ran on well from 300 M to take charge closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, rear of midfield throughout. Never seen with a chance.
At rear. Steady progress from 700 M to be midfield and wide entering straight. Unable to improve further.
Midfield. Ran on steadily from 250 M, kept on same pace close home.
Settled towards rear. Made gradual ground from 200 M. No extra close home.
Worked forward to attempt to make all. Challenged and overhauled by the quinella pair final 100 M, kept on quite well.
In touch early, then remained around mid-division from 1100 M. Not a factor in the straight.
Missed start, soon recovered ground to be midfield on rail. Gave ground from 250 M.
Better than midfield throughout, kept on one pace in straight.
Prominent early when caught wide running to first turn. Midfield from 1400 M. Weakened from 150 M.
Waited with at tail. Steadied at 400 M then improved through field from 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. At back. Wide on home bend. Made up good ground in straight.
In touch. Hampered first turn. Weakened from 200 M.
Soon better than midfield. Checked and clipped heels first turn. Never a factor afterwards.
In touch. Kept on well in straight.
Mainly midfield. Ran on well in straight. Winner too strong.
Well there to 250 M. Weakened.
Jumped well. Always there. Weakened from 300 M.
Jumped slowly. At back to straight. Shifted out to outside at 400 M. Made up good ground. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Behind midfield. Checked first turn. Never in contention afterwards.
Ridden to lead. Made all.
Tardy start. Soon in midfield. Failed to quicken in straight.
At back. Wide on home bend. Made up little ground in straight.
Towards rear. Improved from 800 M to be midfield turning in. One-paced in straight.
Led field to approaching 200 M. Weakened.
In touch. Improved to 3rd final turn. Ran on to take lead approaching 200 M. Unable to match speed with winner closing stages.
Made no show.
Towards rear. No improvement in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped to the rear home bend. Tailed off in straight.
Slightly slowly away, soon recovered ground to be 2nd. Held on well until finding no extra final 200 M.
Dropped to the rear group soon after start. Never in contention.
Rear early, soon recovered ground to be midfield. Dropped out from final turn.
Never far off. Kept on same pace in straight.
Mostly 3rd or 4th to straight. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Settled 8th. Made progress rounding home bend. Ran on from outside when 7th early straight to take over final 100 M.
Better than midfield. Made ground steadily in straight without threatening.
Was soon last from a wide draw. Progressed to the midfield turning in. Kept on.
Soon took up running approaching home bend. Forged clear inside 200 M to win readily.
Bumped and lost ground at start. Always last few and hung in badly.
Well there. Disputed lead early in straight. Unable to sustain effort over 200 M out.
Wide in midfield early. Good headway rounding home bend joining leaders into straight. Held some chance early on until no extra final 200 M.
Broke well and led early. Held up behind leaders. Fought on under pressure in straight without threatening.
Raced greenly throughout. Dropped to tail-end home bend.
Ridden in midfield early. Weakened upon straightening.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never far off to straight. One-paced early in straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight. Never nearer.
Never better than midfield.
Rear. Commenced run into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Steadied to midfield home bend. Produced good late impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear. Made ground steadily in straight.
Prominent early. Remained in touch to final turn. Faded final 200 M.
Midfield. Made progress final turn. Was checked passing 400 M. Soon recovered to take 2nd inside 150 M.
Midfield. Steadied 200 M. Never recovered.
Prominent. Caused interference early straight and again near 100 M. Lost a minor placing near finish.
Rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, pushed forward to be just behind midfield. Kept on well final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Moved forward to be 2nd 800 M. Kept on until checked 100 M out. Weakened.
Soon led and never headed.
Made no show.
Prominent early, soon dropped back to be midfield or slightly better. One-paced.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 250 M. Wide throughout.
Midfield. Improved from 800 M to be in touch final turn. Kept on well in straight.
Travelled just better than midfield. 5th into straight. Ran on steadily to hold every chance inside 200 M.
Broke well and led far side. Tracked leader into straight and fought on to re-gain lead briefly inside 200 M but soon found no extra.
Towards rear to straight. Kept on steadily.
Never nearer.
Well back. Steadied about 300 M out and made up late ground to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, then raced in midfield to home bend when dropped out.
Rear to straight. Improving well when forced to steady inside 200 M.
Around midfield to straight. Shifted out for a run early on and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent before steadied to midfield about 1200 M out. Quickened well inside final 300 M to assert authority close home.
Ridden to muster early pace. Settled behind leaders to straight. Ran on steadily to hit front closing stages but soon overhauled.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield early and wide. Moved up to take up running home bend and led till no extra 200 M out.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Wide behind midfield. Faded from home bend.
Worked across to be right behind leaders. Wider on home bend and then began to weaken.
Rearward and wide at first bend. Never quickened.
Midfield with cover. Widest on home bend but did not make threat in the straight.
Towards rear early. Made ground on home bend and then made steady ground in the straight.
Little slow into stride to be rearward. Commenced run around field after 700 M and made steady ground in the straight.
At rear and very wide at first bend. Last at home bend and then made only moderate ground in straight.
Worked forward from wide alley to be outside leader. One-paced in the straight.
Midfield and wide at first turn. Always there.
Went forward from inside gate to lead. Led until 200 M then one-paced.
Midfield on the rail. One-paced.
Slow to begin. At rear. Always thereabouts.
Began best to be straight to lead then eased at first bend to be behind leader. There until home bend and then one paced.
Settled behind leader. Eased out on home bend for game win.
Towards rear and on the rail early. There until 500 M then worked to outside to make good ground out wide.
Midfield. Into clear after straightening and responded well to claim 3rd placing close to home.
Midfield throughout.
4 wide outside lead early. Continued forward to be 2 wide and hold narrow advantage on straightening. Kept on strongly to maintain narrow lead in straight.
Near rear. Remained on inner after straightening and was disappointed for a run. Only slight improvement afterwards.
Near rear. Improved to be wide in midfield on straightening. Further improvement early in straight then no more final 200 M.
Prominent and wide. Kept on one paced early straight then gave ground final 200 M.
Prominent. Kept on well in straight and just failed to hold onto 3rd placing.
Near rear. After straightening gained nice run through near inner and responded well. Continued to make ground in the run to the line.
With lead early. Trailed leaders into straight. Kept on early straight then gave ground final 200 M.
At rear. Only passed tiring horses in straight.
Led. With lead on straightening and kept on strongly but unable to peg back winner.
Followed leaders into straight then gave ground quickly.
Outside leader early. Trailed leaders into straight and gave ground quickly shortly afterwards.
Steadied just after the start. Then midfield. Steadied again at 300 M. Ran on steadily final stages.
Towards rear. Failed to make any impression in straight.
In touch. Steadied twice when disappointed for running near 300 M and 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
At rear. Never nearer.
Soon led. Headed 250 M. Weakened badly inside 100 M.
Prominent early. Tracked leader from 1000 M. Every chance upon straightening. Kept on to hold 2nd narrowly.
Mainly midfield. No extra in straight.
At back. Ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Well there. Kept on in straight without threatening.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Mainly midfield or worse. Dropped out after 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Ran on well to the line to miss 2nd narrowly.
Worse than midfield. Wide turning into straight. Made up little late ground.
Mainly better than midfield and wide throughout. Moved closer before turning into straight. Took lead 250 M and won comfortably.
Jumped awkwardly. Behind midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M until no extra in the closing stages.
Inconvenienced at start. At rear. Ran on strongly final 300 M and grabbed 2nd on the line without threatening the winner.
Stumbled on jumping. Soon recovered to be thereabout. Under pressure rounding home bend. Weakened badly final 250 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 350 M.
Always at rear. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Travelled kindly in 2nd or 3rd place. Checked when disappointed for running at 400 M. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
At rear. Pulled in the middle stages. Improved a little 800 M out. Wide turning in. Ran on well final 300 M only to lose 2nd on the line.
Soon forward of midfield. Responded well upon straightening and took lead 150 M out. Held on well.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Never a threat.
Well there. Sat outside the leader from 1200 M. Soon weakened and dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Never far off. Hung out home turn. Responded well upon straightening and led 350 M out. Headed 150 M. One-paced thereafter.
Led to 350 M. Weakened badly thereafter.
Behind midfield or a little worse. Made up some ground from 350 M until one-paced close home.
Midfield or better. Hung out in the middle stages and badly on home turn. Ran on steadily until not quickened close home.
In rear to straight when he made up considerable ground to claim 2nd close home.
Shifted out abruptly after start and unseated rider.
Well there before moving up to lead 300 M. Was headed 100 M and plugged on under pressure.
Last and wide into straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear and was under pressure approaching home turn. Ran on strongly inside 200 M to narrowly miss 2nd.
Was 2nd before taking lead briefly into straight. Faded rapidly once headed.
Was 6th going into straight when he made up some ground from the 250 M. Found no extra close home.
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Midfield early. Improved to be 5th home bend. Ran on in straight to challenge passing 200 M. One-paced near finish.
Given reminders early and was up there before losing ground approaching 1200 M. Made no show after.
Never far off to halfway.
Soon improved towards leaders and was 4th turning into straight. Quickened 250 M and led 100 M, holding on well to line.
Never on terms.
Held narrow lead to home turn. Weakened badly on straightening.
Better than midfield. Slightly progressed to 4th home turn. Found no extra final 200 M.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Ran on final 200 M.
Never in contention.
Led field to 300 M out. Faded closing stages.
Mostly 4th to straight. Unable to quicken.
Towards rear. Moderate progress turning in. Soon found no extra.
Towards rear. Made ground strongly 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield rounding home bend. Towards rear early straight. Tailed off final 200 M.
Pushed along to soon be prominent. Came to tackle leader home bend. Ran on to take lead 300 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Midfield or behind. Ran on steadily in straight.
Soon prominent. Kept on same pace in straight.
Behind midfield and was wide to straight. Unable to quicken.
Behind midfield. Hung out middle stages. Made up good ground inside 200 M, just failing to catch the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield to home bend. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back. Ran on steadily on rails in straight.
Given reminders to hold midfield position early. Gradually weakened upon straightening.
Always last few.
Broke well. Settled behind pace. Kept on before weakening 200 M out in straight.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well down centre of straight to win by a commanding break.
Took up running approaching home bend holding 2Ls break into straight. Unable to sustain effort and swamped 200 M out.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to narrowly miss remote 2nd.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Towards rear. Produced good late impression to be nearest at finish.
Ridden along from poor draw to settle behind leader. Kept on steadily early in straight but could find no extra inside 200 M.
Raced in 4th just better than midfield. Quickened to hit front momentarily inside 200 M but immediately overhauled.
Never better than rear of midfield.
Well back. Widest turning in. Ran on steadily.
Mostly 4th or 5th until finding no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on 200 M out.
Soon led. Shared lead final turn until headed 250 M. No extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. Unbalanced near 1000 M, dropping to the rear. Recovered some ground rounding home bend. Inconvenienced early straight, soon dropped out.
Prominent early. Dropped back gradually to be midfield turning in. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Never able to feature.
In similar position throughout.
Tracked leader until joined final turn. Gained upper hand 250 M and held on well to finish.
Pushed along from widest draw to be prominent. Kept on in straight to reach 2nd inside 150 M. No threat to the winner.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Towards rear. Severely checked near 1000 M. Made no show.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Recovered ground to be 4th home bend. Kept on well early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Last to straight. Made up considerable ground inside 250 M.
Midfield throughout.
Midfield to 450 M. Dropped out.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never far off. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to straight then weakened badly.
Always last few.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run turning in. Ran on steadily.
Wide without cover in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Well back. Saved ground on inside turning in. Kept on steadily.
Began well from inside draw and attempted to make all.
Well back. Commenced move home bend. Ran on well from midfield into straight.
Ridden along to dispute lead. Gained upper hand close home.
Prominent. Ran on steadily closing stages to just claim 3rd.
Tailed off far side and into straight. Ran past beaten runners.
Midfield early. Wide and rear on home bend. Never quickened.
Worked across from wide alley to lead then eased to be behind leader. Never quickened from 600 M. Weakened badly.
Settled outside leader then overraced and strode forward to lead. Soon overtaken on straightening.
Towards midfield early. Only one-paced in the straight.
Towards rear early. Widest on home bend and made up good ground out wide but never threatened winner.
At rear early. Came from well back on home turn out wide and made up good ground.
Midfield early then checked to be rearward. Always well back and never made any threat.
Very wide forward of midfield. Never nearer.
At rear early. Worked to midfield middle stages. Out wide on home bend then only one-paced.
Towards rear early. Disappointed for a run on home bend. Then never made much ground thereafter.
In handy position early and then checked to be forward of midfield.
Settled right behind leader. Eased outside leader but never threatened winner.
Forward of midfield on the rail. Always there until 400 M then weakened.
Went forward to be in handy position. Eased out on home bend and soon improved to score impressive win.
Never far off until beginning to tire 100 M out.
Always there. Looked a chance 100 M out until no extra final 50 M.
Severely checked at start, trailed field to 400 M. Made steady progress final 250 M.
Unable to keep up despite driven along. At rear from 1100 M until making some headway on outer final 250 M.
Pushed along early to dispute lead. Clear advantage 200 M out, swamped inside 100 M.
Severely checked at start, near rear throughout. Never seen with a chance. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled rear of midfield. Responded well final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon sharing lead. Steadily weakened from 100 M.
Towards rear. Under pressure from 800 M but failed to respond.
Around midfield, gave ground from 100 M.
Settled just better than midfield. Ran on well upon straightening though having a tendency to shift ground. Every chance 100 M out, just collared by the winner final strides.
In front of midfield throughout. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Brief lead, remained in touch until dropping out from the 600 M when unbalanced several time. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind mid-division. Driven along from 500 M, made steady progress to get up near the line.
Soon disputed lead. Clear advantage from 800 M until finding winner too strong final 100 M.
Midfield. Under pressure from 700 M when beginning to give ground. Weakened further in home straight.
Jump awkwardly. Pushed along to be midfield. Made up a little late ground.
Jumped awkwardly, midfield and wide early. Ran on quite well final 200 M until no extra near finish.
Inconvenienced at start, at rear to straightening. Made up some ground from 300 M, effort not sustained final 100 M.
Niggled along from wide draw to be in touch. Ran on steadily final 200 M to claim 3rd close home.
Disputed lead to 800 M, then sat behind leader. Steadied at 600 M. Gradually weakened from 200 M.
Steadily dropped behind midfield from widest draw. Ran on well from 300 M. One-paced closing stages.
Well there to 600 M. Under pressure and dropped to midfield entering straight. Kept on one pace.
In touch briefly, dropped steadily to last at 900 M. Never a factor.
Not far off to 400 M. Faded.
Settled at rear. Switched wide on straightening and ran on strongly from 300 M to assert authority inside 100 M.
Prominent to 250 M. Steadily weakened inside final 150 M.
Niggled along in midfield. Dropped back a bit on home bend. Not a factor in the straight.
In touch early from the widest draw. Dropped back steadily.
Rear. Checked at 400 M. Made ground steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Progressed to 6th passing 400 M. Maintained same to finish.
Better than midfield. Made no show soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Checked at 800 M. Was last turning in. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Followed leader to straight. Ran on to take control 100 M out. Just held on.
Better than midfield. Ran on from 5th early straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Behind midfield. Steadied 400 M. No progress in straight.
Led soon after start, still holding 1L advantage turning in. Was one-paced when headed 100 M out.
Raced keenly to 3rd and was difficult to settle middle stages. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Was inconvenienced passing 600 M. Crept closer order along rail final turn. Kept on steadily.
Midfield. Made progress to 4th 450 M. Kept on quite well in straight.
Mainly in 3rd to 400 M. One-paced under pressure.
Always well behind.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Improving well when badly hampered over 200 M out. Sustained progress to the line.
Tracked leader. Took over upon straightening holding some 1L break 200 M out but caught final stride.
Around midfield. No extra closing stages.
Travelled better than midfield. Kept on one pace under pressure in straight.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground in straight weaving his way through field to snatch victory final stride.
Towards rear. Produced late impression closing stages.
Midfield. Made moderate progress in straight but unable to sustain effort nearing home.
Wide in midfield. Dropped to last few home bend.
Prominent early, then travelled mainly in midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Led to 400 M. Gradually weakened in straight.
Jumped well, settled 4th. Hung out 600 M. Found no extra in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Dropped to behind midfield far side. One-paced in straight.
Last to final turn. Made ground steadily in straight.
Prominent. Became 2nd near 900 M. Took over at 200 M but was beaten narrowly at finish when joined by the winner closing stages.
Tardy start, towards rear. Crept close order along inner final turn. Kept on well to be nearest at finish.
Soon led. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Never in contention.
Better than midfield. Dropped back turning in.
Behind midfield. Widest turning in. Ran on a bit. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Made no show final 250 M.
Prominent. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Settled midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Ran on well to grab lead in a ding-dong battle closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made ground steadily from 400 M. (Lame.)
Prominent. Gradually gave ground from halfway. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide in first few. 3rd into straight. Gradually faded.
Held up in prominent position. Hit front passing 800 M but headed upon straightening. Weakened.
Well behind. Produced good late finish closing stages.
Broke well and led early. Disputed lead around home bend. Re-gained advantage turning in but caught in the shadows of the post.
Wide in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Made up good ground down straight to claim victory near line.
Rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Sluggish at start. Well back till running past beaten horses closing stages.
Midfield. Awkwardly placed behind weakening runner early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well in straight.
Midfield and wide early stages. Never threatened and weakened closing stages.
Towards rear early. Lost ground after 600 M and tailed off.
Handy position on rail early. There until after 200 M when onepaced.
Midfield early. Made up steady ground from 500 M but never threatened placegetters.
Eased early to be behind leader. Eased out to make run but onepaced.
Ridden hard from wide gate to lead. Always there until 200 M.
At rear early. Never threatened.
Went forward just behind leaders. Under pressure from 500 M but never threatened winner.
Midfield on rail early. Made ground after 600 M and eased out to score convincingly.
At rear early. Made only moderate ground when placed under pressure.
Midfield, three wide early. Always there and then onepaced in the straight.
Wide at rear early. Rearward throughout then made only steady ground along rail in straight.
Went forward early stages. Out wide in the straight but no threat.
Wide at rear early. Always there.
Near rear. Remained same into straight then made only fair ground under hard riding.
Midfield. Remained on inner and made good ground after 400 M. Continued to make gradual ground in the run to the line.
Slow to begin and at rear. Moved closer along rail after 900 M. Remained on inner around home turn and made steady ground in run to line.
Behind midfield. Kept on one paced until giving ground last bit.
Near rear. Dropped to be with rear at 700 M. Made run wide on track from 400 M and responded well to arrive in last stride.
In front of midfield and 3 wide. Midfield turning in. One-paced until giving ground final 100 M.
Caught wide early and allowed to stride forward to be 3 wide outside the lead. Remained same into home straight then at 200 M effects of hard run set in and commenced to give ground.
In front of midfield. One paced under hard riding early in straight then gave ground final 200 M.
Led. Kept on strongly when challenged after straightening. Failed to hold off winner in last stride.
In front of midfield. One paced in straight.
With rear. Carried wide when commencing to make run at 400 M. Once balanced in straight made steady ground.
Outside the leader. Found no extra when asked for effort at 400 M.
Behind midfield. Remained same into straight then did not obtain clear run so was not tested.
Followed leader. Into clear on straightening and responded well to be narrowly beaten.
Travelled kindly behind the pace. Quickened well upon straightening and took lead 150 M out. Held on well.
Jumped very awkwardly. Mainly midfield. Weakened badly 100 M out.
Jumped awkwardly. Mainly towards rear. Ran on without threatening final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was then further inconvenienced. Remained towards rear despite being ridden along early with reminders. Ran on steadily in straight without troubling the first pair.
Led or disputed lead from 1000 M. Kept on in straight until finding no more final 100 M.

Severely checked at start. Soon recovered to be forward of midfield whilst pulling and travelling wide with no cover. Improved rounding home bend to be in touch turning in. Weakened steadily final 100 M.
Always at rear and wide. Never a threat and finished wide out.
Niggled along behind midfield. Dropped towards rear passing Rock. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Led briefly before sitting outside the leader. Ran on in straight until not quicken final 100 M.
In touch. One-paced in straight.
Ridden forward and led briefly before sitting inside the leader. Re-gained narrow advantage rounding home bend. Kept on until weakened badly final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Switched out upon straightening and ran on strongly final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield to straight. Hung out badly approaching and rounding the home turn. Made up little ground towards the finish.
Worse than midfield. One paced in straight.
Worse than midfield. Dropped to rear when crowded at 400 M. Never close thereafter.
Prominent to straight. One paced thereafter.
Midfield. Weakened steadily in straight.
Prominent. Improved to 2nd turning into straight. Failed to quicken final stages.
Towards rear. Wide into straight. Took closer order close home.
Niggled a bit to go forward across field from wide gate. Took lead from 700 M to score an impressive win.

At rear. Never a threat.
Towards rear throughout. Hung in and raced ungenerously in straight.
Soon led. Headed 700 M and maintained 3rd into straight. Kept on well but found the winner too strong.
Knuckled on jumping and at back. Never in contention.
Midfield. Dropped to 9th far side. Made ground gradually from final turn. Was steadied 200 M before shifting in for a clear run to be 3rd 100 M. Lost the minor placing close home.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on final 200 M to snatch 3rd near finish.
Slowly away, was last to the 1st turn where he recovered some ground to be behind midfield far side. Made no show in straight.
Midfield or behind. No progress in straight.
Was 3rd before dropping steadily from 700 M. Midfield turning in. Found no extra.
Never better than midfield.
Near rear. Ran past a few tiring horses inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on same pace in straight.
Made all.
Always there. Progressed to 2nd upon straightening. Kept on without threatening.
In touch. Progressed to 3rd approaching the Rock. Unable to maintain position upon straightening. Raced wide without cover throughout.
Prominent. Sat outside leader until home turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Slightly slowly away, always at the rear.
Towards rear. Checked 1300 M out. Never able to feature.
Very slowly away. Remained well back. Made up some late ground.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Mainly around midfield. Snuck up on rails turning in. Held every chance 200 M out. Failed to match pace closing stages.
With leaders racing freely early. Dropped out over 200 M out.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Settled in remote 4th just better than midfield. Closed on leaders to be 1L off pace turning in. Unable to sustain effort.

In last few. Came under reminders from 400 M and ran on steadily.
Well back in straight. Kept on.

Behind midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
In touch, was 3rd far side. Dropped back steadily from 500 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on early straight but was soon one-paced.

Towards rear. Wide turning in. Unable to quicken.
Ridden along from a wide draw to be 5th. Advanced to 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on well in straight.
Mostly 4th or 5th along the rail. Ran on 200 M.

Settled midfield. Made some late impression inside 200 M.
Last to straight. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Pushed along from the widest draw to soon be 2nd. Held on but lost a minor placing near finish.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Behind midfield. Produced good late finish to narrowly miss placing. (Lame.)

In rear of midfield to straight. No extra.
Began awkwardly and squeezed to rear. Never nearer.

Well back to straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Always well behind.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Prominent to 200 M then weakened.
In last few to straight. Finished well.

Restrained in 4th position. Quickened to take charge inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well in straight doing best work at finish.
Tracked leader. Came under pressure to maintain position early in straight. Swamped nearing finish.
Began well but lacked early pace to be midfield rail. Right behind leaders turning in then inside run to score impressive win.
Steadied early to be rearward. Steadied at 500 M and again at 400 M. Balanced at 300 M and made very good run to just miss place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Early speed to be equal lead. Never quickened from home bend and lay out slightly in the straight.

No early pace to be rearward. Never nearer.

Began quickly to be leading early. There until 200 M without threatening winners sprint.
Good speed from wide gate to be behind leaders early. Outside leader turning in. One-paced thereafter.
Slow to begin from inside gate to be rearward. Always at the rear.
Rearward and 3-wide inside early. Never nearer.

Led to 1500 M then remained in prominent position. Kept on fairly final 100 M.
Near rear, proved difficult to settle early, brushed rail and became unbalanced near 200 M. Never seen with a chance.
