At rear throughout, never on terms.
Becoming unbalanced on first turn when bumped then raced wide without cover. Ran on steadily from 250 M to miss narrowly.
Stumbled at start, recovered to be just behind midfield. Did not quicken in straight, gave ground final 100 M.
Midfield throughout, failed to quicken in home straight.
Towards rear throughout, never in contention.
Rear of midfield. Made up a little late ground.
Midfield mainly on rail. Made steady progress in straight until no extra close home.
Prominent, chased leader from 1000 M. Had every chance final 200 M, just missed a place final strides.
Forward of midfield. Closer order rounding home turn. Faded from 200 M.
Taken back to rear, proving difficult to settle early stages. Made up some ground final 200 M.
At back. Wide in back straight. Slightly inconvenienced at 700 M. Made up a little late ground.
Towards rear. Brushed rail at 600 M. Tightened near 400 M. Made up little ground.
At back. Made up a lot of ground from 200 M to just narrowly miss.
Midfield throughout.
Bounded in the air at start. Behind midfield slightly inconvenienced at 700 M. Made up some ground from 300 M.
Well there. Broke down at 700 M.
In touch. Tired badly final 100 M.
Tightened first turn. Soon in midfield. Inconvenienced at 700 M when a horse broke down in front. No response in straight.
Midfield. Slightly inconvenienced at 700 M. Never a factor afterwards.
Midfield. Progressed around home bend. Took charge 100 M out. Held up.
Tightened first turn. In touch. Inconvenienced at 700 M when a horse broke down in front. One-paced in straight.
In touch. Slightly inconvenienced at 700 M. Failed to quicken.
Tear away leader to straight. Weakened steadily from 200 M.
Towards rear. Progressed from 600 M. Hung out and wide into straight. Made up good ground.
Never able to feature.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield. Weakened close home. Hung out throughout.
Bounded in the air at start, soon recovered ground to be prominent. Took lead passing 600 M. Unbalanced and stopped riding momentarily 200 M. Held on until headed closing stages.
Jumped well and was in touch early. Dropped back steadily 600 M. Hung in throughout.
Was prominent until failing to hold position passing course proper.
Always there. Responded well final 400 M to assert authority closing stages.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Always thereabout. Kept on without threatening inside 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made ground steadily 600 M out to join the lead 200 M. However effort not sustained.
Unbalanced at start, soon last. Ran past a few tiring horses 200 M.
Well there early, soon dropped to behind midfield. Kept on final 200 M.
Among the mid-division throughout.
Tardy start, behind the main bunch. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened steadily.
Midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Ran on to win readily.
Well back. Not clear run early in straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Ridden to first few early. With leaders into straight. Kept on steadily.
Never better than midfield.
Always well there. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well and led early. Held up behind pace home bend. Fought on doggedly under pressure to claim 2nd final strides.
Took up running home bend and attempted to make rest. Swamped close home.
Prominent. Steadied to midfield approaching home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Soon in rear.
Ridden in prominent position early. Raced awkwardly and lost ground passing 1000 M. Badly checked and dropped to last few 800 M out. Never recovered.
Midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Always there. Held similar position when unable to obtain clear run on the rail in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear group rounding home bend. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Tardy start, towards rear throughout. (Lame.)
Better than midfield. Moderate progress early straight but soon found no extra.
Held up in midfield. Unbalanced middle stages and dropped towards rear when awkwardly placed home turn. Never able to feature.
Led early. Remained in prominent position until weakening out of contention upon straightening.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Ran on well in straight to take command closing stages.
In touch. Dropped to midfield or behind when steadied final turn. Was severely checked when attempting to make ground 250 M. Never recovered.
Around midfield throughout.
Led early, then remained 2nd until failing to quicken closing stages.
Soon led. Just kept on same pace when headed closing stages.
Jumped very awkwardly and was last early. Made ground rounding home bend to be midfield 400 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Behind midfield on the rail. Ran on steadily in straight.
Towards rear, was last final turn. Ran past a few tiring horses inside 200 M.
Always thereabouts. Quickened to hit front momentarily over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort.
Always well back. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Kept on one pace.
Virtually made all. Fought on under pressure to retain lead throughout closing stages.
Restrained in midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Towards rear most of way.
Settled outside leader to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Some progress early in straight.
Midfield or better to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Held up in 4th and close up to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Made no show.
Well back. Made up ground past beaten horses in straight.
Settled in last few. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Finished well.

Standing awkwardly and missed the start. Wide on home bend but one-paced in the straight.
Restrained to be rearward early stages. Came from near rear on home bend to make good ground and just miss.
Settled near midfield with cover. Always there.
Ridden hard from wide gate to be equal lead. Weakened from 400 M.
Tailed off badly after racing behind midfield.
With leading division early then restrained with cover. Thereabouts until home bend but no match for placegetters.
Began best to lead on rail early. Began to weaken near 400 M.
Ridden along to be midfield early. Niggled along in middle stages then made wide run from 600 M to score good win.
Ridden hard early to be right behind leaders. Under pressure from 500 M but never ran on.

Towards rear and wide early. Made up steady ground in home straight.
Equal lead early stages then crossed to rail. Held lead until 200 M.
No early pace to be rearward. Always there.
Led until 300 M then gave ground gradually.
In front of midfield. Remained on inner around home turn. Commenced to make ground early straight. Steadied when disappoint for run 200 M. Made good ground afterwards.
Steadied at start from wide gate and shifted to fence then improved to be behind midfield. Made strong run through field after straightening. Reached lead concluding stages.
Midfield. Responded fairly in straight and continued to make ground in run to line.
Behind midfield and 3 wide. Carried wide on home turn and gave ground after straightening.
Behind leaders. Remained same into straight then kept on one paced until giving ground last bit.
Prominent and 3 wide. Gave ground after straightening.
Near rear. Widest turning in. Kept on fairly early in straight and effects of hard run set in at 100 M.
Allowed to stride forward and joined lead at 1000 M. Remained same until approaching 200 M then found no extra.
Midfield. Responded fairly after 400 M and continued to make steady ground in run to line.
At rear. Only made slight headway in straight to pass tiring horses.
In front of midfield. Issued challenge after straightening and went clear approaching 200 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off winner.
Near rear. Remained same until after straightening then made nice ground through field to be closest at finish.
Around midfield. Kept on fairly early in straight then one paced last bit.
Soon outpaced to rear. Hung in rounding the turn and in the straight. Made a little late impression.
Soon towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Never far off. 5th turning in. Quickened well final 200 M to snatch win final strides.
Hard ridden early to be in 2nd or 3rd place. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Niggled along behind midfield or worse. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Slowly away. At rear. Made up a little late ground. Hung in throughout.
Never far off. Caught wide early and middle stages. Dropped right out of contention 250 M out.
Jumped awkwardly and bumped another runner. Recovered to be in touch from 800 M. Kept on well until not quickened close home.
Slowly away. At back and wide most of the way.
Jumped best before settling forward of midfield. Kept on in straight until weakened badly final 100 M.
Bumped at start. Ridden forward and disputed lead from 1000 M to 800 M before settling inside the leader. Kept on before weakened badly 100 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon midfield or worse. Kept on one-pace in straight.
Bumped at start. Hard ridden early to remain in touch. Dropped back to midfield from 800 M. Never a threat in straight.
Bumped at start. Ridden forward to lead or dispute lead. Kept on well in straight and was caught just before the line.
Crowded at start. Raced greenly and made the first turn awkwardly. At back throughout.
Soon tracked leader from a difficult gate. Kept on quite well until weakened closing stages.
Midfield or better. One-paced in straight. Weakened close home.
Worse than midfield throughout.
Went forward from a wide gate to lead from 1000 M. Proved difficult to settle in early stages. Headed 100 M but held on for 2nd.
Midfield throughout.
Settled in prominent position. Responded well in straight when asked for effort. Took lead 100 M out.
Missed the start badly. Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly and towards rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish. (Rider dropped his whip after the 200 M.)
Worse than midfield. Made up some little ground in straight until no extra closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Over-raced in the early stages. One-paced in straight.
Midfield or worse. One-paced in straight.
Handy early. Eased back to 5th 1000 M. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well there. Did not quicken in straight.
Steadily shifted across from wide barrier to settle towards rear. Made steady ground from 350 M until no extra close home.
4th early, then improved to track leader at 1100 M. Kept on fairly in home straight without threatening the placegetters.
Soon dropped to rear from widest gate. Found nothing in home straight.
Prominent to 250 M. Steadily weakened.
Jumped awkwardly, held up in rear. Responded quite well after straightening until finding no more closing stages.
Always well there until run ended inside 200 M.
Travelled kindly better than midfield. Became unbalanced and dipped near 400 M. Shaken up at 300 M, led 200 M out to win in nice fashion.
Settled in midfield. Quickened from 300 M to challenge leader final 200 M. No answer to the winner.
Near rear throughout, never a factor.
Midfield, dropped back a bit from 700 M. Stayed same in the straight and was not able to quicken.
Midfield. Was awkwardly placed early in straight and was steadied and shifted out for running 300 M out. Ran on well doing best work near finish.
Soon took up running. Headed at 250 M and gave ground steadily.
Waited with at rear. Crept closer from 800 M to be midfield and 4-wide entering straight. Made steady progress in straight, one-paced closing stages.
Dropped out early and was among rear group turning into straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well before dropping to 5th 800 M. Similar position into straight where he kept on same pace under pressure.
Towards rear before running on a bit closing stages.
Well there before failing to hold place shortly on straightening.
Was midfield before fading quickly under pressure 250 M out.
Mostly 6th to home turn. Kept on to dispute for 2nd placing inside final 150 M.
Never on terms.
Always going well. Took command early in straight and won unchallenged.
Made no show.
Last to straight where he made some late progress closing stages.
Led approaching 800 M before finding no extra when headed early in straight.
Always well there. Found winner too strong and just held on for 2nd.
Around midfield before dropping to the rear group 800 M. No progress.
Prominent to 450 M. No extra. (Saddle shifted.)
Behind midfield. Improved well from 800 M and came to tackle leader passing 500 M. Gained slender advantage turning in. One-paced when headed 100 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Always prominent. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped out.
Towards rear throughout.

Well back. Made up late ground inside final 200 M.

Never far off to straight. Weakened.

Never able to feature.

Around midfield throughout.

Tracked leader. Took over at 200 M. Won going away.
Better than midfield. Very wide final turn and then dropped out. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.

Settled in rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield. Came to challenge home bend but soon weakened in straight.
Midfield. Switched widest turning in. Ran on steadily to claim placing closing stages. (Rider dropped whip 200 M.)
Early pace to be right behind leader. Every chance in straight but no match.
No early pace to be rearward. Always at the rear.
Midfield early. Never quickened and weakened final 200 M.
Ridden along early but only maintained midfield. Ridden hard on home bend but never threatened.
Midfield early stages. Wide on home bend but then made no impression.
Good gate speed to be right behind leaders. Eased out on straightening but one-paced.
Wide in forward position early. Under pressure from home bend but never quickened.

Better than midfield. Ran on steadily final 200 M to chase leader, just lost 2nd final stages.

Prominent to 600 M. Dropped out.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily final 300 M for a remote 3rd closing stages.

Prominent to straight. Dropped out.

Never in contention.
Wide behind midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Produced late impression running past beaten runners in straight.

Never in contention.

Never better than midfield.

Behind midfield. Dropped back from first turn.
Well there. Found no extra closing stages.
With rear. Made up good ground final 400 M to miss narrowly at finish.
Rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on without quickening.

Held narrow lead until dropping out approaching home bend.
Never in contention.
Never far off. Kept on steadily to reach 2nd about 200 M out.
Well there. Disputed lead into straight. Weakened quickly over 200 M out.

Midfield to straight. No extra.

Midfield early. Faded far side.

Led to halfway. Giving ground when checked home bend.
Never in contention.
Always well behind. Found nothing under pressure.
Broke well. Always prominent. Kept on steadily till no extra closing stages.

Very wide equal with leaders early. Wide on home bend and then badly on straightening.
Allowed time to settle to be midfield. Right behind leaders on bend.
Slow to get going to be rearward. Always well back then made some late improvement final 200 M.
Midfield on the rail early stages. Always thereabouts.
Bounded as the gates opened and lost considerable ground. Always well back and made up some ground in the straight.
Began well to be equal lead early then allowed to cross to the rail. Led thereafter until 300 M, no match for the winner.
Right behind leaders with cover. Eased out on home bend but unable to improve with the winner.
In forward position early but then drifted back middle stages to be rearward. Made very good ground in straight. Green.
Behind midfield early stages.
Allowed to settle towards rear. Saved ground on home bend to pounce shortly after straightening for decisive win.
In handy position with cover early stages. Right there on straightening but never quickened.
Right behind leaders with cover. Every chance from home bend but not able to match placegetters.
Prominent. Unable to quicken in straight, tired closing stages.
Mainly midfield or worse. Kept on one-paced in straight.
At rear early. Improved a bit approaching and rounding the home turn but weakened gradually after 300 M.
Towards rear. Ran past a few beaten runners close to the line.
Soon led. Joined from 900 M. Fought on doggedly in straight but just failed to overhaul the winner.
Never far off. One-paced when asked for extra after straightening.
At back. Moved closer rounding the home turn but unable to produce extra in straight.
Settled midfield. Responded well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Midfield or worse. 4-wide turning into straight and found nothing afterwards.
Tracked leader along the rails early. Led or disputed lead from 900 M. Sustained effort to gain upper hand.
Ridden along to maintain a position better than midfield. Saved ground turning into straight from a rail run. Ran on steadily without threatening the placegetters.
Remained at rear. Made no show.
Towards rear despite niggled along. Kept on same pace in straight.
Soon dropped to rear. Never a factor.
Ridden along to remain in midfield. Ran on a little final 200 M.
Brief lead, behind leader remainder of the race. Became unbalanced when checked at 800 M. Lost 2nd place near finish.
Fractious in stalls, jumped awkwardly, lost ground and was well back. Widest into straight, never a factor.
Midfield to 300 M, steadily weakened.
Always well there. Ran on from 300 M to challenge the leader, just failed.
Began well from wide draw, prominent briefly then settled better than midfield. Wide early and middle stages. Ran on steadily from 250 M.
Fractious in stalls, jumped awkwardly and lost ground. At rear, moved closer when wide on home bend. Short-lived effort near 300 M, soon one-paced.
Midfield early, soon dropped towards rear. Ran past beaten runners final 250 M.
Better than midfield to 250 M then dropped out.
Pushed along to lead at 1200 M. Not headed since and kept on well to defy challengers.
Jumped well and prominent, kept on quite well in straight until close home.
Midfield or worse to straightening. One-paced.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Dropped to 4th when checked passing 1000 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Led early before settling 3rd 1000 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group passing 800 M.
Missed the start slightly, ridden along to be better than midfield. Hung out badly from 800 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages. (Dropped whip 400 M.)
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, remained in rear. Made up some ground final turn but was soon one-paced.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Ran on well from 300 M but failed to catch the winner. (Saddle shifted home turn.)
Prominent. Took lead 1000 M and soon shifted in to cause interference. Held on well to the line.
Never in contention.
Never a factor.
Never better than midfield.
5th early, moved forward to be 2nd passing 900 M. Unable to hold position inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening.
Always last few.
Behind midfield. Made progress early in straight. No room closing stages when improving.
Midfield. Kept on well.
Towards rear, racing freely early. Kept on one pace in straight.
Better than midfield to straight then dropped out.
Towards rear. Made steady headway in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Broke well. Virtually made all.
Sluggish at start. Soon picked up to midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Well back. Steadied 400 M. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Waited with. Finished well in straight.
Always there. One-paced under pressure closing stages.
Midfield. Made some progress early in straight. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Well there. Faded out of contention soon after straightening.
Midfield or behind. Ran on from outside final 400 M.
Better than midfield. Found no extra on straightening.
Towards rear. Made up some ground along rail in straight.
Near rear. Made ground from outside in straight.
Towards rear. Was in midfield rounding home bend. Ran on steadily early straight, doing best work when under pressure inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Was steadied 300 M and approaching 200 M when trying to make ground. Never recovered.
Prominent. Took lead upon straightening. Won comfortably.
Behind midfield. Moderate progress early straight. Soon found no extra.
Always there. Kept on quite well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground 250 M, never nearer.
Lost ground at start. Never in the hunt.
Mostly 5th before weakened steadily from 300 M.
Soon moved to the front. Dropped out from final turn.
Never better than midfield. Steadied at about 800 M.
Midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Behind midfield. No clear passage in straight. Kept on well.
Raced freely in rear. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Produced good late finish closing stages.
Led to 300 M then weakened under pressure.
Began very awkwardly losing ground. Behind midfield to straight. Soon weakened. (Saddle shifted.)
Wide throughout. Behind midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish down centre of track.
Settled behind leaders. No clear run early in straight and hit on the head. Finished well inside final 250 M to win convincingly.
Midfield and wide. Ran on to be nearest at finish down centre of track.
Broke well. Always prominent. No extra finish.
Midfield. Raced tightly between runners and under pressure early in straight. Hit front 200 M out but soon swamped.
Always last few.
Always there. Hit front briefly inside 300 M but soon swamped.
Jumped quickly to be with early lead. Held position but not able to match finish of winner.
Slow into stride to be rearward. Placed under pressure from 400 M but made little impression.
Niggled along early stages but only midfield. Always there and never made any impression.
Began awkwardly and lost ground to be rearward. Made only a little ground after 400 M.
About midfield early stages. Always thereabouts and never threatened.
A bit slow into stride, then was tight for early stages. Ran on well final 300 M.
Began well but not much early pace to be about midfield. Only one-paced when under pressure.
No early pace and then weakened from 300 M. Never a threat.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Ridden along to be equal lead by middle stages. Unable to sustain thereafter.
Showed early pace to be with leaders but then never went on from 400 M and weakened final stages.
Jumped best to lead. Unable to go on from 400 M.
Good early speed to be right with leaders. A bit one-paced when placed under pressure.
Began well and allowed to settle middle of field. Finished very strongly from 200 M to score.
Began fairly, niggled along to hug rail and took lead 1000 M out. Joined before straightening, kept on well to maintain advantage until headed 100 M out.
Behind midfield to 400 M, wide on home bend, then made only moderate headway final 200 M.
Always well there. Joined leader into straight. Effort not sustained and steadily weakened final 200 M.
In front of midfield, over-racing in middle stages. Dropped out from 200 M.
Slow to begin and tailed off throughout.
Driven along to dispute lead early, then sat behind leaders from 1000 M. Gave ground from 300 M.
Well there to straightening. Unable to keep up with the leaders in straight and only kept on one-paced.

Began awkwardly, rider lost off side iron for some distance. At rear and wide early, then steadily improved to be midfield from 1000 M. Became unbalanced at 800 M and switched wide, weakened from 300 M.
Never far off with cover. Into the clear at 300 M and made sustained effort to overhaul the leader 100 M out. Kept on well.
Began well, steadily dropped to the rear. Made up some ground from 250 M. One-paced last bit.
Unbalanced on jumping when crowded, mainly rear of midfield. Hung out throughout.
Raced with tail throughout, ran past a few beaten runners closing stages.
Forward of midfield, made steady ground from 200 M until keeping on same pace close home.
Midfield and wide early. Dropped back a bit from halfway. Ran on steadily final 250 M.
Soon in touch. Took up running 1200 M out. Kept on well until outsprinted by the first pair 100 M out and lost 3rd when one-paced close home.
Thereabout to 800 M before dropping out of contention. (Bled.)
Ridden forward to take up running. Headed 1200 M. Fought on well in straight until outsprinted by the first pair final 100 M.
At rear. Steadied at 800 M. Under pressure rounding home bend. Unable to quicken in straight.
Mainly midfield or behind. Headway rounding home bend but trapped wide. One-paced in straight until finding no more final 100 M.
In touch early before settling around midfield. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Settled behind the pace. Kept on one pace without threatening in straight.
In touch early before settling midfield or worse. Steadied at 800 M and dropped to the rear. Made up some ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
At rear. Improved a little under pressure rounding home bend. Ran on well final 300 M and took lead 100 M out. Held off strong challenge from 2nd horse.
Soon towards rear. Improved along back straight to sit outside the leaders 900 M out. Kept on until weakened badly final 200 M.
Midfield or worse. Dropped out from 1000 M and tailed off. (Heart irregularity.)
At rear. Trapped widest whilst improving rounding home bend. Ran on determinedly in straight but was always held off by the winner.
At rear. Ran on a bit in the early straight but was weakened closing stages.
Well there. No extra in straight.
Prominent. Crowded at 350 M and then ran on well to the line.
Midfield. Dropped towards rear before straightening. One-paced thereafter.
Soon midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening placegetters.
Checked on jumping, at rear. Switched widest rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight but found winner too strong.
Slow to begin, then midfield or worse. Produced good finish in straight to miss placing narrowly.
Unable to keep up. Tailed off from 1100 M. Ran past beaten runners in the run to the line.
Tracked leader. Could not keep up upon straightening. Gave ground badly 200 M out.
Behind midfield throughout. Hung in rounding the home bend and in straight. Rider was difficult to ride out to the line.
Settled midfield. Found nothing after straightening.
Prominent. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon led from a difficult gate. Headed 300 M. Weakened steadily.
Better than midfield. Commenced a run before straightening. Took lead 300 M out to win comfortably.
In mid-division on rail. Was inconvenienced when tight on rail near 200 M, then until finding no more closing stages.
Pressed the leader to 350 M, dropped out.
Prominent early, then remained forward of midfield. Kept on quite well.
Towards rear early. Improved to midfield at 900 M. Did not quicken in home straight.
Slight slow to begin, then was checked and shifted across to the rear on rail. Ran on well final 300 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily from 300 M but failed to peg back the winner.
Rear of midfield. Never seen with a chance.
Fractious when boxed. Ridden early to be prominent 3rd. Responded when asked to quicken from 300 M and led at 200 M. Readily.
Midfield early, stayed in touch from 900 M. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Towards rear throughout. Was awkwardly placed near 800 M when pulling. Never likely.
Soon dropped to last. Ran past a few beaten runners final 200 M.
Near rear to 800 M where it broke down and was pulled up.
Niggled along early to travel behind midfield. Taken into clear 300 M out and made steady ground.
Soon led. Headed at the 200 M. Kept on until beginning to tire inside final 100 M.
Towards rear before making up some good ground closing stages.
Prominent and held every chance till outstayed towards finish.
Mostly among rear group to straight when he ran on strongly inside final 200 M to fail narrowly.
Never near to challenge.
Well there before steadily losing ground from home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Well there before losing some ground 1300 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Never far off to straight where he ran on to reach 3rd 300 M. Found no extra close home.
In touch before dropping out quickly coming into straight.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Ran on well from 250 M to threaten near finish.
Always there. Took narrow lead from 1100 M to straight. Just held on under pressure to retain advantage.
At back to straight where he made steady progress to line.
Soon given reminders and was 4th rounding home bend. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Ran 3rd from 1000 M and remained there to home turn. Soon dropped out of contention on straightening.
In touch. Weakened inside 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pulled to be prominent. Sat outside leader until taking over 150 M. Unable to resist winner's challenge final 100 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on.
Never a factor.
Started awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Led. Kept on when headed inside 150 M.
Midfield. Progressed to 4th 800 M. Ran on well along rail in straight to take command 100 M.
Midfield early, dropped slightly towards rear passing 800 M. Ran on a bit in straight.
Prominent early, soon in midfield. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped very awkwardly, always at the last.
Never nearer.
Soon outpaced. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Soon took up running from wide draw and raced keenly in front until finding no extra under pressure in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield.
Ridden early but had to settle for 3rd behind leaders. Yielded ground from home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to claim remote 3rd.
Ridden when sluggish early. Raced greenly and wide in midfield. Headway into straight then kept on same pace.
Never far off travelling well. Commenced move upon straightening and asserted authority over 200 M out.
Never nearer.
Always in rear.
Always in rear.
Ridden to muster early pace. Raced outside leader to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Better than midfield. Raced 4th passing 1200 M. Improved steadily rounding home bend. Ran on in straight to take command final 100 M.
Remained 5th and 6th throughout.
Held 3rd to 600 M. Was 5th rounding home bend. No response when under pressure in straight.
Midfield to 600 M. Dropped back steadily.
Behind midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Led field to 100 M out. Kept on without quickening.
Towards rear throughout.
Ridden to 2nd from the widest draw. Was one-paced final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made progress passing 700 M to be 4th 400 M. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. Dropped back steadily far side to become last turning in. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Rear. Shifted to the outside final turn. Ran on well despite laying in passing 300 M.
Always well behind.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Prominent till no extra final 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Attempted to make all. Fought on to retain advantage in straight but pipped at post.
Chased leader to straight. Kept on without quickening.
Settled in rear. Commenced move home turn and finished well to snatch victory final stride.
Settled behind midfield. No clear passage in straight before late when made up good late ground.
Never seen with a chance. Hampered early in straight before running past beaten runners.
Prominent and wide. Weakened.
Good early speed to lead. There until challenged at 200 M.
In forward position early stages. Lost touch with leaders after 700 M. Struggled to keep in touch thereafter.
Wide in midfield early. Wide on home bend and then made steady ground.
Always tailed off.
Went forward to be in handy position early stages. Never quickened and weakened from 300 M.
Outside leader early stages. Always there but could not hold off winner's challenge.
Wide early and restrained to be rearward. Never made any impression.
Sped through to be right behind leader on rail. Gained inside run on straightening to score decisive win.
Midfield with cover early stages. Improved from 500 M. Hung in under pressure and difficult to ride out.
No early pace to be rearward. Made only moderate ground in the straight.
Forward of midfield on rail early. Clear running from home bend but one-paced.
Midfield on rail early stages. Always thereabouts.
Ridden forward from wide barrier to be behind lead. Remained prominent until straightening then gave ground quickly afterwards.
Slow to begin. Settled behind midfield and 3-wide without cover. Stayed same until after straightening then made some ground in straight despite having tough run.
Near rear. Remained same into home straight. Responded well when asked for effort and continued to make ground in run to line.
In front of midfield. Remained on inner after straightening and commenced to make gradual ground then did best work late to gain 2nd placing in concluding stages.
Behind midfield. Improved to be midfield at 600 M. Hard ridden to hold position until after straightening then gave ground.
Midfield. Under pressure before straightening and gave no response.
Taken back to rear early. Commenced to improve around field from 1000 M. Forced very wide without cover. Prominent on straightening. Kept on one-paced until finding no extra final 200 M.
Led throughout. Able to secure soft lead and as a consequence responded strongly after straightening.
Followed leader. Dropped to be in front of midfield at 800 M. Kept on well in straight and just failed to gain quinella placing.
Near rear. Improved around field from 600 M to be wide in midfield turning in. Kept on one-paced until finding no more final 150 M.
Midfield. Improved after 700 M to be behind lead at 600 M. Remained prominent in straight after keeping on strongly. Lost placing in concluding stages.
In front of midfield. Under pressure at 600 M but did not respond and gave ground shortly afterwards.
In touch. Kept on well until not quickened close home.
Prominent briefly then settled in midfield. Ran on well in straight.
Well there on inside. Kept on one pace.
Slowly away, at back throughout, never a factor.
Broke best, behind main bunch. Dropped out from 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly, at back. Improved around home bend when wide. Ran on strongly in home straight and won easily.
Always well there. In the straight hung in, found winner too strong.
Soon in midfield. No further improvement.
Led to straightening. Failed to quicken.
Put head down and began awkwardly, at back. Never a factor.
Towards rear, improved to midfield from 800 M. Weakened final 200 M.
Bumped at start, at rear. Closer order home bend. Steadied at 200 M when straightening to make up strong ground.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered ground steadily to be forward midfield halfway. Kept on well.
Lacked early pace to remain in the rear group. Ran on well inside 300 M to snatch 3rd close home.
Midfield or behind. One-paced.
Never in contention.
Always prominent. Gained 2nd passing 200 M. Kept on well but without ever reaching the winner.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield halfway. No extra.
In touch. Responded well to take lead passing course proper. Never threatened.
Tardy start, towards rear. Recovered ground gradually to become better than midfield 400 M. Unable to quicken.
Among the front runners. Disputed for 2nd passing 400 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Always at the rear.
Towards rear soon after start. Never a factor.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Better than midfield. Found no extra final 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout. Hung out.
Slow into stride but quickly recovered to prominent position. Dropped out upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden early but soon dropped to last few. (Lame.)
Soon took up running and led to 200 M then weakened.
Towards rear. Finished well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent briefly. Wide in midfield to 400 M then weakened.
Broke well. Held up in prominent position. Weakened upon straightening.
Broke well. Never far off and mainly in 5th to straight. Ran on to reach 2nd inside 200 M but not match speed of winner.
Settled in last few. Kept on steadily in straight.
Well there to 450 M then dropped away quickly.
Midfield. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M and soon went clear.
Midfield most of way. No extra closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Checked at start. Mainly in rear of midfield. Tightened early in straight then kept on at the one pace.
Sluggish at start. Made steady headway to just behind midfield home bend. Sustained progress down straight running past beaten horses.
Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Weakened 200 M out.
In touch. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Towards rear throughout.
Mostly midfield. Kept on well closing stages.
Behind midfield. Weakened 200 M out.
Better than midfield. 4-wide turning in. Kept on early straight but found no extra inside 200 M.
Lost ground at start, last to straight. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Prominent. Faded out of contention soon after straightening.
Slightly better than midfield. Responded well early straight to chase the leader, just getting up on the line.
Behind midfield. Made ground under pressure final 300 M. Unable to threaten the front runners.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well final 250 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Ran on well from outside in straight to just miss narrowly.
Pushed along to take lead soon after start. Held on but was caught marginally final stride.
Prominent to home bend. Dropped out.
Slow out. Always well behind.
Around midfield. Towards rear entering straight. Ran on steadily under pressure.
Given reminders early. Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away. Travelled in last few. Ran on final 300 M to be nearest at finish in straight.
Well there. Disputed lead into straight. Unable to gain upper hand under pressure 200 M out and swamped by winner closing stages.
Attempted to make all. Headed closing stages.
Prominent. Responded well and quickened to assert authority inside final 200 M.
Prominent. Caught very wide around stable bend. Dropped out in straight.
Always in rear.
Rear to straight. Ran on steadily under pressure.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Prominent to halfway. Midfield rounding home bend. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Just better than midfield into straight. No extra.
Raced in handy position early stages. Eased out after home bend and shot clear looking likely winner except final strides.
Right behind leaders early stages. Clear running from home bend but onepaced.
At rear on rail early stages. Never made any impression.
Very wide at rear early stages. Made no impression.
Midfield early stages. Always thereabouts and one paced.
Midfield early on the rail. Every chance in straight and made steady ground final stages.
At rear and wide early. Never nearer.
Settled behind leaders from wide gate. Eased out to take lead at 300 M. Unable to hold off challengers.
Rearward early stages. Made only moderate ground out wide.
At the rear early. Improved through field from 600 M. Made good late challenge to score final strides.
Went forward to race outside leader. Quickly passed at 400 M then crowded when weakening at 200 M.
About midfield early. Crowded near 800 M to be rearward. Always thereabouts for remainder.
Right behind leaders early stages. Always there until carried in slightly after 200 M. Objection overruled.
Began well from wide gate to cross to lead. Overtaken before 400 M and then weakened badly.
In front of midfield. Made some improvement early in straight then one-paced final 200 M.
Midfield throughout. One pace when asked for effort after straightening.
Near rear. Waited with until after straightening then made gradual ground through field. Kept on fairly.
In front of midfield. Moved into clear on straightening and responded well to reach lead close to the line.
Behind leader. Moved up to join leader on straightening then responded strongly but unable to hold off challenge of winner in concluding stages.
Led until 150 M. Kept on fairly afterwards.
In front of midfield. Failed to quicken after straightening and gave gradual ground in straight.
With rear. Remained same into home straight then failed to respond and only passed tiring horses in run to the line.
Behind midfield and free. Raced wide without cover and gave ground shortly after straightening.
Behind midfield. Edged way into clear after straightening then responded well to gain 3rd placing in concluding stages.
Prominent. Asked for effort after straightening but no response.
Near rear. Asked for effort after straightening but only one-paced and failed to make any real impression.
Midfield. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Rear. Remained same into straight then took time to gather momentum. Did best work final 200 M.
Towards rear. Moved closer rounding the home bend. One-paced in straight.
Outpaced early. At back. Improved steadily rounding the home bend. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield. One paced in straight.
At back soon after the start. Never in contention.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Within striking distance. Weakened after straightening. Gave ground badly 250 M out.
Handy 3rd or 4th. Ran on well in straight but unable to pick the winner.
Led. Joined from 800 M. Headed 400 M and kept on until not quickening close home.
Outpaced early. Niggled a bit to midfield or better. No extra in straight.
Midfield or worse. Raced wide throughout without any cover. Approaching and rounding the turn hung out. No extra.
Midfield and wide. Weakened steadily after straightening.
Tracked leader early. Led or disputed lead from 800 M. Took clear lead 400 M and never headed. Won well.
Remained wide from bad draw, dropping behind midfield before home bend. Made no improvement thereafter.
Midfield or better. Weakened gradually in straight.
Began very awkwardly and lost ground. Remained at back. Switched out 350 M out and made up a lot of ground to be nearest at finish without threatening the winner.
Mainly forward of midfield. Steadied when crowded after 400 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Soon at rear. 2nd last turning in. Ran on well in straight to grab 3rd in the closing stages.
Always in touch. Severely checked when disappointed for running after 400 M. Kept on without threatening thereafter.
In touch early before settling forward of midfield from 1000 M. Improved steadily from 800 M and hung out rounding home bend. Kept on in straight until finding no extra and crowded close home.
Thereabout. Weakened badly and dropped right out of contention upon straightening.
Soon midfield. Swift headway 1000 M out to sit outside the leaders rounding home bend. Kept on until weakened badly final 100 M.

Jumped well before moving across from wide draw to settle towards rear. Headway on the outside 1000 M out to be in touch but wide rounding home bend whilst hanging out. Ran on until no extra close home.
Slowly away but soon recovered ground to be behind midfield. Steadied when crowded after 400 M. Never a threat in straight.
Soon behind midfield or worse. Checked and unbalanced when pulling 1200 M out and then dropped steadily towards rear. Made up some ground until not quickened final 100 M.
Soon led. Headed 300 M out. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Settled at rear. Steady headway from 900 M to be in touch but wide turning in. Accelerated well upon straightening and took lead 300 M out to win going away.
Ridden forward to sit outside the leader from 1400 M. Weakened badly 300 M out.
Soon midfield or worse whilst over-racing and proving difficult to settle. Ran on well final 350 M only to lose 3rd in the closing stages.
Dropped to rear. Ran on steadily on outer from 300 M until finding no extra closing stages.
Behind leader to 300 M, kept on fairly.
Never far off. Ran on well from 300 M and had every chance final 150 M. Just failed by the narrowest margin.
In 4th or 5th position to 100 M out, tired therafter.
Rear of midfield throughout. Never in contention.
Obliged wide early, then tracked leaders from 1700 M. Shaken up at 400 M to lead 250 M out. Kept on gamely to prevail after ding-dong battle final 150 M.
Settled in midfield. One-paced in straight, weakened inside final 200 M.
Near rear throughout, never seen with a chance.
Behind midfield or worse on fence. Failed to quicken in home straight.
Steadily dropped towards rear. Ran on well from 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, over-raced when restrained to behind midfield and obliged wide turning into the back straight. Was inconvenienced at 700 M, tailed off inside final 200 M.
Slowly away, held up in rear. Made steady ground from 300 M until one-paced last bit.
Around midfield throughout. Did not quicken in straight.
Made running until headed 250 M out, kept on fairly.
4th 1000 M and was about 6th swinging into straight. Could make no impression on leaders.
Improved steadily from rear 900 M and was 9th rounding home bend. Stayed on a bit close home.
Settled midfield to straight. Was steadied 350 M before making up considerable ground closing stages.
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on quite well final 250 M despite not reaching winner.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Was headed 200 M out and steadily faded.
Never in the hunt.
Towards rear 1000 M. Improved along rails turning into straight. Kept on well to be nearest at finish.
Well there briefly. Soon pulled hard in midfield and remained there to straight. Faded rapidly 250 M.
Improved towards leaders from midfield approaching home bend and was disputing 3rd into straight. Did not sustain effort 200 M.
Well there before failing to hold place shortly on straightening.
Prominent to straight. Ridden to lead 200 M out. Found no extra close home.
In rear to straight where he made up some ground inside 200 M.
Never on terms despite making some improvement closing stages.
Always handy. Ran on strongly to lead inside 200 M. Won impressively.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon led. Headed 450 M. Found no extra when 2nd early straight.
Near rear. Made some progress final turn to be midfield early straight. Kept on without threatening the first pair.
Midfield or better. Made good progress rounding home bend to be 2nd turning in. Kept on well but failed to catch the winner.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield far side. Stayed on until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield or behind. No response when given reminders turning for home.
Never better than midfield.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Advanced to a handy position first time in the straight. Dropped back gradually 500 M out.
Always in touch. Hung out rounding home turn. Lost 3rd close home.
Towards rear. Hung in in straight. Made no show.
Led briefly early, then tracked leader until taking over 450 M out. Held out to resist runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Was in touch before dropping to midfield far side. Dropped out from home bend.
Around midfield throughout.
Well back. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield early. Effort around Rock. Gained 3rd into straight. No extra.
Ridden early. Settled in midfield. Came under pressure home bend. Found nothing.
In similar position throughout.
Behind midfield. Made modest progress in straight.
Raced awkwardly early stages. Always well behind.
Led early. Settled outside leader. Re-gained advantage upon straightening. Hung on well under pressure.
Held up in midfield. Finished strongly to miss narrowly.
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace.
Soon took up running. Headed upon straightening and weakened.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out entering straight.
Remained in 5th or 6th throughout.
Stumbled at start. Never better than midfield.
Raced 3rd from widest draw. Found no extra closing stages.
Led or disputed lead until headed 400 M. Kept on 2nd early straight until failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Better than midfield. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Never far off. Steadied for a run early straight. Ran on solidly to take lead 150 M. Just caught near finish.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order along rail final turn. Ran on from 6th early straight to gain 3rd close home.
Never in contention.
Near rear. Made up good ground from outside final 200 M.
Slightly behind. Ran on well in straight to snatch victory final stride.
Well there. Led or disputed lead from 800 M. Took clear advantage home bend until headed 150 M. One-paced.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Hung out badly home bend. Never a factor.
Made all.
Settled in last few. Came to challenge rounding home bend. Wide into straight. Ran on under pressure down straight doing best work at finish.
Rear of midfield. Raced wide far side and carried wider into straight. No extra.
Settled just behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Prominent before hampered and dropped to midfield about 1000 M. Kept on one pace in straight.
Chased leader. No extra close home.
Better than midfield to straight. No extra.
Around midfield until yielding ground approaching home bend.
In last few. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight then weakened gradually.
Settled on rails at the back. Baulked for a run early in straight before running on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield to straight. Faded.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Right behind leader on rail at stable bend. There until home bend when eased out and beaten by barest margin in driving finish.
Right behind leaders early stages. There until placed under pressure from home bend. One-paced early straight then made steady ground.
Began well to be handy on rail at stable bend. Raced there until eased out on home bend to win by narrow margin.
Towards rear on rail early stages. Improved along rail after 600 M. Made ground along inside in straight.
Midfield with cover early. Improved from 600 M. Made ground in straight without threatening.
Very wide in forward position early stages. Ridden along from the Rock but commenced to weaken.
Crossed by another runner early then raced outside leader. Always there until 300 M then weakened badly.
Wide and at rear early stages. Saved ground along rail on home bend. Made only steady ground in straight.
4-wide at rear to stable bend then restrained to be at tail of field. Saved ground on home bend. Never threatened.
3-wide behind midfield early stages. Ridden along from 600 M. One-paced in the straight.
Towards rear 3-wide at stable bend. Always there and never quickened.
Began well and in handy position early stages. Gradually midfield to 600 M then never nearer from that point.
Began best and went crossed to lead. There until headed about 300 M from home. Gradually weakened.
Towards rear early. Ridden along from 600 M but only made steady ground.
Followed leader until giving ground from 500 M.
Behind midfield. Made home turn widest in midfield then responded well to gain 3rd placing narrowly.
Behind midfield. Moved closer to be midfield on straightening then kept on one-paced.
In front of midfield. Kept on one-paced early in straight. Gave ground final 200 M.
Prominent. Eased into clear at 400 M and responded strongly in straight but never looked like catching the winner.
Behind midfield. Midfield on straightening and hampered shortly afterwards. Once balanced made good ground to just miss 3rd placing.
With rear. Waited with until after straightening. Had some difficulty getting run early straight. Steadied and taken to outside then finished strongly despite drifting out.
At rear. Improved slightly making home turn then kept on one-paced.
In front of midfield. Improved to be 4-wide outside lead at 600 M. Effort told and gave ground from 300 M.
Led. Went clear on straightening and never looked like being run down.
Midfield. Asked for effort on straightening and continued to make slight ground in straight. Never looked likely to figure.
Behind leaders. Improved to be 3-wide outside lead after 700 M. Kept on fairly early in straight then gave ground quickly final 200 M.
In front of midfield. Lost balance at 700 M. Eased down in straight. (Heart Irregularity.)
Near rear. Dropped to rear at 600 M. Failed to respond in straight and only passed tired horses.
Behind leaders. Kept on until not quickened final 100 M.
Disputed lead. Narrow advantage entering straight, kept on well until unable to hold winner close home.
Tardy start, at back throughout.
Mainly midfield, ran past tired horses at finish.
Towards the rear. Ran on strongly from 300 M without threatening the first two.
Mainly midfield. Not clear run near 200 M. Ran on steadily when got into the clear.
At the back. Never a factor.
Disputed lead to 400 M. Weakened badly after 200 M.
Settled just behind midfield. Crept close from 700 M to be better than midfield into straight. Ran on steadily to get up closing stages.
Midfield or better. Weakened final 150 M.
Behind leaders. Every chance at 200 M. Failed to quicken.
At back. Wide along back straight. Improved around home bend. Effort not sustained in straight.
Around midfield. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Never a factor. (Dropped whip at 200 M.)
Took no part.
Prominent far side. Gradually dropped to midfield home bend. Made steady headway on rails in straight.
Well there. Looked to hold some chance before squeezed out of contention inside 300 M.
Well there to 350 M then faded. Hung out badly around home turn.
Ridden to hold narrow advantage early. Went 1L clear upon straightening. Failed to sustain effort and caught final strides.
Held up in midfield. Ran on well down straight to snatch victory final strides.
Never far off. Not much room early in straight. Kept on steadily for remote 3rd.
Towards rear. Hampered passing 1000 M.
Sluggish at start. Well back to straight. Never nearer.
Soon tailed-off.
Wide and prominent to straight then gradually weakened.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Never in contention.
Midfield when severely checked on rails 1000 M out. Never recovered.
Well there. Took lead inside 200 M, but swamped near finish.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Pulled up.
Remained in last few throughout.
Led to straight. No extra.
Prominent and wide to straight then dropped away quickly. (Bled.)
Travelling well in midfield home bend, but just kept on one pace nearing home.
Never far off. Baulked early in straight. Switched off rail to challenge and ran on well to assert authority final strides.
Soon in rear.
Prominent far side. Dropped to midfield and given reminder home bend. Kept on one pace.
Midfield. Produced good late finish for distant 4th.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened.
Began slowly. Always towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight. Never nearer.
At back to straight where he ran on quite well from the 250 M.
Worse than midfield to home bend. Quickened in straight to threaten inside final 200 M.
Soon in midfield and remained there to home bend. Made no show in straight.
Slow at start and was among rear group when clipped heels, almost unseating rider turning into straight. Eased down after.
Well there before weakening out of contention 250 M.
Never a factor.
Well there to halfway.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
In rear to straight where he stayed on a bit.
Never far off to straight. Ran on well to challenge and lead inside 150 M.
Was last before making up some ground on straightening.
Prominent. Led passing 1200 M and was 2L clear early in straight. Did not sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Always prominent, having every chance closing stages.
About 5th approaching home turn. Kept on till finding no extra inside 200 M.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Faded.
Wide behind midfield. Made modest progress down straight to claim 5th late.
Well back to straight. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Broke well. Led until headed about 200 M out. Hung on well for close-up 4th.
Always well back.
Well there. Settled behind pace home bend. Switched in for a run early in straight and ran on to take charge final stages.
Midfield and wide. Weakened in straight.
Midfield. Found no room early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Hampered about 800 M out. Midfield home bend. Faded in straight.
Jumped well then raced outside leader. Held every chance early in straight. Swamped closing stages.
Prominent and wide. Quickened to hold every chance early in straight. Fought on well but unable to draw level.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight doing best work at finish.
Wide in midfield without cover. Always thereabouts until straightening but then never quickened.
Eased back from wide draw. Always there till straight then made up good ground.
Went forward to be three wide equal lead. Always there until dashing clear at 200 M with winning break.
Right behind leaders early stages. Clear running in straight but never threatened.
Handy position on the rail behind leader. Never a threat in straight and one-paced.
Always very wide with no cover then commenced to weaken from 400 M.
Worse than midfield on rail. Ridden hard on straightening but a bit one-paced thereafter.
Trapped very wide and no cover behind midfield. Saved ground on home bend but never really threatened.
Outside lead early stages. Passed by winner at 300 M then struggled closing stages.
Rearward. Always thereabouts and never really quickened.
Right behind leaders early with cover.
Sped through from inside draw to lead. Took cover from 1000 M then eased out at 400 M. Unable to catch winner.
Always three and four wide towards rear. Never quickened and always at rear.
Eased from speed battle to be behind leaders with cover. Did not quicken and was a bit one-paced.
Ridden to be outside leader from outside draw. Remained same until taking lead momentarily at 200 M. Kept on strongly but unable to withstand finishing efforts of quinella pair.
Midfield. Made some ground early in straight then run evened out final 200 M.
Prominent. Under pressure before straightening and gave ground shortly afterwards. (Bled.)
Midfield. Into clear on straightening. Took time to respond but finish strongly final 200 M to win well.
Ridden forward from wide gate to lead. Stayed same until 200 M. Kept on one-paced afterwards.
Near rear. Same into home straight then made good ground through field without ever threatening.
Behind midfield and four wide. Carried wider making home bend. Responded strongly in straight despite hanging out.
Followed leader. Responded well to take lead for short distance after 200 M. Unable to hold off winner despite keeping on strongly.
Midfield. Carried wider on straightening then kept on one paced.
Prominent and 3 wide. Gave ground quickly after straightening.
Prominent and 4 wide without cover. Remained same into straight then effects of hard run set in and gave ground from 300 M. (Saddle shifted.)
Near rear. Saved ground on home bend by remaining on inner. Midfield on straightening then no response afterwards.
Rear after being slow to begin. Waited with into straight then steadied off heels. Made ground without ever looking likely.
Near rear throughout and never likely.
Niggled along to midfield or better and wide early stages. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened 200 M out.
Hard ridden to stay in touch. Dropped back to midfield rounding home bend. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Mainly towards rear. Steadied at 800 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Crowded at start. Towards rear. 2nd last rounding home bend. Never a factor.
Travelled nicely behind the leader. Steadied at 600 M and lost a little ground. Shifted out upon straightening and ran on well to take lead 150 M out. Held on well.
Soon at rear despite being niggled along. Improved along rail rounding home bend to be around midfield turning in. Ran on determinedly to be nearest at finish without troubling the winner.
Midfield or worse. Lost running at 800 M and dropped to the rear. Last turning in. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Soon dropped from wide draw towards rear. Wide throughout. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish without threatening placed horses.
Led to home bend before joined. Headed 300 M out. Kept on until weakened badly final 100 M.
Soon dropped from wide draw to rear. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Midfield or better. Checked whilst hanging out 600 M. One-paced in straight and hung in.
At rear early before moving up to midfield or worse from 900 M. Never featured in straight.
Soon midfield or worse. Hung out rounding home turn. One-paced in straight.
Sat outside the leader. Disputed lead rounding home bend. Took lead from 300 M but was headed 150 M out. Kept on and lost 2nd when not quickened close home.
Settled behind pace. Took narrow lead after 200 M but effort could not sustain final stages to miss 2nd on the line.
Prominent. Hung in quite badly early stages. Kept on one paced to the line.
In touch until straightening. Weakened gradually in straight.
Midfield. Hung out badly and ran off rounding the home turn. Dropped out thereafter and never recovered.
Mainly midfield. Kept on in straight without threatening.
Ridden to lead across field from wide gate. Fought on doggedly final 200 M to hold 2nd narrowly.
Worse than midfield. 4 wide rounding the home bend. No extra upon straightening.
Slowly away. Settled just worse than midfield. Switched to outside after straightening and showed nice turn of foot final 350 M to snatch the race 50 M out.
At rear. Crept closer rounding the home turn. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish and missed a placing narrowly.
Jumped awkwardly and was inconvenienced at about 800 M. Mainly midfield or worse. One paced in straight.
Soon at back and was far behind the contention. Hung out throughout the race. Remained the last turning in. Made up good ground final stages.
Mainly midfield or worse. Under pressure before straightening. Unable to quicken in straight.
Was 2nd before failing to hold place 200 M out.
Midfield at best. (Lame.)
Never on terms.
Hit front 1400 M and led field to straight. Looked winner 200 M when still 2L clear. Unable to hold late burst of winner towards finish.
In touch to straight where he soon dropped out.
Mostly 5th to home turn. Ran on strongly inside 200 M to snatch race final strides.
Soon improved towards leaders and was mostly in 4th to straight. Kept on till one-paced under pressure close home.
Worse than midfield to home bend. Stayed on without threatening closing stages.
6th or 7th rounding home bend. Kept on steadily on straightening.
In rear throughout.
Settled in rear to home bend and could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Midfield to straight where he ran on quite well close home despite not reaching first 2.
Always at the back. Found nothing when asked in straight.
Never near to challenge.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch early, dropped to midfield home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground to midfield. Weakened from early straight.
Towards rear. Moderate progress 400 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Jumped well and was always better than midfield. Improved to 4th turning in. Ran on well in straight but no match with the winner.
Soon led and never headed. Won comfortably.
Midfield. Advanced to 2nd 1000 M. Kept on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Towards rear. Kept on final 300 M. Hung in badly in straight.
In touch. One-paced in straight.
Around midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon 3rd and remained there until improving to 2nd approaching 200 M. Kept on but was one-paced closing stages.
Last throughout.
Midfield or behind. Hung out home turn. Kept on quite well final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Missed the start, towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Not far off to straight. No extra.
Settled mainly in 3rd. Joined leader turning in but soon dropped out after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Commenced run rounding home bend and quickened well from midfield into straight to take charge final strides.
Well back. Produced good late finish down centre of straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Sore.)
Led early. Settled behind leader till weakening under pressure home bend.
Settled in midfield. Wide home turn and quickened to gain 1L advantage over 200 M out but grabbed close home.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Held some chance early in straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Took up running turning into back straight and led till joined inside 450 M. Overhauled final 250 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Checked stable bend, then never better than midfield. No extra in straight.
Towards rear to straight. Made steady progress without threatening.
Travelled better than midfield. Effort rounding home bend to be close-up 3rd into straight. Kept on before fading over 200 M out.
Held up in forward of midfield. Found no room upon straightening. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Towards rear. Over-raced and severely checked 900 M. Hung out badly home turn. Ran on 250 M.
Midfield and was always wide. Responded well final 250 M to assert authority close home. Won readily.
Always prominent. Kept on well.
In touch, advanced to 2nd 800 M out. Unable to hold place soon after straightening.
Among the rear group to 200 M. Ran on.
Near rear. Made up good ground on inside in straight.
Led briefly after start, then raced 4th or 5th to straight. Ran on well under pressure to re-gain advantage 150 M. Unable to resist winner's late burst.
Pushed along from widest draw to take lead approaching 1000 M. Was one-paced when headed inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back steadily final 300 M.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield or behind. No progress. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Moderate progress early straight, then one-paced.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped to rear when checked passing 1000 M. Never recovered.
In touch to 200 M. Dropped out when rider concerned action of the horse final 200 M.
Well back. Made moderate progress early in straight, then one-paced.
Well back. Ran on late.
Settled wide in midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Around midfield to straight. Faded.
Held up behind pace. Dropped out upon straightening.
Settled in last few. Produced late impression closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled towards rear. Shifted out for a run early in straight and finished well to snatch 3rd final stride.
Settled in forward of midfield. Gained 3rd turning in. Ran on steadily without looking likely.
Broke well. Held up wide behind midfield from poor draw. Kept on well down centre of straight.
Towards rear. Made some progress early in straight. Weakened closing stages.
Gradually improved to just behind leader. Found nothing in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Loomed up to challenge inside 300 M. Won well.
Crossed from wide alley to be outside lead. Headed from 400 M and weakened badly.
Midfield early. Wide on home bend and out wide in straight when onepaced.
Began best to be right behind leader. There until home bend but weakened badly.
Right behind leaders early stages. Sprinted on straightening but soon headed from 300 M.
Ridden along hard early but no early speed to be midfield. Under pressure on home bend then never quickened.
Midfield on rail. Always there to home bend. Made on steady ground in the straight.
Went forward to handy position early. Wide on home bend and sprinted well but not able to match the winner.
Handy position on rail early. Made run through with winner but unable to match strides.
At the rear from wide gate. Always there and made no show.
Began best to bounce straight to lead. Quickly headed after 400 M then weakened badly.
At rear early stages. Saved ground on home bend to make steady ground in the home straight.
Began best from widest gate but restrained to midfield. Out wide on home bend but never quickened.
Allowed to settle behind midfield. Saved ground through field on home bend and sprinted for impressive win.
Midfield three wide early. Always thereabout in the straight and made no threat.
Led. Went clear at 400 M. Found no more when challenged approaching 200 M.
Behind leaders after beginning awkwardly. Asked for effort near 400 M and responded well but no match for winner.
Lost ground at start after getting head down. Remained at rear throughout.
Midfield. One-paced after 400 M until giving some ground late.
Behind midfield. Made steady ground over final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon with leaders. Hung out when placed under pressure after 400 M. Kept on fairly.
Outside leader. Responded well after 400 M to take clear lead at 200 M. Went on to win well.
Followed leaders. Gave ground from 300 M.
With rear after being checked at start. Took time to respond to pressure after 400 M. Made some improvement late.
Around midfield early. Dropped to be behind midfield at 500 M. Mostly one-paced under pressure.
Prominent. Made steady ground over final 400 M without threatening. Struck on head by another rider's whip at about 100 M.
Near rear after getting head up at start. Asked for effort approaching 400 M and continued to make ground in the run to the line without threatening.
Midfield. Dropped to be with rear at 500 M and no response afterwards.
Behind midfield. Made steady ground when asked for effort near 400 M. Doing best work final 100 M.
Best to jump and then settled behind leaders. Ran on quite well in straight without threatening placegetters.
Worse than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled at rear. Under pressure from 500 M. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
At back. Remained last into straight. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
In touch early, took lead from 1300 M. Headed 350 M, kept on until no extra close to the line.
Well there. Kept on one pace in straight until no extra final stages.
Tightened at start and then held up around midfield. Found running 250 M out and ran on well to the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly midfield or worse. Clipped heels and almost fell at about 600 M. Not in contention afterwards. (Lame.)
Prominent early. Tracked leader from 1200 M. Took lead 350 M out and kept on to the line.
Mainly better than midfield. Made steady progress in straight.
At rear. Last from 800 M. Steadied when disappointed for running at 600 M. Made up good ground without threatening placed horses in straight.
Distant 2nd. Took closer order turning in. Responded well in straight and took lead 350 M out. Headed 250 M and dropped out of contention final 100 M.
Led to 350 M. Weakened badly thereafter.
Mostly around midfield after laying in early in the run. Steadied when crowded at 600 M and dropped towards rear. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Behind midfield or worse. Steady headway rounding home bend to be in touch turning in. Ran on well and had every chance but was unable to match speed with the first pair final 100 M.
At rear. Never a factor.
Distant 3rd. Took closer order turning in. Ran on determinedly and took lead 250 M out. Held on well.
Towards rear. Improved rounding home bend to be in midfield turning in. Ran on well but was always held off by the winner.
Niggled along early and middle stages to maintain position in midfield. Unable to quicken in home straight.

Slowly away, at rear. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.

Worse than midfield early. Crept closer when 5 wide rounding home bend. Dropped out from 350 M.
Tracked leader. Taken out by leader near 500 M to be nearly 4 wide going into straight. Stayed on well, just failed to claim 2nd close home.
Near rear throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Around midfield throughout. Failed to quicken in home straight.
Prominent briefly, soon held up 5 or 6 wide towards rear. Moved closer on home turn and switched widest. Made sustained effort from 300 M to snatch race concluding stages.
Soon took up running. Switched out away from rail near 500 M to be nearly 3 wide turning in. Kept on until beginning to give ground 200 M out.
Held up in rear. Ran on steadily from 300 M until one-paced final bit.
Handy. Began to struggle at 400 M, dropped out.
Behind leader on rail. Obtained running before straightening and held every chance until overhauled by the winner near finish.
Jumped very awkwardly, shifted out and lost ground. Trailed field until recovered ground to join rear of field 1000 M out. Never in contention.
Always at the back.
Worse than midfield to home bend. Kept on under hands and heels only. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made no show.
Always well there, having every chance under pressure inside 200 M.
Towards rear till staying on a bit final 200 M.
6th halfway and same position entering straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
About 10th coming into straight. Never nearer.
Led field to straight when under pressure. Unable to hold winner 150 M and one-paced towards finish.
Settled midfield to straight where he quickened to threaten close home.
Never far away. Steady headway home bend and was close up home turn. Ran on well to challenge closing stages.
Well there to straight where he did not find a clear run 300 M. Switched out and kept on close home.
Always prominent. Ridden to challenge 250 M, gaining upper hand passing 150 M. Held on under vigorous riding.
Midfield at best.
Midfield or behind. Made ground steadily after turning in. Kept on for 3rd closing stages.
Midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on but just failed to obtain a minor placing closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped very awkwardly, lost ground. Was with rear until improving to midfield entering straight. Made up some ground final 200 M. (Lame.)
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses inside 200 M.
Never a factor.
Led field to 150 M. Found no extra.
Made no show.
Always there. Advanced to 2nd turning into straight. Responded well to take lead 150 M out. Headed final strides.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd 1100 M. Lost position when widest final turn. Made no show in straight.
Settled behind midfield from the widest draw. Ran on well inside 250 M to snatch victory close home.
Soon 2nd. Failed to hold place upon straightening.
Was there until failing to maintain position upon straightening.
Made all. Drifted out upon straightening. Held on under pressure.
Prominent and niggled along early. Gradually settled in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Soon tailed off.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Slow away. Always well behind.
Behind midfield and wide. No extra in straight.
Gradually settled in prominent position. Weakened in straight.
Midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily in straight.
Around midfield. Steadied approaching home bend. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Prominent and wide. Quickened to hold some chance on inside early in straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages. (Lame.)
Never nearer.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Behind midfield throughout.
4th. Made no progress when given reminders far side. Dropped back from 500 M. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. Dropped back from 500 M.
Mostly 5th before improving to 3rd 400 M. Kept on.
Midfield. Dropped back a little rounding home bend. One-paced thereafter.
Prominent early, settled better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear. Advanced to 4th or 5th final turn. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear around 1300 M. Was last home turn, then made up good ground final 200 M.
In touch. Was 3rd 1300 M. Further advanced to 2nd home bend. Held on until one-paced final 150 M.
Always towards rear.
Towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Soon led and made all. Held on well.
Behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight. Wide without cover throughout.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide in prominent position to home bend then weakened.
Behind midfield. Commenced run entering straight. Ran on well to miss narrowly.
Well back. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never nearer.
Led to halfway. Remained in prominent position to 200 M then weakened under pressure.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Prominent when hampered and clipped heels stable bend. Travelled in forward of midfield to home bend then weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Went very wide home turn. Kept on steadily in straight.
Restrained in close-up 2nd inside leader. Tended to hang out stable bend. Took over halfway out and hung on well in straight.
Always well behind. Tailed off home bend.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Midfield on rails. Made steady progress in straight without quickening.
Well back. Made modest progress on rails early in straight.
Handy position with cover early. There until bend and then one-paced.
Settled rearward. Eased out from home bend and made up good ground out wide in straight.
Midfield early. Lost ground after the Rock. Always well back.
Very wide in midfield early. Wide throughout and commenced to weaken after 600 M.
Ridden early from wide gate to race outside leader. There until 200 M and weakened quickly final 100 M.
Behind midfield early stages. Saved ground along rail home bend but never quickened.
Right behind leaders early. Eased out on straightening and went to lead from 200 M.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Improved position after the Rock and made steady ground in the straight.
Began well to be behind leader. Made challenge on straightening. Just failed.
Settled behind leader on rail. Right there on home bend then had a little difficulty with running but one-paced final stages.
Little slow into stride to be rearward. Placed under pressure from 500 M but never quickened and then one-paced.
Straight through to lead. There until headed at 200 M. Battled on gamely for 3rd.
Behind midfield and wide without cover from wide barrier. Near rear on straightening. Made steady ground in run to the line.
In front of midfield. Wide in midfield on straightening then made some ground without threatening.
With rear. Save ground along rail to be around midfield on straightening. Stopped quickly final 200 M.
Near rear. Ridden along as far as 700 M out. Midfield on straightening and made further improvement early in straight then one-paced final 200 M.
Outside leader. Found no extra when asked for effort at 400 M and gave ground shortly afterwards.
Midfield. Improved from 600 M and was taken into clear on straightening. Once balanced finished strongly to not be beaten by far.
Behind leading group. Carried wider after 500 M and was midfield on straightening. Made some ground in straight without threatening.
Midfield. Improved gradually after 600 M and was checked at 400 M. Midfield on straightening then kept on strongly to finish just behind the placegetters.
Followed leading ground. Into clear on straightening and responded well to just fail.
