In front of midfield and 4-wide. Effects of hard run set in at 500 M and gave ground quickly after 400 M.
Near rear. Dropped to rear at 500 m and no response afterwards.
Led throughout. Drifted out in straight but kept on to score narrowly.
Hard ridden to be 3-wide outside leader. Under pressure at 400 M and remained prominent into home straight. No extra afterwards.
With rear after being a little slow to begin and then being crowded. Remained near rear until straightening then finished strongly when making run through the field.
Settled at rear. Held up for some distance near 500 M. Ran on steadily final 200 M to claim 2nd close home.
Mainly midfield. Gave ground from 150 M.
Midfield or worse. Never in contention.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out from 200 M.
Towards rear. Moved a bit closer rounding bend. Ran on well upon straightening to hit front 100 M out.
Always well there, proved very difficult to settle early stages. Steadied at 600 M. Kept on well in straight.
Settled better than midfield. Checked near 200 M, recovered some ground afterwards.
Jumped very awkwardly and lost ground, at rear. Hung in after straightening and was checked after 200 M. Renewed effort afterwards.
Pushed along to be prominent from widest draw. Chased leader until taking over after straightening. Drifted out 100 M out and was soon headed by the winner when no extra.
Settled just behind midfield. Ran on a little final 200 M.
Never far off, obliged to race wide without cover early stages. No extra final 100 M.
In touch to 150 M, steadily weakened.
At the back to straight. Made up good ground.
Prominent, took lead from 1400 M. Headed after straightening. Dropped out from 200 M.
Never in contention.
Towards rear soon after start.
Prominent. Took lead momentarily 200 M out. Unable to quicken when headed inside 150 M.
Around midfield. Ran on well 300 M to take lead passing 150 M. Unable to resist challenge from winner close home.
Behind midfield. Given reminder passing course proper. Responded well to chase the leader, gaining upper hand close home.
Jumped awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be prominent. Weakened steadily inside 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, never better than midfield.
Always there. Kept on well 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Well there. Found no extra 200 M. Hung in closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 250 M.
Made no show.
Among the front runners to 200 M. No extra.
In similar position throughout.
Prominent till faded gradually 200 M out.
Held up behind leaders. Quickened well to challenge and led over 200 M out.
Travelled in forward of midfield and shifting ground. Finished strongly once inside final 200 M and snatched 2nd place final stride.
Soon in rear. Never featured.
Midfield to halfway then weakened.
Broke well and led till headed by winner over 200 M out. No extra.
Travelled well in close-up position. Looked to hold some chance 200 M out but failed to match pace with winner.
Soon in rear.
Soon in rear. Never nearer.
Tailed-off from halfway.
Began awkwardly. Disputed lead till weakened onto course proper.
Mainly in mid-division. Ducked in onto course proper. One-paced under pressure closing stages.
Began awkwardly and always well behind.
Reared inside gate. Began slowly and never in contention.
Among leaders. Took clear lead 1400 M out. Held on until headed final turn. Weakened.
Midfield or better. Improved to 3rd passing 700 M. Unable to maintain position on straightening. Travelled wide without cover throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on well early straight to assert authority closing stages.
Prominent. Dropped back slightly 600 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Never far off. Ran on from 5th 300 M to take 2nd final 50 M. No threat to the winner.
Well there. Took lead final turn. Held on well until headed closing stages.
At rear throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer order home turn. Continued to make ground in straight until one-paced inside 200 M.
Midfield. Steadied near 400 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Lost ground at start, never a factor.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made no show in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd final turn and was 2nd 250 M. Soon found no extra.
In similar position throughout.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Midfield or worse. Made moderate progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on upon straightening. Just denied.
Prominent early. Dropped to midfield approaching home bend. Dropped further back into straight.
Close-up. Gradually moved up to assume lead 1000 M out. Headed over 200 M out when no extra racing ungenerously.
Never far off. Quickened to gain 1L advantage 200 M out. Just defied runner-up's strong late challenge.
Lost considerable ground at start. Never a factor.
Always well back.
Midfield early. Towards rear into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening. Wide throughout.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily.
Ridden to close-up position. Remained there until weakened early in straight.
Narrow lead early then settled behind pace. Found nothing in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Beaten for early speed to settle behind leader. Raced alongside lead from 800 M. Worked to the lead closing stages.
Early pace early to be behind leaders. There till home bend but then never quickened.
Went forward to be right behind leader. Every chance but weakened in the straight.
No early pace to be rearward. Never a threat and tailed off.
Midfield early stages. Under pressure home turn and made good ground in the straight.
Restrained to be midfield early. Well beaten in the straight.
Slow into stride to be rearward. Under pressure home bend. Made steady ground.
Rearward early. Made no headway along rail in the straight.
Handy position on the rail early. Always thereabouts and one paced in straight.
Beaten for early pace to be rearward. At rear on home bend. Made good ground out wide in straight.
Midfield three wide early stages. Wide into home straight but never quickened.
Forward of midfield early stages. Under pressure home bend but never threatened. (Lame.)
Began best to cross straight to the lead. Nearly made all. Caught final strides.
Midfield and wide early stages. Wide on home bend and weakened badly.
Behind midfield. Ridden hard to improve after 600 M and was in front of midfield on straightening. Continued to be hard ridden and kept on well despite being unable to match winner.
Reared at start and dislodged rider.
Followed leaders. Remained in front of midfield until giving ground final 200 M.
Sat outside leader. Remained same until finding no more final 300 M.
With rear. Remained same into home straight then taken to outside. Took time to gather momentum and was doing best work late.
In front of midfield. Gave ground from 500 M.
Midfield. Improved after 1000 M to be 3 wide outside lead at 600 M. Kept on well until 200 M then effects of hard run set in.
In front of midfield. Dropped to midfield on 500 M. Remained around midfield to near 200 M then finished strongly.
Ridden forward to follow leaders. Remained prominent into straight and responded well to join lead at 200 M. Kept on fairly afterwards but unable to hold off placegetters.
Behind midfield after being bumped at start. Near rear on straightening then had difficulty finding clear run. Finished strongly late.
Ridden forward to lead. Remained in lead until 200 M then kept on one-paced.
Midfield and wide. Improved after 600 M to be in front of midfield at 400 M. Gave ground after straightening.
With rear. Worked way through field from 400 M and was in the clear at 200 M and finished strongly to just miss 2nd place.
At rear. Under pressure rounding home bend. Made up some ground 300 M out until effort not sustained final 100 M.
Soon led. Headed 300 M. Weakened badly thereafter.
Restrained to the back of the field. Switched away from the rail to find running early straight. Ran on gamely final 250 M to grab 3rd in the closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Improved from 1200 M to be forward of midfield. Ran on in straight until one-paced final 100 M.
Never far off. Not much room early straight. Ran on well final 300 M without threatening the winner.
Towards rear. Ran on well final 300 M only to lose 3rd close home.
In touch. Kept on in early straight. Steadied 250 M out and gradually dropped out of contention.
Niggled early and soon sat behind the leader despite hanging out. Kept on in straight until weakened badly 250 M out.
Settled midfield or better. Trapped wide turning in. Responded well in straight and took lead 300 M out. Kept on well for an easy victory.
Checked on jumping. Midfield. Held a tendency to lay out in the middle stages. Not a factor from 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Not too far off before dropping to midfield 250 M out. No extra.
Midfield early. Under pressure from 500 M but never quickened.
Soon worse than midfield. Made up some ground after the 200 M.
Soon better than midfield. Gradually crept closer from 400 M. Took lead 200 M out and held on to win.
Soon led. Headed 200 M and no extra thereafter.
Prominent. Kept on well but found winner too strong.
At rear. Never a threat.
Midfield or better. Ran on well final stages.
Began badly. Midfield to 500 M. Soon tired.
Jumped awkwardly. Never in contention.
Best to begin. Prominent to 200 M. Weakened steadily.
Around midfield. Ran on well.
Lacked early pace, at rear until passing beaten runners close home.
Disputed lead to 300 M where finding no extra. Was taken in after the 200 M and steadily weakened.
At rear. Only ran past well beaten runners closing stages.
Never far off, made move from 300 M and stayed on gamely to prevail on the line.
Always challenging for lead, drifted out in the run to the winning post and just missed by the narrowest of margins.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear and never seen with a chance.
At rear of the field throughout, never in the hunt.
Prominent, unable to keep up with the leaders from 400 M and remained some 3 lengths off the lead thereafter.
At rear, steadily shifting across from inner to join main ground towards outer. Ran on steadily from 400 M until hampered and checked 100 M out. Kept on.
Slow to begin, recovered to be midfield. Dropped out from 200 M.
Raced alone on inside rail towards rear. Ran on well final 300 M despite drifting out in the run to the line when under pressure.
Niggled along but was outpaced near rear. Made steady headway final 200 M.
Behind pace, ran on well to look a chance final 200 M until shifting out away from another runner which drifted out. No extra closing stages.
Forward of midfield. Made steady ground from 300 M until crowded 100 M out. Stayed on same pace.
Always at the back.
Jumped awkwardly. Worse than midfield to straight where he kept on well to the 150 M. No extra.
Towards rear before making headway along rails coming into straight. Kept on to hit front 100 M and look winner. Found winner too strong final strides.
With leaders before losing ground from 200 M.
Prominent. Gained narrow advantage briefly passing 200 M. Found no extra.
Never a factor.
In rear throughout.
About 10th turning for home. Switched out 300 M and ran on quite well closing stages.
Well there. Effort home bend to share lead home turn. Every chance till outpaced final 100 M.
Well there before failing to hold place approaching home turn.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Made up good ground final 250 M to lead near finish.
Never far off to home turn. Unable quicken to challenge on straightening.
Was prominent before weakening out of contention approaching 200 M.
In touch to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Always there. Kept on in straight.
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Midfield or behind. Made moderate progress along rail in straight.
Led field to 1000 M. Raced 3rd until dropping back to midfield final turn. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit 200 M out.
Prominent. Sat outside leader rounding home bend. Unable to hold place soon after straightening.
Made no show.
Never in contention.
Slightly better than midfield. One-paced.
Midfield early, soon moved up to be in touch. Ran on well from 3rd early straight to take command 300 M out. Won going away.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or slightly behind. One-paced in straight.
Well there. Took lead from 1000 M. Weakened steadily when headed 300 M out.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from 400 M to take 2nd closing stages.
Given reminders to muster early pace. Remained prominent till dropped to midfield home bend. No further impression.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage rounding home bend going 1L clear 200 M out. Flattered and overhauled closing stages.
Settled at the back. Finished well down straight to assert authority close home.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Wide behind midfield. Rear into straight. Ran past beaten runners.
Prominent. Ran on upon straightening, despite racing ungenerously.
Just worse than midfield. Made steady headway without threatening.
Towards rear. Never nearer.
Led early. Still prominent to straight then weakened.
Squeezed out to rear at start. Never seen with a chance.
Always prominent. Came to tackle winner 250 M out. Kept on gamely but unable to take over.
Midfield. Made up good ground under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Made good progress 800 M out. Took lead early straight. Kept on to hold off runner-up's challenge.
Midfield or slightly better. Made no show from 300 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Recovered ground gradually to be 4th briefly passing 800 M. Found no extra final turn. Faded 200 M.
Well there. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Towards rear soon after start. Never in contention.
Mostly 5th until weakening inside 250 M.
Led field to 300 M. Unable to quicken.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Steadied soon after start. Last to straight. Made ground from outside final 250 M, never nearer.
In touch early. Severely checked approaching 800 M. Midfield rounding home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Forward midfield. Quickened well to take charge 100 M out.
Always well behind.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened under pressure.
Early speed. Settled just behind pace. Not clear run early in straight. Late impression under pressure.
Always well behind.
Took up running approaching home bend and led until no extra final 100 M.
Well back. Ran on down centre of straight.
Midfield throughout despite interferences at 800 M and 400 M. One-paced in straight.
Hampered at start but quickly recovered to rear of midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Rear early. Effort into straight. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Mainly in forward midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to reach 3rd late.
Towards rear. Ran on well late.
Well there. No clear run on rails and tightened passing 300 M. One-paced.
Went forward from wide gate but no cover. There on straightening but a little one-paced.
Slow to begin to be at rear. Made only moderate ground in the straight.
Took lead early stages. Passed at 300 M then struggled closing stages.
Worked forward to race outside leader. Thereabouts till 400 M then never quickened.
Midfield with cover. Began to tire from 400 M and weakened badly last 200 M.
Midfield early then checked at 800 M, to be at rear. Always there.
No early pace to be rearward. Worked to midfield on home bend. Gained clear runs in straight to score impressively.
Settled midfield. Right behind leader on straightening but then didn't quicker and one-paced.
Forward and wide early stages then eased to midfield. Wide on home bend then made some ground but never threatened.
Took time to work forward from wide gate. There until taking lead at 300 M to dash clear. Not able to withhold winners challenge.
Wide and in handy position early stages but overracing. Within striking distance home bend but never quickened.
Midfield early stages then checked at 800 M. 3-wide thereafter and eased out in straight but one-paced.
Rearward early. At rear on home bend then made good ground final 200 M.
Midfield on the rail. Never made any ground and weakened final 200 M.
Followed leader. Responded well after straightening to take lead at 200 M and went on to score comfortably.
Led until about 300 M. Kept on one-paced afterwards.
Rear. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Behind midfield. Remained on inner around home turn and saved ground to be midfield on straightening. Responded fairly afterwards to continue to make ground in the run to the post.
Sat off leader. Joined leader on straightening and took clear lead after 300 M. Kept on fairly but unable to hold off placegetters final 200 M.
Midfield until after straightening. Took time to respond when initially placed under pressure but did best work in final 200 M to just miss quinella placing.
Near rear after being checked early when free. Near rear into straight and dropped out shortly afterwards.
Rear. Remained on inner and never looked like figuring.
Checked shortly after start and near rear. Taken to outside on straightening and responded fairly without ever looking likely.
In front of midfield. Improved after 500 M to be prominent on straightening. Continued forward early in straight to be with leaders at 200 M. Kept on well but unable to hold winner off.
Midfield and kept on mainly one-paced in straight.
Free early and 3-wide prominent. Didn't obtain any cover and gave ground shortly after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Crowded in early stages. Failed to finish the race as strongly as usual.
Behind midfield. Kept on mainly one-paced in straight.
At the back throughout. Never a factor.
Just better than midfield. Raced ungenerously for some distance middle stages when tight inside another runner. Dropped out from 300 M.
Ridden along in prominent position. Began to give ground from 300 M.
Prominent briefly, then remained in mid-division. Unable to quicken in straight when put under pressure.
Ridden along but failed to keep up at rear. Under pressure from 500 M, made up a little ground in straight.
Tardy start, towards rear. Ran on steadily from 300 M despite hanging in and proving difficult to ride out.
Midfield early, steadily dropped towards rear near 800 M. Made up some ground from 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Brief lead, then sat 3L behind leader rounding home bend. Ran on from 400 M to challenge for lead but one-paced final 100 M.
At rear throughout, wide on home turn. Never in contention.
Midfield or slightly forward. Dropped back on home bend. Further weakened in the straight.
Ridden along out wide to take lead at 800 M. Held 3L advantage rounding home bend. Kept on well in straight until overhauled by winner closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear, dislodged rider near 1000 M.
Niggled along to be in touch. Kept on quite well in straight without threatening the placegetters.
Settled just behind midfield. Made move from 400 M and ran on well to take charge close home.
Midfield. Was bumped while improving 300 M. Kept on.
Midfield or behind. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on from 5th 400 M to take 2nd closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Weakened in straight.
Midfield early. Dropped to the rear group from first turn. No improvement.
Better than midfield. Steady progress to 2nd near 1000 M. Responded well early straight to take lead 300 M out. Held on well to the line.
Prominent until weakening out of contention final turn.
In touch. Raced wide without cover to straight. One-paced.
Led field to early straight. Kept on along rail to maintain a minor placing at finish.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made moderate progress early straight. Soon found no extra.
Towards rear. Stayed on quite well inside 250 M.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd final turn. Kept on until one-paced 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Checked 800 M. Ran on steadily soon after straightening. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Prominent to home bend. Dropped out.
Behind midfield. Finished well down straight to snatch victory near line.
Never in contention.
Never in contention.
Wide in midfield to home bend then dropped out.
Towards rear. Took closer order home bend. One-paced from midfield into straight.
Led till dropped out over 200 M out.
Ridden early. Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to gain 3rd place late.
Midfield to straight. Found nothing.
Midfield on rails. Came to challenge turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never far off. Quickened to lead over 200 M out. Caught final strides.
Well back to straight. Made up ground on inside. Never nearer.
Behind midfield and wide to straight. Kept on steadily.
Never able to feature.
Midfield. Made ground steadily in straight.
Made all. Won going away.
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
In touch. Dropped to midfield while hanging out final turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Held 3rd to 400 M. Found no extra.
Towards rear. Made good progress final turn to be 3rd early straight. Kept on.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Always 2nd. Unable to match speed with the winner. Hung in throughout.
Towards rear. Never nearer.
Wide behind midfield. Ran on down straight without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Midfield and wide. Dropped out home bend.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent. Effort rounding home bend to chase leader into straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Hampered early. Ridden to be well there early. Dropped out home bend.
Settled behind leaders. Faded gradually in straight.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Ridden to lead early. Joined turning into back straight. Headed approaching home bend and soon dropped out.
Midfield most of way. One-paced.
Midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Well there. Took lead 800 M out. Careered away in straight for a comfortable victory.
Never in contention.
Forward of midfield three wide early. Loomed up on straightening and dashed clear for solid win.
Forward of midfield early stages. Always there and one-paced.
Wide in midfield early. Widest on home bend. One-paced under pressure.
Midfield on the rail early. Always there.
Crossed quickly to race outside leader. Began to tire from 300 M.
No early pace to be at rear. Last on home bend. Improved well in straight.
Worse than midfield and wide early. Out wide in the home straight only made moderate ground.
Began quickly to be straight in lead. There until 300 M. Weakened badly final stages.
Slow into stride to be rearward. Eased out on straightening and made up good ground out wide.
Handy position on rail early. Gained clear run on straightening.
Slow to begin to be rearward. Last throughout.
Right behind leader early stages. Never quickened.
Midfield early stages. Clear run from home bend and made steady ground.
Began quickly to be behind leader. There until 300 M then weakened last 200 M.
Free early and worked forward to be behind leaders. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Followed leader. Gave ground quickly from 700 M. Tailed off.
Behind midfield. Taken to outside on straightening. Responded well without ever looking likely to win.

Behind midfield. Crept forward along back straight and was in front of midfield at 600 M. Into clear on straightening and responded well despite laying in. Got up in last bit. Objection from 3rd horse overruled.
Near rear. Waited with until straightening then unable to get clear run until 200 M. Made good ground when in clear.
Near rear. Improved gradually on home turn then steadied when crowded early in straight. Again commenced to make ground then checked when crowded. Kept on well. Objection against winner overruled.
In front of midfield. Improved from 500 M and went to lead at 400 M. Kicked clear and looked winner only to be caught in concluding stages.
Led until 400 M then gave ground quickly.
Outside lead. Failed to quicken after straightening and kept on one-paced.
Midfield. Gave ground from 300 M.
Bounded in air at start and was behind midfield. Steadied when unable to get clear run early straight. Made good ground when in clear final 200 M.
Failed to show speed and was at rear throughout.
Midfield. Made some ground early in straight then run ended at 200 M and found no more afterwards.
In front of midfield. Lost ground behind another runner at 700 M. One-paced in straight.
Settled midfield or worse. Ran on well in straight without threatening.
Soon at rear. Wide into straight. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Hung out badly approaching and rounding the home turn. Ran on well without threatening.
Tardy start, soon midfield or better. Unable to quicken in straight.
Always prominent, 2nd or 3rd. Led briefly 200 M. Effort not sustained to defy the winner final stages but held on for 2nd close to the line.
Around midfield. Made steady improvement after straightening until no extra close to the line. (Hung out in straight.)
Midfield and wide most of the race. Made no show in straightr.
At rear. Moved closer along the rail early straight, then kept on one pace.
Difficult to settle early. Soon midfield. Progressed to 4th before straightening but soon found no extra. Gave ground badly 150 M out.
Jumped awkwardly, then mainly 2nd or 3rd. Took time to gather momentum early straight. Ran on well to the line and just got beaten by quinella pair narrowly.
Soon led. Briefly headed 200 M but fought back determinedly final stages to win narrowly.
Midfield or worse. One-paced in straight.
Taken to back. Checked when disappointed for running between runners at about 300 M. One-paced thereafter.
Worse than midfield. Under pressure 600 M. Found nothing in straight.
In touch to 350 M. Weakened gradually thereafter.
Towards rear. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Mainly behind midfield. Never a factor upon straightening.
No early speed and remained at back. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish without troubling the first pair. (Saddle shifted back.)
Jumped best before settling in touch. Dropped back a little from 1200 M. Never a threat in straight.
Began awkwardly. Settled at rear. Headway rounding home bend to be behind midfield turning in. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away but soon recovered to be midfield. Headway from 1200 M to be 3rd at 900 M. Kept on in straight until no extra inside 100 M.
Soon midfield whilst proving difficult to settle. Slight improvement from 600 M. One-paced in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Soon 2nd. Took lead turning in and sprinted away for a commanding victory.
Soon towards rear despite being ridden along. Dropped to the back 500 M out. Soon eased down upon straightening.
Began awkwardly and soon midfield or behind. Weakened badly 300 M out.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Headway around field from 800 M to be in midfield but wide turning in. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish without threatening the winner.
Soon led. Headway turning in. Kept on until not quickened final 100 M.
Settled around midfield on rail. Shaken up 350 M out and improved a bit then only kept on one-paced final 200 M.
In touch early, steadily dropped towards midfield from 900 M. Not a threat in the straight.
Steadily dropped to the rear from wide barrier. 4 wide rounding home bend then ran on strongly on outer from 300 M to just miss narrowly.
Settled near rear. Clipped heels near the 600 M. Made up some ground from 300 M then one-paced closing stages.
Midfield, 3 or 4 wide without cover middle stages. Gave ground from 300 M.
Ridden along early but was outpaced towards rear. Under pressure 450 M out, made ground steadily final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield, dropped back a bit rounding home turn when racing tight. Ran on steadily from 300 M, one-paced close home.
Behind the pace on rail. Took over from 300 M, kept on well to the line to defy challengers.
Always prominent, kept on well but just failed to claim a placing concluding stages.
Niggled along to make running. Hung out away from rail from 600 M. Headed at 300 M, swamped 100 M out.
Prominent to straight. Kept on till finding no extra closing stages.
In similar position throughout.
In touch to 250 M. Soon beaten.
Never troubled leaders.
Never in the hunt.
Settled in rear and was well back into straight. Made up considerable ground final 250 M.
Mostly in 6th to straight where he ran on well to challenge inside 200 M, having every chance despite drifting out near finish.
Was 9th when fell 700 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon took up running and led field to straight. One-paced when headed 150 M.
4th or 5th to straight. Asked for effort 250 M and ran on to lead inside 150 M. Just held on under pressure.
About 10th when fell 700 M. (Bled - see Racing Incidents.)
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Was 5th before improving from 1000 M and was upsides leaders approaching home turn. Lost some ground early in straight till renewing effort 150 M. Kept on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Dropped back early and was towards rear when fell 700 M. Subsequently destroyed. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Among leaders passing the Rock. Gained slender advantage on straightening. Was headed passing 150 M and never able to fight back. (Saddle shifted.)
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside final 200 M. (Dropped whip 100 M.)
Towards rear early. Improved progressively along rail to be 4th 700 M. Sustained effort in straight to take lead inside 150 M. Held on well.
Midfield at best.
Midfield. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Last. Ran on well passing 200 M.
Left awkwardly, soon made up good ground to be prominent. Unable to hold place from 3rd final turn.
Led field to home turn. Held 3rd until weakened badly closing stages.
Always thereabouts. One-paced.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Found no extra in straight.
Chased leader. Failed to quicken to challenge closing stages.
Midfield. Finished strongly final 200 M to take charge close home.
Led till no extra closing stages.
Rear of midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled behind leaders. One-paced in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on.
Wide in midfield to straight. Faded.
Midfield to straight. Ran on well late.
Always towards rear.
Always well behind.
Never better than midfield. Over-raced middle stages.
Never nearer.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground steadily far side to be 5th approaching 400 M. Kept on.
Towards rear. Dropped to the last from 500 M.
Led. Unable to defy challenge from the winner closing stages.
Always well there. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Held 5th to 800 M. Progressed steadily to be 3rd turning in. Responded well to take lead 100 M out. Held on.
Soon 4th. Improved to 3rd 1000 M out. Found no extra final 400 M.
Midfield early, dropped to the rear 1200 M out. Never able to feature.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Made up a little ground early straight. Soon found no extra. (Lame.)
Stumbled at start, behind midfield. Remained 6th from 1250 M. Kept on same pace to finish.
Held 3rd to 900 M. Dropped back steadily.
Led till overhauled early in straight.
Last most of way to straight. Never nearer.
Wide. Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Well there. Held some chance early in straight. Kept on one pace.
Settled at the back. Loomed up on inside to hold every chance passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort.
Rear of midfield. Carried out about 200 M out. Ran on late.
Never in the hunt.
Settled in midfield. Quickened to lead 200 M out. Pushed out once in front.
Settled behind leaders. Angled off rails to challenge turning in holding slender advantage early in straight but worn down closing stages.
Better than midfield. Shifted out about 200 M out. One-paced.
Midfield. Checked 500 M. Dropped out turning in.
Unable to keep up early to be rearward. Saved on home bend. Made good ground very late.
Midfield with cover early. Saved along rail home bend. Made steady ground without looking a treat.
In prominent position but 3-wide early. Began to tire after 600 M.
Ridden hard early but unable to show speed. Always at the tail.
Right behind leaders early stages. There on turning in. Never a threat.
Wide in midfield early. Wide and rearward on home bend. Never quickened.
3-wide midfield early. One-paced without threatening.
Began best to go to lead. Passed at 200 M and battled on one-paced.
Midfield on the rail. Saved ground on home bend to within striking distance. Gained run to score well.
Began well straight outside leader. Unable to hold ground from 500 M. Tired badly closing stages.
Very wide into first bend but handy. There until home bend. Weakened final 200 M.
Right behind leader early stages. Eased to outside leader on home bend. Dashed clear run down final stages.
Outside leader. Gave ground on straightening.
Outside lead and 3-wide. Gave ground from 400 M.
Led. Kept on well despite being headed shortly after straightening.
Prominent. Kept on mostly one-paced in straight.
Behind leaders early and then dropped to be in front of midfield at 600 M. Responded well after straightening to just fail. Raced tight with winner over concluding stages.
Midfield. Gave ground after straightening. Clipped heels and nearly fell when beaten at 200 M.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Behind leaders. Into clear on straightening and soon went to lead. Kept on strongly to score narrowly despite racing tight over the concluding stages.
Failed to show early pace and was behind midfield. Near rear on straightening. Only passed tiring horses in straight.
Slow to begin and then with rear. Saved ground on home bend by remaining on inner. Kept on fairly in straight.
From outside gate taken back to be with rear. Commenced to improve from 500 M. Made good ground early in straight but found no extra final 200 M.
Near rear. Circled field from 500 M. Made good ground early in straight. Run evened out final 200 M.
Prominent, 3-wide without most of the race. Weakened steadily 150 M out.
Niggled along early to hold position in midfield. Moved closer rounding home bend to be behind leaders into straight. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Dropped towards rear 700 M out. Never a factor.
Towards rear, wide without cover most of the way. No significant progress in home straight.
Began awkwardly, always at the back. Checked at 400 M. Did not recover.
Better than midfield. Began to struggle 400 M out, weakened further inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running , then eased to sit behind leader from 1100 M. Dropped out rapidly from 500 M, eased down in straight.
Ridden along to be in touch early. Settled in midfield from 1100 M. Under pressure from 500 M, unable to quicken in straight.
Soon settled towards rear. Closer order rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on well from 250 M to hit front 100 M out. Comfortably.
Jumped awkwardly, ridden along to dispute lead until holding clear advantage 1100 M out. Headed at 100 M when finding winner too strong.
Better than midfield on rail early stages. Crept closer from 1000 M to track leader rounding home bend. Unable to keep up with the placegetters inside 200 M.
Slightly slowly away, ridden along but outpaced towards rear. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Midfield. Under pressure rounding the home bend and soon dropped towards rear. Faded after straightening.
Towards rear. Widest into straight. Made steady progress until one-paced closing stages.
Soon led and made all for a victory.
Towards rear. Made up steady ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon settled at back. Commenced a run rounding the home bend and crept closer until steadied at about 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Ridden across field from a difficult gate to go forward. Soon tracked leader. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Midfield or worse. 4-wide into straight. Kept on well without threatening.
Mainly midfield. Ran on well when cleared 250 M out to miss 2nd narrowly.
Midfield or better. Improved to 3rd before straightening until weakened steadily final 250 M.
Always at rear. Never seen with a chance.
Jumped awkwardly and then ridden a bit to maintain a handy position along the rail. Kept on well in straight and held on for 2nd.
Prominent. Dropped to midfield before straightening. No extra.
Well there. Took lead passing 100 M. Held on until headed 200 M. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 4-wide 5th turning in. Ran on to take lead 200 M. Won going away.
Midfield. Dropped back passing 800 M.
Always thereabout. Unable to quicken in straight.
Better than midfield. Advanced to 3rd passing 700 M. Found no extra 200 M out.
Towards rear from the widest draw. Was bumped and stumbled at 400 M, nearly unseating the rider. Eased down thereafter.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader final turn. Kept on without threatening.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped well and was in the front early stages. Dropped back steadily home bend to be midfield turning in. Kept on without threatening.
Towards rear. Improved along rail to midfield home turn. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group turning for home. Moderate progress final 200 M.
Tardy start. Raced greenly and was in the rear throughout. Shifted out abruptly 400 M and bumped WINNING ASSOCIATES.
Chased leaders to straight. Kept on without quickening.
Never seen with a chance.
Disputed lead to 350 M then weakened gradually.
Broke well. Held slender lead before gaining 1L advantage after straightening. Caught by fast-finishing winner close home.
Given reminders to muster early pace. Dropped out from 5th into straight.
Always at the back.
Broke well but sluggish and soon dropped behind midfield.
Last throughout.
Mainly wide in midfield to straight. Kept on one pace.
Never in danger.
Never far off in 4th. Finished strongly inside final 250 M to grab victory near finish.
Led field to 1100 M, then sat outside leader to straight. Unable to maintain position from 3rd 200 M out.
Remained 3rd to final turn where he ran on well along rail to gain upper hand briefly approaching 200 M. Kept on but was caught near finish.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group 400 M. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Behind midfield and was wide. Made up good ground in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Soon last. Ran past a few beaten horses final 250 M.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily from 900 M. (Lame.)
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th from 1000 M. Weakened in straight.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Made ground early straight to be 4th until finding no extra closing stages.
Better than midfield. Progressed to 4th final turn. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Well there. Led field from 1100 M, still holding slender advantage early straight. Was headed briefly near 200 M. Kept on gamely to regain advantage close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Wide. Midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled behind midfield. Made moderate progress on inside down straight.
Trailed field to 300 M. Ran past beaten runners.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Prominent to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Behind midfield. Kept on without quickening.
Mostly in midfield to straight. No extra.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight. No extra close home.
Nearly made all. Caught closing stages.
Prominent till gradually weakened from approaching home turn.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled behind leaders. Came to challenge soon after straightening and asserted authority closing stages.
Wide towards rear. Went to midfield in middle stages. Continued on and wide on home turn. Onepaced in straight.
Raced outside leader. Weakened on home bend and stopped badly.
Forward of midfield. Right behind leaders on home bend. Couldn't catch winner.
Began well from inside draw. Under pressure home bend and weakened final 200 M.
Crossed straight to lead. Passed at 200 M. Weakened final stages.
Went forward from wide alley to be on the pace. Three equal thereafter and shot clear on straightening.
Slow into stride to be rearward. Still there to 400 M. Made good ground late.
Went forward but very wide into first bend. Began to weaken near 600 M.
Towards rear early. Worked through field from 600 M. Made good ground in the straight.
Midfield on rail. Thereabouts to 600 M. Saved ground on home bend.
Midfield three wide early stages. Under pressure on straightening but weakened.
Midfield and wide into first turn. Always towards rear.
Midfield and three wide early. Never quickened.
Midfield on the rail. There throughout then one-paced.
Worked forward to reach lead at 1400 M. Went clear on straightening. Still held commanding break at 200 M but began to shorten stride shortly after and just failed to hold on.
Midfield. Behind midfield on straightening then only slight improvement until finding no more final 200 M.
Near rear. Rear into straight. No response afterwards.
Near rear early after failing to show pace. Improved after 1400 M to be prominent at 800 M. Still left with plenty to do at 200 M but responded well to claim leader in concluding stages.
Behind midfield after being checked early. Made ground gradually from 500 M and responded well early in straight. Kept on but to no avail.
Midfield throughout. Mostly one-paced in straight.
Prominent. Improved to be behind lead at 800 M. Came under pressure shortly afterwards but only kept on one-paced until giving ground final 400 M.
In front of midfield throughout. Kept on mostly one-paced in straight.
With rear. Waited with until straightening then when in clear finished the race off stronger than anything else but it was too late.
Behind midfield after being checked early. No response in straight.
Taken back to rear from outside barrier. Commenced to improve from 500 M but remained near rear into straight. Finished strongly last 300 M.
In front of midfield. Was steadied when giving ground at 300 M. Dropped out afterwards.
Led early then took sit behind leader at 1400 M. Chased leader into straight and kept on fairly until finding no more final 200 M.
Taken back to be near rear after being caught wide early. Remained same into straight and failed to make any ground afterwards.
Tightened at start. At rear. Dropped to last from 1300 M. Never a factor.
Midfield or better. Improved to be in touch down back straight. Dropped quickly out of contention 350 M out.
Mainly towards rear. Under pressure from 1000 M. Never a threat.
Soon sat outside the leader. Ran on well in straight and led briefly passing 200 M before being outsprinted by the winner 100 M out.
Towards rear from stable bend. Headway from 800 M to be in midfield turning in. Ran on early straight before dipping twice and weakened badly final 200 M.
Midfield early before dropping back towards rear. Improved turning into back straight to take up running turning in. Headed 200 M and was one-paced final 100 M.
Soon settled at back. Steady headway from 1400 M to be in midfield and wide. Responded well final 300 M and took lead 100 M out to win going away.
Tightened at start. Settled in midfield. Unbalanced and dipped at 1400 M. Ran on steadily in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
In touch early before dropping back slightly to forward of midfield rounding stable bend. Made up some ground final 200 M without threatening placed horses.
Soon led. Headway turning in and soon dropped right out of contention.
In touch. Unable to quicken upon straightening and weakened badly final 100 M.
Mainly midfield or worse. Found nothing after 300 M.
Prominent early. Eased back to 4th or 5th rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Midfield. Improved to 3rd after straightening. Kept on one pace until finding no extra in the run to the line.
Mainly midfield or worse. Under pressure from 600 M. No improvement in straight.
At rear. Made up some late running concluding stages.
Not far off until straightening. Weakened steadily final 300 M.
Prominent. Tracked leader from 900 M. Kept on well to hold 2nd without threatening the winner.
Crowded on jumping, then towards rear. Wide into straight. Ran on well without threatening quinella pair.
Slow to begin and at back. Remained last into straight. Made up some late ground final stages.
Steadily dropped towards rear. Never a factor.
Soon took up running and made all for a commanding victory.
Niggled along to maintain a position around midfield. One-paced in straight until finding nothing final stages.
Never better than mid-division despite improving a bit from 300 M.
Never on terms.
Soon improved towards leaders and was 3rd 1200 M. Stayed on same pace closing stages.
Mostly 6th to home bend and similar position into straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Last 800 M and still in rear turning into straight. Stayed on a bit final 250 M.
2nd before taking lead from 600 M. Was 2L clear early in straight before finding winner too strong 200 M. No extra.
Rear early and was midfield home turn. Found nothing when asked 300 M.
Mostly midfield to home bend. Kept on steadily in straight to claim 2nd inside 150 M.
Led to 600 M and was 2nd on straightening. Could find no more and dropped out 300 M.
Ran well to home bend where he soon gave ground.
Well there before dropping to rear 1400 M. Improved a bit on outside rounding home bend but did not sustain effort in home straight.
Among rear ground into straight where he failed to obtain clear run 250 M. Kept on when clear close home.
Never far off. 3rd into straight where he quickened to lead and go clear passing 200 M. Kept on strongly under pressure.
Towards rear before making up some ground inside 200 M. Never nearer.
Midfield or behind. Towards rear along back straight. Crept closer order turning in. Made ground final 300 M to grab 3rd near finish.
Better than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Always there. Ran on along rail to take command final turn. Won unchallenged.
In touch. Made progress to 2nd 600 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield turning for home. Ran on steadily to take 2nd close home.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 400 M. Hung in home turn and straight.
Slightly slowly away, around midfield before making some progress turning for home. No response when whipped 300 M.
Soon led. Hung out badly when headed final turn. Faded.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Rear. Very wide final turn. Made up some ground in straight.
Towards rear. Wide turning in. No progress.
Towards rear. Made ground final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Effort rounding home bend hitting front about 200 M out. Just defied runner-up's late challenge.
Settled in last few. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on to miss by the narrowest of margins.
Soon took up running and led till dropped out home bend.
Never a danger.
Never far off. No extra in straight.
Midfield. Hung in from whip entering straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Well there to home bend. Dropped out.
Prominent. Hit front rounding home bend. Headed soon after straightening when no extra.
Never nearer.
Prominent. Took closer order home bend. Disputed lead turning in. Weakened inside 200 M.
Always well behind.
Towards rear. Made steady progress in straight without threatening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on for a remote 4th in straight.
Soon towards rear. Hung out badly home bend. Eased down.
Midfield. Made moderate progress inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field from 800 M until headed 150 M out. Unable to match speed with the winner.
Midfield. Made good progress from 400 M. Ran on steadily to take 3rd 200 M out. Kept on.
Soon prominent. Was 2nd turning for home. Ran on solidly to take control passing 200 M. Won readily.
Prominent from widest draw. Unable to hold place soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Never on terms.
Prominent early, soon raced midfield or slightly better. One-paced.
Tardy start, remained at rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Settled in last few. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Given reminders early. Midfield till faded halfway out. (Lame.)
Prominent in 3rd to straight. Dropped out.
Never in the hunt.
Began well. Settled in midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight producing some late impression.
Settled towards rear. Finished well along rails to just fail to get up on line.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening under pressure.
Led early. Tracked leader far side. Re-gained advantage inside 200 M. Hung on well.
Took up running rounding stable bend and set pace to straight. Headed 200 M out and tired badly.
Around midfield to straight when little difficulty to be ridden out.
Raced in midfield. Saved ground on home bend. One-paced in the straight.
Slow into stride to be rearward. Still midfield on home bend. Made ground out wide inclined to hang in.
Slow into stride to be rearward. Right behind leaders on home bend. Gradually obtained lead closing stages. (Distressed.)
Right behind leaders. Left in front when another runner ran off. Shot clear on straightening. Run down final stages.
Checked on first bend to be handy position. There until 400 M then one-paced.
Began well to be right behind leader on rail. There until straightening but then tired closing stages.
Ran off badly at first bend. Raced wide throughout. Eased down.
Carried wide on first bend. Eased to be back racing towards rail. Wide and then weakened final stages.
Midfield on the rail. Never quickened and weakened badly.
Wide in midfield. Always there and never quickened.
Carried off the track by another runner. Had to be checked and shifted back in. Handy till 300 M, then a bit one-paced.
Slow to begin. Last on home bend. Made up good ground latter stages.
Behind midfield. Worked a little closer around home bend then responded well in straight to just fail.
Behind midfield. Dropped to rear on straightening. No response afterwards. Rider concerned with action.
Despite being hard ridden failed to show pace and settled in front of midfield. Gave ground before straightening and no response afterwards.
Near rear. Improved around field from 800 M and was midfield on straightening. Continued to make steady ground in the run to the line.
Followed leader. Took lead at 200 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off quinella pair.
Ridden along early and went across to sit outside leader at 1100 M. Lost some ground when hung out on home turn. Kept on fairly early in straight then one-paced.
Rear. Made a little ground early in straight then gave no more final 200 M.
Midfield. Shifted into clear on straightening and responded well to join lead at 100 M. Kept on to score narrowly.
Midfield. Ridden hard to keep up passing the 700 M. Failed to make any impression in straight.
With rear. Only ran past tired horses in straight.
Behind leaders. Shifted out into clear on straightening but then only kept on one-paced.
Soon led. Headed at 200 M. Kept on one-paced afterwards.
Always well there, awkwardly placed behind another runner 200 M out. Ran on steadily until no extra near finish.
Began well, then settled in better than midfield. Gradually weakened 100 M out.
Soon trailed the field. Made up good ground final 100 M.
Ridden along to race behind leaders. Steadily weakened from 500 M.
Jumped awkwardly, pushed forward but was outpaced towards rear. Never a factor.
Niggled along to be in touch. Behind leader into straight. Made sustained effort to hit front closing stages.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on. (Lame.)
Better than midfield and always wide. Not a factor in straight.
Disputed lead early then sat outside leader. Steadily dropped out of contention 150 M out.
Steadily dropped to rear of midfield from wide barrier. Shifted out to go forward at 200 M and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Worked forward to lead. Headed concluding stages when finding no more.
Tardy start, settled towards rear. Made up good ground final 200 M to just miss.
At back. Never in contention.
Ridden along to track leader. Took lead just after 200 M but was grabbed closing stages.
Soon midfield. Under good hold rounding home bend. Ran on without threatening. (Lame.)
Worse than midfield. Dropped further back before straightening. Never a factor.
Niggled a bit early before settling at 3rd from a difficult gate. No extra final 200 M.
Attempted to make all from a good gate. Headed just after 200 M, then found no extra.
Midfield and wide throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Worse than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Settled towards rear on rail. Made up good ground after straightening to be nearest at finish.
Prominent until 200 M. Gave ground badly final 100 M.
Around midfield. Responded well final 250 M to take charge closing stages.
Checked just after start, soon at rear. Made no improvement.
Behind the main bunch. No improvement in straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on steadily in straight to take lead 100 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Well there from widest draw, settling better than midfield. Weakened soon after turning in.
Slightly better than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Prominent. Unable to hold place soon after straightening.
Jumped very awkwardly, mostly at the last until running on steadily in straight.
Soon 4th. Kept on well final 250 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well from outside inside 300 M. Just failed narrowly.
Prominent early, soon in midfield or better. Hung out 500 M. Kept on until one-paced final 200 M.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Made up good ground in straight, never nearer.
Pushed along from inside to take lead passing 1200 M. Unable to quicken when headed 100 M.
Well there, 2nd to 300 M. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear turning in. No progress. Hung out throughout.
Midfield. Found no room upon straightening. Into the clear too late in closing stages.
Slow early. Ridden to hold slender lead to 250 M when overhauled.
Lacked early pace and always at the back.
Well there to 250 M then weakened.
Mainly in midfield. No clear passage in straight until producing good late impression closing stages.
Slowly away. Well back until making up late ground closing stages.
Towards rear. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Made modest progress.
Prominent. Held every chance early in straight. No extra closing stages.
Began well from poor draw. Settled wide in prominent position. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Remained well back until running past beaten runners closing stages.
Never far off. One-paced when checked about 200 M out.
Towards rear. Dropped out in straight.
Broke well. Held up. Settled behind midfield and wide without cover. Made no impression in straight.
Well there early. Mainly just better than midfield to straight. Quickened well to take charge inside final 200 M.
Prominent. Dropped to midfield final turn. Weakened final 200 M.
Made most. Held on well to the line.
Midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Prominent briefly early stages. Soon dropped back and never in contention.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Never on terms.
Midfield. Hung out badly home turn. Weakened closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made steady progress rounding home bend. Kept on.
Mostly midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight. (Lame.)
Towards rear throughout.
Pushed along to soon be prominent. Came to tackle winner early straight. However effort not sustained.
Towards rear. Made ground along rail to be 4th 700 M. Kept on well in straight.
Better than midfield. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Pushed along from outside to be prominent. Took lead briefly rounding home bend. Found no extra in straight.
Wide in first few far side. Joined leader into straight. Drew clear final 200 M to win readily.
Well there early. Hampered and lost ground coming out of back straight. Recovered some ground around home bend but unable to sustain effort in straight.
Settled in last few. Snuck up on rails turning for home. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Broke well then settled in last few. Made no show thereafter.
Settled behind midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Well back. Went off the track home turn. Never recovered.
Midfield. Effort turning in. Faded from prominent position upon straightening.
Never nearer.
Broke well. Prominent to straight and weakened.
Soon led. Joined by winner entering home straight. Outsprinted closing stages.
Around midfield. Made steady headway down straight without threatening.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Mostly in midfield to 500 M then weakened.
Restrained in forward of midfield far side. Took closer order home bend. Soon weakened from prominent position upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began best to be outside leader early. Travelled behind from middle stages. Unable to run down winner.
Forward but wide early. Wide to home bend. Never threatened.
Midfield. Checked on straightening then weakened.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Wide in midfield thereafter. Made good ground in straight.
Rearward. Last on home bend. Only one-paced in straight.
Midfield early. Under pressure on home bend. Made up good ground in the straight.
Began best to be leading division but three wide. One-paced in the straight.
Very wide equal lead early. Raced there till 400 M then weakened badly in home straight.
Sped through from inside draw to lead. Dashed clear on straightening to score very well.
Wide in midfield early. Out in straight but didn't quicken.
Rearward. Never quickened and only plodded.
Midfield. Never nearer.
Rearward. Always there.
Right behind leader early then restrained to midfield. Dropped out badly in home straight.
Near rear. Remained same into straight and then only ran past tired horses.
Midfield. Hard ridden on straightening but found nothing.
Rear. Same into home straight then took time to gather momentum. Made same ground final 200 M.
Initially outside leader then behind lead at 900 M. Kept on one-paced early in straight then gave ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Eased into clear on straightening then sprinted quickly to take lead at 200 M. Went on to win comfortably.
Behind midfield. Followed winner through after straightening but unable to match its effort despite keeping on well.
Near rear. Made good run down outside after straightening. Continued to make ground in the run to the line but never looked likely.
In front of midfield. Found no extra after straightening and gave ground final 200 M.
In front of midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Went forward from start and crossed to lead at 900 M. Remained same until 200 M then kept on fairly.
Midfield throughout. Did not quicken in straight.
In front of midfield and free early. Gave ground from 450 M.
Led early then settled behind leader at 900 M. No response when asked for effort at 500 M.
Well there till 200 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Midfield early. Dropped back slightly before the home bend but soon ridden to midfield. Ran on well in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and then improved to 2nd or 3rd into straight. Found nothing 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear. 2nd last into straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Broke best. Soon steadily dropped to midfield or worse. No further progress.
Better than midfield. Trapped wide into straight. Could not keep up 300 M out.
Worse than midfield. Wide throughout. Made no improvement in straight.
Tardy start. Trailed field. Ran past few beaten runners closing stages.
Better than midfield. No extra after straightening.
Inconvenienced on jumping and then ridden to midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Attempted to make all. Hung out from 800 M. Rounding the home turn and in the straight hung out badly. Headed 100 M and lost 2nd place final strides.
Better than midfield. Could not produce extra when asked for effort after straightening.
Midfield or worse to straight. Ran on well to take lead 100 M out and held on to win.
At the rear group. Made some improvement in straight.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon took up 3rd place. Under pressure rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight and gained upper hand final 100 M. Held on.
Ridden forward to be in touch. Dropped back to midfield from 1300 M before losing further ground to be at rear turning in and dropped right out of contention.
At rear early before moving up to midfield or better from 1300 M. Unable to quicken in straight and dropped out of contention final 200 M.
At rear early before moving up to midfield or worse from 1400 M. Hung out rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight.
Soon led. Headed 300 M. Kept on one-pace in straight and proved difficult to ride out whilst hanging out in the run to the line.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Made up some ground early straight until one-paced final 200 M.
Soon moved up along rail to 2nd position. Ran on well upon straightening and took lead 300 M out. Kept on well but was outsprinted by the winner inside 100 M.
Midfield or worse. Dropped to the rear rounding home bend. Never a factor.
Mainly towards rear. Improved from 800 M to forward of midfield turning in. Ran on until not quickened final 100 M.
Jumped well from wide draw and settled in 4th place from 1300 M. Kept on without threatening.
At rear. Never a factor.
Midfield or worse. Dropped to the rear 1000 M out. Last from 800 M. Never a threat thereafter.
Soon towards rear. Wide turning in. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
At rear. Headway from 700 M but was trapped wide turning in. Ran on well final 350 M to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Under pressure upon straightening but only managed to stay on one-paced. Not persevered with closing stages.
Behind pace on rail. Gave ground gradually 200 M out.
Jumped awkwardly then was checked, at rear until recovering to midfield and wide near 1000 M. Ran on steadily from 350 M, no extra concluding stages.
Niggled along to dispute lead. Behind leader from 1000 M. Faded from 350 M.
Began awkwardly then was severely checked. Tailed off until making significant ground along inner final 200 M.
Better than midfield most of the way, became unbalanced when tightened running to first turn. Kept on one-paced final 200 M when finding no extra.
Midfield and mostly 4 or 5 wide. Became unbalanced at 800 M and did not stretch out thereafter. Dropped out quickly inside 200 M.
In forward position early, steadily dropped to the rear at 1200 M despite ridden along. Not a factor thereafter.
Ridden to be well there, hung in early stages. Dropped out from 300 M.
Waited with towards rear. Unbalanced near 500 M when awkwardly placed behind another runner. Ran on steadily final 300 M to claim a distant 2nd, dipped near the line.
Well there early, steadily dropped towards mid-division at 1200 M. Dropped back further rounding home bend then made ground steadily from 200 M.
Niggled along from widest gate to be prominent. Took slender lead out wide from 1200 M. Shifted across to rail at 900 M. Kicked clear from 400 M to win impressively.
Prominent then steadily dropped towards midfield or worse from 1000 M. Made gradual ground final 200 M.
Improved steadily from rear rounding home bend. Continued to make ground in straight, keeping on quite well closing stages.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Hard ridden to lead and hold narrow advantage into straight. Unable to hold place 200 M.
Well there to straight where he made no show.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field to straight. Made up considerable ground final 300 M.
Soon in midfield and remained there to straight. Ran on well to lead towards finish.
5th or 6th to straight where he failed to run on.
Towards rear before improving quite well in straight to threaten close home.
10th 800 M. Kept on early in straight till finding no extra closing stages.
Never in contention.
Worse than midfield 1200 M and similar position on straightening. Ran on a bit to the 200 M. Found no extra.
Never on terms.
In touch and held every chance 300 M. Soon beaten.
Never far off to straight where he quickened to lead passing 200 M. One-paced when headed near finish.
Behind the front runners. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Made a little progress in straight.
Settled behind midfield from widest draw. Effort home bend to reach 2nd soon after straightening. Unable to quicken inside 200 M.
Prominent. Took lead final turn. Found no extra when headed inside 200 M.
Soon led until headed final turn when weakened. Tailed off final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made slight progress rounding home bend. Ran on quite well 400 M but unable to catch the winner.
Prominent early, soon remained in touch. Midfield turning in, then unable to feature.
Tardy start, remained at rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Dropped to the rear group final turn. Found not much room while improving early straight. Made up good ground when in clear.
Midfield. Severely checked along rail approaching 300 M. Never recovered.
Jumped well from a wide draw, then settling midfield. Sustained effort in straight to take lead passing 200 M. Held on well.
Always at the rear. (Bled.)
Always prominent. Kept on well in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Prominent to straight then faded gradually.
Broke well settling behind leaders. Fought on doggedly to gain 2nd but find winner too strong.
Midfield early. Lost ground and hampered and dropped to last few home bend. Made up some late ground in straight.
Travelling in 5th and better than midfield when badly hampered approaching home bend. Never recovered.
Midfield throughout. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra close home.
Never better than midfield. Hampered approaching home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Slowly away. Always in rear. Made no show.
Never nearer.
Settled just better than midfield. Commenced move upon straightening to grab victory close home. Pushed out.
Slightly slow at start and hampered. Quickly recovered to midfield on outside home bend. Sustained good progress final 200 M doing best work at finish.
Midfield to straight, then weakened.
Pushed to lead after start. Held narrow advantage rounding home bend and attempted to make rest. Caught close home.
Midfield far side. Met interference and lost ground approaching home bend. Never recovered.
Settled close-up outside leader. Came to challenge under pressure in straight but unable to quicken to threaten.
In touch to 250 M. Weakened.
Towards rear. Hampered 300 M. Made up some ground thereafter.
Around midfield to straight. Weakened closing stages.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Disputed lead to 800 M out. Dropped out from 2nd soon after straightening.
Soon towards rear. Unable to quicken in straight.
Prominent. Found no extra final 200 M.
Always behind midfield.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Held for a run when improving inside 300 M. Ran on when in clear.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made up good ground from outside inside 300 M.
Soon last. Ran on well from outside final 300 M to claim victory closing stages.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground along rail to be in touch. Kept on quite well early straight but unable to quicken closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Kept on well final 200 M.
Led or disputed lead, taking over from 800 M. Held on until headed closing stages.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to tackle leaders upon straightening holding every chance. Just denied by bobbing of heads.
Never nearer.
Bet6ter than midfield most of way. One-paced.
Broke well. Held up behind leader. Hit front upon straightening. Fought on doggedly to just resist runners-up's strong late challenge.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Wide throughout and midfield to straight. Ran on well down centre of track to have every chance closing stages. Unable to sustain effort close home.
Slightly slow early. Soon in midfield. Tightened inside 400 M before running on steadily.
Prominent to straight then dropped out.
Midfield throughout.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Settled at the back. Produced good impression down home straight.
Led to straight and overhauled. (See Racing Incidents.)
Knuckled and almost fell at start. Made no show.
Mostly just better than midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled at back. Last turning into straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Niggled to maintain at midfield in early and middle stages. Rather wide throughout. Not a factor from 400 M.
Jumped well, led or disputed lead. Took narrow advantage in early straight until headed 200 M and weakened steadily thereafter.
Soon disputed lead. Dropped out 300 M out.
Towards rear. 2nd last into straight. Made up steady ground to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace in straight without threatening.
Always well there. Ran on well to look like a chance at 200 M until weakened final 50 M.
Broke well and then settled behind leaders. Asked to go 300 M and took lead 200 M. Kept on to score narrowly.
Mainly at rear. Moved closer to midfield before straightening. Ran on well in straight.
Mainly midfield. Steadied when crowded at 800 M. One paced in straight.
Mainly midfield or better, responded well after straightening. Ran on well to miss narrowly on the line.
Towards rear throughout. Became unbalanced when crowded at 200 M and then made no improvement.
Held up inside pacesetters early on, asked to lengthen 500 M from home, hit the front while hanging out with 100 M to run causing interference, lost lead in shadow of post.
Away well, led those drawn on far side and still vying for lead before weakening with 200 M to run.
Away well but tended to hang out throughout, prominent until 400 M before dropping away markedly.
Last and towards far rail with 800 M to race, about 7Ls off pace and ridden with 600 M to go, stayed on at same pace.
Always towards rear, raced about 5Ls off leaders with 600 M, soon faded.
Raced prominently during first half of race, niggled to maintain effort 500 M, soon retreated.
Broke well, always raced prominently, hard ridden with 400 M to run, headed by COMME D'HABITUDE 100 M out, battled back gamely to win all out.
Away smartly, gradually shifted left from outside draw to reach stands rail on terms with leaders with 500 M to race, stayed on well without the pace of first three.
Exited gates awkwardly shifting out, raced in midfield about 3.5 lengths off leaders at 600 M, under pressure at 400 M but stayed on fairly well to make moderate late headway.
Broke well but never on terms during first half of race, weakened further in second half.
Travelled well before being asked to stay in touch with 600 M to race, pulled up. (Bled.)
Impeded on exiling gates, raced towards rear early on, responded to pressure 500 M out to steadily peg back leaders, just ran out of ground.
Hampered at gates but plenty early speed to lead at 800 M, ridden approaching 200 M in between COMME D'HABITUDE and GOLCONDA, beaten when badly baulked by former 30 M from line.
Settled alongside COMME D'HABITUDE early on, ridden to stay in touch 400 M out but offered no response.
Always up there. Took lead 200 M out. Every chance until collared by the winner near the line.
Behind leaders to 350 M, dropped out quickly.
Better than midfield. Responded well to challenge leaders final 300 M but unable to peg back the first pair.
Driven along from the start but remained last until passing well beaten runners close home.
Well back and was soon under strong pressure. Made steady ground final 300 M.
Midfield to 350 M, dropped out of contention.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Trailed the field until making gradual progress from 300 M. One-paced final bit.
Around midfield. Under pressure from 650 M. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Weakened 250 M out.
Just behind midfield. Weakened 350 M out.
Inconvenienced at start and travelled in midfield. Asked for effort inside 400 M to grab victory final strides.
Began awkwardly but not far off. Dropped back to midfield 300 M out, then kept on same pace.
Always in touch, raced ungenerously in the run to the line, causing rider to stop riding and straighten. Kept on.
Disputed lead to 200 M, no extra though keeping on quite well.
Held up in rear, threatened to make a burst up inside rail entering straight 6Ls down but failed to follow through.
Tardy start, dropped out to race in last place early stages, raced three wide 6 to 7 lengths off pace entering straight, ran on well without ever threatening winner.
Niggled along early on, ridden to improve around bend, entered straight two wide and 5Ls down, rapid headway to hit front 200 M out, ran on well.
Raced in midfield on inside, entered straight in 7th, 3.5Ls off leader, briefly threatened to challenge, not come on final 200 M.
Slowish exit from stalls, raced two wide 2.5 lengths behind leader on straightening up, held every chance 400 M from line but could not pass SUPER CENTURY, chance gone 200 M out, faded.
Never on terms racing in second / third / fourth from rear throughout, always at least 6 lengths off pace.
Settled on inside in 4th or 5th until entering straight, prevented from delivering run for over 200 M before shifting out, final sprint have too little, too late.
Ridden to make early running, ceded advantage to SUPER CENTURY with 900 M to run, ridden but still in touch upon straightening up 2 lengths off leader, on inside, quickly fell away.
Gained lead from wide draw 900 M out, travelled well, still on bridle 300 M out, no answer to winner's finishing kick but stayed on well for second.
Tracked leader racing outside HORNET until 400 M out, entered straight in second place, 1 length down, effort 300 M out quickly extinguished.
Travelled in midfield two off the rails, turned for home 4Ls off pace inside winner, weakened rapidly. (Bled.)
Outpaced early and well behind, some 10 lengths back, entering straight. Kept responding to strong riding to stay on well through beaten horses.
Never on terms early on, raced outside of eventual winner entering straight, offered little during final 400 M.
Matched strides with SMART WINNER on that horse's outer before capitulating 200 M from line, had been 3 wide entering straight just 1.5 lengths off leader.
Midfield to straight where he was inconvenienced 300 M. Kept on passing 200 M, finding only one-pace close home.
In rear to straight. Never nearer.
Always there. Ran on to lead briefly 200 M out. Found first two too strong near finish.
Midfield into straight where he ran on to challenge final 200 M. Gained upper hand short of line.
Well there before dropping back to rear and remained there to straight. Made up considerable ground final 300 M.
Last into straight where he was improving when steadied 200 M out. Stayed on well towards finish.
Soon pulled his way forward. Held narrow advantage from 700 M to straight. Soon headed and weakened badly.
Settled worse than midfield to home turn. Quickened in straight to take narrow advantage 200 M. Kept on till caught final stride.
Mostly first 2 to straight when he soon dropped out of contention.
Well there to straight when he failed to run on.
Never troubled leaders.
Never better than mid-division.
Never on terms.
Mostly in 5th to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Midfield. Made progress to 4th rounding home bend. Kept on until one-paced inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed the field throughout.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and was towards rear throughout.
Always prominent. Was 2Ls 2nd turning in. Kept on but just lost 2nd close home.
Mostly 5th. Kept on well closing stages.
Settled behind midfield from widest draw. Made slight progress rounding home bend. Ran on from 6th final turn but unable to catch the winner.
Soon led and made all.
Held 2nd to 600 M. Remained prominent to straight but unable to quicken closing stages. Hung in badly throughout.
Ridden along to reach 3rd approaching 800 M. Was checked while hanging out badly about 700 M. Made no show thereafter.
Towards rear. Clipped heels and nearly fell approaching 400 M. No progress.
Rear of midfield. Under pressure early straight to make up some ground inside 200 M.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Always thereabouts. One-paced in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Attempted to make all. No extra when headed near finish.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Wide behind midfield. Gave ground at home bend.
Always in last few.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Well back. Never nearer.
Lost ground at start. Never seen with a chance.
Never far off. Quickened upon straightening to take charge closing stages.
Midfield throughout.
Jumped very awkwardly, losing ground. Never in contention.
Always at the back.
Mostly 10th to straight where he made up good ground from outside.
In touch. Hung out final turn. One-paced.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Led field approaching 800 M. Held on well along rail in straight.
Prominent. Was 3rd along rail upon straightening. Unable to hold place inside 200 M.
Hampered at start, behind midfield. Dropped out in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed along from widest draw to sit outside leader. Was one-paced and lost 2nd inside 100 M.
Never better than midfield.
Around midfield throughout. Found no extra closing stages.
Better than midfield. Improved gradually from 600 M to be 4th turning in. Continued to run on but never able to threaten the winner.
Waited with. Commenced move home bend. Quickened well down straight to snatch victory close home.
Slow out. Mainly wide in midfield.
Never on terms. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Never on terms.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Nearly made all. Overhauled rear finish.
Always last few.
Settled behind leaders. No room on rails early in straight. Obtained clear run passing 200 M and fought on under pressure.
Prominent and wide. Weakened inside 200 M.
Around midfield. Made modest headway in straight.
Bumped at start, mainly at rear. Made headway from 600 M but wide. Ran on well in straight but found the quinella pair too strong.
Pushed along and led from 1200 M. Narrowly headed 800 M but regained upper hand after straightening. Kept on and just held on to defy late challengers final stages.
No early speed despite pushed along. Mainly midfield or worse. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield or better. Under pressure near 600 M, unable to quicken. Dropped out from 250 M.
Midfield or better early. Moved clear to challenge winner 200 M until headed by the placegetters closing stages.
Not too far off. Checked when crowded just past the winning post the firt time then mainly midfield. Tired last 100 M.
Always better than midfield. Under pressure rounding the home bend. Unable to quicken in straight.
Settled at back. 4-wide into straight. Made up good ground to miss it narrowly.
