Mainly towards rear. Made up some ground in straight. Steadied at 200 M.
Soon sat outside the leader. Narrow lead from 800 M until headed after straightening, then gradually dropped out.
At rear. Made some progress from 600 M but wide. Unable to quicken in straight.
Around midfield. Checked at 600 M, then lost position. Made up some ground in concluding stages.

Settled in mid-division early on, drifted back to race 2 and 3-wide down back straight, still well back entering home straight widest of all, made moderate late headway through beaten horses, nearest finish.
Held handy position on inside rail in mid-division through first half of race, ridden to improve position when 6Ls off leaders 400 M from home, made little or no headway.
Sat amid trailing bunch two off rail about 7Ls off leaders, caught flat-footed once pace quickened entering home turn, no further impression.
Held up upon exiting stalls, remained near rear down back straight, ridden to take closer order 400 M from line, fair headway along inside rail in straight, nearest finish.
Up with early pace in 3rd position racing 3-wide, ridden to lie up with leaders 600 M out, soon weakened right out of it.
Reared exiting gates and lost at least 3Ls as a result, never on terms thereafter, always occupying one of the last three or four places.
Pressed on from gates early on, challenged for lead by Super Elite until finally moving to front 700 M from line, one-paced in home straight and no answer to winner's late effort.
Dropped into last place out of stalls, raced 10Ls off pace on inside 800 M out, not come on.
Settled on inside rail early on, ridden in 4th place when 4Ls off leader around home bend, one-paced in straight, hung out slightly under pressure.
Always prominent, moved forward into 3rd/4th and settled off leaders racing 2-wide, sat 2L off front-running Chocolate Tycoon rounding home turn, stayed on to grab leader inside final 100 M.
Always raced 3-wide towards rear, came under pressure 700 M to race, straightened up 4-wide, no impression.
Broke well, raced on inside and vied for early lead with Chocolate Tycoon, ceded advantage 700 M from line, off bridle entering home bend, gradually faded away.
Prominent and 3-wide. Shaken up 200 M out to prevail inside final 100 M. Held on well to defy challengers.
Knuckled and shifted out on jumping, prominent early then travelled in midfield from 900 M. 5-wide into straight. Ran on well on outer and looked a serious threat until no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Caught wide on home turn. Made only moderate progress final 150 M.
Driven along to take up position in midfield. Made gradual ground from 200 M, one-paced final bit.
Ridden to dispute lead early, then prominent on rail. Checked at 200 M when disappointed for running. Never recovered.
With leaders to 800 M then remained in touch. Weakened from 200 M.
Began awkwardly then was settled towards rear. Caught 6-wide rounding home bend and into straight. Made steady progress final 200 M.
Taken back from widest draw to be on the rail at rear. Crept closer rounding home turn. No clear running from straightening until 200 M, then ran on strongly just miss.
Slow to begin, soon recovered to be midfield or slightly better. 4-wide on home bend. Brief effort after straightening. Weakened inside 100 M.
Outpaced at rear. Ran past beaten runners concluding stages.
Well away and disputed lead early. Among front runners until taking lead after straightening. Headed by winner 100 M out, kept on well to the finish.
Prominent out wide. Took lead passing 1000 M and shifted across to the fence near 600 M. Headed 200 M out and weakened quickly from 100 M.
Rear of midfield. Lost running when knuckled near 800 M. Towards rear final turn. Made up a little ground in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on well in straight but unable to threaten the winner.
Prominent. Was 2nd around 900 M. One-paced final 400 M.
Pushed along to be in touch from widest draw. Dropped back from final turn.
Prominent early, soon dropped back to midfield or behind. No progress.
Towards rear. Made progress home bend to be 5th turning in. Unable to quicken in straight.
Tardy start, towards rear. Progressed to midfield turning in. Ran on steadily.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield 400 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Severely checked at start, was last to final turn. Ran on strongly inside 250 M to be nearest at finish.
In touch early, dropped to midfield near 500 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Midfield. Improved rounding home bend to be 2nd or 3rd home turn. Kept on without quickening while hanging in in straight.
Led field soon after start. Held on well to the line.
Near rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on along rail without quickening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to home bend where he dropped back slightly. Made no show in straight.
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always last few. No response under reminders turning in.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent briefly. Dropped behind midfield home bend. Made up late ground in straight.
Ridden to dispute lead home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Ridden at start and settled just better than midfield. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M holding some 1L break before caught close home.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Around midfield. Held up for a run on rails early in straight. Quickened well inside 200 M to claim victory final strides. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crossed gradually from wide draw holding narrow advantage to straight. Broke some 1L clear at about 200 M but soon weakened and overhauled.
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Always well back.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow at start. Quickly ridden to midfield. Found no extra over 200 M out.
Behind leaders. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Led field passing 1200 M. Weakened when headed inside 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed along to take lead until headed passing 1200 M. Effort in straight to re-gain advantage inside 200 M. Was just caught close home.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Never able to feature.
Always prominent. Kept on well inside 200 M.
In touch early. Remained in better than midfield until weakened badly final turn.
Behind midfield. Moderate progress home turn. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
In touch early, soon in midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Wide turning in. Made up some ground from outside final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon last. Moderate progress in straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Quickened well along rail to snatch victory near finish.
Better than midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Slightly behind midfield. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well soon after turning in, never nearer.
Broke well settling in midfield. No clear passage on inner early in straight until making steady headway inside 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Close up early. Dropped to midfield approaching home bend. Faded further into straight.
Settled on heels of leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening holding some chance but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Gradually improved along rails to be joint leaders home bend. Soon weakened in straight.
Contested lead from difficult draw. Settled just outside leaders home bend. Still 4-wide turning for home when quickened to hold narrow advantage. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled close home.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to reach 2nd final stride. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled at the back. Held up for a run early in straight. Never nearer.
Jumped fairly. Quickly improved to be joint leaders. Shared pace to straight then gradually weakened.
Always well back.
Midfield to straight. Found nothing.
Tightened at start. Gradual headway to be midfield home bend. Obtained split 300 M out and quickened to take charge nearing home.
Raced wide in front rank from poor draw. Taken back to 5th position before home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Soon tracked leader. Kept on well but just failed to pick up the winner final strides.
Jumped awkwardly and mainly at rear. Made up some late ground.
Slowly away and mainly at rear. Inconvenienced at 500 M. Ran past beaten runners final stages.
Tardy start, always at back. Never a factor.
Midfield early. Dropped back to worse than midfield rounding the home bend. Inconvenienced near 500 M. Not a factor thereafter.
Well there until weakened steadily 250 M out.
Mainly midfield. Hung out badly in the middle stages. Clipped heels and knuckled at about 500 M, then found nothing in straight.
Pushed to midfield after jumped awkwardly. Closer order round home bend. Kept on despite racing greenly after 200 M.
Settled midfield. Made up steady progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. No extra in straight.
Wide early. Well there. Kept on in straight until final stages to miss a place.
Mainly midfield or better. Kept on in straight without threatening.
Settled at back. Wide in early and middle stages. Slightly improved to worse than midfield rounding the home bend. Made up some late ground.
Ridden to lead. Fought on well to defy challenge final stages to win narrowly.
Held up in rear, still two wide and 7Ls off lead entering straight, rapid late headway out wide, just missed.
Pushed on to join leaders on exiting gates, 3rd until 1000 M out, ridden 600 M, faded.
Tracked leaders in 5th, under pressure entering straight, stayed on fairly well.
Pressed forward early to race in 3rd, every chance turning in but weakened 300 M out.
Never on terms, always last, always 10Ls off pace. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up near rear, outpaced entering straight, stayed on at one pace.

Settled behind winner racing two wide, switched wider to improve in straight, nearest finish.
Held up on rails inside DRAGON POWER until 400 M out, stayed on well to follow winner's path along rails in straight, nearest finish.
Always near rear, strongly ridden on rails and 8Ls off speed 500 M out, stayed on well in straight, nearest finish.
Away smartest, made all on inside until ceding advantage 200 M out, stayed on at one pace.
Raced in mid-division just outside winner, caught flatfooted between 400 M and 200 M out, stayed on again inside final 200 M.
Niggled along early, travelled around midfield until running on steadily from 250 M. No extra close home.
Ridden along to maintain midfield position. Lost position near 800 M when crowded. Not in contention afterwards.
Jumped awkwardly, gradually dropped towards rear from widest draw. Given reminders near 700 M. Last into straight, only ran past beaten runners.
In touch and wide from awkward barrier. Dropped out upon straightening.
Outpaced at rear. Made gradual ground on outer from 300 M, same pace last bit.
Hard ridden but failed to keep up. Was towards rear throughout.
Disputed lead early, then tracked leader from 1200 M. No extra and commenced to give ground inside final 150 M.
Prominent on rail. Responded well to take charge inside final 100 M.
Pushed along from wide barrier to be behind leader at 1200 M. Dropped out from 300 M.
Slowly away, gradually recovered to be midfield at 1200 M. Was hit on the head by another rider's whip near 300 M. Made steady ground final 200 M.

Best away, settled just in front of midfield. Ran on steadily from 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Began fairly, driven hard to take lead passing 1300 M. Held every chance until overhauled by the winner final 100 M. Kept on.
In touch early, dropped steadily towards rear of midfield at 1000 M, wide along back straight. Made up some ground final 250 M.

Never better than 2nd last, never closer than 7Ls off pace.
Slowish start, steadied in rear on inside, quickened up rounding bend to make rapid progress until 200 M out, no extra.
Settled on inside ahead of GONLARGO, headway around bend, brief effort in straight but not follow through.
Tracked TRILLION WIN in 2nd until straight, soon beaten.
Led after 200 M, never more than 2.5Ls clear, under pressure on straightening up, beaten 200 M out.
Settled on inside within striking range of leaders throughout, improved round bend, ridden to hit lead 200 M out, not last home.
Raced two wide early, 6Ls off leader, took closer order entering straight, switched widest to deliver challenge, quickened up well, hit front 50 M out.
Always there. Held every chance final 200 M. Found one-pace near finish. (Saddle shifted.)
Worse than midfield to home turn. Did not get a clear passage in straight until final 150 M when he stayed on strongly, full of running at the finish.
Was prominent before sharing lead from home bend. Hit front 200 M out but found no extra when headed passing 150 M.
Never far off before failing to hold place final 200 M.
Last to straight where he made up considerable ground.
In touch to home bend and was beaten turning into straight.
Mostly midfield to straight. Kept on under pressure closin stages.
In rear to straight where he ran on strongly to lead 150 M. Kept on under pressure.
Midfield to straight where he kept on well to 150 M. Found no extra.
Soon in midfield and remained there to straight. Kept on till outpaced final 150 M.
Never in the hunt.
Led or shared lead before fading out of contention approaching 200 M.
Soon dropped to rear. Never on terms.
At back to straight where he ran on a bit closing stages.
Held 4th early. Moved up to be 2nd far side. Took over soon after straightening. Won unchallenged.
Pushed along from widest draw to be slightly better than midfield. Improved to 3rd passing 800 M. Held on.
Midfield or better. Dropped back steadily from 1200 M to become last approaching the Rock. Never able to feature.
Prominent early until dropping back steadily around 1200 M. Tailed off in straight.
Held 2nd to 850 M, dropping to 4th. Weakened inside 250 M.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Steady progress to reach 4th turning in. Ran on without threatening.
Midfield or behind. Kept on moderately final 200 M.
Towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Led field to early straight. Found no extra.
Towards rear. Improved a bit home bend. Kept on.
Rear. Gradual progress from 400 M. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Made all. Hung on well.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Mainly in better than midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Never seen with a chance.
Travelled just better than midfield. Quickened to be close-up 3rd into straight. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Rider lost iron early. Quickly improved to position in better than midfield. Just kept on at the one pace in straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Never better than midfield. Hampered and lost ground into straight.
Settled behind leader. Unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Jumped badly. Rear. Improving when inconvenienced home bend. Made up good ground in straight doing best work at finish.
Settled at the back. Commenced move at Rock. Circled field home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Weakened into straight.
Prominent 3-wide to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. Made progress far side. Improved well rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Soon found no extra.
Midfield to the Rock and dropped back slightly. Never able to feature. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield.
Near rear. Checked approaching 1000 M. Never in contention.
Led briefly early, then remained in touch. Effort in straight to re-gain advantage passing 200 M. Just caught close home.
Prominent from widest draw. Among leaders 800 M out. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
Slowly away, last to 200 M. Made up good ground from outside.
Prominent. Led or shared lead from 800 M. One-paced when headed passing 200 M.
Soon midfield or behind.
Jumped well, then settled towards rear. Made good progress from outside home turn, taking charge close home.
Took lead 1000 M out and was soon joined. Dropped back to 3rd from 800 M. Weakened steadily from the home bend.
Around midfield to home bend. Pushed along 400 M to be in touch turning in. Ran on without threatening.
Prominent until home bend when weakened.
Midfield throughout. Found no room in straight.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened.
Mostly in front before joined into straight. Soon weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly behind leaders. Gradually weakened passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Finished strongly to snatch victory final strides.
Never in contention.
Wide in midfield. Went wider into straight. Made moderate progress to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly and rider unbalanced. Remained well back to straight. Kept on same pace.
Well there, holding brief narrow lead far side. Regained advantage turning in but unable to sustain effort and caught close home.
Settled in rear. Obtained split upon straightening and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Rear. Awkwardly placed behind runner into straight then not much room and kept on to finish.
Sat behind leaders. Asked to go after straightening. Took lead at 100 M. Held on to win.
Settled midfield along the rail from a good draw. Ran on in straight to hold 3rd narrowly.
Settled at rear. Responded fairly and made up some ground final stages.
Midfield or worse. No further progress.
Midfield or worse. Made up steady ground in straight to miss a placing narrowly.
Soon at back. Wide on first bend. Never a factor.
Always at rear. Wide into straight. Made no improvement.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Tardy start. Soon well there until no extra final 200 M.
Slowly away. Towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Broke well and soon sat outside leader. Narrow advantage 250 M but then headed final 100 M. Kept on to the line.
Soon led. Headed 250 M and weakened steadily.
Slowest away, raced in 2nd last on rails, travelled well but short of room and 7 lengths off leader rounding home turn, rapid headway inside final 200 M, line came too early. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced widest of all throughout, 4-wide early 3Ls off pace, widest entering straight, one-paced and not come on.
Slow start, never on terms and detached from field in early stages, 10Ls off speed entering home straight, passed two rivals in shadow of post.
Held up near rear and 3-wide early on, 6Ls away turning in, one-paced between 400 M and 200 M out, moderate headway final 200 M, nearest finish.
Took inside position early 2-3Ls off leaders, outpaced and under pressure 600 M out, stayed on fairly well final 200 M.
2-wide and settled near rear in early stages, in same place 200 M out, slight improvement to pass beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Broke well, took front rank on inside, clear lead 600 M out, kicked for home 500 M out and clear by 2.5Ls entering straight, all out, just lasted home.
Led after 200 M, racing 2-wide, ceded advantage to BULLISH after 400 M, under pressure and struggling to hang on to 2nd rounding turn, quickly dropped away. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3-wide early, 2-3Ls off pace, stayed on well straight, nearest finish (raced on POT BLACK's outer throughout without heading that rival at any stage).
Raced on inner about 3.5Ls off early speed, gradually became further detached from 600 M out, one-paced final 400 M.
3rd early on racing 3-wide, 2nd on straightening up, failed to finish off strongly, still 2nd 100 M from line, no extra.
Raced 2-wide and 2Ls off leaders early on, outpaced on bend, stayed on well final 400 M, nearest finish.
Outpaced at rear, driven to recover to midfield at 600 M. not in contention in the straight.
Never far off, ran on well from 200 M to look a winner until pipped by the winner final stride. Hung in badly throughout.
Bounded in air at start from difficult draw, wait with at rear, caught wide until the 600 M. Ran on strongly from 200 M to snatch race on the line.
Began fairly, niggled along to sit behind the leader on the rail. Gave ground gradually final 100 M.
Driven along to hold position in midfield. Just before the 200 M was steadied to avoid a runner. Kept on without quickening.
Better than midfield. Was steadied before the 200 M when disappointed for running. Kept on quite well afterwards.
Around midfield, ran on well under pressure final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Outpaced at rear despite being pushed along. Made up a little late ground.
Sent to the front, 2-wide. Headed inside 100 M. Kept on.
Niggled along from wide barrier to be in touch. Moved closer to the rail and the leaders passing the Rock. Every chance final 100 M, no extra closing stages.
Rear of midfield and wide early. Hung out approaching and rounding home turn and tailed off.
Behind midfield, 4-wide rounding home bend and into Straight. Made little progress in home straight.
Always at the back.
Around midfield to 200 M out. Weakened.
Soon travelled behind midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Well there. Took lead passing 400 M. Won going away.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Made no show.
With early speed and was well there to 250 M. Soon found no extra.
Jumped very awkwardly and dipped. Pushed along to soon be in touch. Weakened steadily inside 200 M.
Prominent. Kept on well but no match with the winner.
Midfield to 400 M. Never a factor.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on without quickening. (Saddle shifted.)
Better than midfield. Ran on final 200 M to just miss 2nd. (Saddle shifted.)
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Made steady progress from 400 M. Kept on.
Mainly better than midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Jumped best. Attempted to make all. Overhauled closing stages.
Well back. Made up good ground in straight doing best work at finish.
Broke well settling in last few. Produced significant progress down centre of straight to grab victory final strides.
Better than midfield to straight. Kept on.
Began awkwardly. Soon in midfield. Towards rear home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Well there. Found no extra closing stages.
Prominent. Quickened into straight to hit front about 100 M out but only to be outsprinted close home.
Stayed wide after beginning from poor draw. Went off the track home bend and never recovered.
In last few early. Made rapid progress to midfield home bend. Ran on strongly down straight to be nearest at finish.
Disputed lead far side. Dropped away quickly from close-up position into straight.
Midfield early. Yielded ground from home bend.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Tardy start, remained in midfield. Dropped back soon after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, was last to final turn. Made ground along inside from early straight, never nearer.
Made no show.
Towards rear. Made slight progress along rail while hanging out in straight.
Raced keenly and was soon in the front. Held on well to maintain advantages at finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Steadied at 300 M. No progress.
Sat outside winner to straight. Found no extra 200 M out.
Remained 5th to 300 M out. Ran on steadily to be 2nd close home.
Always prominent. Was 2nd briefly near 200 M. Kept on.
Settled 4th. Remained there until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Made up a little late ground final stages.
Prominent early. Wide around home bend and gradually dropped to last few into straight. Made up good ground in straight doing best work at finish.
Wide throughout. Midfield till dropped out into straight.
Midfield on rails early stages before checked and lost ground approaching home bend. Made up good ground on inner in straight.
Sluggish at start. Never seen with a chance.
Just better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Soon took up running. Broke 2Ls clear upon straightening. Flattered inside 200 M and caught close home.
Disputed lead to straight. Dropped out.
Mainly worse than midfield. One-paced.
Jumped slowly but soon in midfield. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Broke well. Held up in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Waited with. Widest on the turn. Finished strongly down centre of straight to snatch victory short of line.
Settled in midfield. Not much room upon straightening. Came to challenge once into the clear running on steadily to miss 3rd narrowly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield early. Improved to chase leader into straight. Kept on steadily before swamped for 2nd place close home.
Broke well settling behind leaders to straight. Weakened under pressure. (See Racing Incidents.)
At back. Never a factor.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground.
Broke best. Settled better than midfield. Kept on in straight.
Soon behind leader. Moved away from the rail to take closer order rounding the home bend. Quickened well to take charge inside final 200 M. Won comfortably.
Mainly midfield. Switched to inside to find running at 350 M. Ran on well but found the winner too strong.
Worse than midfield. Asked to go after straightening. Made up good late ground despite inconvenienced at 200 M and steadied near the winning post. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly midfield. Unbalanced when awkward on heels for some distance near 1200 M. Moved closer after straightening, weakened 200 M out.
Inconvenienced on jumping and then at back. Taken to outside to find running after straightening. Made some late ground.
Towards the rear group. Made up some ground in straight. Checked when crowded near the winning post.
Around midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Around midfield and then moved closer before the home bend. Wide into straight. Kept on until found no extra 250 M out.
Led until 200 M. Steadily weakened afterwards.
Ridden to take up a forward position. Rider dropped his near side rein near 500 M. Soon dropped out.
Settled two off the inside about 5Ls off pace, stayed on under pressure from 400 M, nearest finish.
Within striking range of leaders on outside in midfield 800 M out, passed by improving horses 600 M out, soon beaten.
Hard to ridden early to lie 3Ls off pace on inside 800 M out, soon driven to maintain position, beaten 400 M out.
Held up towards rear on inside, 6Ls off pace and under pressure 600 M out, tried to rally but stayed on at same pace.
Ridden to race prominently early, settled on outside behind eventual winner, under strong pressure turning in, stayed on to line.
Prominent in third and fourth position early, failed to lie up with leaders for long, gradually fell back, no chance 600 M out.
Settled in midfield three wide and 4Ls off pace early, steadily improved on outside around home turn, stayed on well straight to grab lead 100 M out.
Widest off all round first bend, ridden to occupy third position 1200 M out, under plenty pressure turning in, soon faded.

Tardy start, became slightly detached from main group in last or second last 8 to 10Ls off pace, took closer order 500 M out but still well back turning in, moderate late headway up inside rail, nearest finish.
Raced in second at REWARD's quarters throughout, still second 200 M out but tying up, no extra.
Relaxed on inside in midfield, travelled well, every chance to improve on inside off home turn but only very briefly threatened.
Away slowly, held up in rear, very wide on bend, never less than 8Ls off leaders.
Soon led though never more than 1L clear of ALL THE GLORY, still in front 200 M out, passed by winner 100 M from line and by runner-up 20 M out.
Never on terms, always vigorously ridden, widest entering straight, finished in own time.
Better than midfield, 3-wide. Kept on well without quickening in straight.
Settled towards rear. Made gradual ground from 250 M until finding no extra closing stages. end of race.)
Steadily dropped to the rear from outside barrier. Ran on well final 250 M to snatch race on the line.
Slow to begin, driven along to recover to be midfield at 1200 M. Asked for effort from 400 M to hit front inside 100 M. Just pipped by the winner final stride.
Began well, waited with behind leaders. Made move from 300 M to lead 200 M out. Swamped by placegetters inside final 100 M.
Settled around midfield. Ran on well under pressure from 250 M but unable to match strides with the first two closing stages.
Equal lead on rail. Clear advantage into straight. Headed 200 M out, gave ground steadily.
Jumped well from wide barrier to share lead on outer. Behind leader entering straight, dropped out from 200 M.
Niggled along to track leaders. Kept on fairly until beginning to tire inside final 200 M.
Steadily dropped to the rear despite niggled along. Never a factor.
Always travelled smoothly in second or third at ALL THE BEST's quarters, ridden to hit front 300 M out, couldn't repel winner's late effort.
Settled in mid-division two or three wide early, niggled to take closer order over 600 M out, 4Ls off leaders and hard ridden entering straight, kept grinding to hit front 30 M out.
Always prominent on inside in second or third, passed by CLASSIC MASTER 400 M out, failed to get near the lead again but stayed on fairly well in closing stages.
Raced three wide in fourth or fifth place early on, hard ridden entering straight, soon well out of contention.
Held up to race detached from main group, crept closer straightening up, followed path up inside rail used by ROMANTIC SYMPHONY, nearest finish.
Raced in handy spot on rails 3Ls off leader, switched off fence to make an effort 300 M out and carried head high, not reach leaders.
Always in the back group, never closer than 8Ls off the pace.
Restrained in rear on inside, crept closer on inner rounding home turn still 7Ls off pace, stayed on very well in straight, nearest finish.
Away well, led 1000 M out, relinquished advantage 300 M out, one-paced final 200 M.
Midfield early, tracking HIN YUEN'S UNICORN and racing two wide, soon under pressure and beaten around home turn.
Broke well but settled to race in rear racing three wide, second last turning in but soon dropped away markedly.
Towards rear in around 10th position racing two wide, switched further to deliver challenge 300 M out, nothing there.
Raced 6 to 7Ls off pace on inside, brief effort at top of straight, not come on.
Held up early in rear, remained there, always at least 8Ls off the pace.
Never on terms.
About 5th or 6th turning into straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Mostly in 7th to home turn. Ran on quite well closing stages but found winner too strong.
About 8th rounding home bend. Ran on a bit from the 300 M but unable to make further progress close home.
4th 1000 M and similar place early in straight. Was baulked along rails 250 M and made no show thereafter.
Always at the back.
In touch before failing to hold place approaching 200 M.
Towards rear before making up some ground final 250 M. Found one-pace near finish.
About 5th or 6th into straight where he ran on to lead passing 200 M. Won convincingly.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Was headed passing 200 M and found no extra.
Well there to straight. Held some chance 250 M but effort not sustained near finish.
Soon led until headed early straight. Kept on but unable to peg back winner.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Then one-paced.
Prominent from the widest draw. Found no extra in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly 4th until running on steadily final 300 M to just miss 2nd on the line.
Around 6th to final turn. Made no show in straight.
Never a factor.
Always well there on the rail. Took lead soon after straightening. Held on well to defy runner-up's challenges.
Around midfield. Kept on for a remote 4th.
Tardy start, towards rear. Last to straight, ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Always there or thereabouts.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily under pressure on rails.
Held up in rear. Ran on well down straight doing best work at finish.
Towards rear. Made modest progress down straight. Nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened gradually.
Never seen with a chance. Rider said concerned horse's action during race.
Around midfield. Dropped out entering straight.
Midfield. Ran on to narrowly miss place.
Settled in 3L 4th. Quickened well to draw level over 200 M out. Claimed victory in the bobbing of heads.
Nearly made all.
In touch. Hung in rounding the turns. Unbalanced passing 200 M. One-paced.
Settled towards rear. Shifted to inside and made good progress turning in. Ran on well to take lead 150 M. Won impressively.
Behind midfield. 4-wide 6th turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Slightly behind midfield. Weakened in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Held 4th to 200 M out. Weakened.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Soon led until headed 150 M. Found no extra.
Mostly 2nd. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Better than midfield. Was 3rd briefly far side. 7th turning in, unable to quicken.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Recovered some ground in straight.
Always at the back.

Jumped slowly. Settled just behind midfield. Shifted off rail upon straightening. No clear passage behind runners briefly passing 200 M before making good headway nearing finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled behind leader. Held every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Despite running off the track approaching 1200 M, virtually made all the running to 200 M and weakened.
Well back. Kept on one pace in straight to beat one home.
Settled in midfield. Commenced run upon straightening and quickened well between runners to take charge close home.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Mainly better than midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Rear till making some late ground closing stages.
Always in last few and wide.
Trapped wide in midfield. Dropped out in straight.
Prominent when carried very wide abruptly but rapidly recovered to chase behind leader before climbing up Rock. Remained same to 350 M till weakened.

Jumped awkwardly and took several strides to get properly balanced. Ridden along to go forward but was steadied when disappointed for running at about 800 M. Around midfield rounding the home turn. No extra in straight.
Soon led. Was joined at 700 M. Kept on well but was beaten narrowly in a long ding-dong battle in straight.
Broke well and took up a forward position. Joined lead 700 M. Ran on well to win narrowly in a long ding-dong battle in straight.
Tailed off throughout.
Well there. Approaching and rounding the home turn hung out, then inconvenienced. No extra afterwards.
Soon prominent. Wide in the early stages and rounding the home bend. Found nothing 200 M out.
At rear. Moved closer after straightened up near the rail. One-paced afterwards.
Soon prominent. Unbalanced at about 500 M. Kept on in straight but found the quinella pair too strong.
At rear. Caught wide early. Steadied and shifted out to continue to go forward about 200 M. Made up late ground.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Midfield or worse. Shifted out to make run after straightening. Made up a little late ground.
Mainly midfield. Awkwardly placed when close to heels rounding the home turn. Kept on in straight without threatening.
Prominent in 4th on inside 3Ls off pace early, ridden to lie up around bend, one-paced final 400 M.
Slowest away, shoved along to race on inner in 2nd last, finally crept to 5Ls off pace 400 M out, not follow through in final stages.
Not break well, always in rear, 8Ls off pace turning in, became further detached up straight.
Made very early running on inside rail before FORTUNE MAKER took charge 800 M out, moved off fence turning in, knuckled down well to hit front 100 M out, finished full of running.
Held three from rear on inside early on, 4Ls down and on inside turning in, not quicken.
Raced 3-wide outside SMILING FOREST early on, struggling 600 M out, soon beaten. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in 6th, 2-wide about 4-5Ls off pace until straight, took closer order 400 M out, stayed on very well final 200 M.
Raced freely to lead about 800 M out, given a breather rounding home turn, fairly short-lived effort in straight, one-paced and overhauled 100 M out, just hung on for second.
Settled near rear 2-wide and 7Ls off speed, strongly ridden, racing 5-wide turning for home, moderate headway final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3-wide in 5th place early, hard-ridden straightening up, no impression.
Never better than three from rear, very one-paced in straight.
Well-placed and relaxed in 3rd racing 2-wide, 2Ls off pace and every chance turning in but one-paced and never improved position.
Jumped awkwardly from difficult barrier and waited with at rear on rail. Steadied when disappointed for running near 500 M and at no stage obtained running on rail throughout the straight.
3-wide in midfield with cover. Made a little progress late.
Hard driven early but only managed position near mid-division. Ran on steadily final 150 M.
In touch to 200 M, dropped out from 200 M.
4-wide without cover around mid-division. Steadily forward to be 3-wide behind leaders near 900 M. Swamped inside 200 M when finding no more.
Travelled just rear of midfield. Dropped towards rear near 400 M. Did not obtain running final 200 M when held up behind runners.
Ridden along to track leader. Shared lead from rock until not able to keep up with the leader upon straightening. Kept on one-paced in 5th final 100 M.
Soon took up running. Was joined from 700 M until kicking clear 200 M out. Collared by the winner concluding stages.
Settled rear of midfield, steadied and dropped towards rear near winning post the first time when disappointed for running. Ran on well outer from 200 M to get up closing stages.
Held up at rear. Switched 4-wide to go forward rounding home bend. Made up good ground down centre of track from 250 M. No extra close home.
Behind leaders on rail. Kept on fairly until beginning to give ground inside final 200 M.
Towards rear. Moderate progress inside 300 M.
Prominent. Took lead 1000 M. Remained prominent when headed 800 M. Ran on to be 2nd early straight but lost a minor placing closing stages.
Midfield early. Pushed along to take lead 800 M out. Weakened when headed 350 M.
Better than midfield. Made some progress turning for home. Found no extra closing stages.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened steadily.
Always there. Kept on well in straight.
Midfield or better. Faded in straight. Wide without cover throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on steadily to take 2nd close home.
Led briefly early, settling 4th approaching 800 M. Sustained effort final turn to assert authority 250 M out. Won readily.
In touch briefly early, soon dropped back and never in contention.
Severely checked just after start and was last to home turn. Made ground steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Never a danger.
Raced wide and never seen with a chance, despite short-lived effort far side.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress for distant 4th.
Well there. Commenced run entering straight and soon joined leader. Hit front momentarily about 200 M but soon overhauled.
Broke well. Raced wide in prominent position to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Sluggish at start. Well back. Kept on past beaten horses in straight.
Never a danger. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led briefly. Close up till weakened into straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide in midfield throughout. Kept on in straight.
Never far off. Came to challenge upon straightening. Asserted authority closing stages. (Showed signs of lameness.)
Midfield when badly hampered entering back straight. Remained towards rear before recovering to midfield home bend. Just plugged on under pressure in straight.
Held narrow advantage. Joined into straight. Gradually faded after headed passing 200 M.
Tardy start, towards rear. Improved along rail final turn to be 3rd or 4th 200 M. Soon weakened.
Well there. 3-wide 3rd approaching 800 M. Kept on but unable to quicken final 200 M.
Soon in touch. Steadied twice at 300 M and 200 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Pushed along to share lead. Took 1L clear 800 M. Weakened when headed approaching 200 M.
Behind midfield. No advancement.
Well there early. Dropped back steadily to be midfield home bend. Faded steadily soon after straightening.
Prominent early, soon in better than midfield. Made progress early straight. Weakened when steadied 200 M.
Midfield. Ran on from 6th 300 M out without threatening.
Towards rear. Ran on well from early straight to take charge closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made ground soon after straightening to take lead briefly 200 M. Kept on moderately when headed closing stages.
Rear. Found no clear run when improving early straight. Ran on a bit when in clear.
Rear. Moderate progress closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Soon among the front runners. Was 2nd 800 M. Unable to hold place 200 M out.
Restrained in prominent position. Pulled to front rounding home bend. Came under pressure to retain advantage early in straight but outstayed final 200 M.
Midfield. No clear run behind runners early in straight. Ran on closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Wide towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight.
Well back. No clear passage early in straight. Produced good late impression nearing finish.
Rear. Widest turning in. Produced good impression down centre of straight.
Settled wide behind midfield. Quickened well down centre of straight to take charge closing stages.
Gradually came in from bad draw to settle in prominent position 3 or 4 wide. Faded steadily upon straightening.
Settled just better than midfield. Raced tightly on rails early in straight. Ran on steadily between runners final 200 M.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Always in similar position behind midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily in straight.
Well there till weakened over 200 M out.
Settled just better than midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening holding some chance but only kept on steadily closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and wide early. Settled at back. Never in contention.
Midfield or better. No extra in straight.
Settled at rear. Shifted wide into straight. Made up good ground despite hung in throughout the straight to miss it narrowly.
Slowly away, at the back throughout.
Ridden to lead. Headed 1100 M and then tracked leader. Weakened gradually 250 M out.
Mainly midfield. Crept closer order after straightening. Ran on well and held on to win narrowly.
Worked across from a bad draw and took lead from 1100 M. Headed 200 M and then weakened steadily.
Mainly midfield. Made up a little late ground.
Midfield or worse. Wide early. One paced in straight.
Well there. Every chance 200 M but could not keep up final stages.
Jumped awkwardly, worse than midfield. Ran on well in straight but found the quinella pair too strong.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Tardy start, steadily made ground to be better than midfield. Held up for a run early straight. Ran on when in the clear final 100 M.
Mainly midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.

Held handy position inside COURAGE STAR 2.5Ls off pace, raced two wide entering straight in 6th place, briefly prevented making run by weakening pair HONEST DRAGON and HORNET 300 M out, one-paced thereafter.

Settled in 8th place early on inside 4-5Ls off pace, turned in race four wide but prevented making run between 400 M and 200 M out, still 2.5Ls down 200 M out, quickened up well to hit front about 70 M out and score with a bit in hand.
Advanced to lead 1200 M out by 1L, pinched another length off pursuers turning in, still in front but under pressure inside final 100 M, soon swallowed by stronger finishers.
Settled near rear first 200 M, between 1200 M and 100 M out improved, racing four wide, to 4th or 5th, 2Ls off pace, found little when asked to quicken again in straight, beaten 200 M out.
Reared exiting gates and lost 4Ls as a result, raced next to rear on inside, ridden to improve and race inside ALWAYS WIN 400 M out, not follow through.
Pushed on to race in 4th 1200 M out, clear 3rd but ridden turning into straight, well outpaced and beaten by 200 M out.
Held up towards rear on inside 6Ls off speed, forced five wide turning in, stayed on well final 200 M.
Away well and very early leader, 2nd 1200 M out, vigorously ridden entering stretch, beaten 200 M out and eased.
Raced outside of ALWAYS WIN, threatened to get competitive turning in racing five wide, failed to quicken and became unbalanced, beaten 200 M out.
Settled in between FOREST SPRING and SOMLUCK early, turned into stretch racing six wide, under pressure when short of room between SOMLUCK and FLAMENCO STAR 200 M out, no further impression.
Raced in 7th two wide down back straight, crept closer on turn, challenging in 3rd and every chance 200 M out, stayed on well but no answer to winner's late sweep.
Raced handily in 3rd on rails 1200 M out, always prominent, saved ground turning in and advanced to 2nd 200 M out, stuck on fairly well final 200 M.
Held up in 3rd last racing two wide 7Ls off pace, straightened up racing seven wide (widest), finished off quite well without ever threatening to grab lead.
Dwelt at start, sluggish over early stages and raced in rear, 6Ls down and under pressure 400 M out to tack on to remainder of field, stayed on through beaten horses final 200 M, nearest finish.
Began fairly, niggled along to share lead on rail. Dropped out from 200 M.
Slow to begin, recovered to midfield. Under pressure from 400 M to threaten leaders 200 M out. Soon found the winner too strong.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield for a short while near 500 M, at rear most of the way.
Fractious and rear before start. Midfield or behind to 250 M. Ran on steadily to claim 3rd close home.
Well away and contested lead. Commenced to give ground steadily passing the 200 M and inclined to race ungenerously.
Travelled kindly better than midfield towards outer. Asked for effort 300 M out and responded well to hit the front inside 200 M. Comfortably.
Prominent on outside rail. Gave ground gradually from 400 M.
Towards rear until running on steadily from 300 M. One-paced closing stages.
At rear throughout, never seen with a chance.
Never worse than a 1.5Ls off SIROCCO's quarters, entered straight racing six wide, stayed on well final 200 M.
Raced outside of PLENTY OF LUCK early on, within striking distance of leaders 400 M out, one-paced in straight.
7Ls off pace 800 M out on inside, took closer order rounding turn, stayed on well up straight, nearest finish.
Placed on rails 4Ls off leader early on, crept closer turning in, forced to switch inside to find racing room final 300 M, stayed on quite well.
Away slowly but still raced on inner and just 2Ls off leaders turning in, raced green, became unbalanced and carried head high at top of straight, hanging out, one-paced final 200 M.
Keen early, racing four wide 1.5Ls off pace, soon folded at top of straight, eased down considerably. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sent on to race prominently early two wide, 1.5Ls off lead, under pressure entering straight, no further impression.
Held rails position inside 2nd place, well poised to pick off leader turning in, battled hard but could never get head in front.
Four wide and 4Ls off pace 800 M out, entered straight widest of all, never threatened to run a place.

Sent on early to lead, racing a little freely outside of INTERVENE, never able to get clear of that rival, gamely kept answering rider's call in toe-to-toe battle with INTERVENE all the way up straight, never headed.
Settled in mid-division racing two wide 2.5Ls first quarter, turned in racing five wide, stayed on best of chasing pack, hung in final 50 M.
Held up in rear, never closer than 8Ls off pace, became steadily detached around bend, came home in own time.
With leaders to 500 M. Soon beaten.
Close up before taking lead passing 1400 M. Remained in front on straightening and kept on to the 200 M when headed and weakened out of contention.
Well there before losing some ground approaching home turn. Renewed effort early in straight and kept on.
Settled in rear early. Headway from 800 M and made up good ground in straight to challenge closing stages. Outpaced by winner final strides.
Mostly midfield to home turn. Unable to quicken to challenge in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Never troubled leaders.
Worse than midfield when held wide home turn. Found nothing when asked in straight.

Was midfield before improving towards leaders home bend. Kept on to hit front briefly passing 200 M. Soon headed and shifted out under the whip. Kept on same pace at the finish. (Finished 3rd, placed 4th.)
Was prominent before dropping out of contention from the 350 M.
Among rear group to home bend and unable to make any impression on leaders final 200 M.

Ran 6th from 1400 M and about similar position early in straight. Ridden and improved from 250 M but was carried out and inconvenienced 150 M. Recovered and stayed on well towards finish. (Finished 4th, placed 3rd.)
Improved from rear home bend, running on well to challenge final 200 M. Led close home.
Settled in last and remained same position swinging into straight. Ran on quite well closing stages under vigorous riding.
Soon led until headed at 1000 M. Dropped back steadily from 2nd rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Settled 5th. Improved far side to be 3-wide 2nd 500 M. Found no extra in straight.
Trailed the field throughout.
Moved to inside from an outside gate towards rear. Made ground steadily in the straight to snatch 2nd near finish.
Around midfield on outside. Weakened from 400 M.
Midfield. Made steady progress inside 350 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or slightly behind. Moderate progress from 400 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Mostly 3rd or 4th before advancing to 2nd home turn. Kept on without threatening the winner. Lost 2nd near finish.
Tracked leader before taking over at 1000 M. Held 2Ls advantage turning in. Held on well.
Near rear from widest draw. 2nd last turning in. Made up a little ground final 250 M.
In touch. Dropped back steadily from the Rock. Made no show thereafter.
Disputed lead to 200 M. No extra.
Broke well. Held narrow lead until worn down inside 100 M.
Never in contention.
Never seen with a chance.
Never far off. Quickened well from 4th into straight to take charge inside 100 M.
Midfield throughout.
Not far off to straight. Gradually weakened.
Jumped in air and lost ground at start. Finished strongly from 3rd last into straight.
Settled behind leaders. Failed to quicken to threaten.
In similar position throughout.
Settled behind midfield. Made up good ground up straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield near 700 M. Sustained effort in straight to share lead 200 M. Held on to take charge 50 M out.
In touch. Made progress far side to be 2nd approaching the Rock. Unable to hold place 200 M out.
Led field to 1200 M. Remained prominent to straight. Ridden to share lead 200 M but unable to match speed with the winner closing stages.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Mostly 6th. One-paced on outside in straight.
Slowly away, near rear to straight. Ran past a few beaten horses inside 300 M.
Behind midfield. Made progress far side to be 3-wide 3rd near 500 M. Kept on.
Mostly midfield on inside. Steadied early straight before turning on quite well when in clear.
Well there. Dropped back to 5th rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
At rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Took lead from 1200 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield. Faded home bend.
Tracked leader. Gained narrow advantage briefly inside 100 M but pipped at post.
Rear. Kept on well in straight.
Nearly made all.
Settled in 4th some 3Ls off the leader. Improving when inconvenienced about 200 M out. Ran on.
Always last few.
Midfield. Effort home bend. Widest turning in. Held every chance but drifted about. Kept on.
Held up behind midfield. Ran on well in straight to snatch victory final stride.
Began awkwardly. Held up in rear. Made good impression closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up good ground in straight. Steadied close home.
Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Tardy start. At back and was wide throughout. Made no show.
Worse than midfield. Under pressure rounding the home bend and wide into straight. No extra.
Niggled early to maintain at around midfield or worse. Crept closer after straightening. One-paced thereafter.
Midfield or better. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, then in the early stages raced a little awkwardly. Always prominent. Kept on in straight and held on for 2nd despite no match with the winner.
Well there. Kept on in straight to miss 2nd narrowly.
Went forward and was wide turning out of the straight first time from a difficult gate. Well there but continued to race wide without cover. Gave ground 600 M out.
About midfield. Weakened steadily from 600 M.
Soon at back. Never a factor.
Soon led and made all. Won easily.
Always midfield. One-paced in straight.
Soon racing in 2nd, 1L off CERTAINTY, no change of gear in straight and swallowed by those behind 200 M out.
Held up on rails 4-5Ls off pace, ran on well final 300 M along inside, nearest finish.
Never better than 8th place, outpaced turning in, little impression in straight.
Pushed on to race 4-wide in 3rd position after 200 M, 3-wide and 1L off CERTAINTY entering straight, failed to quicken and beaten 200 M out.
Soon led, crossed over to rails 800 M out, under pressure on straightening and beaten 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide, 3Ls off pace, never threatened leaders in straight.
Held up out wide early 9Ls off pace, improved steadily from 600 M out, turned in racing widest, five deep, stayed on well but not reach winner.
Away smartly, held up in 5th place 2.5Ls off leaders racing two wide, switched wider upon straightening, quickened up well to join leader around 200 M out, ran on strongly.
3-wide and 4Ls off leader down back straight and turning in, weakened markedly in straight.

Held up in rear, still on bridle but still tailing field entering straight, soon improved behind NEVER SAY NEVER but caught for room behind weakening CERTAINTY 200 M out, stayed on again late on, nearest finish.
Settled inside with run of race in 4th place 2.5Ls off speed, every chance 300 M out, not pace of winner.
Held up three from rear racing 3-wide, not come on in straight.
Prominent, detached 2nd from 1000 M. Kept on fairly until finding no extra concluding stages.
Rear of midfield on fence. Never in contention.
In touch on rail. Kept on fairly until beginning to tire 100 M out.
Settled just in front of midfield. Failed to accelerate in home straight, was checked when crowded near 100 M, did not recover.
3-wide without cover forward of midfield. Dropped out from 200 M.
Held up in rear. Under pressure from 500 M, made ground steadily in straight without threatening the first pair.
Attempted to make all, drawing 5Ls clear from 700 M to straightening. Effort told and was headed and swamped inside final 100 M.
Checked at the start, then waited with in last position. Switched 4-wide rounding home turn, continued to shift out after straightening, ran on strongly final 200 M to get up on the line.
Midfield out wide going into first bend, then 2 or 3-wide towards rear. Made steady progress from 200 M, no extra closing stages.
Began a little awkwardly, settled near rear. Was held up on latter part of home turn and shifted out for running near 200 M. Finished well though missing by the smallest of margins.
In touch when wide without cover early, 3-wide in midfield from 1200 M. Made gradual ground down centre from 200 M, just pipped for 3rd position near finish.
Slowly away, was last early. Improved from outside to be midfield 600 M. Weakened closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on quite well final 250 M.
Midfield or better. Progressed to 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Weakened inside 400 M.
Jumped well but soon raced towards rear. Progressed to midfield turning in. Ran on steadily 300 M.
Around midfield to straight. Dropped to the rear group when held up 250 M. Kept on after shifting in final 100 M.
In touch. Dropped back to behind midfield turning in. Faded.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Led field before settling 3rd on the rail rounding home bend. Re-gained advantage upon straightening. Won easily.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear final turn. Made up some ground final 200 M.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to 6th when steadied near 800 M. Renewed effort final turn to take 2nd inside 150 M.
Soon last. Never able to feature.
Midfield early, moved up quickly to share lead approaching 800 M. Unable to hold place when headed early straight.
Midfield early. Made progress on outside to share lead rounding home bend. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Niggled along wide in prominent position to 500 M. Dropped out.
Never seen with a chance.
Well back to straight. Ran on past beaten horses to be nearest at finish.
Close up to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled in midfield. Raced tightly early in straight. Finished well inside final 250 M to narrowly miss 2nd.
Behind midfield throughout.
Settled wide in midfield or behind. No clear passage in straight until 200 M when produced late impression.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield most of way. Steadied for a run 300 M out before making late impression closing stages.
Well back. Made up good ground down centre of straight doing best work at finish.
Jumped fairly then quickly improved to poise on heels of leader. Came to challenge upon straightening but unable to threaten and only made moderate headway near finish.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Broke well showing early pace. Crossed steadily to reach inside rails before home bend. Still held 1L advantage turning in and hung on to the line.
At the back. Made ground steadily in straight, doing best work final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Among front runners early. Sat outside leader rounding home bend. Hung out home turn and weakened soon after straightening.
Jumped very awkwardly and was last early. Made ground far side to be just behind midfield middle stages. Unable to quicken in straight.
Towards rear. Slightly improved from 1000 M to be just behind midfield home bend. Made no show in straight.
In touch early, soon raced 6th along rail to straight. Kept on quite well final 250 M.
Rear. Made up some ground inside 200 M.
In touch. Ran on well from 5th early straight to just get up in a ding-dong battle.
Towards rear. Made up good ground inside 350 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or better. Steady progress near 1000 M to be 4th home bend. Effort early straight to lead briefly 200 M out. Found no extra when headed closing stages.
Settled midfield from the widest draw. Ran on well in straight to miss narrowly at finish.
Prominent. Took lead from 1000 M. Weakened when headed passing 250 M.
Prominent. Unable to hold place early straight. Weakened 200 M out.
Never in contention.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon took up running and led to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in rear. Saved ground on inside turning for home and made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Settled behind leader. Dropped away quickly upon straightening.
Always in last few.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to hit front momentarily inside 200 M but soon swamped.
Waited with. Finished strongly to snatch victory final strides.
Jumped fairly. Raced freely and ungenerously and soon dropped to rear.
Settled in midfield. Quickened up well to hit front inside 200 M but caught short of line.
Towards rear early. Improved to midfield home bend. Sustained progress early in straight to hold every chance. Found no extra nearing finish.
Mostly in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Broke well. Settled wide in midfield. Towards rear into straight and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped slowly. Ridden to recover to hold 4th or 5th position. One-paced in straight.
Midfield. Made run through the field 200 M out to grab win close home.
Midfield. Crowded near 800 M to be at rear. Not a factor afterwards.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily early straight and took lead 200 M. Could not hold off winner's late challenge.
Broke well and soon tracked leader. Kept on until weakening from 200 M.
Around midfield. Gave ground steadily 300 M out.
Jumped fairly, soon behind midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Ridden to lead from a difficult gate. Headed 200 M and then weakened gradually.
Worse than midfield early. Commenced to improve rounding home bend but was wide. Ran on in straight despite hung in near the line.
Checked on jumping and then mainly worse than midfield. Checked when disappointed for a run about 400 M, made a little late ground.
At back. Last into straight. Made up good ground from 400 M. (Lame near front leg.)
Missed the start slightly and severely checked shortly afterwards. At back. Dropped out 300 M out.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon prominent. Mainly 3rd, kept on until one paced 250 M out.
Towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Worse than midfield. Made progress rounding the home bend to 3rd into straight. Wide most of the way. Kept on until finding no extra final 100 M.
Held 5th racing two wide without cover early on, ridden and four wide entering straight, very one-paced from then on.
Impeded at start and slowly away, 7Ls off pace 800 M out, travelling well in rear entering straight, quickened up in good style but fell just short of grabbing leaders.
Always last over 7Ls off pace until straight, tried to make up some ground from 400 M out but never looked like getting on terms with principals.
Raced two wide about 5Ls off pace until 400 M from line, delivered strong finish on outside down straight, just failed to peg back leaders.
Raced on inside 2-3Ls off pace early on in 4th or 5th place, went for home over 300 M out to grab lead with 200 M to race, stayed on well.
Ridden to lead from gates, pinched 2.5Ls lead turning into straight, overhauled 250 M out, quickly faded.
Held rails position inside ASPIRATION until straight, showed little worthwhile acceleration, beaten over 200 M out.
Awkwardly into stride, raced three wide about 5Ls off leaders until straight, failed to quicken, never threatened.
Had run of the race in 2nd place on inside, effort at top of straight, briefly hit front over 200 M out but one-paced and soon passed.
Raced in 3rd, came under pressure fully 700 M out, soon faded.
Never better than three from rear, closest to leaders 200 M out when 4.5Ls off pace, soon regressed.

Settled in mid-division racing two wide never worse than 4Ls off speed, big effort 400 M out to go with leading pack, got within a neck of NEW PLANET over 100 M out but offered no extra, just held on for runners-up spot.
Three wide and in 6th early before being rushed up to take 2nd 1000 M out without cover, under pressure entering straight, not come on.
Quietly ridden in rear on inside rail 6Ls off pace until entering straight when asked to lengthen, still 2.5Ls off pace 200 M out, finished well but failed to grab leaders.
Slow to begin, towards rear most of the way, kept on same pace final 200 M.
Missed start, rear of midfield on outer, brief effort near 300 M, gave ground inside 200 M.
Behind midfield or worse throughout, never in contention.
Midfield on outer. Ran on a bit from 250 M, soon one-paced.
Towards rear, tailed off 200 M out.
Began awkwardly and shifted out. Driven along to hug inside rail and contest lead. Found no more 250 M out, weakened close home.
Tracked leaders, took over 250 M out, always confidently holding the runner-up.
Led group on outer, 2 or 3 Ls off the lead. Responded well when asked to improve with winner 300 M out, though never looked likely to overhaul the winner.
Disputed lead until finding no extra inside final 200 M, kept on fairly.
Better than midfield early. Improved to be with leader 600 M out. Gave ground steadily from 250 M.
Travelled in midfield. Steady progress from 350 M, never able to threaten the quinella pair.
Inconvenienced at start and was well back. Ran past tired runners close home.
Towards rear, dropped to last 400 M out, ran past well beaten runners concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly, outpaced at rear. Ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Took close position in 3rd position early on, hit front 300 M out, ridden out to score.
Raced keenly on inside through early stages 3Ls off pace, pursued AUCASH from 300 M out, managed to get closer but never threatened to pass that rival.
Raced prominently without cover three wide early on, asked to quicken at top of straight but only stayed on at same pace.
Settled near rear early, niggled to take closer order 600 M out, moderate late headway.
Tucked in midfield two wide early, under pressure 400 M out, no impression.
Cut out early pace on inside rail, soon passed upon straightening up, folded very tamely.
Raced without cover three and four wide until entering straight, failed to match the pace of leading pair 300 M out, one-paced final 200 M.
Raced in rear on inside, hard-ridden 1400 M out to retain interest in race, managed to stay in touch until 300 M out, quickly wilted.
Accompanied VIPER CORP until straight, packed up even quicker than that rival, finished very distressed.
Jumped awkwardly, settled in rear between two rivals early on, travelling well but forced to look for gaps through field 400 M out, race already settled when clear passage finally found 200 M out.
Settled in rear racing three wide, entered straight racing seven wide and 4Ls off speed, still 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on strongly to be nearest finish.
Always within 2Ls of leaders on inside 400 M out, very one-paced from thereafter.
Settled in clear 3rd early 5Ls off pace, took closer order off home turn, asked to lengthen 300 M out, hit front 200 M out, stayed on strongly.
Raced two wide 10Ls off pace early, crept closer entering straight, stayed on to take 2nd place 100 M out, no chance with winner.
Settled a long way off speed in rear, still 9Ls off pace 400 M out, improved rapidly wide out in straight, nearest finish.
Raced in 4th early two wide, beaten turning in.
Raced three wide without cover 7Ls off pace early, improved to 4th place 400 M out, not come on and soon passed.
Raced two wide until entering straight 7Ls off pace, quickly improved but failed to hang onto runners-up spot inside final 200 M.
Cut out fast early pace to skip 3Ls clear entering straight, overtaken by FAIRY KING PRAWN 200 M out, no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in 4th early on inside 6Ls off pace, stayed on at one-paced in straight.
Missed the start by 3 to 4Ls, managed to race third from rear until the straight, forced to switch inside MERIDIAN STAR 400 M out, stayed on well, nearest finish.
Quickly assumed 2nd position 2 to 3Ls off pace, failed to match winner's speed 300 M out, one-paced final 200 M.
Never better than 11th place, closest to leaders when 5Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra.
Never better than midfield racing three wide, dropped further back in straight. (Saddle shifted.)
Held up two from rear on inside, still 9Ls off pace 400 M out, moderate late headway to be nearest finish.
Held inside rail in 8th place, 7Ls off pace 400 M out, effort to improve until 200 M out, soon eased down.
In rear to straight where he stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight where he kept on same pace to the 200 M. Found no extra.
Always at the back and was steadied approaching 200 M.
Soon improved from rear to be 1st or 2nd from 1000 M to straight. Could find no more when outpaced 300 M.
Ran well to home turn. Found nothing when asked in straight.
Soon in last and remained there to straight. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M.
Never far off to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Was 11th 800 M and about mid-division turning into straight. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
Worse than midfield into straight where he made up good ground final 250 M.
About midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to threaten winner final 100 M. (Finished lame.)
Led or shared lead before gaining clear advantage 300 M. Held on well when threatened close home.
Well there before failing to hold place final 100 M.
Never on terms.
Mostly midfield to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Midfield. Checked passing 300 M. Never recovered.
Behind midfield. Short-lived effort passing 400 M. Soon weakened.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Widest home turn. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never on terms.
In touch. Kept on well early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Prominent. Led or shared lead 900 M out until home bend. Faded.
Behind midfield. 5-wide turning in. Made ground steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or behind. Kept on well final turn. Continued to make ground in straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Led or shared lead to 150 M. Found no extra.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside in straight, never nearer.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Slightly improved rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never far off, was 1-1/2Ls 4th turning in. Sustained effort to take lead inside 150 M. Just held on.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Steady progress 400 M and was held for a run approaching 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Held 3rd to 600 M. Dropped back steadily.
Settled at the back. Commenced move entering home straight when widest. Ran on to hold every chance early in straight then soon weakened.
Raced keenly behind midfield. Found no room turning in. Switched out for a run early in straight and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Improving when hampered over 200 M out. Continued to make ground to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage coming out of back straight. Swamped when no extra over 200 M out.
Settled behind midfield but wide. Quickened well down centre of straight to draw level closing stages. Just beaten by the narrowest of margins in bob of heads.
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened well to hit front inside 300 M but pipped at post.
Waited with. Saved ground on inner turning for home. Sustained effort down straight to just get up on line.
Behind leaders to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield. Ran on steadily on rails to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there. One-paced in straight.
Travelled mainly in 4th position never far off before tightened and lost position inside 200 M.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Niggled along. Midfield until losing ground approaching home turn. One-paced in straight.
At rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from 300 M. Never nearer.
Was 2nd last before making up some late ground inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Lost some ground when checked at 800 M. Weakened in straight.
Pushed along early to set pace. Faded from 400 M. Tailed off to finish.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily 300 M out to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Made progress final turn to share lead upon straightening. Kept on same pace when headed inside 200 M.
In touch early, soon dropped to be just better than midfield. Kept on well in straight but unable to catch the front runners.
Tracked leader until sharing the lead from 400 M. Gained 400 M. Gained slender advantage passing 200 M but was headed close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Moderate progress inside 300 M. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Mainly 3rd to final turn. Weakened.
Midfield. Checked on the rail near 800 M. Made ground early straight. Responded well under pressure to take lead close home.
Towards rear early. Improved gradually to be just behind midfield. Severely checked passing 800 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Always in rear.
Around midfield. Produced good impression down straight but shifted ground closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on well down inner of straight to grab victory near finish.
Broke well then settled in last few and never featured.
Just better than midfield to straight then faded steadily.
Midfield throughout.
Well back. Kept on past beaten horses in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Missed the start but quickly improved to just better than midfield. Kept on one-pace in straight.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened upon straightening.
Rear. Kept on past beaten horses in straight.
Held clear advantage to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in 3rd within striking distance. Quickened to hit front over 100 M out but unable to sustain effort close home.
Midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Pushed along and soon 4th. Weakened gradually 200 M out.
Pushed along in the early stages to maintain midfield position. Under pressure from 600 M and one-paced thereafter.
Well there to 600 M. Unable to quicken and further dropped out from 300 M and weakened steadily thereafter.
Disputed lead early. 2nd or 3rd from 800 M. Under pressure before straightening. One-paced.
Settled worse than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Towards rear. Wide on first bend. Dropped out badly after straightening.
Wide on first bend. Midfield or worse. Wide rounding home bend and last into straight. Not in contention thereafter.
Dropped in behind from wide draw. Steady progress rounding home bend. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon disputed lead. Took up clear lead before making the home turn. Kept on to score comfortably.
Lacked early speed and travelled towards rear. Made a little ground closing stages.
Soon at back. Checked out 400 M. Ran on to the line.
Always prominent. Kept on in straight to miss 2nd narrowly.
Widest making the first turn from a difficult gate. Around midfield. Gave ground gradually from 500 M and soon dropped out.
Quietly ridden in rear on inside early, followed QUICK STEP along rails entering straight, not clear run 300 M out, stayed on well final 100 M, nearest finish.
Held up early on inside, next to rails and 5Ls off pace 800 M out, crept through on inside entering straight, stayed on without matching winner's pace.
Settled in rear racing two wide 8Ls off pace, turned for home widest of all, not find much under pressure, nearest finish.
Pulled to lead after 200 M still over-racing around bend in lead, overhauled at top of straight, faded away very quickly.
Raced in mid-division without cover until straight, close enough to challenge but soon very one-paced.
Away smartly, had run of race on inner 2Ls off lead early, came under pressure 500 M out, found little in straight.
Raced three wide 6Ls off pace down back straight, crept closer entering straight out wide, briefly threatened to catch winner 200 M out when 2Ls down but not follow through.
Raced three and four wide without cover through early stages, tried to improve on bend continuing to race wide, quickly petered out in straight.
Away well, raced prominently in third two wide, not come in straight and under pressure and beaten 300 M out, one-paced to line.
Held up early, advanced to assume inside position 1200 M out, took a pull to switch off rail 600 M out, left with clear run 400 M out, hit front 200 M out, stayed on well.
Held up near rear on fence 7Ls off pace, not clear run entering straight, failed to quicken final stages.
Sat two wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, never posed a threat in straight and eased down 100 M out.
Missed start, raced a little keenly and gradually improved through field to take up running entering straight racing three wide, overtaken by winner 200 M out, no extra.
Raced keenly early on in fourth and fifth place on inside, sorely outpaced at top of straight and soon well behind.
Pushed along to hold position behind leaders on fence. Switched away from rails after straightening to improve. Did not find extra gear, kept on one paced.
Ridden but lacked early speed, behind mid-division until getting a little closer rounding home bend. Moderate progress concluding stages.
Trailed field and very wide throughout, covered a lot of ground without getting into the race.
Rear of midfield, wide early stages. Awkwardly placed 800 M. Unable to quicken in home straight and had a tendency to hang out.
Travelled kindly behind lead, hit front passing 200 M to score readily.
2nd or 3rd last to 300 M. Steadied at 200 M and shifted out. Made a little headway late.
Driven from awkward gate to maintain midfield position out wide. Improved to join leader 3 wide at 700 M, every chance 300 M. Headed inside 200 M, stayed on same pace to the line.
Waited with in midfield, 3Ls off pace. Remained same and 3-wide into straight, ran on steadily from 300 M, one-paced close home.
Bounded in air, soon better than midfield and 4 wide. Steadied near 700 M, hung out approaching and rounding home turn, save ground further in home straight.
Sent to the front. Joined at 700 M, headed 250 M out, steadily weakened.
Jumped awkwardly, driven to be forward of midfield and 5 wide. Dropped steadily from 700 M to be 2nd last entering straight. Made up a bit of late ground.
Travelled along inside near rear, still on bridle 400 M out, failed to kick when asked 300 M out, nearest finish.
Towards rear early racing four wide, brief effort turning in but not match pace of leaders, soon beaten.
Settled on inside in 3rd behind leading pair, well placed turning in but failed to quicken final 400 M.
Held up early 5 or 6Ls off pace, crept closer on bend, enjoyed smooth run on inside entering straight to quickly move from 7th to 2nd, 1L off leader 350 M out, led 200 M out, stayed on well.
Cocked jaw and never settled early on racing two wide in 2nd, passed by KINDRED SPIRITS on turn and soon off bridle and beaten.
Raced two wide near rear early on, checked 800 M out and relegated to last, nowhere to go at top of straight, clear passage 200 M out and stayed on strongly to grab 2nd just before line, unlucky.
Settled in mid-division racing two wide early 3Ls off speed, switched out to make run entering straight but failed to quicken, ran on again final 100 M, nearest finish.
Raced three wide without cover through early stages, six wide and hard ridden entering straight, not come on, eased down final 100 M.
Over-raced in lead, ceded advantage 500 M out, found nothing in straight.
Prominent early, under pressure to lie up 600 M out, outpaced and last 300 M out, stayed on again through beaten horses until line.
Raced three wide down back straight in 5th 2.5Ls off pace, hit front 500 M out still three wide, grabbed by winner 200 M out, stayed on at same pace.
Raced in mid-division two wide, still fairly placed turning in but soon very much outpaced and 3rd last 200 M out, eased down.
Raced without cover about 3.5Ls off pace 1000 M out, one-paced and never threatened leaders in straight.
Soon led on inside but never able to pinch a good lead, 1L clear 200 M out but grabbed by winner 100 M out, one-paced final stages.
Always handily placed on inner 2Ls off speed, every chance 300 M out, not come on and stayed on at same pace.
