Settled in mid-division on inside 3.5Ls off speed, hard ridden to lie up 600 M out, found nothing final 400 M.
6Ls off the pace early and two wide, hard ridden turning to keep up, no impression final stages.
Dropped in for cover on rails 7Ls off pace early on, left with clear run two off inside 300 M out, quickened up well to hit front 150 M out, stayed on strongly.
Missed the start, never strode out at all and became further and further detached throughout, tailed off.
Not break well, raced on inside early near rear, switched wider around bend and entering straight but very one-paced and no impression.
Without cover 5Ls off pace down far side, wide entering straight, failed to quicken 400 M out and never looked like picking up leaders in straight.
Held up early, sent on 1000 M out to sit just off leaders racing four wide 2.5Ls off pace, failed to match winner's pace 200 M out but still stayed on stoutly to line.
Never travelled well and 9Ls off pace early on, still 2nd last and struggling on rails turning in, stayed on through beaten horses final 200 M, nearest finish.
Raced very keenly and two wide in 2nd early on, soon under pressure and beaten 350 M out.
Prominent early, raced three wide 1200 M out, led 800 M out, hung out markedly entering straight, no extra final 300 M out.
Never far off from leaders. Improved from 400 M to take charge approaching 200 M. Won convincingly.
Never far away till outpaced from the 300 M.
Was midfield, in touch, halfway. Came under pressure 200 M and kept on steadily.
Towards rear before quickening well inside final 200 M to snatch 3rd placing at the finish.
Well there to 300 M. Could make no impression on leaders close home.
In touch on standside. Quickened to dispute 2nd close home. Lost minor placing final strides.
Towards rear of main bunch. Made no show closing stages.
Midfield halfway. Unable to hold place from the 250 M.
Close up before taking control passing 500 M. Was headed 200 M out and faded under pressure.
Jumped well and was prominent before finding no extra closing stages.
With leaders before starting to give ground passing 200 M.
Always there on standside. Kept on under pressure.
With leaders to 350 M. Unable quicken to challenge.
Ridden along from widest draw to be better than midfield. Widest turning in. Made ground steadily but just failing to obtain a minor placing.
Mainly 5th or 6th. Made some progress along rail early straight. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Always prominent. Kept on well to share lead briefly 200 M. Soon headed and unable to fight back.
Towards rear. Moderate progress in straight.
Missed the start and never able to feature.
Pushed along to soon be 2nd. Sat outside leader until weakening out of contention inside 200 M.
Led. Weakened when headed 200 M out.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on inside 250 M to take 3rd close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped well, settled 4th. Sustained effort in straight to take lead 150 M. Held on.
Midfield. Dropped back from the Rock.
Tardy start, remained among the rear group until making up some ground final 200 M. (Finished distressed.)
Slow out. Quickly recovered to midfield on rails going up Rock. Sustained progress rounding home bend. Took some time to obtain run early in straight before making steady headway to hit front late.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Always thereabouts. One-paced under pressure.
Soon tailed-off.
Midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to claim 3rd closing stages.
Outside leader. Hit front entering straight. Caught final strides.
Midfield early before dropping towards rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Never nearer.
Broke well but gave ground gradually shortly after start.
Always 3 or 4-wide and never better than midfield.
Settled just better than midfield. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Attempted to make all. Headed upon straightening and soon found no extra.
Prominent. Made progress to reach lead 700 M. Held 2nd early straight before weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Soon in touch. Steady progress far side to be 3rd near 700 M. Gained advantage final turn. Kept on well but was beaten near finish.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. 2nd last home turn. Ran on under pressure while hanging in in straight.
Prominent. Was 1-1/2Ls 4th turning in. Kept on early straight but weakened inside 200 M.
Always thereabout. Kept on well early straight but unable to quicken closing stages.
Last to straight. Never a factor.
Led until joined 700 M. Was headed 400 M out. Made no show in straight.
Around similar position in midfield throughout.
In touch early, soon raced 3-wide towards rear. Improved home turn and made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Ran on very well from 9th early straight to hit front close home.
Midfield. Checked passing 200 M. Never recovered.
Jumped fairly. Gradually improved to dispute lead. Gave ground from 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Never seen with a chance.
Never rearer.
Midfield most of way.
Always prominent. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Just behind midfield. Ran on well on inner down straight to grab lead close home.
Well there. No extra final stages.
Prominent early. Dropped behind midfield approaching home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
Close up. Gained slender advantage entering straight. Swamped closing stages.
Broke well. Settled towards rear from poor draw. Finished race off strongly to grab 3rd final strides.
Midfield or worse. Moved to the outside into straight. Ran on well to grab victory final strides.
Midfield early. Improved to 3rd near 600 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Broke well and soon prominent. Kept on until no extra close home.
Well there. Dropped back to midfield around 600 M. Made up some ground along rails in straight.
At back. Shifted to outside entering straight and finished well.
Jumped awkwardly, then travelled around midfield. Inconvenienced at 600 M and lost position. Renewed effort and ran on well.
Jumped well and prominent. Tracked leader from 700 M until weakened final 150 M.
Worse than midfield early. Crept closer from 600 M. Ran on well in straight and hit front inside 100 M. Caught near the line.
Bounded in the air on jumping and at back. Never able to feature.
Restrained and got its head up on the first turn, then lost ground towards rear. Never a factor.
Worked across field to lead from a wide gate. Headed 200 M and steadily dropped out.
Raced in 4th out 3-wide, under pressure around bend, became further detached.
Settled 2-wide in 8th place early, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace 600 M out, slight improvement to hold good place chances 200 M out, touched off beaten for 3rd before line.
7Ls off pace and in rear early, under pressure entering straight, not come on.
4th early on inside, 3Ls off speed and 7th turning in, good headway but not reach winner.
Raced 2-wide at back of main group, improved in straight, no chance with winner.
Drifted back on exiting, improved 700 M out on outside, entered straight racing 4-wide, hit front 300 M out, stayed on well.
Held rails position near rear early racing keenly, pulled out wide to deliver challenge entering straight, not come on.
Raced in 2nd 2-wide, led 500 M out, grabbed by winner 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Set slow early pace, passed 500 M out, soon emptied.
3rd early racing keenly, 2Ls off leaders entering straight, failed to kick.
2-wide in 5th early, took closer order around final bend, failed to quicken.
Raced two from rear racing 2-wide and 6Ls off early pace, moderate late headway to pass beaten horses in straight.
Began awkwardly and outpaced early. At back, last into straight. Made up ground steadily, doing best work at finish.
Midfield, unable to quicken in straight. Was further steadied near 100 M.
In touch early then settled worse than midfield. Ran on well from 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start, at back. Closer order rounding home bend, made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield or worse. Made up some late ground.
Broke best, trapped wide, soon taken back towards rear. Made the home turn very awkwardly. Slightly crowded closing stages then ran past tired horses.
Ridden to dispute lead early, then settled in prominent position. Attempted to improve inside the leader at 400 M. One-paced in straight.
Crowded after start, towards rear. Improved around home bend to be 3rd into straight. Kept on well and lost 2nd place near the line.
Ridden to lead, hampered near 400 M when CHARMING CITY attempted to improve on its inside. Soon eased down.
Prominent, wide early. Weakened steadily from 100 M.
Well there, led into straight. Kept on well to fend off the challengers.
Jumped awkwardly, mainly midfield, kept on one pace.
Settled worse than midfield racing 3-wide early on, still wide and well back turning, stayed on well through beaten horses final 200 M, nearest finish.
Chased leaders racing 2-wide in mid-division, forced wide to challenge at top of straight, not reach leaders.
Enjoyed run of race in 3rd on inside, every chance turning in, not come on final 300 M.
Settled 5Ls off pace in 8th racing 2-wide through early stages, improved from 700 M out, entering straight racing 4-wide 2.5Ls off leader, responded well to hit front 100 M, driven out.
Awkwardly away, in rear throughout never closer than 8Ls to pace, moderate late headway past tiring runners.
Ridden to take early lead, came under pressure rounding home turn, stayed on well before finally ceding advantage to front two 100 M out, held 3rd comfortably.
4th or 5th early racing 3-wide, improved 600 M out, short of room turning in racing 4-wide, soon retreated.
Tracked leaders on inside in 6th, still travelling well 400 M out, led winner 200 M out, not match winner's late pace.
Held up on inside one from rear, ridden to improve 700 M out, under pressure 6-wide and 5Ls off pace turning in, no extra.
Raced prominently 2-wide early on, gradually disimproved from 600 M out, very one-paced.
Raced in 2nd 2-wide, under pressure around bend to hold position, faded quickly in straight.
Held up near rear on inside, travelling well turning in, 3.5Ls off speed, briefly threatened to get competitive in straight, nearest finish.
Behind midfield. Lost ground when held up near 800 M. No progress in straight.
Mainly midfield. Made ground steadily final 300 M, never nearer.
Held 5th to 950 M. Eased down from 800 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly 3rd to home turn. Dropped back a bit when unbalanced 400 M. Found not much room early straight and was one-paced closing stages.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, near near. Widest turning in. Very moderate progress final 300 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made progress far side to be 6th approaching 800 M. Inconvenienced near 600 M and forced to be wider. Made no show in straight.
Mainly 2nd to straight. Found no extra 200 M.
Better than midfield. Made progress final turn to be 3rd early straight. Ran on well to take lead inside 150 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Improved well rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Continued to make ground to take 3rd inside 100 M.
Midfield or behind. Dropped out from home bend.
Jumped awkwardly, soon picked up to lead from early stages. Held on until headed 200 M when finding no extra.
Always there. Kept on well in straight to lead briefly 200 M. Soon headed and never able to fight back.
Behind midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Missed the start. Well back to straight. Making moderate progress when hampered on rails over 200 M out. No further impression.
Jumped slowly. Midfield or better. Angled off rails upon straightening. Improved well between runners to grab victory short of line.
Mainly in midfield. Gave ground from home bend.
Broke well. Settled just better than midfield. Midfield entering straight. Quickened well to hold every chance inside 200 M. Pipped at post.
Wide in midfield far side. Short-lived effort home bend. Weakened in straight.
A narrow leader until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. No extra in straight.
Jumped slowly. Disputed lead to straight. Dropped out.
Never a factor.
Settled in rear. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Held up in prominent position. Shaken up upon straightening. Driven to hold some chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort.
Behind leaders to straight. No extra.
Never better than midfield.
Better than midfield. Weakened from halfway.
Jumped well but soon dropped back towards rear.
Led field to around 250 M. Soon found no extra.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear. Made ground to be just behind midfield 600 M. One-paced.
Around midfield to course proper. Sustained effort 400 M to take lead inside 200 M. Held on well.
Midfield. Kept on steadily 300 M but was one-paced closing stages.
Better than midfield. Kept on 400 M.
In touch to 400 M. Weakened.
Jumped awkwardly, remained in rear. Disappointed for a run 450 M when trying to improve. Made up some ground after shifting in to find running.
In touch to 450 M. Dropped back steadily.
Behind midfield. Ran on quite well 400 M to take 3rd closing stages.
Started badly, never in contention.
Always prominent. Improved to 2nd 500 M, gaining advantage briefly 250 M. Kept on without threatening 200 M.
Led field to 150 M. Faded.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Slow out. Settled towards rear. Gained midfield turning in saving ground on inner. Kept on one pace.
Behind midfield most of way.
Never a danger.
Ridden to prominent position early. Chased leader to straight. No extra.
Toards rear. Ran on well in straight doing best work at finish.
Similar position throughout.
Settled in midfield. Cruised to lead about 200 M out. Comfortably.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Never a danger.
Travelled just better than midfield most of way. One-paced in straight.
In first few to straight. Dropped out.
Well there. Dropped back to midfield after 1000 M. Wide into straight. Weakened from 300 M.
Left gates awkwardly and rider was almost dislodged. Checked shortly after the start, towards the rear. Wide around the home bend. Never a factor.
Tardy start. Towards the rear. Some progress along rail after 700 M to be midfield turning in. One-paced in straight.
Jumped well and wide early from a difficult gate. Settled better than midfield. Ran on well after straightening. Every chance at 200 M, unable to match speed with winner close home.
Pushed along to lead. 2nd from 1200 M. Disputed lead into straight. Narrow advantage to 200 M where headed. Kicked back and fought off strong challenge from 2nd place.
Left gates awkwardly. Mainly worse than midfield. Shifted to outside to find running after 700 M. Made up good ground in straight but lost third place on the line.
Ridden to maintain a prominent position but wide. Disputed lead from 700 M with winner into straight. Steadily weakened.
Better than midfield to 300 M. Soon tired.
In the early stages had a tendency to pull. Worse than midfield. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Always in midfield. Steadied when crowded about 200 M. One-paced afterwards.
Dropped back towards rear at start. Last into straight. Made up little ground until no extra final 100 M.
Jumped fair. Middle or better on inside. Steadied near 400 M. Kept on well in straight.
Checked after the start. Mainly worse than midfield. Closer order on the home bend. Awkward between runners near 450 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Soon led, got across to rails 800 M out, continued to cut out fast pace until 300 M out, found nothing under pressure, eased down final 200 M.
Held up three from rear 7Ls off early pace, still plenty of work to do turning in, gradually improved on outside down straight, nearest finish.
Held rails position near 6Ls off pace early, ridden to keep in touch fully 110 m out, never travelling thereafter, found nothing in straight.
Held fourth place racing two wide early 3Ls off pace, still moving well entering straight, grabbed lead over 200 M out, just denied by MUGHAL PALACE on line.
Settled 1.5Ls off pacesetting EXPEDIENT on rails, still at close quarters entering straight, soon under pressure and passed over 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Held fifth place racing three wide 5Ls off pace early stages, ridden 800 M out and still under pressure entering straight, beaten 300 M out.
Always in rear at least 9Ls off pace and racing two or three wide, became further detached in straight.

Not jump well, sent on to race on inside, in sixth place, 5Ls off pace and niggled to lie up with leaders 800 M out, responded to pressure in straight, kept responding to pressure but not reach leaders.
Not jump well, two wide and 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 6Ls off and hard ridden entering straight, moderate late headway until 100 M out, no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in third, 2Ls off pace and two wide until straight, still going well and every chance 300 M out, found nothing off bridle and beaten 200 M out.
Slowly away, held up two from rear on inside, still travelling well but 7Ls off pace entering straight, clear run 350 M out, kept responding to pressure, led on line.
Raced without cover three wide and 6Ls off early pace, forced five wide and under pressure entering straight, soon left behind.
Fractious in stall, ridden forward to join leader 2 wide at 1000 M, soon held 1L advantage closer to rail. Pulled 2-1/2Ls clear 300 M out to win stylishly.
Driven along early to maintain midfield position. Awkwardly placed near 800 M, steadied and lost position. Under pressure upon straightening, ran on steadily on outer from 250 M, one-paced near home.
Prominent, became severely unbalanced near 400 M when hampered by inside horse which attempted to shift out. Gave ground from 250 M.
Behind midfield with cover. Improved steadily along fence final 300 M but never likely to threaten the winner.

Went straight to the lead, overtaken by winner 900 M out. Attempted to switch out from behind winner inside another runner upon straightening but unsuccessful. Into the clear 300 M but failed to find extra. Weakened from 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly, soon recovered to be prominent 4th. Over-racing near 800 M. Kept on one pace in straight, gave ground closing stages.
Dropped to rear from widest barrier. Trailed field throughout.
Prominently briefly, steadily dropping back to rear of midfield passing 1000 M despite ridden along and given reminder. Crept a bit closer on home turn, kept on same pace to the line.
Towards rear, caught wide until 700 M. Never near enough to figure.
Just forward of midfield from difficult gate, wide until 600 M. Effort 300 M out to hold place chance, overhauled by placegetters final 50 M.
Began awkwardly and shifted out, could not keep up and tailed off throughout.
Midfield and wide early. Dropped back towards rear with cover near 900 M. Moved closer 3 wide rounding home bend, made steady ground from 200 M down outside of track until no extra near finish.
Raced kindly in 5th two off the rails and close up, every chance entering straight, off bridle and one-paced 300 M out, place chances gone 200 M out.
Held run of race in 3rd on rails until 400 M out, clear 2nd and 1.5Ls down before giving serious chase to winner 300 M out, kept finding, just failed.
Saved ground on inside in midfield 3Ls until turning in, soon under pressure, first one to crack 350 M out. (Bled.)
Settled 1L off leader racing two wide, still at leader's quarters entering straight, found little off bridle and soon beaten.
Pushed on from 6th and without cover to 3rd racing four deep, three wide and without cover and niggled turning in, not come on in straight and beaten 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up three from rear 5Ls off pace, 4Ls down and outpaced 400 M and 200 M out, moderate late headway to be nearest finish.
Settled three wide without cover 1400 M out and 4Ls off pace, turned in travelling smoothly but still three wide and 2.5Ls off leader, asked to unwind 300 M out but nearest at finish.
Raced keenly early to advance from near rear to midfield, two wide and 3.5Ls off pace 800 M out, improved along inside 400 M out, stayed on very strongly inside final 200 M, just missed.
Slowest away, held up in rear 7Ls off pace early on, still rear 400 M out, running on through stragglers 200 M out, nearest finish.
Away best, gained easy lead after 200 M on rails from outside draw, still going well and 1.5Ls clear 300 M out, soon hard ridden, all out to just hang on.
Held up racing two and three wide near rear early on, two wide and within striking range entering straight, found nothing and beaten 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly 4th or 5th to home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Settled in rear to home turn. Ridden 300 M and kept on close home.
4th or 5th 1200 M and about similar position early in straight. Found no extra closing stages.
In rear to home bend and was last 250 M. Ridden and ran on strongly close home, doing best work at finish.
Improved from midfield passing 1000 M to be close up 2nd or 3rd into straight. Held every chance 250 M but found no extra near finish.
Among rear group to straight. Unable to secure a clear run until passing 200 M where he stayed on strongly.
Took up running from 1200 M and held narrow advantage into straight. Kept on same pace after being headed 200 M out.
Almost unseated rider at start and was last to home bend. Made up considerable ground closing stages.
Slowly away but soon ridden to be in touch. Was still there before weakening out under pressure final 250 M.
In rear to straight where he started to improve. Was denied a clear passage final 200 M and not ridden out to the line.
Always prominent. Ran on to lead approaching 200 M, holding on well under pressure.
Worse than midfield turning into straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Close up before settling in midfield to straight. Found little when asked closing stages.
In touch early, soon in midfield. 4-wide 5th turning in. Unable to quicken thereafter.
Rear. Ran on a bit along rail in straight.
Midfield the best.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch. Dropped to 6th far side. Steadied 500 M before making ground along rail to be 2nd early straight. Found no extra final 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order final turn. One-paced.
Jumped awkwardly and was last to straight. Never a factor.
Bounded at start, behind midfield. Pushed along to be prominent stable bend. Faded from 450 M and tired badly 200 M out.
Mostly 4th. Kept on in straight to gain a remote 3rd closing stages.
Pushed along from a wide draw to be 2nd passing 1200 M. Held on until fading out of contention soon after straightening.
Midfield. Dropped out from final turn. (Bled.)
Switched in from widest draw to stay behind midfield. Remained there until running on well final 300 M to take command 100 M.
Led. Hung out badly 1400 M. Unable to match speed with the winner when headed 100 M.
Rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Behind leader. One-paced without quickening in straight.
Always in last few.
Well back. Ran on to just miss distant 3rd.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Began awkwardly but raced mainly in midfield till faded in straight.
Prominent to home bend. Dropped out.
Settled within striking distance. Ran on resolutely down straight to assert authority close home.
Lacked pace early. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Well back. Made up some ground past beaten runners early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Nearly made all. Grabbed near finish.
Always thereabout. Was 1-1/2Ls 3rd turning in. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from final turn.
Better than midfield. Improved far side to be 2nd approaching 800 M. Kept on well in straight but unable to match speed with winner final 200 M.
Mostly 3-wide in midfield. Ran on 250 M to snatch 3rd close home.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 200 M out, never nearer.
Tardy start, last to 300 M. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Held 2nd to 850 M, 2Ls 4th final turn. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on until weakened final 200 M.
Pushed along from widest draw and made all. Won readily.
Behind midfield. Made ground early straight to reach 6th 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground from outside inside 250 M.
Towards rear throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never a factor.
Made all. Held on under pressure.
Wide in midfield. Short-lived effort around home bend before dropped out.
Always thereabouts. No extra near finish.
Always last few.
Never nearer.
In similar position throughout. One-paced.
Well there. Improved to hold every chance entering straight. Failed to quicken to threaten closing stages.
Hampered early. Settled around midfield. No clear passage early in straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite racing tightly.
Wide in midfield far side. Dropped to tail-end home bend.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Close up. Behind leader on rails turning in. No clear passage and steadied for a run passing 200 M. Produced good late finish.
Broke best. Among leaders to straight holding every chance early on but failed to quicken to threaten.
Well back. Behind a wall of horses early in straight. Produced good late impression final 200 M.
Knuckled on jumping, then towards rear. Held up in the early straight until cleared 300 M out. Ran on steadily until one-paced close home.
Broke well. Waited with in midfield. Headway into straight and took up running from 350 M. Kept on well to defy strong challenge for a courageous victory.
Midfield on rail. Held up behind runners in the early straight. Cleared 250 M out and one-paced to the line.
Ridden to take up a prominent position. Shared lead from 500 M. Headed 300 M out, kept on one-paced.
Jumped awkwardly and then went forward wide to be prominent. Disputed lead from 800 M until 350 M. Dropped out from 250 M.
Outpaced at back. Ran on well from 300 M to be nearest at finish without threatening the first pair.
Failed to muster early speed despite pushing hard early stages. Around midfield. Never quickened.
Settled towards rear. About 3Ls off pace rounding the home bend. Shifted out slightly to obtain running after straightening. Ran on well to the line but found the winner too strong.
Ridden to dispute lead out wide from 900 M. Widest rounding the turn and into the straight. Soon tailed off after straightening. (Throughout the race hung out badly.)
Pushed hard to lead early. Headed around 800 M but still maintained a prominent position on rail. Gave ground from 250 M.
Went forward from difficult gate, then restrained back behind pace near 900 M and settled around midfield. Rounding the home bend and in the straight inclined to hang out. Unable to feature.
Raced without cover 3-wide and 7Ls off early pace, forced towards middle of track on straightening, not come on.
Raced 2-wide two from rear early 10Ls off pace, 4-wide entering straight at rear, finished down centre of track at the one pace without any threat.
Ridden to lead after 200 M, 2-3Ls clear until straight, soon under pressure and passed 300 M out, no extra and quickly faded.
Raced 2-wide in 6th place 4Ls off early speed, under strong pressure turning in, retreated quickly.
Raced on inside in 5th, 4Ls off pace, switched off rails 400 M out to make moderate late headway and grab 3rd 200 M out, nearest finish.
Raced without cover 2-wide and 9Ls off pace early on, 7Ls off turning in, moderate late headway in straight through beaten horses.
Slowly into stride, improved to settle in 7th, racing 4 or 5-wide and 6Ls off leader until turning in, failed to quicken and nearest finish.
Raced 3-wide in 4th place, 4Ls off early pace, niggled to keep tabs on leaders 500 M out, became further detached in straight.
Drifted back on exiting gates to settle in rear 11-12Ls off pace, 3-wide and still travelling well turning in, soon off bridle and no chance 200 M out.
Settled near on inside 9Ls off leader, hard ridden turning in, not come on.
Settled in midfield on inside 6-7Ls off pace, under pressure on straightening, one-paced in straight though improved position slightly.
2-wide and 7-8Ls off pace down back straight and until turning into straight, stayed on through beaten horses in straight, nearest finish.
Raced 2-wide in 3rd, 3Ls off pace through early stages, crept closer turning in, hit front 250 M out, stayed on well.
Held inside berth in 2nd, 2Ls off early pace, ridden at top of straight and led briefly 300 M out, headed by winner 250 M out, kept on at same pace.
Jumped best and led briefly. 2Ls off pace on rail until joining leader into straight. Hit front inside 300 M and pulled clear, just pipped by winner final stride.
Jumped awkwardly, settled rear of midfield or worse. Made moderate progress on inner from 200 M, same pace closing stages.
In touch without cover from widest gate, advanced to track leader near 900 M. Dropped out quickly from 300 M, tailed off 200 M out.
Niggled along early in midfield, 4-wide rounding the turn and into straight. Unable to produce extra in the straight, weakened close home.
Better than midfield and 4-wide, tendency to pull early stages. 5-wide into straight, soon tired and dropped out.
Sent to the front from difficult gate, crossed to inside rail at 1000 M. Headed 350 M out, gave ground steadily from 200 M.
Well there early, then settled forward of midfield on fence. Brushed rail near 700 M and became unbalanced. Made steady ground from 250 M, one-paced concluding stages.
Slow to begin, ridden along to take up position in midfield. Steady headway from 200 M, no extra close home.
Soon at tail. Made up some ground towards outer from 250 M. One-paced closing stages.
Prominent from wide draw. 4-wide entering straight. Gave ground inside 200 M.
Slow to jump. Waited with at rear. Responded fairly from 300 M and made gradual ground through field though unable to find top gear to close race off.
3 or 4-wide towards rear with cover. Steadied and shifted out near 500 M. Made sustained effort from 300 M on outer to snatch race on the line.
Never able to feature.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from course proper, doing best work final 200 M.
Midfield. Ran on well final 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Slowly away, travelled at the rear. Ran on a bit inside 150 M, never nearer.
Always prominent. Kept on while shifting in passing 200 M to cause interference. Unable quicken to threaten.
Soon 5th. Made some progress 200 M to be 2nd briefly. One-paced close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Around midfield within striking distance. Ran on from 400 M to take lead passing 200 M. Just held on to score narrowly.
In the front until weakening out of contention final 200 M. (Abnormal breathing noise after race.)
Midfield. Made up some ground when given reminder 300 M. Hampered passing 200 M and inside 100 M. Found no extra.
Behind the main bunch. Kept on same pace final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear early. Made ground steadily to be among front runners 600 M out. Found no extra 250 M.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Made ground to be prominent 700 M. Weakened out of contention final 200 M.
Well back. Ran on resolutely down centre of straight to just get up on line.
Midfield. No clear run early in straight. Found room too late.
Well back till ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield early. Dropped to tail-end into straight.
Chased leader. Raced ungenerously early in straight before dropped out over 200 M out.
Never far off in 4th. Held some chance over 200 M out. One-paced.
Towards rear till dropped out approaching home turn.
Soon in midfield. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out but caught final strides.
Midfield throughout.
Well back. Effort behind midfield home bend. Tight early in straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Broke well and ridden to gain 1L advantage home bend. Swamped inside 200 M.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Midfield. Widest runner turning in. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Midfield or behind. Checked 700 M. Never recovered.
Behind midfield. Dropped further back passing 600 M.
Towards rear. Made good progress home bend to be 2nd turning in. Ran on in straight to gain slender advantage closing stages.
Better than midfield. Made good progress 1000 M out, taking 2nd approaching 800 M. Kept on until finding no extra upon straightening.
Jumped well and was prominent on the rail. Dropped slightly home bend and was 5th turning in. Kept on one-paced thereafter.
Midfield or better. Dropped towards the rear when severely checked 700 M. Improved to midfield on inside turning in. No further progress.
Towards rear. Improved steadily from 850 M to be 6th home turn. Ran on without threatening the place-getters.
Led. Kept on when headed 150 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made progress near 500 M to be 4-wide 8th turning in. Kept on without quickening.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily 900 M out.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Soon last. Tailed off in straight.
Mostly 4th before dropping to 6th home bend. Unable to quicken in straight. (Hung out throughout.)
Pushed along from widest draw to be in midfield. Gradual progress far side to be 3rd final turn. Kept on well but was always held by the winner.
Well back. Ran on in straight.
Never better than midfield. One-paced under pressure.
Midfield. Made modest progress without threatening.
Midfield. Gradually faded from home bend.
Well back. No room early in straight. Finished strongly to grab 2nd final strides.
Midfield to striaght. Dropped out.
Quickly improved to first few. Weakened upon straightening.
Rear when steadied far side. Remained rear to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never better than midfield. One-paced.
Prominent. Fading when shifted out early in straight. Dropped out.
Settled 4L 4th. Hampered and lost momentum early in straight. Recovered ground steadily to claim 5th close home.
Broke well. Made all virtually. Won readily.
Just better than midfield. Tightened early in straight. Kept on steadily.
Midfield briefly. Weakened home bend.
Worse than midfield. About 8Ls off leader and under pressure around 1000 M. Progress steadily on outside rounding home bend. Ran on well to be nearest at finish but failed to catch winner narrowly.
Slowly away and at the tail. Never in contention.
Ridden early to go forward. Led from 1000 M until headed at 300 M. Kept on one-paced.
Ridden to maintain in midfield position and wide. Dropped back from 1200 M to be well behind. Tailed off from 700 M.
About midfield. Steadily dropped out from 800 M.
Ridden at start to maintain a prominent position on rail. Moved away from rail to take closer order rounding the home bend. Took charge inside 250 M and kept on to the line.
Towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend. Shifted to outside and ran on strongly in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there until straightening. Made no show in straight.
Widest on first bend from a bad gate. Midfield or worse. Continued to race wide along the back straight. Dropped out steadily rounding the home bend and not in contention thereafter.
Around midfield. Crept closer rounding the home bend but no extra in straight.
Took up a midfield position from a difficult gate. Slight headway before straightening but unable to quicken when asked to accerlerate in straight.
At back early, then ridden along to be in touch in midfield or worse. No extra in straight.
Soon led. Headed near 1000 M. Every chance 300 M. Kept on until found no extra final stages. (Lame.)
Midfield early, dropped back to the rear after the first bend. Not a factor afterwards.
Sat 3 to 4Ls off early pace racing three and four wide, raced keenly 800 M out, chances of filling a place 200 M out, no extra.
Ridden to lead after 200 M, travelled well in front and kicked on again in straight, no answer to winner's pace 150 M out, weakened latter stages.
Slowly away, raced in rear and 7Ls off pace entering straight, forced widest down centre of track to make finishing effort, nearest finish.
Not best away, held up to race on inside 6Ls off pace turning in, stayed on well in straight, checked slightly 100 M out when without a chance of filling a place, eased down.
Prominent through early stages on inside in fourth 2.5Ls off pace, under pressure turning in and found nothing.
Held up worse than midfield 5Ls off pace down back straight racing three wide, posed no threat in home straight.
Settled along rails 3Ls off pace in midfield, ridden 500 M to quicken up, failed to respond.
Sat off early pace to race without cover four wide, niggled to lie up with pace 700 M out, turned in racing five wide, not come on.
Prominent early in fifth racing two wide and 2.5Ls off early pace, one-paced in straight.
Raced keenly but prominently in third early, 1.5Ls off leader 800 M out, still racing keenly entering straight, no chance with winner but stayed on well nonetheless.
Held up racing three wide early three from rear, 6Ls off pace entering straight, stayed on well in straight, nearest finish.
Sat 3.5Ls off early pace in midfield, racing three wide, turned in racing four wide, quickened up well to hit front 250 M out, stayed on strongly.
Dwelt slightly at start, raced on inside two from rear, 6Ls off pace on straightening, no threat final 400 M.
Raced keenly to hold second position 1L off leader, passed for second 400 M out, soon beaten.
Driven from wide barrier to be prominent, caught wide early stages. Inconvenienced near 200 M, gave ground steadily.
Best away and led briefly, steadily dropped back to mid-division at 1100 M. Crowded near 800 M and dropped back further. Not a factor in straight.
Began fairly, soon recovered to lead. Headed 350 M out, kept on same pace until dropping out 200 M out. (Abnormal breathing noise after race.)
With tail to straightening. Ran on steadily from 300 M to claim distant 3rd closing stages, having to steady and shift out near 200 M.
Around midfield to 400 M. Dropped out gradually thereafter.
Prominent, joined leaders at 1100 M then remained on hindquarters of leader from 800 M. Every chance 300 M to 200 M, one-paced then weakened final 100 M. (Abnormal breathing noise after race.)
From difficult gate steadily moved up to be just in front of midfield, always hanging in. Progress from 300 M while hanging in badly. No extra final 100 M.
Waited with at rear. Asked for effort out wide from 700 M to be 5-wide forward of midfield entering straight. Hit front 200 M out but overhauled by the winner inside final 100 M.
Held up in midfield with cover. Shifted out into clear upon straightening, pushed out hands and heels to score smartly.
Handy on rail, unable to quicken in straight, gave ground from 200 M.
Outpaced at rear despite niggled along. Ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Held up in rear 7Ls off early pace, not come on in straight.
Raced two wide near rear 5Ls off early speed, travelled well turning in, stayed on past beaten horses, nearest finish.
Raced keenly early in fourth place 2.5Ls off pace and two wide, every chance entering straight, not match winner's pace, kept on.
Held inside rail 4.5Ls off early pace, brief effort at top of straight, never really threatened.
Settled in midfield racing three wide, two wide entering straight and 2.5Ls off pace, failed to quicken.
Eased in from wide draw to race three wide in fifth place, 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, still three wide entering straight, assumed lead 300 M out, stayed on strongly.
Restrained in 10th place early on inside, 6Ls off leaders, still near rear turning in, soon beaten.
Raced three wide early 4Ls off pace, turned in without cover racing three wide, soon beaten, eased 200 M out. (Sore.)
Raced two wide in second at HORNET's quarters, still second turning in, chance gone 350 M out.
Ridden to lead early and in front after 200 M, crossed to rails 1000 M out, turned in still leading, soon under pressure and found nothing.
Sat two wide 3.5Ls off in seventh place, unbalanced 600 M out, turned in racing two wide, beaten 200 M out.
Restrained on exiting and settled 5Ls off pace, niggled 800 M out, stayed on well in straight without ever threatening winner.
Fourth and on inside 2Ls off pace until 400 M out, found little in straight.
Held up in rear racing three wide 6Ls off pace, forced wide turning in, steady effort final 400 M, nearest finish.
Held up 6Ls off pace racing two wide early on, niggled to keep in touch 600 M out when 7.5Ls off pace, stayed on well under pressure.
Settled well off the pace in rear on inside over 12Ls away, managed to draw a little closer on bend but failed to follow through again in straight.
Three wide and 10Ls off pace early on, crept closer 600 M out, turned in racing three wide and 3.5Ls off pace, every chance 200 M out, no extra.
Raced towards rear 12Ls off leaders through early stages, still rear and two wide turning in, stayed on in straight, nearest finish.
Settled in midfield racing in seventh, 6Ls off pace down back straight, fairly well placed turning in but no acceleration final 400 M.
Settled 4Ls of early speed in sixth racing two wide, travelling well turning in, led 200 M out, stayed on under pressure.
Held up on inside early and 8Ls off pace, forced four wide to challenge and hard ridden entering straight, stayed on strongly final 400 M, nearest finish.
Slowly into stride, raced a long way off pace down back straight, last entering straight, no impression. (Lame.)
Second early but tucked away in fourth place racing two wide and 2Ls off pace, still on bridle 400 M out, not quicken final 300 M.
Raced a little keenly three wide early on, two wide and disputed lead from 1200 M to straight, passed 200 M out, no extra.
Led after 2000 M on inside, still ahead entering straight, soon passed and beaten 350 M out.
Had the run of the race in fourth place on inside 2Ls off leaders, under pressure turning in and beaten 350 M out.
Raced 4Ls off early pace in fifth on inside, travelled well turning in on inside, briefly left without racing room behind tiring horses 300 M out, ran on well final 200 M.
Slowest to exit held up 12Ls off pace on inside, plenty to do turning in, no impression.
Rear early. Made steady headway approaching 350 M, running on well close home to snatch 2nd place final stride.
Well there. Quickened to challenge 300 M. Found no extra close home.
Held narrow advantage before finding no extra inside final 250 M.
Never far off to 400 M.
Among rear group before making up some good ground final 250 M.
In touch to 200 M where he was severely checked. Not in contention after.
In rear to 400 M where he ran on to be nearest at finish.

Never far away to halfway.
Worse than midfield early. Quickened from 400 M to take command passing 200 M. Won readily.
Well there before being outpaced from the 200 M.
In touch before losing ground final 200 M.
Always at the back.
Prominent with brief lead stable bend. Held 3rd from 900 M until weakening out of contention turning for home.

In touch early, was in midfield far side. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon in rear.

Midfield. Improved to 4th approaching 800 M. Kept on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield or behind. Steady progress to 5th far side. Ran on final turn to take lead closing stages.
Well there. Took lead approaching 1000 M. Held on until headed closing stages.
Prominent. Sat outside leader approaching 800 M. Kept on until finding no extra close home.
Midfield from widest draw. Ran on final 200 M.
In touch before dropping to midfield stable bend. Towards rear far side but with some late progress closing stages.
Jostled at start. Never far off to straight. Dropped out. (Sore.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield on rails. Made steady headway to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Raced freely when in front briefly passing 1200 M. Weakened in straight.
Well back. Commenced move entering home straight switching for a run and ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Never a factor.
Settled just better than midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to get up on line.
Effort rounding stables bend. Led entering back straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield throughout.
Slightly slow away. Well back. Forced very wide turn and ran on down centre of straight.
Led early. Prominent till no extra 200 M out.
Wide behind midfield. Steadied behind runners when swung wide home turn. No further impression.
Wide in midfield. Forced very wide into straight. Made no show thereafter.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the last when checked 950 M. Tailed off in straight.
Settled midfield. One-paced.
Soon led. Shared lead 750 M to straight. Found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Behind midfield. Very moderate progress in straight.
Towards rear. Dropped out final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Progressed well along rail in straight to be 2nd 100 M. No match with the winner.
Missed start and was towards rear. Ran on well final 250 M.
Near rear. Made some ground early straight. Found no extra when steadied passing 200 M.
Was there until weakening final 200 M.
Midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.

Settled in a prominent position. Ran on strongly 200 M and soon took command. Won readily.
Soon well there. One-paced in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, then towards rear. Closer order rounding the home bend. One-paced in straight.
At back throughout.
Ridden to go forward early. Soon disputed lead. Went clear from 600 M until headed 250 M. Steadily weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced move rounding the home bend. Ran on well in straight and took lead 150 M out. Kept on well to the line.

Prominent early. Slightly dropped to 5th rounding the first bend. Unable to keep up from 500 M and dropped to the rear before straightening. Found nothing in straight.
Inconvenienced at the start and soon midfield. Moved up to 3rd rounding the first bend. Unable to quicken in straight.
Niggled to go forward from a wide gate. Soon midfield along the rail. Ran on well final 300 M.
Soon disputed lead. Headed 600 M and then severely checked near 400 M. Gave ground steadily thereafter.
At back. Wide in the back straight and rounding the home bend. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield or worse. Checked severely about the 400 M. No extra in straight.
Towards rear. One-paced when inconvenienced early in straight.
Given reminders early. Soon tailed-off.

Midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure.
Led to 200 M. No extra.
Played up in the gate. Missed the start. Remained towards rear. Kept on well in straight.
Never far off. Quickened well to hit front 200 M out. Readily.
Just behind midfield. Made some progress down centre of straight.

Very wide early on and in rear, two-wide and 10Ls off pace 400 M out, soon tailed off.

Always prominent, led 1400 M out, headed 200 M out, no extra, held on for 3rd place.
Driven along to lead early on but failed to hold position for long, under pressure in 4th 500 M out, soon faded.

Raced keenly on inside in 3rd early, every chance entering straight but not quicken final 300 M.

Raced on inside early towards rear, travelled well on rails entering straight, one-paced final 300 M.
Broke awkwardly, settled in rear 7 to 8Ls off pace, under pressure 600 M out, no impression.

Raced three-wide early on near rear, 5Ls off speed and two-wide down back straight, stayed on through beaten horses final 400 M, nearest finish.
4th 800 M and about 2Ls 6th early in straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Never far off and held some chance briefly 200 M out. Soon beaten.
Took up running from stable bend and led field to straight. Found no extra final 200 M. (Whip dropped 200 M.)
About 7th rounding home bend. Stayed on to claim 4th towards finish.
Prominent to 200 M where he dropped out steadily.

Never on terms despite making up some ground closing stages.
Mostly 5th or 6th to straight. Switched in and ran on to lead passing 200 M. Quickened well when threatened near finish.
Always well there, having every chance final 200 M. Found winner too strong.
In rear to straight where he stayed on a bit.
Prominent. Unable to hold place when 3rd early straight.
Prominent. Dropped to midfield home bend. Widest turning in. Faded.
Last. Made up good ground from 10th home turn, never nearer.
Led briefly early, soon dropped to midfield. Dropped out rounding home bend.
Towards rear. Made steady progress along rail passing the Rock. Ran on from 4th final turn to take lead inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Made ground home bend to be midfield turning in. Kept on well final 200 M to obtain a remote 3rd close home.

Led field approaching 1000 M, still holding 2Ls advantage upon straightening. One-paced when headed 200 M. (Abnormal breathing noise after race.)
Behind midfield throughout.
In touch to 400 M. Made no show in straight.
Midfield. Slightly progressed to 5th turning in. Unable to quicken in straight.
Wide in midfield. One-paced in straight.

Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Held up in rear early stages. Found nothing in straight.
Well back. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Wide behind midfield. Faded from home bend.

Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to straight. Dropped out.

Began slowly. Settled towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight to claim remote 4th.

Midfield or slightly behind. No progress in straight.
Mainly 4th to 200 M. Unable to quicken.

Towards rear. Made up a little late ground inside 200 M.

In touch early, settling 6th. Found not much room when trying to improve 200 M out, unable to ride out.

Mostly 5th. Kept on in straight.
Just better than midfield. Gradually faded in straight.
