Towards rear 6Ls off pace, ridden 600 M out to improve, found little in straight.
Raced 2-wide early in 5th or 6th, crossed to rails 1300 M out niggled to keep up 700 M out, responded to pressure to keep on final stages without threatening first three home.
Enjoyed run of race on fence in 3rd 2Ls off lead, under pressure 500 M out, not come on.
Sat 2-wide 8th position early, 4.5Ls off pace 800 M out, under pressure on final bend but stayed on well to be nearest finish.
Ridden from gates to take up inside position in front, quickened up entering straight but passed by CHOCOLATE TYCOON 100 M out, no extra, held on for 3rd.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off early pace, ridden 800 M out to lie up, turned in racing 4-wide, one-paced final 300 M.
Settled in midfield 4.5Ls off early speed on inside, in rear and on fence entering straight, one-paced in straight, though caught a little short of room on rails 200 M out, eased down final 100 M.
Sat 2 and 3-wide slightly worse than midfield early, entered straight in rear bunch 5Ls off pace racing 3-wide, found nothing.
Held up in rear 8Ls off early pace, improved 600 M out to loop field racing 4-wide, 5Ls off pace entering straight, stayed on strongly to lead on line.
Slowly away, crossed to rails to race two from rear 6Ls off pace, one-paced in straight.
4-wide in midfield early, moved a bit closer and 2-wide with cover at 1200 M. Switched out before straightening and responded well to hit front 200 M out, soon went clear.
Slow to jump, waited with at tail. Steadied and shifted in when disappointed at 400 M. 3-wide 3rd last turning in. Ran on well from 150 M to grab distant 2nd on the line.
Settled 3-wide with cover in mid-division. 4-wide rounding home bend and ran on steadily from 250 M, no extra concluding stages.
Forward of midfield and 4 or 5-wide early, shifted across towards fence at 1300 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Rear of midfield on rail. Switched 4-wide into straight. One-paced.
Soon took up running from wide gate. Gradually shifting across to reach rail at 1000 M. Held 1.5L advantage from 800 M. Headed at 200 M, dropped out.
Tracked leader, 2-wide. Run ended at 200 M, faded.
Settled near rear on rail. Made steadily ground inside last 200 M, one-paced final bit.
Jumped awkwardly, midfield turning out of straight. Checked at 1200 M and dropped towards rear. Gave ground further from 400 M, tailed off in straight.
Began awkwardly, 3-wide without cover in prominent position, 2Ls off pace. Under pressure from 700 M, hung out on home turn, dropped out from 400 M.
Behind pace on fence. Brief effort near 200 M, soon found no answer to the winner and kept on one-paced to the line, lost 2nd place final strides.
Settled in last position. Under pressure from 500 M, switched wide into straight. Found nothing.
Settled 6Ls off early pace on inside, stayed on well in straight to be nearest finish.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace until straight, stayed on strongly though beaten horses, nearest finish.
Held up early on, improved to race 5-wide, not sustain effort and beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off early pace, under pressure turning in and ran green hanging out 250 M out, stayed on strongly final stages.
Race 3-wide disputing early lead, 1L off pace 600 M out, one-paced and not quicken in straight.
Disputed early lead racing on inside, travelled well turning in, hung in 200 M forcing LEGEND OF WEI HAI to snatch up, straightened up again, stayed on well.
Disputed early lead racing 2-wide, under pressure to keep up 400 M out, became further detached in straight.
Sat in 4th place on inside and 2.5Ls off pace 600 M out, slightly impeded by winner hanging in 200 M out, kept on to line.
Hung out throughout racing 4-wide, under pressure 500 M out, not come on, eased down final stages.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off early pace, brief effort turning in, bumped 250 M out when beaten, no extra.
Sat 3Ls off early pace racing 3-wide, under pressure 500 M out, beaten at top of straight.
Ridden early on inside 4Ls off pace, came under pressure 600 M out, not come on and never a threat in straight.
Led field to final turn, then remained 2nd until finding no extra passing 200 M.
Pushed along from a wide draw to be prominent 3rd. Unable to hold place inside 250 M.
Well there. Took advantage final turn. Unable to contain the winner closing stages.
Towards rear from widest draw. Slightly improved home bend. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Dropped to the rear passing 600 M. Made ground 300 M but was soon steadied. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Steadied for a run when pushed along 400 M. Made up some good ground final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden to midfield. Soon dropped back to the rear group and never able to feature.
Midfield. Responded well when given reminders 250 M. Just obtained a minor placing close home.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit early straight. Renewed effort 200 M to be nearest at finish.
In touch. Hung out badly home turn. Faded 250 M.
Pushed along from a wide draw to be in touch. Kept on to remain in similar position throughout.
Towards rear. Made some progress early straight. Weakened closing stages.
Tardy start, never a factor.
Midfield. Made progress from outside rounding home bend. 3-wide 6th turning in. Ran on steadily in straight to take lead final 100 M.
Midfield. Ran on under pressure closing stages.
Niggled along in midfield. Lost ground coming out of back straight. No further impression.
Prominent. Joined leaders briefly home turn before weakened.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily on rails in straight.
Well there. Weakened gradually upon straightening.
Hampered early. Well back. Loomed up to look a danger in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Always better than midfield, travelling well throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. No clear passage upon straightening. Quickened well to take charge closing stages. Won comfortably.
Midfield to straight then weakened.
Never better than midfield. Produced good impression in straight.
Ridden to hold narrow lead. Headed inside 300 M. Weakened under pressure.
Settled mainly behind leaders. No room behind runners early in straight. Made no impression closing stages.
Raced keenly behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening. Gained 1L break over 200 M out but soon overhauled.
Pushed to be 5th soon after start. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening. (Bled.)
Was 3rd early, dropped to 6th halfway. Made no show in straight.
Midfield to home bend. Faded.
At rear and was wide to straight. Ran on steadily.
Midfield or behind. Ran on along rail 400 M to take 3rd 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground inside 250 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Midfield. Very moderate progress upon straightening. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Soon led, holding 2Ls advantage early straight. Kept on when headed 200 M.
Soon last. Ran past a few weakening horses 400 M.
In touch. Ran on from 3rd final turn to assert authority 200 M. Won readily.
Disputed for lead early, then sat outside leader from 1000 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Left awkwardly and was towards rear. Made up a little ground when widest in straight.
In touch to 450 M. Dropped out.
Prominent to home bend then weakened.
Missed the break and dropped to rear. Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Gained slender lead home bend. Dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Broke well. Settled just better than midfield. Quickened to 2nd early in straight but lost position late.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Around midfield. Kept on in straight.
Soon moved up to lead. Narrowly headed on rails home bend. Pulled to the front upon straightening. Unchallenged.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled behind leaders. Fought on doggedly in straight for 2nd.
Never nearer.
Wide throughout. Towards rear. Dropped backward turning in. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Towards rear. Commenced move entering straight, but only produced moderate effort under pressure.
In first few to straight then weakened.
Soon tracked leader. Steadily weakened 200 M out. Hung in throughout.
Midfield early. Could not keep up and dropped further back from 800 M.
Soon prominent. Unable to accelerate in straight and one-paced to the line.
Ridden to go forward and led narrowly. Kept on well in straight until grabbed by winner final stages.
Mainly midfield. One-paced in straight.
Outpaced early, towards rear. Ridden hard to keep up with midfield along the rail rounding the home bend. One-paced in early straight and made some ground final stages.
Towards rear. Made some late ground to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Ran on in straight but found the quinella pair too strong.
Outpaced early and soon at back. Made no improvement in straight.
Broke well, soon worse than midfield. Wide and unable to hold position rounding the home bend. Found nothing in straight.
At back wide from a difficult gate in early and middle stages. 5-wide rounding the home bend. Dropped out after straightening.
Broke well, soon around midfield on outside and wide. About 5Ls from leader into straight. Running on strongly from 300 M to take command final 50 M. Won comfortably.
Slowest away, raced on inside 5Ls off pace down back straight, posed no threat from 400 M out.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off early pace, took closer order racing 5-wide around bend, no extra from 300 M out.
Broke well, disputed early lead racing 4-wide, then 2-wide 800 M out, every chance entering straight and briefly held lead 350 M out, found little under pressure and passed 300 M out, soon faded.
Sent on to race 3-wide without cover 1000 M out 1L off pace, travelled well turning in, led 300 M out, all out to just hang on.
Placed in midfield 3Ls off pace early on, sat 2-wide entering straight and travelling well, kept on strongly before tiring final 50 M.
Held up on inside 4Ls 1000 M out, travelling well but forced to switch inside to challenge 350 M out, not clear run until 200 M out when still 3Ls off leader, finished very strongly, unlucky.
Held up towards rear 5Ls off pace racing 2-wide, still near rear forced 4-wide on straightening, no threat final 300 M.
Held up on inside rail 2.5Ls off leader down back straight, improved to race at leader's quarters turning in, not quicken.
Broke well but held up to race 2.5Ls off pace 1000 M out racing 2-wide, tried hard but a bit one-paced in straight.
Second slowest out of gates, held up in rear 6Ls off lead, brief effort from rear on straightening, soon petered out.
Settled 2-wide in midfield early on, came under strong driving turning in, kept responding to pressure gamely.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace in worse than midfield, still on the bit turning in, dug deep to stay on strongly final 300 M, nearest finish.
Settled 4Ls off speed early on racing 3-wide, under pressure 500 M out, no impression in straight.
Ridden to lead after 200 M on inside, under pressure when overhauled 350 M out, faded very quickly.
3-wide just behind midfield with cover. Gave ground from 600 M.
3-wide without cover towards the front. Dropped back a bit rounding home turn. Gave ground steadily upon straightening.
Unable to keep up. At rear before switching out near 700 M to try to improve on home bend 7-wide. Widest and towards rear straightening, unable to quicken.
Ridden to track leader 2-wide. 3Ls off pace 800 M out. Shaken up 400 M out, hit front inside 100 M, readily.
Midfield 2 or 3-wide with cover. Made up some ground concluding stages.
From difficult gate was caught wide without cover towards rear throughout. Never a factor.
4-wide without cover in mid-division. Advanced slightly near 800 M. 3-wide 2Ls off lead into straight. Kept on one pace to the line.
Caught 6-wide behind midfield into first bend, then settled 3-wide towards rear. Under pressure from 600 M, did not quicken.
Sent to the front. Headed at 900 M to be 1.5L off leader. Kept on same pace until no extra near finish.
Niggled along early, 4-wide midfield out of straight. Still midfield along back straight but 4-wide without cover. Hung in badly on home turn. Faded from 400 M.
2-wide near rear. Steadied at 700 M when disappointed for running. Last into straight, ran past beaten runners in straight.
Pushed along early in handy position on fence. Under pressure from 800 M, struck rail at 700 M. Midfield into straight, kept on same pace before moderate late headway final bit.
Slow to jump, crowded and dropped to tail. Recovered some ground behind midfield on rail. Under pressure from 500 M, hung out upon straightening and made up a little ground before tiring close home.
Hard ridden but caught 4-wide forward of midfield into 1st turn. Swift progress out wide near 1000 M to hold 2Ls advantages on rail at 700 M. No answer to the winner when headed inside 100 M.

Slowest into stride, held up in rear 6Ls off pace, turned in racing widest of all (6-wide), pushed out to quicken up from rear 5Ls off pace 300 M out to hit front 150 M out, won hard held, impressive.
Raced on inside in 6th or 7th 2.5Ls off early speed, slightly outpaced 500 M out, never looked like getting competitive final stages.
2nd early on racing 3-wide, hard ridden entering straight, stuck to task well to finish fourth without threatening first three past post.
Drifted back upon exiting stalls, held rails position 3.5Ls off speed 800 M out, niggled to keep in touch around bend, posed little threat in straight.
Took keen hold early on racing 3-wide 3.5Ls off pace, raced 4-wide 600 M out, under pressure entering straight, not come on.
Soon led by a length early on, 2Ls clear entering straight, passed 150 M out, no chance with winner but stayed on well.
Second slowest out of stages, held up one from rear 5Ls off pace, stayed on from rear through beaten horses final stages.
Raced 2-wide in 3rd place until straight when 2Ls down and with every chance of reaching frame, not quicken.
Away well, raced 3-wide in 5th 2.5Ls off pace, under pressure at top of straight but stayed on gamely final stages.
Handily placed on rails in 4th early on, still well-placed but under pressure 400 M out, one-paced in straight.
Sat 2.5Ls off early pace racing 2-wide, still travelling well 400 M out, found little off the bridle 300 M out and soon beaten.
Raced 2-wide 3 to 4Ls off early speed, travelled well 400 M out, soon asked to quicken but found little, no chance 200 M out.
Worse than midfield into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Never troubled leaders.
Well there and was 2nd into straight. Kept on till checked 200 M out. Soon beaten.
Close up before failing to hold place into straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace final 200 M.
Midfield home bend. Ran on well closing stages despite not reaching winner.
Close up before dropping to rear 1000 M and remained there to straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
At back to straight where he made up some ground final 200 M.
About 6th into home bend. Improved into straight but was baulked 200 M out. Stayed on when clear near finish.
Midfield into straight where he ran on well to take charge close home.
Settled behind leaders in 5th passing 1000 M and was about 3rd or 4th into straight. Quickened to lead approaching 200 M and was one-paced when headed 100 M.
Led field from 1200 M till headed by 200 M. Dropped out steadily.
Slowly away, towards rear. Very moderate late progress closing stages.
Midfield. Hung out 500 M and was awkward final turn. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Towards rear early. Improved to 7th near 600 M and remained in similar position thereafter.
Tracked leader to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Made most. Was just caught at finish.
Jumped well from widest draw, mostly 4th to straight. Kept on same pace to finish. (Dropped whip 300 M.)
Mostly 5th until progressing to 3rd early straight. No match with the quinella pair.
Behind midfield. Made some progress along rail final 200 M.
Was 4th before reaching 3rd approaching the Rock. Continued to progress home bend to be 2nd 400 M. Ran on in straight to snatch victory by the narrowest margin.
Checked after start, last to straight. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Always towards rear and was wide without cover.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on well final 200 M to just miss 3rd.
Held 3rd before dropping to midfield home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to obtain the minor placing narrowly closing stages.
Near rear. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Always prominent. Kept on without quickening.
Soon 5th. Improved to join the lead 450 M to early straight. Soon weakened.
Towards rear. Was widest in the last turning in. Ran on a bit 200 M out.
Soon midfield. Improved from outside to be 4th 600 M. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Led field passing 1000 M until joined 450 M. Regained advantage 200 M until headed near finish.
Checked soon after start, remained at rear to 350 M. Made some moderate progress.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear home bend. Moderate progress closing stages.
Midfield or better along the rail. Improved to 3rd turning in. Ran on to grab lead close home.
Behind midfield. Faded final 250 M.
Around midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Tight early in straight. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Behind leaders. Forced to switch out for a run upon straightening. Found nothing.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled closing stages.
Midfield on outside. Good effort from Rock. Kept on well in straight.
Well there to Rock. Dropped away from 600 M.
Towards rear. Good headway from Rock. Widest turning in. Ran on to hold every chance but found winner too strong.
Always last few.
Midfield on rails. Kept on behind leaders in straight.
Just better than midfield. Hampered 600 M out. No further impression.
Waited with. Finished well down centre of straight to take charge closing stages.
Jumped outward. Never seen with a chance.
Broke well. Prominent but wide. Came under pressure home bend. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Prominent till giving ground from approaching home bend.
Chased leader to straight. Faded gradually.
Never better than midfield. Weakened in straight.
Towards rear early. Midfield but wide far side. No further impression final 500 M.
Never nearer.
Midfield briefly.
Prominent. Moderate headway passing Rock. One-paced in straight.
Midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily.
Attempted to make all. Caught near finish.
Towards rear. Commenced run home bend. Switched outward for a run entering straight. Ran on while shifting ground to assert authority close home.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Always well back.
Dwelt at start and slowest away, settled in rear on rails 5Ls off pace, under paced under pressure final 500 M, made little impression.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off pace, 4-wide 700 M out, under strong pressure 500 M out, practically no response.
Away well and soon led on inside rail, under pressure 500 M out and ceded advantage on home turn, fell away very quickly.
Held up in rear 6Ls off pace, raced in snatches down back straight, still in rear and on inside turning in, moderate late headway final 300 M.
Sat 3.5Ls off early pace on inside, crept a little closer turning in, stayed on at one pace on inside up straight.
Raced at SINCERE AND FAITH's quarters in 2nd racing 2-wide, hit front entering straight, overtaken by winner (BOBO DUCK) 180 M out, kept trying but to no avail.
Close up racing 2-wide in 5th early on about 1.5Ls off pace, niggled to quicken up 500 M out, not match pace of first two home in straight.
Sent on to race a bit keen and 3-wide in 3rd but without cover early on, felt the pinch 600 M out and quickly weakened right away.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off early speed still travelling but 5-wide entering straight, not come on and flattened out quickly.
Raced 2-wide and 3-wide 3.5Ls off lead, travelled well entering straight, found little off the bridle.
Away well, had the run of the race in 4th on the fence, 1.5Ls off pace, quickened up off home turn to assume lead 180 M from line, always looked in control final 100 M.
Raced 2-wide off early pace 5Ls off pace early on, ridden to take closer order around home turn, no impression.
Around midfield or worse. Made the first turn awkwardly. Ran on steadily in straight.
Left the gates very awkwardly and then bumped with another runner. 4-wide making the first turn before took up running around 900 M. Headed at 350 M and then dropped out gradually.
Mainly midfield. Kept on same pace to the line.
Worse than midfield. Dropped towards the rear rounding the home bend. Made steady ground after cleared 200 M out.
Well there, tracking the winner. Ran on in straight but found the winner too strong.
Taken back towards rear from difficult barrier. Unable to obtain running between runners after the 200 M and was not ridden out.
Broke well and always prominent. Quickened to take charge 300 M out. Kicked away and won unchallenged.
Midfield without cover. 4-wide around home turn and into straight. One-paced to the line.
Led briefly before settling in touch at 900 M. One-paced in straight, weakened steadily final stages.
Slow to begin and soon at back 4-wide without cover. Proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Moved closer when wide rounding the home turn. Kept on in straight.
Well there early. Midfield from 900 M. Made no show in straight.

Missed the start slightly, inconvenienced and was at back. Taken wide on home bend and awkward on heels early straight. One-paced in straight when hung out and proved difficult to ride out. Ran on past beaten runners close home.
Pushed along early to take up position behind leader. Asked for effort 500 M out, responded inside 200 M to take charge 100 M out.
Settled midfield or slightly behind on fence. Under pressure from 500 M. Kept on same pace in the straight.
3-wide without cover in midfield. 5-wide towards rear into straight, failed to quicken.

Waited with towards rear on rail, inclined to pull in early stages and was awkward on heels. Crept close rounding home bend, switched out before straightening and ran on final 1200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon at tail. Under pressure from 700 M, found little, only ran past tiring runners closing stages.
Towards rear with cover 2-wide. Under pressure from 500 M but only kept on one pace to the line.
Niggled along early to dispute lead. Held soft lead from 1900 M, hung out rounding home turn and in the straight. Headed 100 M out, kept on quite well.
2-wide in mid-division or better. Closer order home turn to be outside leader turning in. Kept on fairly when inconvenienced in the run to the winning post.
Brief lead 3-wide early, then behind leader 2-wide without cover from 1700 M. Lost position when run ended at 400 M, gave further ground in home straight.

Pushed forward early, then settled 3Ls off pace forward of midfield. Stuck rail at 1300 M, steadily dropped behind midfield at 600 M, then made the home turn awkwardly and hung out. Made steady headway final 150 M.
Slow out, reluctant to stretch out early stages and was at rear without cover. Improved a bit out wide near 800 M. Never on terms.
Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Missed the start badly, remained at rear early. Made ground from 1400 M to be midfield 1000 M. Ran on from 6th early straight to miss narrowly.
Among front runners until failing to hold place when 3rd final turn. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Pushed along to be prominent. Dropped to midfield far side. Towards rear passing 600 M. No progress. (Hung out throughout.)
Behind midfield throughout.
Behind midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 3rd early straight. Ran on but just failed to catch the winner.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Unable to quicken in straight.
Midfield early. Ridden to the front 1400 M. Led or shared lead far side until headed early straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages. (Hung out throughout.)
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Prominent from a wide draw. Midfield rounding home bend and soon dropped out.
Midfield. Made some progress home bend to be 5th final turn. Kept on until weakening 200 M.
Better than midfield. Pushed along to be prominent stable bend. Reached lead home turn, gaining advantage 250 M. Just held on.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made moderate progress 200 M.
Left awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Ridden early. Prominent far side. Among leaders turning in. Found nothing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to straight. Jostled turning in and dropped out.
Midfield. Made modest progress in straight without threatening.
Well back. Produced late impression closing stages.
Just better than midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Well back. Effort early in straight but one-paced closing stages.
Well back. Made swift headway on rails to be better than midfield into straight. Moved up to take charge inside 200 M to win unchallenged.
Ridden and led to 300 M, then one-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight then weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped to rear into straight. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped slowly and travelled in last few. Steadied approaching home bend. Effort turning for home and ran on quite well without threatening winner.
Jumped well. Better than midfield to straight. One-paced.
Towards rear before progressing to 8th passing 1200 M. Remained in similar position until responding well inside 200 M. Jockey failed to ride out near finish.
Never able to feature.
Midfield or better. Ran on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Bounded in the air at start. Soon eased out of the race. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon prominent. 2nd rounding home bend. Failed to hold place final 200 M.
Led early stages. Held 2nd or 3rd on the rail until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
In touch. Sustained effort in straight to take control inside 150 M. Held on well.
Ridden to the front from widest draw and led field from 1000 M. Found no extra when headed 150 M.
Midfield to 300 M. Weakened.
Settled towards rear. Made progress from outside in straight but unable to reach the winner.
Mostly 5th. Ran on quite well final 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on from outside final 200 M.
Slow into stride, towards rear. Lack of galloping room and steadied twice when making progress in straight. Stayed on.
Always thereabouts.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Well back into straight. Not much room but kept on strongly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. Kept on in straight.
Made all.
Well back. Ran on steadily under pressure down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced keenly around midfield. Dropped out upon straightening. (Bled.)
Wide in midfield. Faded passing 200 M.
Rear. Headway on outside around home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without threatening.
Never nearer.
Midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Worse than midfield. Weakened steadily after straightening.
Broke well, ridden along to be in midfield or better. Wide in back straight. Under pressure from 500 M. No extra in straight.
Tardy start and soon at back. Wide rounding the home bend. Never in contention.
Outpaced early, soon at back. Last into straight, ran past a few beaten runners closing stages.
Led or disputed lead in trio. Always 3-wide. Kept on well in straight until caught by the winner final stages.
Well there early, then settled behind leaders. Ran on in straight without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly, mainly at midfield. Wide over the back straight and rounding the home bend. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Soon at back. Never a factor.

Jumped fairly, soon pushed along to go forward along the rail. Joined the leaders before the home turn. Narrow advantage early straight. Fought on in a 3-horse battle until overtaken concluding stages.
Soon led or disputed lead in trio. Ran on well in straight to snatch victory final stages.
Soon midfield, always along the rail. Kept on in straight without a threat.
Taken back early from a wide gate to shift across behind runners to take up a position closer to the rail. Moved closer to midfield on the home bend. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced in snatches on rails and then 2-wide down back straight, asked to quicken up turning in, beaten 300 M out, finished one-paced.
Held up in midfield racing 2-wide, improved to sit 3.5Ls off pace in 6th 700 M out, ridden hands and heels entering straight and hit front 150 M out, just collared about 10 M from line.
Held up towards rear without cover racing 3-wide and about 7Ls off pace, 5Ls off pace 400 M out, non-threatening when forced to check 100 M, ran on again.
Settled in 3rd or 4th early on racing 2-wide 2Ls off pace, 4th, 2-wide and 2Ls off lead turning in, tried hard, but no extra final 200 M and dropped away.
Slowest away, second from rear and widest (5-wide) entering straight, made up good ground down centre of track though hung in 100 M out, nearest finish.
Bumped at start, held rails position in rear but 8Ls off pace, turned in still racing in rear, never passed a horse throughout.
Settled towards rear about 6Ls off pace through early stages, travelled well entering straight, not clear run until 150 M out though 3/4L down on REBEL LEADER, quickened up well to get up near line.
Took keen hold through early stages on rails, 2.5Ls and still on fence 400 M out, rallied until 200 M marker before dropping away.
Held up near rear upon exiting, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide until 600 M out, turned racing 4-wide, non-threatening when heavily checked 100 M out, eased down.
Raced keenly in 2nd 1200 M racing 3-wide, led 1100 M out and eased pace up on bend; overhauled 200 M out, faded 100 M out.
Raced prominently 3-wide early on, clear 2nd 800 M out 1.5Ls off pace, entered straight in 2nd place, hard ridden to briefly wrest lead 200 M out, not keep up final stages.
Placed in midfield racing 3-wide, improved position 900 M out to sit 2.5Ls off pace and 3-wide entering straight, stayed on quite well but never looked like winning in straight.
Led after 200 M before settling in 3rd on fence 1.5Ls off lead, hemmed in against rails behind front pair 300 M out, soon under pressure and faded out of contention very quickly.
Raced prominently before settling on fence 4Ls off speed, very one-paced at top of straight, no impression.
2-wide just behind midfield with cover. Into clear 300 M out, made ground steadily before shifting out approaching the winning post causing rider to put whip away. Just missed in 3-way photo.
Pushed along early to be prominent on fence, 2Ls off pace. Ran on under pressure final 200 M to prevail on the line.
Ridden along to take up position in front of midfield 3Ls off pace. Inconvenienced at 900 M. Kept on quite well until no extra final 100 M.
Behind midfield before dropping towards rear 1000 M out. 2nd last on straightening, ran past beaten runners concluding stages.
Settled in mid-division on rail. Commenced to give ground 200 M out.
Dropped to tail from difficult gate. Never in contention.
Niggled along early to dispute lead, tracked leader one off fence from 1100 M. Run ended inside final 150 M, gave ground steadily.
3-wide towards rear. 5-wide into straight. Short-lived effort near 300 M, soon one-paced.
Jumped awkwardly and checked, gradually recovered ground to be midfield and 4-wide without cover from 900 M. Ran on from 300 M until one-paced final 100 M.

Worked forward from widest gate to dispute lead. Clear advantage at 1200 M and shifted across to reach rail 1000 M out. Kept on but shifted out in run to line, rider stopped riding and changed whip hand. Caught final stride.
Best away, steadily dropped back towards rear of midfield, 4-wide. Ran on from 250 M down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
At rear throughout, never on terms.
3 or 4-wide without cover 3Ls off lead. Unable to keep up when pace quickened after straightening. Dropped out from 300 M.
Waited with near rear on fence. Switched away from fence at 600 M to prepare for run. Made moderate progress near 300 M, soon one-paced.
Held up 8Ls off early pace, crept closer round bend and travelled well but, like MOMENTUM, was blocked behind a wall of 4 horses from 350 M to 150 M out, one-paced final stages.
Sent on from gates to race in 2nd 2.5Ls off pace down back straight, every chance 400 M out, tried hard but one-paced final stages.
3rd early on, 3Ls off pace, hard ridden to lie up with pace turning in, no impression from 300 M out.
Drifted back upon exiting, settled 8Ls off pace, turned in racing 4-wide but stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Held up 6Ls off pace on inside, travelled well turning in on inside but blocked behind a wall of 4 horses between 350 M and 150 M markers, ran on but much too late.
Held up at least 10Ls off pace early on, similarly placed and hard ridden turning in, made up plenty of ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish, encouraging effort.
Settled on rails and in 4th, 4Ls off pace early on, crept closer at top of straight, short of room inside WINNING BOY 300 M out, not clear run until 200 M out, nearest finish.
Settled 8Ls off pace on fence, slightly closer turning in, rallied to get within 2Ls of leader 200 M out, no extra from thereafter.
Raced 2-wide 5 or 6Ls off pace until straight, quickened up well to TRILLION WIN's quarters 200 M out and every chance, stayed on well but not catch winner.
Settled in 4th and 5th early racing 2-wide 4 to 5Ls off pace, entered straight racing 3-wide and under pressure to keep up with pace, dropped out tamely.
Led after 200 M on inside, skipped 2.5Ls clear 1200 M out, slowed tempo down on bend but still 2Ls clear entering straight, quickened up again final 300 M to win all out.
Close up into straight where he dropped out of contention approaching 250 M.
Was 8th from 1000 M to home turn. Kept on steadily under strong pressure.
Slow into stride and was about 10th rounding home bend. Kept on final 250 M.
Made no show.
Always prominent. Held narrow advantage home bend and looked winner 200 M. Caught by winner final strides.
At back to straight where he made steady headway to finish.
In rear to straight where he made some late progress closing stages.
Always there. Kept on quite well closing stages despite not reaching first 2.
Worse than midfield into straight where he ran on strongly final 200 M to snatch race towards finish.
Midfield halfway, and similar position early in straight. Ridden 300 M and ran on quite well until steadied 100 M.
In rear to straight where he made up considerable ground.
Mostly 5th or 6th to straight where he kept on steadily from the 300 M.
Was prominent before fading rapidly on straightening.
Never far off to straight. Was 2nd 300 M before finding only one-pace near finish.
Slowly away, never in contention. (Bled.)
Led early, remained in prominent position until fading out of contention soon after straightening. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Improved rounding home bend to be 5th turning in. Unable to quicken.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made ground after turning in until run ended closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend. (Bled.)
Pushed along from a wide draw to take lead 1000 M. Held 3Ls advantage on inner early straight. Found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Midfield or behind. Ran on well inside 300 M to grab lead close home.
Jumped well and was in the front early. Remained 4th before dropping to midfield final turn. Ran on well along rail to gain slender advantage 150 M out. Headed close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly better than midfield. Made progress home turn to be 2nd early straight. Held on while hanging in but unable to hold place closing stages.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Hung out home turn and was last early straight. Ran past a few beaten horses 200 M out.
Better than midfield. Steadied on straightening. Made ground from 400 M to challenge inside 100 M. Was beaten narrowly at finish.
Began awkwardly, soon in last. Made up good ground final 400 M, never nearer.
Never a factor.
Prominent and 3 or 4 wide. One-paced upon straightening.
Attempted to make all. Caught final strides.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Midfield 3 or 4 wide. Effort rounding home bend but soon weakened in straight.
Always in last few.
Midfield. Made some headway under reminders home bend. No more to give closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Disputed lead home bend. One and half length off the pace turning in. Fought on doggedly to claim narrow victory short of line.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
In last few. Dropped to tail-end before straight.
Broke well. Travelled better than midfield before gave ground rounding home bend.
Well back. Given strong reminders turning in. Ran on strongly to just fail to get up on line.
Towards rear behind midfield. Made up a lot of ground in centre of straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than mid-division.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground at start. Never a factor.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent to 250 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Made no show 300 M.
Near the front to half-way. Kept on but found no extra closing stages.
Soon prominent. Led field 400 M and never threatened.
In touch. Took 3rd briefly 300 M. Unable to quicken.
Midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Rear. Ran on quite well 350 M to take 2nd closing stages.
Never far off. Gained 2nd briefly 100 M. Kept on.
Slowly away, remained at rear until making up good ground inside 200 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Mostly in midfield.
Broke well then held up towards rear. Finished well down straight to claim 3rd close home.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage home bend. Won readily.
Soon tailed-off.
Did not jump well. Always well back.
In similar position throughout.
Led far side. Narrowly headed by winner home bend. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Well in rear. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Just better than midfield to straight. No extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. Steadied slightly approaching home turn. Soon found no extra in straight.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Never better than midfield. Kept on under pressure closing stages.
Towards the rear. Wide into straight. Made up good ground after clear 300 M out but was outsprinted by the quinella pair.
Jumped awkwardly and soon last. Blundered at 700 M. Made up some ground from 250 M, no extra near finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Difficult to settle early. Well there until straightening. Gave ground steadily 400 M out.
Better than midfield. Made steady progress running into the straight and took lead out about the 300 M. Kept on well to the line but caught by the winner closing stages.
Soon disputed lead. Threw head about and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Dropped out after straightening.
Broke well from widest gate, soon settled towards the rear. Wide most of the way. Found nothing in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, then towards rear along the rail. Made up steady ground in straight. One-paced close home.
Slowly away and soon behind midfield. Lost position when making the home turn. 2nd last into straight. Made steady ground through runners final 200 M. (Saddle shifted back in middle stages.)
Settled around midfield. 5-wide rounding the home bend. One-paced in straight.
Soon led or disputed lead. Headed after straightening and weakened steadily from 250 M.
Restrained in midfield. Taken into clear 300 M out. Ran on strongly to score closing stages despite shifted ground on a number of occasions.
Niggled in rear of midfield from difficult gate. Steady progress from 1200 M to join leaders 4-wide at 700 M. Every chance early in straight before dropping out from 300 M.
Jumped cleanly. Mainly midfield. Short-lived effort near 200 M, soon one-paced.
Well there until straightening. Unable to quicken and weakened from the 250 M.
Drifted back, tagged onto field again to race 2-wide about 5 or 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, off bridle 600 M out but responded to pressure, blocked for a run 300 M, ran on strongly final 200 M.
Sent on to settle in 6th place about 4Ls off early pace racing 2-wide, improved on bend to race 3-wide 2Ls off lead, battled on gamely in straight though a bit one-paced.
Enjoyed the run of the race in 3rd 2Ls off pace and on fence until 600 M out, short of room from 400 M to 200 M, ran on well final 200 M but no chance of catching winner.
Held up towards rear, held rails 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, travelled well on straightening, very short of room on inside rail in straight, gab appeared much too late.
Sent on to duel with EXPLOSIVE POWER for the lead racing 2-wide, under heavy pressure but still in 2nd place 300 M out, dropped out very quickly thereafter.
Not break well but held up to settle a long way off pace in rear, 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, moderate level of improvement in straight, never nearer.
Raced 2-wide early on in midfield before slipping onto rails 3Ls off pace 800 M out, hard ridden entering straight, short of room 350 M out but not come on final stages when clear. (Lame.)
Settled in 3rd last place 7Ls off speed, slight improvement on bend racing 3 and 4-wide, found nothing in home straight.
Away well and sent on to lead on rails, was hassled for the lead by ZABETTE throughout, overhauled by winner 250 M out but stuck on resolutely, albeit a little one-paced, for 3rd.
Never better than 2 or 3-wide or closer than 4Ls to lead, brief effort turning in out wide but no chance after 350 M out.
Broke awkwardly and lost about 3Ls at start, travelled well settling 6 to 7Ls off pace on rails until straight, got a split between horses 250 M out to smoothly grab lead, driven out.
Raced 2-wide in 4th 2Ls off lead, under pressure turning in though still in contention turning in, soon very laboured and finished in own time.
Raced 3-wide about 5Ls off early pace, forced quite wide turning in, not really threaten final 300 M, one-paced.
Ridden on exiting and 8Ls off early speed, improved from 1200 M out racing 4-wide to get within 1L of lead turning in but under heavy pressure, faded from 300 M out.
Never far off 3-wide with cover, one-paced in the straight.
Towards rear before running on steadily inside final 200 M.
Slow to begin, soon trailed the field. Switched wide on straightening and ran on well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Jumped cleanly but outpaced on rails in better than midfield, despite niggled along early. Ran on well through narrow run inside 200 M to take race near the line.
Prominent early out wide from difficult draw. 4-wide 2Ls off pace from 1000 M. Kept on one-paced to the line.
Slow away, at rear on fence. 3-wide into straight. Brief effort near 300 M, soon one-paced.
Over-racing in middle of leading trio. Gave ground steadily from 200 M.
Midfield towards inner. Dropped back a bit on straightening. Recovered a little ground final 200 M. (Bled.)
Pushed along to be 2Ls behind lead in handy position. Tired closing stages.
Steadily dropped to rear from difficult gate. 4-wide entering straight, unable to quicken, weakened inside 150 M.
Disputed lead 3-wide. Quickened to hold clear advantage 200 M out, just pipped the winner final strides.
Shared lead on rail. Commenced to give ground from 200 M, was checked when crowded 100 M out.
Prominent to 600 M. Dropped back steadily to midfield. No progress.
Jumped awkwardly and never a threat.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield. One-paced.
Made no show.
In touch. Held 3rd from course proper. No threat to the first 2.
Not far off until dropping back to midfield 200 M. Faded.
In touch early. Dropped back steadily from course proper.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Raced greenly and hung out without improvement.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Shared lead from 400 M. Kicked clear passing 200 M. Won well.
Tardy start, around midfield. Raced ungenerously middle stages while in 5th position. No extra closing stages.
Better than midfield. Remained in similar position throughout.
Among front runners. Shared lead from 400 M. Unable to match speed with the winner when headed inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Weakened passing 200 M.
Missed the start slightly but quickly ridden to the front. Settled outside leader home bend but kicked 1L clear early in straight. Overhauled over 100 M out.
Prominent 3-wide till dropped out into straight.
Well there early. Narrow leader home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Broke well and raced keenly prominently. Wide when drifted back to midfield far side. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Well back. Obtained run shortly after straightening and produced good late finish closing stages.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Missed the start slightly but soon recovered to midfield. No clear passage on rails early in straight. (See Racing incidents.)
Towards rear into straight. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Found no extra closing stages.
Held up behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well to lead over 100 M out. Won readily.
Towards rear. Made ground home turn to be midfield 200 M. Ran on.
Rear. 2nd last to straight. Ran on a bit 200 M out.
Well there from a difficult gate. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Slowly away, rear to straight. Made up good ground from outside to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no show inside 250 M.
Midfield. Progressed to 4th 400 M. Unable to quicken inside 200 M.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader early straight. Unable quicken to challenge closing stages.
Towards rear. Under pressure early straight. Responded well to take lead passing 150 M. Held on.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on early straight until finding no extra closing stages.
Soon led. Held 1-1/2Ls advantage turning in. Kept on until one-paced when headed passing 200 M.
Prominent. Hung in badly early and middle stages. Faded soon after straightening.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield throughout. Rider concerned action and not ridden out in straight.
Towards rear. Produced some late impression under pressure closing stages.
Never nearer.
Virtually made all.
Behind midfield. Improving when drifting ground early in straight. Kept on.
Well there to 200 M.
Never in contention.
Around midfield. Badly checked over 300 M out.
Settled just better than midfield. Ran on to just get up on line.
Towards rear. Kept on early in straight.
Prominent in 4th to 300 M. Faded.
Never better than midfield.
Always thereabouts.
Around midfield. Tightened over 300 M out. Fought on doggedly.
Always well back.
Jumped fairly, pushed to lead. Headed after 200 M, steadily weakened.
Settled worse than midfield. Made up good ground after clear 300 M out to be nearest at finish.
Wide and at back early. Eased to the inside after 1200 M. Short-lived effort early straight but then no extra.
Soon sat outside leader. Kept on until no extra final 100 M.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out thereafter.
Better than midfield. Not in contention from 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly, soon recovered to be in midfield. One paced after straightening, further tired final 100 M.
Missed the start, then inconvenienced and at back. Taken to the outside after straightening to make up good ground to be closest at finish.
Soon settled at back. Steadied and shifted in to find running about the 300 M, made some late impression.
Broke best, prominent. Asked to go after straightening, took narrow lead at 150 M and fought on courageously to defy challengers final stages to win narrowly.
Slow to begin, mainly behind midfield. Not a factor from 300 M.
Caught wide early and middle stages in midfield. Ran on well until not quickened final 100 M.
Better than midfield but wide. Weakened from 300 M.
In touch. Saved ground along the rail making the home bend. Ran on well in straight to miss it narrowly in a 4-way finish.
Stood in stalls and very slowly away, never any better than 6Ls off pace, became further detached in straight.
Held up near rear racing 2 or 3-wide and 7Ls off pace, pushed 500 M out to lie up, responded to hard riding to stay on through beaten rivals final 200 M.
Always prominent in 2nd or 3rd racing 2-wide, travelled well entering straight and led 350 M out, overhauled by winner 200 M out, stayed on.
Raced kindly on inside in 4th early on, travelled well turning in, no extra from 300 M out.
Very keen early on and raced about 8Ls off pace, not find much in straight.
Hugged rail throughout advancing from 7Ls down to 4 down turning in, not pose much threat in straight, running on late to be nearest finish.
Soon led by 2.5Ls but passed turning into straight, dropped away very quickly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke exceptionally fast but soon restrained to settle in 4th or 5th 2 to 3Ls off pace racing 2-wide. Led 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide in rear 9 or 10Ls off pace, not come on around bend and well beaten a long way out.
Held up worse than midfield early, sat 2 and 3-wide 6Ls off pace 800 M out, 5Ls down 400 M but responded to strong riding in straight snatch 3rd on line.
Raced 2-wide 5 or 6Ls off pace until straight, never landed a blow in final stages.
Prominent early before settling in midfield to race 2-wide, 3Ls off pace 600 M out, hard ridden entering straight, found nothing.
Led from gates before settling in 2nd on rails, led entering straight but passed 350 M out and one-paced to line.
Managed to get onto fence 1200 M out to sit in 5th or 6th, 3Ls off pace turning in, not reach front two and just caught for 3rd on line.
3-wide leading out of home straight, shifted across to be on rail at 1200 M, maintaining 1L advantage. Headed before straightening, dropped out from 300 M.
3-wide without cover in touch, 3Ls off pace. Moved closer from 1100 M to be 1.5Ls behind lead. Hit the front turning in, just collared by quinella pair near home.
Tracked leader to 300 M. Commenced to give ground from 200 M.
Shifted out abruptly on exit, bumped another runner and was checked. Held up at tail, ran on steadily from 200 M to be nearest at finish and was inconvenienced near the line.
Settled towards rear. Ran on with winner from 300 M. Just failed to prevail in tight finish.
Waited with near rear. Made very moderate late ground.
Midfield before making up some moderate headway near 200 M, one-paced final bit.
Began awkwardly and unbalanced rider, held up at rear. Kept finding when put under pressure 300 M out to get up closing stages despite drifting out.
Prominent 3rd or 4th on fence. Ran on from 300 M to look a threat until no extra and overhauled by placegetters concluding stages.
At rear throughout, never on terms.
Midfield throughout, kept on same pace in straight, tired closing stages.
Held up towards rear 6Ls off pace, turned in racing 5 wide, never threatened but nearest finish.
Settled in midfield on fence about 3Ls off pace, stuck on quite well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon led out wide, passed by winner at top of straight, dropped away quickly.
Not break well and held up towards rear, under pressure 600 M out, no impression.
Raced 3-wide in 5th place early on, went 3rd 800 M out 1.5Ls off pace, stayed on gamely in straight to hang on for 3rd.
Settled on inside about 5Ls off pace early on, forced to switch wider in straight to challenge, nearest finish.
Always amongst back four runners, 7Ls off pace early on, never competitive in straight though a bit short of room 200 M out.
Settled in 5th early on just 2.5Ls off speed, outpaced at top of straight but stayed on quite well, nonetheless.
Always travelled well in 2nd at leader's quarters before taking up running entering straight, 2.5Ls clear 300 M out, ridden out to line.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off pace early on, turned in racing 5-wide, found nothing.
Slowest into stride, held up 5Ls off pace and 2-wide early on, not reach principals in straight.
Raced keenly on rails in 4th 2Ls off early pace, 2.5Ls down and challenging for 2nd 200 M out, not come on.
Held 4Ls off speed racing 2-wide early on, under pressure round home turn, stayed on under strong riding in straight.
Held up in rear 7 or 8Ls off pace and 2-wide until straight, finished very strongly final 200 M, nearest finish.
Forced to race without cover 3 and 4-wide through early stages about 3Ls off pace, brief effort at top of straight, beaten 300 M out.
Raced in lead or in 2nd on inside, led 500 M out, shaken up to stay on well final 200 M, all out, just denied on line.
Very keen early on though prominent in 4th racing 2-wide 2Ls off pace, every chance 200 M out, stayed on at same pace to line.
Always amongst trailing 3 runners and never closer than 6 or 7Ls to pace, became further detached in straight.
Travelled well racing 2-wide and 3Ls off pace, staying and with a chance 200 M out just 1L off leader, not match pace of front pair but still stayed on well.
Always in rear 8Ls off pace and on fence until straight, moderate late headway through beaten horses.
Held up 5Ls off pace early on racing 2-wide, 2Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well to lead on line.
Raced 2 and 3-wide early on about 4Ls off pace, not lengthen immediately in straight, nearest finish.
Keen early on racing 2 and 3-wide 4Ls off pace, under pressure turning in, one-paced to line.
Settled on inside 3Ls off early pace, 2Ls down and two off the rail 200 M out, no extra.
Settled in 2nd last place about 6Ls off pace early on, turned in racing widest off all, stayed on well under pressure to be nearest finish.
Well placed in 3rd or 4th along fence just 2Ls off pace, not quicken at top of straight and one-paced final 200 M.
Sat 3-wide 2Ls off early pace in fifth, dropped back a couple of places on bend, never recovered but lost no more ground in straight.
Led, racing keenly early on, passed by FERRULE 400 M out, stayed in touch and still in with a chance 200 M just 1L off pace, dropped away quickly.
Midfield to straight where he ran on strongly final 200 M to lead close home.
Mostly in last to straight. Ran on quite well closing stages despite not reaching first 2.
Towards rear till running on a bit from the 300 M.
Settled in rear to straight where he made up considerable ground inside final 200 M.
Lost considerable ground at start. Never better than mid-division.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Worse than midfield into straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Never far off to straight. Kept on same pace to 200 M where he failed to hold place.
Soon in touch and remained there to straight. Held every chance 250 M before finding no extra towards finish.
Never on terms.
Ridden early to be in touch and was not far off rounding home bend. Found little when asked turning into straight.
Always well there. Quickened to lead 150 M but unable to resist winner near finish.
5th or 6th into straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Prominent to 150 M where he dropped out steadily.
Made all. Held on well to win unchallenged.
Mainly 2nd or 3rd. Kept on without threatening.
Always thereabout. Unable quicken to challenge closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made up a little ground inside 200 M.
Mainly 2nd or 3rd. Kept on but lost 3rd close home.
Slowly away, was last until passing a few beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear. Slightly improved from 700 M to be just behind midfield turning in. Continued to make ground in straight to snatch 3rd near finish.
Midfield. Awkwardly placed home turn. Faded.
Never a factor.
Midfield to 200 M. Dropped back steadily. (Bled.)
Behind midfield. Made progress home turn to be 4th early straight. Found no extra final 100 M.
Mainly behind midfield.
Held up behind leaders. No extra soon after straightening.
Missed the start badly. Never in contention.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Ridden to muster pace early. Settled outside leader. Came to challenge and hold some chance early in straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Always prominent. Ran on well to miss narrowly.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well down centre in straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Never in contention.
Around midfield. Came under pressure halfway out. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made all. Drifted outward early in straight but just held off strong late challenges.
Never far off. Kept on same pace in straight. Steadied at about 200 M.
Well back with some late impression closing stages.
Prominent 4-wide early. Drifted back to midfield far side. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made steady progress from stable bend to be 3rd 800 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Better than midfield. Slightly inconvenienced near 500 M. Switched out when progressed to 4th 400 M. Ran on steadily to assert authority closing stages.
Led field from 1400 M to 200 M. Kept on but was steadied near finish.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield far side. Weakened in straight.
In touch early. Dropped back gradually to the rear far side. Widest turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader turning in, gaining upper hand 200 M. Outstayed by the winner closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Began awkwardly, rear to 400 M. Made some progress turning into straight. One-paced. (Dropped rein near 200 M.)
Pushed along from widest draw to be 3rd near 1200 M. Hung in badly 600 M and raced ungenerously 500 M, losing ground to be in the rear group final turn. Never able to recover.
Jumped awkwardly, behind midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on same pace to the line.
Mostly behind midfield. Checked at 500 M. No significant progress thereafter.
Bounded in the air at start, losing considerable ground. Towards rear before recovering some ground far side. Made no show in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Behind midfield. Behind runners upon straightening. Kept on.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Given reminders round home bend. Finished off race well to be nearest at line.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to hold every chance closing stages but the line came too soon.
Prominent to straight. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear into straight. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Led to 200 M then weakened.
Never better than midfield.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Settled at the back before making swift progress on rails up Rock. Fought on doggedly from prominent position into straight to hit front close home.
Well back. Finished strongly down centre of straight late.
Sped across field from an outside draw to lead before making the first turn. 2Ls clear entering the straight. Kept on to the line.
Broke well, soon at back. Asked to accelerate upon straightening along the rail. Hung in on home turn and in straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Soon at back. Widest into straight. Unable to feature.

Niggled a bit to go forward but caught wide making the stable bend. Continued to travel wide along the back straight and improved to 2nd before the home bend. Kept on early in straight but weakened steadily from 250 M.
Worse than midfield, steadied 1st turn. Under pressure from 400 M to improve steadily. Taken to the outside after straightening and ran on well to the line, nearest finish.
Midfield, 4-wide on 1st turn. Crept closer from 800 M. One-paced in straight.
Soon tracked leader. Wide without cover early and middle stages. Dropped out quickly passing Rock, eased down in straight.
About midfield. Commenced to hang out badly in the middle stages. Towards rear on straightening. Became unbalanced and dipped in the straight and was eased up.
Ridden along early to maintain prominent position on rail. Always well there under pressure rounding the home bend to improve to 2nd before straightening. Kept on until no extra concluding stages.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight until close home.
Jumped awkwardly and then inconvenienced. Soon recovered to be behind midfield on fence. Made up a little late ground.
Well there until beginning to give ground steadily at 600 M. Dropped out further in the straight.
Raced 5-wide passing stands first time, 4-wide 900 M out and 5Ls off pace, two from rear and 3-wide turning in, not come on.

Ridden to lead passing stands first time racing 2-wide, remained 2-wide throughout and never more than a length in front, stayed on well under pressure in straight, caught on line.
Slowly into stride and 10Ls behind leader after just 200 M, tacked on to be 6Ls off pace 900 M out, never threatened final stages, only running on through beaten horses.
Advanced to 3rd place 1200 M out 1.5Ls off lead and 3-wide, ridden entering straight but 2nd 200 M out, just 3/4L down, no extra final 200 M.
