Settled in midfield and raced 3-wide and 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2.5Ls off pace turning in and 2Ls down 200 M out, ran on well without managing to put head in front.
Held rails in 2nd place throughout bulk of race and kept up pace to prevent FRENCH CONNECTION getting to inside, under pressure on straightening, weakened and beaten 200 M out.
Sat 2-wide and 3Ls off pace until home turn when travelling well, 1L down and every chance 250 M out, no extra final 200 M, beaten when slightly impeded 100 M out.
Raced 2-wide in midfield 4Ls off pace until 600 M out, crept closer to sit 2.5Ls off pace on straightening, stayed on well in straight, nearest finish.
Without cover throughout racing 3 and 4-wide, under pressure turning in, emptied out very quickly.
Behind leaders on fence. Dropped out from 150 M.
Began awkwardly, settled 2nd last on fence. Switched out near 900 M and made swift progress 5-wide to dispute lead at Rock. Every chance inside 200 M, no answer to winner closing stages.
Held up at tail on fence. Made some headway final 200 M passing tired runners.
Held up in rear. Made gradual ground final 200 M.
3-wide without cover rear of midfield. Moved closer near 800 M, under pressure from 500 M when dropping back to midfield, kept on one-paced in straight.
Pushed along from widest gate to travel 2-wide 2-1/2Ls off lead into first turn. Progressed to 1L behind leaders near 700 M. Loomed up to threaten leaders final 200 M, no extra near home.
Midfield with cover. Steadied near 400 M and dropped to 2nd last entering straight. Recovered ground steadily final 150 M down centre of track.
Behind midfield or worse on rail. Became unbalanced near 1200 M and again on straightening where it struck rail. One-paced in straight.
Soon set pace, joined at 700 M. Kept on well in straight until out-stayed by quinella pair concluding stages.
Travelled outside leader's hindquarters turning out of home straight. Dropped out from 450 M.
Settled on rails better than midfield 3Ls off pace. Switched out for run rounding home bend, ran on steadily final 200 M to assert authority close home.
3-wide at rear. 5-wide into home straight. Made steady ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start, 5Ls off pace 1200 M and on fence, travelled well and 3Ls off pace entering straight, ran on well in straight to be nearest finish.
Not break well, held two from rear racing 2-wide 6Ls off speed, improved to settle 3Ls down turning in, one-paced final 300 M.
Handily placed racing 2-wide in 5th place 2.5Ls off pace, improved to challenge turning in and just a neck down on CHOCOLATE TYCOON 200 M out, stayed on well to line.
Ridden to lead on inside after 200 M raced, 2nd 1200 M out on leader's quarters, under pressure 600 M out and passed 500 M out, weakened right out.
Settled 4Ls off lead racing 2-wide until bend when improved to sit 2.5Ls off pace racing 3-wide, outpaced by principals by 200 M marker and no extra thereafter.
Ridden from gates to take up prominent position, sat 3-wide throughout in 5th or 6th place 3Ls off pace, labouring 500 M out, weakened and came home in own time. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up one rear 7Ls off pace, 5Ls off on straightening, ran on well to weave a way between beaten horses in straight, nearest finish.
Slowly away, raced in rear 8 to 10Ls off pace until home turn when 7Ls behind, no impression.
Held on inside in mid-division 3.5Ls off pace, raced in snatches from 600 M out to home straight, found nothing under strong pressure 300 M out, weakened away.
Always prominent in 2nd or 3rd racing 2-wide, challenged racing 3-wide entering straight and led 300 M out, all out but not fend off FLIGHT OF FANCY and passed 150 M.
Settled in 4th place on inside 1L off pace, similarly placed 400 M out but failed to quicken and dropped away tamely.
Sent on to race 4-wide round first bend past stands and take up lead 1200 M out on inside, never more than 1L clear, under pressure 400 M out, overhauled 300 M out, no extra.
Prominent. Weakened out of contention when 4th final turn. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield before dropping back from home bend.
Behind midfield. Made progress to 7th turning in. Continued to make ground until one-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. Unbalanced near 600 M, dropping to the rear group final turn. Made up a little ground in straight.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield far side. Given reminders early straight, kept on well to take 3rd 200 M.
Among the rear group throughout.
Better than midfield. Pushed along from 1400 M to share lead 1200 M, gained clear advantage rounding home bend. Stayed on well to win convincingly.
Rear. Slight progress rounding home bend. Ran on a bit 400 M but found no extra inside 200 M.
Prominent. Led field from first turn until joined 1200 M. Headed passing 1000 M. Kept on for 2nd but unable to fight back.
Tardy start, towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up some ground while hanging in final 400 M.
Always thereabout. Kept on without threatening in straight.
In touch until dropping back steadily from the home bend.
Towards rear. Was crowded on first turn. Progressed to midfield or better far side. Unable to quicken in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear early. Made swift progress to midfield on outside home bend. Quickened to hold every chance in straight but overhauled final stages.
Wide towards rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Rear till produced some late headway closing stages.
Virtually made all. Just held on.
Broke well. Held up in midfield. No extra in straight. (Bled.)
Close up far side. Dropped back to 4th or 5th home bend. Faded further in straight.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Sluggish at start. Remained rear to straight. Finished well down centre of straight.
Midfield. Commenced move around home bend. Behind leaders turning in. Ran on doggedly under pressure but unable to draw level.
Midfield. Not a factor while hanging out badly in straight.
At the back. Ran past a few tiring horses final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on strongly inside 250 M to catch the leader close home.
Always there. Kept on but just missed 3rd marginally near home.
Midfield. Advanced to 3rd passing 1000 M. Faded in straight. Wide without cover throughout.
Pace-maker. Held 5Ls advantage turning in. Held on well until headed close home.
Very slowly away, recovered some ground stable bend to be just behind midfield far side. Weakened inside 250 M.
Held 3rd. Became 4th rounding home bend. Stayed on.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well final 250 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Remained 2nd to 200 M. Unable to quicken.
Midfield. Settled towards rear far side. Ridden under pressure 400 M to gain 3rd narrowly at finish.
Well there. Gained slender advantage inside 200 M but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Just better than midfield to straight. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Wide in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Checked at start. Remained in last few till making good progress in straight.
Midfield far side. Effort around home bend. Ran on down straight to claim victory final strides.
Behind midfield. Dropped out home bend.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Jumped slowly. Never in contention.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Behind midfield. Made steady headway under pressure in straight.
Soon took up running and led until no extra final 200 M.
Soon took up a handy position. Loomed up to assume lead after straightening but unable to sustain effort final stages to miss a quinella placing narrowly.
Broke well, then travelled around midfield. Checked severely about the 500 M. Made up a little late ground.
Settled towards rear. Made up a little late ground.
Settled towards rear from a difficult gate. Wide into the straight, made up little ground closing stages.
Worse than midfield early. Moved closer to midfield rounding the home bend. Ran on in straight without threatening.
Soon led. Joined at 1000 M. Headed upon straightening and dropped out thereafter.
Well there until checked at 500 M when having difficulty to maintain its position. No extra in straight and dropped out from 300 M.
Tracked leader until disputed lead at 1000 M. Headed upon straightening. Kept on until weakened steadily passing 200 M.
Midfield or better. Went into clear after straightening and ran on well to the line for 2nd.
At back. Made up some ground in straight.
Niggled along early to maintain in midfield. Wide throughout. Unable to feature in straight.
Restrained to the tail of the field from a difficult gate. Inconvenienced at about 500 M. Obtained a clear run about 300 M and ran on well to be nearest at finish.

On jumping, bounded in the air and then niggled a bit to maintain in touch with midfield. Made steady progress from 1000 M but wide rounding the home bend. 3rd into the straight but found no extra 250 M out.
Dropped to the rear soon after start. Closer order rounding the home bend by saving ground along the rail. Ran on steadily in straight to take narrow lead final 50 M. Kept on.
Smartest away, steadily dropped towards midfield, 4-wide without cover. Dropped back further near 800 M but with cover. Made gradual ground from 200 M, no extra closing stages.
Dropped to tail from widest draw towards inside rail. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Well there briefly, settled around midfield. Made some headway near 300 M, soon one-paced.
Dropped steadily towards rear from difficult gate. 4-wide rounding home turn, ran on steadily from 250 M, no extra near home.
Towards rear on rail, difficult to settle early stages and became unbalanced near 900 M when very close to heels. Made no show in the straight.
3Ls off speed forward of midfield on rail. Kept on same pace before commencing to give ground from 250 M.
Began fairly, pushed along to share lead 2-wide at 1200 M. Clear advantage inside 200 M, held on well to defy challenger.
Sent to the front, joined at 1200 M. Unable to match strides with winner 200 M out, overhauled by placegetters when beginning to tire concluding stages.
Handy on rail, unbalanced on heels middle stages, dropped out from 300 M.
Behind midfield early, then made swift progress on outer from 900 M to be behind leaders at 700 M. Bumped at 500 M, unable to figure in the straight whilst hanging in.
Began awkwardly and was inconvenienced, at rear before moving up out wide near 1000 M to be midfield without cover rounding home turn. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Slow away, towards rear one off the fence. Hung out approaching and rounding home turn, failed to quicken in straight.
Up there briefly, then eased to take sit 1-1/2Ls behind leaders. Shifted out to go forward at 500 M and bumped another runner. Ran on steadily final 200 M, found winner too strong.
Restless in stalls, began satisfactorily but soon outpaced at the back. Under pressure from 500 M, never a factor.
Always at rear down centre of track.
Bounded in air and bumped another runner at start. Quickly recovered to be always on firing line. Stayed on strongly to gain upper hand closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Ran past a few beaten runners towards finish.
Reared and lost ground at start. Near rear throughout, never a factor.
Towards rear and hung in throughout. Never near enough to figure.
Began fairly and midfield early. Made move to challenge for lead 500 M out. No extra near finish after ding-dong battle with winner final 250 M.
Hampered at start, midfield with cover. Unable to quicken when into clear 400 M out.
Worked forward to make running. Joined at 500 M, headed at 400 M. Kept on until beginning to give ground steadily concluding stages.
Hampered on exiting, forward of midfield before making a little late headway close home.
Severely checked at start and squeezed out. Switched out and ridden along but unable to muster speed. Never seen with a chance.
Disputed lead until unable to keep up with quinella pair 300 M out, kept on one-paced to the line.
In front early. Commenced to drop out from the 600 M. (Bled.)
Restless in stalls. Slow to jump and well back. Did not quicken.
Kept close to early pace, pushed to find another gear 400 M out, one-paced and finished eased down.
Held up in midfield through early stages, improved to sit 2.5Ls off pace 400 M out, delivered telling run from just over 200 M to hit front over 50 M out, cleverly.
Held up one from rear early before tacking onto main group 3Ls off pace 400 M out, effort from 400 M marker but made little impact and became detached again from 200 M out.
Raced up with pace until 400 M out, not come on and backpedalled markedly final stages.

Not break well and last early on 6Ls off pace and furthest from the inside rail, stayed on well closing stages to 4.5Ls down 400 M out and 2.5Ls down 200 M out, nearest finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Took a while to get into race, niggled along from 800 M to 600 M to lie up, kept on well to be nearest finish.
Broke well and soon led by 1L until 400 M out when overhauled by SOLID CONTACT 350 M, weakened quickly thereafter and well beaten at line.
Always prominent racing close to fence, took up running 350 M out, very strong chance 200 M out, all out but grabbed by ALL THRILLS TOO about 50 M from line, game effort.
Always prominent 1.5Ls off pace in centre of track, every chance 200 M out, not come on.
Raced prominently on rail 1L off pace until 500 M out when niggled to keep effort going, swamped by rivals 350 M out, came home in own time as if something amiss. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced about 4Ls off pace throughout, made some headway through beaten horses inside final 200 M out but never looked like a landing blow.
Never more than 1.5Ls off pace and still well there 400 M out, failed to quicken again and dropped away tamely.
Away well and raced close to pace in 3rd early, part of a main group of 6 or 7 chances 400 M out, soon under pressure and found nothing.

Settled on inside 5Ls off pace, niggled along to maintain inside berth 100 M out, niggled again entering straight 2.5Ls off pace, not clear run 300 M out but gap soon appeared and quickly led, readily.
Held in rear or next to rear racing 3-wide, turning racing 5-wide and 5Ls off pace, raced down middle of track in stretch, no impression.
Slowest away, raced on inside and in rear bunch 7Ls off pace, travelled kindly until home stretch when clearly outpaced, eased down.
Away well, raced 2-wide in second until 400 M out, found nothing off bridle and beaten 300 M out.
Raced 3-wide 4.5Ls off pace through early stages, 5-wide turning into stretch, rather one-paced final 300 M.
Had run of race in 3rd on inside 2 to 2.5Ls off speed, sent on to grab lead from SUPER MOLLY 200 M out but collared by ELECTRONIC UNICORN just as quickly, stuck on gamely final 100 M.
Held up in rear racing 2-wide and 7Ls off pace, niggled to get closer 500 M out, 3.5Ls off pace turning in, went for along inside 300 M out but never posed any threat to principals.
Pulled early racing 2-wide in 4th, turned into straight racing three-quarters of a length off pace but 3-wide, not find much off bridle when they sprinted for line.
Settled about 5Ls off early pace racing 2-wide, niggled 700 M out to keep position, improved to sit 2.5Ls off pace turning in, not come on in straight.
Soon led on inside racing a bit keenly, never more than half a length clear and under strong pressure when passed 200 M out, stuck on well to keep 3rd spot. (See Racing Incidents.)
Worse than midfield early on racing 3-wide and 6Ls off pace, travelled well but wide on home turn, soon under pressure but responded all the way to line.
Raced 2-wide in 5th early 4Ls off pace, 3-wide and 2.5Ls off leader entering straight, stayed on gamely final stages.
Midfield into straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Prominent to 200 M where he could find no extra.
Towards rear before making up some good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never a factor.
Settled midfield to straight where he ran on strongly to lead close home, despite hanging in.
Soon improved towards leaders and was 2nd 900 M. Similar position early in straight but found no extra by 300 M.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Towards rear before improving rounding home bend. Did not sustain effort shortly on straightening.
About 6th or 7th into home bend. Found little when asked in straight.
Always prominent. Led field soon after start and went clear 200 M. Found winner too strong near finish.
Improved from midfield approaching home bend and was close up 3rd swinging into straight. Kept on till finding no extra close home.
Worse than midfield rounding home bend. Ran on a bit close home.
Never better than midfield.
Last into straight where he ran on quite well final 200 M.
Rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Soon led until joined final turn. Kept on well when headed 200 M out.
In touch. Over-raced and difficult to settle early stages. Weakened from 400 M.
Left awkwardly, losing ground. Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or slightly better. Improved to 3rd passing 500 M and was close up to leaders on straightening. Found no extra 200 M.
Prominent. Mostly sat outside leader until joining the lead final turn. Took clear advantage 200 M out. Held on well to the line.
Never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly and was soon pulled up.
Always there. Kept on without threatening the quinella pair.
Never better than midfield.
Never far off. 5th turning for home. One-paced.
Settled towards rear. Shifted to outside home turn. Made up good ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield when hampered and lost ground approaching home bend. Finished strongly down straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well. Held up just 2Ls off the lead. Kept on in straight before carried out inside 200 M. No extra.
Broke well. Settled behind leaders. Commenced run upon straightening and gained upper hand about 100 M out.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Raced wide from poor draw though never far off. Kept on at the one pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away but quickly recovered to midfield on rail. Came under pressure to challenge upon straightening but only one-paced.
Held up behind leaders. One-paced in straight.
Tailed-off most of way. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Disputed lead. Gained 1L break upon straightening but unable to sustain effort and caught close home.
Rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along amongst leaders before squeezed and checked 1200 M bend. Just behind midfield turning in but found no room and checked about 200 M out.
Wide behind midfield to straight. Never nearer.
Towards rear and was wide without cover. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made progress on inner to midfield turning in. Ran on well final 200 M to take 2nd close home.
In touch. Dropped back steadily passing 800 M.
Mostly midfield. One-paced.
Midfield. Improved far side to be 2nd 600 M. Kept on.
Tardy start. Never a factor.
Prominent from widest draw, was 2nd at 1000 M. Dropped back when steadied 500 M. Tailed off in straight.
Behind midfield. Slightly improved rounding home bend. Unable to quicken in straight.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up good ground 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Made progress far side to be 4th passing 600 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Soon led. Held on well to the line.
Always there. Made progress to 3rd 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Settled around midfield. Effort around home bend. Ran on steadily from 4th into straight to miss narrowly.
Mainly in midfield. Improved well down straight doing best work at finish despite tight between runners.
Just worse than midfield. Steadied for room turning in. No further impression in straight.
Sluggish at start. Always in rear.
Well there. Hit front under pressure inside final 200 M.
Made no show.
Soon took up running and led till no extra passing 200 M.
Last few to straight. Produced strong late finish closing stages.
Well there. Fought on to hold every chance closing stages.
Never better than midfield. No extra in straight.
Never far off. Swamped for placing closing stages.
Always last few. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Niggled along early to be prominent from 800 M. Steadily weakened upon straightening.
Jumped very awkwardly and lost a lot of ground at back. 2nd last into straight. Made up some late ground.
Niggled along to maintain a midfield position. Wide without cover early and middle stages. Inconvenienced near the 300 M and then found nothing afterwards.
Niggled along about midfield. Taken onto heels of another runner and became badly unbalanced upon straightening. Unable to recover thereafter.
Made all. Fought on well to defy challenger to claim victory by a narrow margin.
Soon tracked leader. Kept on well in straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Bounded in the air and soon towards the rear, racing greenly early. Made no show in straight.
Towards the rear. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Ridden along but dropped steadily to the rear. Never in contention.
Midfield or worse. Inconvenienced near the 500 M. Made steady progress through narrow run before straightening and bumped another runner, one-paced in straight.
About midfield. Crept a bit closer upon straightening when bumped with another, then one-paced to the line.
Well there. Kept on in straight without threatening the quinella pair.
Settled in 5th racing 2-wide and 3Ls off speed through first half of race, turned in travelling well racing 3-wide and 3Ls off pace, not really come on in straight.
Held up in rear on fence and 6 to 7Ls off pace, made little impression in straight.
Held up on rails 4 to 5Ls off pace, similarly positioned turning but travelling well, ran on fairly well in straight but no threat to principals.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off speed, driven 60 M out to lie up closer turned in widest of all into straight, no impression.
2-wide in 2nd 1L early on, then settled outside winner in 4th 2Ls off pace, struggling 500 M out and found nothing in stretch.
Raced 2-wide about 5Ls off speed, under pressure turning in, found nothing.
Raced 3-wide throughout, 4 off pace 100 M out, sent on out wide 700 M out to take closer order and 2Ls off pace entering straight, quickly backpedalled from 300 M out.
Had run of the race in 4th, on fence and 2Ls off pace, quickened up well off home turn to lead 300 M out, clear 200 M out, pushed out for smooth win.
Sat in 2nd place at leader HIN YUEN UNICORN's quarters until home stretch out when passed by BOBO DUCK, one-paced final stages and hung left final 100 M.
Between 3 and 4Ls of lead and on fence until 400 M out when took closer order, 4th 200 M out and 2.5Ls off pace, stayed on well but no chance with winner.
Dashed straight to lead passing stands for 1st time, under pressure turning in and grabbed by winner 300 M out, faded.
Slowest away, immediately darted across to rails to race 2-wide and 6Ls off pace, remained in same spot until turning in wide, finished off up centre of track, no impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
In mid-division, niggled along early. Brushed rail near 500 M and became unbalanced. When running on well from 200 M was steadied and shifted in 100 M out. Sustained effort to get up near the line.
Not far away before holding narrow advantage 2-wide near 600 M. Punched out upon straightening, holding every chance. Shifted out after 200 M, just collared by winner final strides.
Outpaced towards rear, 5Ls off pace. Made gradual ground from 150 M.
Pushed along but only managed midfield position. Made no impression in home straight.
Dropped to rear from widest gate. Came under pressure from 500 M, failed to quicken.
Led briefly out wide, then remain in touch until dropping out from the 200 M.
Worked forward to take up lead 4-wide near 900 M. Joined by inside runners at 700 M. Took breather near 600 M. Found no extra when under pressure from 400 M, gave ground from 150 M.
Bumped at start, dropped steadily to the rear on fence. Made some late headway.
Soon dropped to tail, racing 2-wide. Ran past a few beaten runners closing stages.
4-wide in midfield. Kept on same pace down centre of home straight.
Bumped at start, driven along to dispute lead from 700 M. Unable to keep up with the front runners inside final 100 M, one-paced.
Handy, 2-1/2Ls off lead. Brushed rail near 500 M and on straightening. Ran on steadily along rail from 200 M but lacked extra kick to catch the first pair concluding stages.
Sent on to contest lead early on before taking up running 1100 M out, hard ridden turning in and passed 300 M out, dropped away quickly. (Lame.)
Dropped in towards rear 7Ls off pace, 5Ls off and 3-wide 400 M out and straightened up wider again, stayed on fairly well final stages to be nearest finish.
Raced wide passing stands 1st time, always 3-wide and 6Ls off pace until well outpaced 600 M out, virtually tailed off on straightening, finished in own time.
Broke well but restrained from taking leaders on and raced keenly early on, sat 4Ls off pace on fence 800 M out and niggled 500 M out, well beaten on straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clear 3rd 2.5Ls off pace from start until home stretch when under pressure, found little off bridle and well beaten 200 M out.
On rails and 5Ls off lead until 900 M out when improved racing 3-wide until 2.5Ls off lead 400 M out, joined FRENCH CONNECTION in lead 200 M out, asserted final 100 M.
Raced 2 and 3-wide between 4 and 5Ls off pace until straight, minor place prospects 300 M out but weakened considerably final 100 M.
Never travelled well racing 2-wide and about 5Ls off pace throughout, not take home turn well, no threat in straight.
Sent on to lead passing stands, passed by HAPPY FOREVER 1100 M out and settled 1 to 2Ls off in 2nd, grabbed lead again 300 M out, joined by winner 200 M out, no extra final 100 M.
Raced 2-wide in 6th 4Ls off pace, improved position slightly on final bend, stayed on fairly well in straight but no chance with leading pair.
Held up in rear, 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, took closer order on final bend and 4Ls off pace 400 M out, stayed on well in straight to be nearest finish.
Always 7 to 8Ls off pace, still in rear when turned in very wide, finished off strongly down centre of track final 200 M to be nearest finish.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent briefly from the widest draw.
2nd last to early straight. Ran on strongly from outside though momentarily unbalancing 100 M out. Just got up on the line.
Better than midfield. Made gradual progress to become 2nd 650 M. Kept on until failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Last to straight. Never a factor.
Prominent to final turn and was hanging out. Dropped back steadily.
Midfield or slightly behind. Improved to 5th turning in. Ran on steadily to look like winner 100 M out. Was beaten narrowly near finish.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield rounding home bend. Continued to make ground to hold every chance passing 200 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Prominent along rail. Unable quicken to challenge from 250 M.
Led. Kept on when headed inside 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was in rear. Soon recovered ground to midfield. Checked 300 M while dropping out.
Midfield. Made moderate progress early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on despite inconvenienced the length of straight. (Finished 6th, placed 5th.)
Midfield to straight. Found nothing under pressure. (Bled.)
Slowly away. Towards rear. Not much room early in straight. Finished strongly to grab lead close home.
2 or 3 wide when led far side. Weakened home bend.
Hard ridden early. Improved to prominent position approaching home bend. Led into straight but overhauled over 250 M out.
Well back. No clear run early in straight. Ran on well.
Mostly wide in midfield to straight then faded.
Always in last few.
Midfield. Headway rounding home bend. Held every chance early in straight. Shifted out while kept on steadily. (Finished 5th, placed 6th.)
Wide throughout. Behind midfield far side. Short-lived effort home bend before no extra into straight.
Well back. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts. Hit front early in straight. Headed when no extra closing stages.
Well there to 400 M then weakened.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or behind. Held up for running early straight until 200 M. Made up good ground without reaching the winner.
Prominent. 4Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Was checked near 200 M when improving. Never able to recover.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to be midfield turning in. One-paced.
Sat outside leader from the widest draw. Took lead approaching 1000 M. Held on until finding no extra when headed 200 M.
In touch. Dropped back from final turn. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led field to approaching 1000 M. Held 2nd until weakening out of contention inside 300 M.
Midfield. Held for a run upon straightening. Unable to quicken in straight.
Forward field on the rail. Made gradual progress home bend to be 2Ls 3rd turning in. Kept on.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight. Never nearer.
Settled better than midfield. 4-wide 6th final turn. Ran on steadily to assert authority 200 M. Held on well.
Tardy start, towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Never in contention.
Prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Led till headed into straight, then gradually weakened.
Wide in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled wide in last few. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Disputed lead. Hit front briefly into straight before overhauled.
Well there to 250 M. Weakened.
Prominent. Jostled early in straight. Weakened 200 M out.
Midfield. Produced good impression closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on steadily on rails in straight.
Rear. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well to hit front over 200 M out. Hung on well.
Never in the hunt.
Well back to striaght. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Well there. Held every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside 200 M.
Broke well and soon led. Briefly headed after straightening. One-paced thereafter until weakened concluding stages.
Midfield and caught wide early, improved to 3rd before making the first turn. Made no show from 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, bumped the inside of its stall and almost dislodged its rider. Towards rear throughout.
About midfield. Over-racing and became unbalanced running to the first turn. Steadied and shifted out to avoid another runner just after straightening. Ran on well to the line.
In touch early, cruised along to sit outside leader passing 1000 M. Led briefly after straightening and kept on well to the line to defy 2nd runner late challenge.
Soon took up a handy position with cover. Ran on well in straight but found the winner too strong.

Restless and lunged forward. Gates opened slightly before the others but came out awkwardly. Well back. Steady improvement from 1000 M to be better than midfield but wide around the home bend. Failure to quicken in straight.
Midfield or worse. Made up little ground in straight.
Settled behind the midfield. Shifted to the outside before entering the straight. Ran on well to the line.
In touch until 300 M. Dropped out steadily thereafter. (Bled.)
Always midfield. One-paced in straight.
At the back. Tailed off from 800 M.
Raced keenly in lead and on fence until 500 M out, very one-paced in straight and back-pedalled right out of contention very quickly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled racing 2-wide and 4 to 5Ls off pace until stretch, quickly improved to challenge and grabbed lead 150 M out, ran on strongly.
Always 2-wide and 4 to 5Ls off pace until 500 M out when outpaced, ran on well again in straight to claim 3rd close home, nearest finish.
Never more than 3Ls off pace until straight, effort 350 M out and still with place prospects 200 M out, one-paced final 200 M.
Held rails position 6Ls off speed until straight, ran on fairly well final stages, nearest finish.

Raced 2 and 3-wide 6Ls off pace until straight when turned in racing 4-wide, no further impression.
Always wide and rear at least 8Ls off speed, labouring and already detached 400 M out, never a factor.
Always prominent and 2-wide through early stages, entered straight racing 4-wide, stayed on well enough without ever threatening leading pair.
Drifted back on exiting and held up 7 to 8Ls off lead, finished off down centre of track but never landed a blow.
Always in rear group about 7 or 8Ls from lead until straight, ran on final 300 M, impeded 200 M out, nearest finish.
Broke smartly and raced prominently early on but did so racing 3 or 4-wide and without any cover, led around home turn until 300 M out, faded final stages.
Crossed over from wide draw to race 1 or 2Ls off pace and 2-wide, gradually lost position from about 600 M out, under pressure 350 M out, not come on.
Slowest away and soon 6 to 7Ls off pace and 2-wide, finished wide down straight, never posed any threat.
Last early 6 to 7Ls off lead before creeping forward on inside from 800 M out, about 4Ls down 400 M out, tried hard in straight and just missed 2nd spot.
Raced 3-wide and 3Ls off pace until straight, soon off bridle though just a length off winner 200 M out not follow through.
Settled 2 to 2.5Ls off lead racing 2-wide, niggled 400 M out to quicken, half length off winner 200 M out but not come on and soon passed.
Held up 4 to 5Ls off pace until straight, stayed on well final 300 M but no chance with winner, held on gamely for 2nd place.
Settled 3 to 4Ls off pace until straight on fence, switched off rails to challenge 350 M out, clear lead 200 M out, pushed out to score comfortably.
Soon led on rails though never more than a length clear, under pressure turning in and passed over 200 M out, dropped away quickly.
2-wide half a length off leader, under pressure 300 M out and weakened quickly from 250 M out.
Held 3rd place on rails no more than 2Ls off pace, travelled well entering straight and still on bridle behind weakening rivals HORNET and DEPECHE MODE until 100 M out.
Held up in rear. Made steady headway from 250 M, no extra near finish.
Jumped awkwardly, settled 2-wide in midfield. Switched out for run rounding home bend, made steady progress from 300 M to score narrowly closing stages.
Rear of midfield on fence. Shifted away from rail on straightening but was disappointed for running for some distance near 300 M. Horse hit on head by another rider's whip at 200 M. One-paced.
Prominent on rail. Faded 200 M out.
Towards the front early, steadily dropped to mid-division at 1500 M, hugging rail. Made gradual ground from 300 M, one-paced final 100 M.
Missed start badly, recovered to rear of midfield at 1700 M. Came under pressure at 600 M. Did not respond and hung in badly in the straight.
Jumped well, caught wide into first turn before settling 2-1/2Ls off pace forward of midfield. Steadied near 400 M when beginning to give ground, not in contention thereafter.
Soon up there, caught wide going into first bend. Joined at 600 M, regained clear advantage 400 M out. Just pipped by the winner final strides.
Taken across to rails at rear. Under pressure from 600 M, ran on steadily towards inner from 400 M until no extra close home.
Settled towards rear. Made some ground from 300 M, one-paced last bit.
From widest gate was obliged to cover a lot of ground without cover towards rear. Crept closer and wide near 800 M, ran on a bit near 300 M, then same pace to the line.
Soon tracked leader. Equal lead at 500 M. Dropped out quickly inside 400 M.
3-wide around midfield. Progress out wide from 900 M to share lead at 600 M. Run ended at 350 M, dropped out.
Began well on rail, taken back to wait near rear. Checked at 1600 M. Last into straight, steadied and shifted out 300 M out. Ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Well there to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Led field from 1000 M before being joined by winner 300 M. Found no extra final 200 M.
Never troubled leaders.
About 7th passing 800 M and same place home turn. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra close home.
Towards rear till making some headway along rails in straight.
In rear to straight. Ran on without threatening inside final 200 M.
Slow into stride and was last swinging into straight. Never nearer.
Always prominent. Quickened to lead 200 M. Kept on under pressure.
Midfield into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Ran 5th into home bend. Improved to be 3rd 300 M but effort not sustained close home.
In rear to straight where he kept on quite well closing stages.
Well there early and was worse than midfield into straight. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M, doing best work at the finish.
Never far off to home turn where he started to give ground.
In touch briefly and was about 10th before home bend. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Always prominent. Was 2nd turning in. Kept on without threatening.
Rear. Made up some ground along rail 200 M out.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never able to feature.
Jumped well and led briefly, soon raced in midfield. Wide into straight and dropped out steadily.
Midfield or slightly better. Unable to quicken in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was at rear after start. Recovered some ground to be just behind midfield home bend. Progressed to 4th 350 M. One-paced.
Took lead from 1000 M and never headed. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield from widest draw. Faded from 600 M.
Behind midfield early, soon dropped to the rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Sat outside leader rounding home bend. Kept on. (Dropped whip 100 M.)
Around midfield. Made swift headway home bend with leaders turning in. Soon weakened.
Rear. Made steady headway home bend. Sustained progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent briefly. Gave ground gradually far side. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Quickened to hold every chance early in straight. Soon weakened.
Reminders early. Soon led. Weakened upon straightening.
Rear. Effort turning in. One-paced in straight.
Tracked leader. Took lead into straight. No extra closing stages.
Settled within striking distance. Ran on well to assert authority closing stages. Won well.
Midfield. Drifted backward around home bend. Produced good late finish closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well. settled wide in rear. Effort rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Rear. Headway home bend. One-paced from midfield into straight.
Midfield. Headway rounding home bend. Ran on to hold every chance over 200 M out but not match winner near finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Slowly away, towards rear. Improved rounding home bend to be 4th turning in. Kept on to take 2nd closing stages.
Lost ground at start, was last until making up some ground passing 600 M to be midfield early straight. No further progress.

Pushed along from widest draw to be prominent. Dropped out passing 600 M.
Behind midfield. Slightly improved to 7th 1400 M. Further progressed to 3rd final turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
In touch early, dropped to 6th passing 1300 M. Faded inside 600 M.
Never better than midfield.
Slightly slowly away. Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Held 2nd to final turn. Faded.
Mainly 5th throughout the race.
Led field to 150 M. Found no extra.
Raced greenly and hung out badly early and middle stages. Never seen with a chance. (Lame.)
Rear. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Never a danger.
Behind midfield. Kept on in straight.
Never far off to straight. Found nothing.
Never in the hunt.
Never nearer than midfield.
Midfield. One-paced without quickening in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to straight. Weakened.
Tracked leaders. Broke 2L clear soon after straightening. Pipped at post.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened.
Prominent before gave ground gradually from approaching home bend.
Never far off. Fought on well down straight to gain upper hand final strides.
Midfield. Headway far side. Weakened into straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Led. Went clear on straightening for an easy victory.
Soon tracked leader. Kept on one pace after straightening until no extra passing 200 M.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Towards the rear. Never a factor.

Settled behind midfield. Made up some ground concluding stages.
Jumped fairly, ridden along to be prominent. Kept on well in straight to claim remote 2nd, tendency to hang out.
Well there until straightening. Hung out rounding the home turn. Unable to quicken, further weakened closing stages.
Soon last. Tailed off from 900 M.
Better than midfield. Wide along the back straight and rounding the home turn. Ran on in straight to be distant 3rd.

2-wide and 4 to 5Ls off pace until home turn when labouring under strong driving, no impression in straight.
Held inside position around 3Ls off pace until 200 M out when still with prospects of running the frame, one-paced closing stages.

Very awkwardly away and raced in rear 2-wide as far back as 9 to 10Ls adrift of lead, grew further detached in straight.
Settled 7 or 8Ls off pace 3-wide, still far back and even wider turning into straight, never a factor.

Never better than 3-wide and 5Ls off lead until 600 M out when hard ridden to maintain position, not show any real sign of improvement from then on.
Never better than 3-wide in the run though prominent 2.5 to 3Ls off pace, under pressure over 600 M out and remained hard ridden until line but stuck to task gamely.

Raced wide around first turn 1400 M out and always caught 3-wide and 6Ls adrift until straight, improved steadily final 250 M to be nearest finish.

Niggled to hold position 2-wide in midfield. Under pressure from 400 M, made gradual ground final 200 M.

Never far off on rails. Kept on before weakening final 50 M.
Outpaced at the back. Came under pressure at 400 M, found nothing.
Settled in rear. Steadied when disappointed for running after the 400 M. No impression thereafter.
4-wide towards rear into 1st bend. Stayed same turning in, made steady progress final 300 M.

3-wide towards rear. Widest into straight, made up some ground down centre of track. One-paced final 100 M.
Restless in stalls, slow to begin, steadily recovered towards rear of midfield on fence near 1200 M. Unable to quicken in home straight.
Soon settled 3-wide in midfield. Crept closer 4-wide around home bend. Ran on to tackle leader 200 M out. Prevailed on the line after locking horn with runner-up final 150 M.
3-wide behind midfield. Short-lived effort near 300 M, soon one-paced.
3-wide forward of midfield, 3Ls off lead. Advanced to challenge for lead upon straightening. Hit front 200 M out, soon joined by winner, outstayed narrowly at finish.
Prominent 2-wide. Kept on same pace before commencing to tire closing stages.
Prominent. Was 2nd rounding home bend. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
In touch. Faded final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Steadied 400 M and again passing 200 M. Kept on same pace to finish.
Midfield. Improved to 4th approaching 600 M. Ran on to take 3rd passing 200 M.
Jumped well and took lead to near 100 M. Kept on.
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. Chased leader turning in, taking over passing 100 M. Held on well.
Last to final turn. Ran on quite well final 200 M.
Near rear. Was last early straight until making up some ground inside 150 M.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily from 400 M.

Towards rear. Progressed to midfield 600 M out. Slightly inconvenienced 200 M. Kept on without quickening.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Around midfield. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Effort around field home bend. Widest runner when midfield turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Always last few.
Towards rear. Dropped out into straight. (Heart irregularity.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide in midfield. Weakened from 400 M.
Led early. Prominent 3rd far side. One-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never nearer.
Well there. Led far side. Went 3Ls clear early in straight. Won well.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Midfield or behind. Kept on steadily in straight.
Broke well. Settled in 4th and not far off. Weakened into straight.
In touch early, settled midfield or behind. Widest turning in. Made up some ground in straight.
Better than midfield. Progressed to 3rd final turn. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Kept on final 350 M.
Behind midfield. Advanced to 5th turning in. Ran on well to catch the leader around 50 M.
Sat outside leader to final turn. Dropped back steadily.
Slightly slowly away. Towards rear and wide throughout.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Found no extra in straight.
Midfield. Dropped back approaching 600 M. Raced wide without cover throughout.
Trailed the field throughout.
Better than midfield. Made progress far side to be 3rd home bend. Made no show in straight.
Led field soon after start. Kept on when headed close home.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield home turn. Kept on without quickening.
Well back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from 7th into straight.
Wide in better than midfield. Dropped out home bend.
Prominent to home bend. Dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there. Hit front into straight. Soon drew clear.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Around midfield to straight. Faded.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Behind midfield. Ran on to grab 2nd place inside 200 M.
Always thereabouts. No extra in straight.
Never a danger.
Led to straight. No extra.
Never nearer.

Taken across behind the field near the rear but closer to the rail from a difficult gate. Steadily improved to midfield rounding the first bend. Wide along the back straight and the home bend. No extra in straight.
Soon towards rear. Disappointed for running about the 200 M and again shortly afterwards.
Jumped awkwardly and at back. Checked near the 800 M. Saved ground on inside to make up good ground in straight for a distant 3rd.
Soon handy in 3rd. Disputed lead from 600 M and hit the front before straightening. Kicked away and won easily.
Worse than midfield. Crept closer along the rail rounding the home bend but was awkward on heels on straightening. No extra.
Soon tracked leader. Ridden along to maintain its position after 800 M. Steadily gave ground from 500 M.
Worse than midfield to straightening. Made up some ground.
Settled slightly behind midfield. Ran on in straight but the winner too strong.
Led. Dropped out rapidly after straightening.
Settled towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Well there, held 4th before improving steadily rounding the home bend to be 2nd before straightening. One paced until no extra final stages.
Mainly midfield. Made some moderate progress rounding the home bend, then one paced in straight.
On inside and 4Ls off pace in 4th before losing place 1000 M out, 6Ls down and on and off bridle from then on, well beaten 300 M out.
Held up and over 10Ls off pace 800 M out, 8Ls adrift and on fence 500 M out, no impression.
Held up racing 2 and 3-wide about 9Ls off pace, stayed on through beaten horses from 400 M post to line, never nearer.
Raced 2-wide in rear 9Ls off pace 800 M out, became further detached and came home in own time.
Always wide throughout, 7Ls adrift and 3-wide 800 M out, 5Ls off and 5-wide entering straight, no threat final stages.

Tardy start and trailed field throughout.
Slow to begin, recovered to be midfield on rail at 800 M. Niggled at 400 M out, given reminders early in straight, Made moderate headway close home under hands and heels. (See Racing Incidents.)
Worked steadily forward from widest gate to share lead passing 600 M. Made latter part of home turn awkwardly, shifted ground and hung out badly, dropped out from 200 M.
Ridden but outpaced towards rear. Did not find much in straight.
Always up there, drew clear inside 200 M, held on well.
Disputed lead before sitting behind leaders from 600 M. Kept on same pace in straight while hanging in, gave ground closing stages.
Began well and was never far off on fence. Kept on in the straight and was inconvenienced near the line.

5th and 3-wide early about 2.5Ls off pace, struggling over 500 M out and very one-paced in straight.

About 8th, pulling hard, 800 M. Never on terms.

Worse than midfield to straight. Kept on close home.

Wide in midfield. Faded into straight.

Well back. Finished well in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening.
Settled in midfield or worse. Quickened well inside 200 M to take charge closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.

Behind midfield. Short-lived effort far side. Faded home bend.

Well there. Caught wide along the back straight and rounding the home turn. One-paced in straight.

Led until 200 M. Kept on until no extra concluding stages.
Well there. Under pressure rounding home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Slow to begin and towards the rear. Crept closer from 600 M, 4-wide into straight. Made up steady ground until no extra final stages.
