Around midfield. Was checked 850 M. Ran on steadily from 8th final turn but without threatening the winner.
Soon last from widest draw. Never a threat.
Among leaders soon after start. Gained clear advantage approaching 800 M. Never headed thereafter.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steadied and shifted in passing 400 M. Made some improvement along rail thereafter.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Prominent to straight and soon weakened.
Never better than midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Well there. Fought on to gain upper hand final strides.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Always in last few.
Missed the break but quickly recovered to midfield. Made moderate progress in straight but forced to steady close home.
Settled towards rear into straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Soon led. Fought on to defy winner's tackle final 200 M but died on its run close to post.
Never a danger.
Broke well. Never far off. Held every chance upon straightening but never able to post any real threats to winner.
Well back. Flew home inside final 200 M to produce an eye-catching debut.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Behind midfield. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Near rear. Responded well passing 400 M. Ran on strongly final 200 M, just failing to catch the quinella pair.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
In touch. Was 3rd from 500 M to 250 M. One-paced thereafter.
In touch. Shifted to the rail approaching 400 M to chase the leader. Steadied and shifted out for a clear run 300 M. Found no extra.
Pushed along to maintain a prominent position. Given reminders 600 M. No response. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear. Improved to midfield halfway. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Prominent. Led field passing 800 M, still holding 2Ls advantage 300 M out. Unable to quicken when headed inside 100 M.
Was there until dropping back steadily passing 400 M.
In touch early. Dropped out steadily when midfield halfway.
Towards rear. Quickened well under pressure final 400 M. Disputed for lead final 100 M to score narrowly at finish.
Around midfield throughout.
Well there to 600 M. Made no show thereafter.
Never far off. Ran on well inside 300 M. Was held by the winner marginally closing stages.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort around 300 M. Soon found no extra.
Better than midfield in 5th. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Led field into straight. Dropped away quickly passing 200 M.
Midfield. Not have clear run early in straight. Made up some late ground.
Ridden to brief lead early, settling outside pace. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Midfield till dropped out into straight.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Recovered to behind midfield before checked and dropped to last 800 M out.
Held up towards rear. No clear passage early in straight before responding well inside 250 M to assert authority close home.
Midfield. Effort into straight. Faded passing 200 M.
Midfield. Steadied for a stride 700 M out on home bend. Not much room in straight and kept on same pace.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Always thereabouts. Every chance the length of straight and only lost touch close to home.
Settled behind leaders. Ran on to hit front about 100 M out but worn down close home.
Towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield early settling in last few. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Made short-lived effort upon straightening. One-paced final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Checked at around 1200 M and lost its position slightly. Failed to quicken in straight.
Midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
Niggled along to go forward and in touch early. Improved to 3rd 1200 M out. Under pressure passing 800 M. Found nothing in straight.
Slowly away, remained at back. Approaching and rounding the home bend hung out badly. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Around midfield. Crept closer upon straightening. One-paced thereafter.
Well there. Improved to 2nd turning into the straight. Held on until one-paced from 300 M, gave ground closing stages.
Soon tracked leader. Took command from 800 M and kicked 5Ls into straight. Still held clear advantage at 200 M but unable to hold off winner final strides.
Towards rear, proved difficult to settle and unbalanced on the first turn. Shifted to the outside upon straightening and made up good ground until no extra final 100 M.
Midfield. Unbalanced at 500 M and steadied just on straightening. Ran on to the line without troubling the quinella pair for a distant 3rd.
Soon led. Headed at 800 M. Dropped out gradually in straight.
Soon handy with cover. Unable to keep up from 600 M. Tired gradually.
Worse than midfield. Ridden hard from 800 M. Made no improvement in straight.

Worse than midfield. Commenced run and shifted to outside from 600 M but still 7Ls off the leader into straight. Ran on strongly despite hanging in and snatched victory right on the line. (Rider dropped his off side rein at about 200 M.)
Held up in rear 6Ls off speed on inside until home straight, wide and 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on well to be nearest finish.
Raced 2-wide and towards rear throughout, no threat in straight.
Raced 3-wide 3 to 4Ls off pace throughout, never looked like landing a blow.
On fence racing keenly 3 to 3.5Ls off pace before being checked 300 M out, produced with strong run inside rivals final 200 M, nearest finish.
Prominent early on inside, close enough to pose serious challenge 300 M out but not come on final stages.
Always in 2nd place and 2-wide at winner's quarters throughout though never able to pass him.
Broke well, led on inside from wide gate by 1100 M out, always three-parts of a length clear and held onto until 200 M out, driven out to score cleverly.
Raced 4-wide in 4th early on, clear 3rd and 3-wide 700 M out, stayed on at one pace final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide and 3Ls off pace 900 M out, still mid-division entering straight and soon hard-ridden, no response.
Raced 3-wide and in 3rd early on, little short of room 300 M out, not match pace of principals.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, crept closer entering straight but couldn't get any closer final 200 M.
Held up on fence 4Ls down back straight, never managed to get any closer than that and beaten 300 M out.
Slowest away, 6Ls off pace and 2-wide and tried to make some progress 500 M out but soon under pressure entering straight and finished in own time.
Held slender advantage before drawing clear 250 M out, soon headed by winner passing 200 M, swamped inside final 100 M.
Steadily taken towards rear, proved very difficult to settle early and middle stages. Brief effort near 250 M, soon emptied.
Held up in midfield towards inner, obtained cover from 1300 M. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Near rear early, soon improved to midfield or slightly better. No response in straight, crowded at 300 M, faded.
Soon tracked leader. Under pressure from 400 M, steadily dropped out from 300 M.
Towards rear early, progressed to midfield near 1300 M. Steadied and shifted in 300 M out. Unable to quicken.
Towards rear early, steadily improved along rail to be 2Ls off pace 1300 M out. Kept on same pace in straight for 3rd.
Around midfield, 3 or 4-wide. Switched wider on straightening, lengthened well when asked for effort 300 M, hit front inside 150 M to win going away.
Slightly slow out, waited with at rear. Switched widest turning in, ran on well behind winner from 300 M until outsprinted final 100 M.
3-wide never far off, shifted out near 300 M and caused interference. Renewed effort when straightened at 200 M, kept on to just miss a placing close home.
Behind midfield. Found nothing in the straight, having been crowded near 300 M.
Jumped very awkwardly and well back. Crowded for room near 300 M. Made up some ground when into clear 200 M out, no extra near finish.
Well there early then settled forward of midfield, 4-wide without cover. Hampered and severely checked 300 M out, did not recover.
Steadily dropped to rear and close to rail. Made gradual ground from 300 M before keeping on one-paced final 100 M.
Slipped across from wide gate to sit 3-wide 3 to 4Ls off pace until 1000 M out, took closer order from 800 M out and led over 300 M out, all out.
Wide at first bend, raced 3-wide and 5Ls off pace 1400 M out, four wide around home bend and under pressure, lacked a change of gear from 350 M out.
Settled on inside 2Ls off pace in 4th, ridden to take closer order 500 M out, kept responding gamely to strong pressure all the way up home straight.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off pace until 600 M out when field packed tighter, travelled well entering straight 3-wide, stayed on well final stages without passing winner.
Soon led by 1 to 2Ls until straight when joined and then passed by winner over 300 M out, outpaced and 1L down 100 M out but battled back gamely and still gaining at winning post.
Held up, 2-wide 9 to 10Ls off speed 1200 M out, turned in still towards rear and widest of all, no impression final 300 M.
Raced 2-wide in 2nd 1.5Ls off TOBOUGG, hard ridden 700 M out and well beaten before turning into straight, faded out of contention.
Raced on inside 7Ls off lead 1300 M out, 5Ls off 900 M out, hard ridden to follow HAWKEYE on fence 500 M out, 3Ls off entering straight, not follow through final stages.
2-wide and prominent just 2.5Ls off pace until 500 M out when ridden to quicken up again, back-pedalled rapidly from 400 M marker.
Held up 6 to 7Ls off pace and 2-wide until 900 M out, crept closer and 4-wide turning in, produced 350 M to deliver finishing burst but never threatened principal players.
8Ls off pace on inside 1200 M out, 6Ls off 900 M out, never a factor after straightening up still well towards rear.
Tracked leader from a distance of 6 to 7Ls until straight when tried to creep closer, about 5Ls off turning in, found little in straight.
Settled in rear 9 to 10Ls off pace on inside, straightened up racing 3-wide and finished off well through beaten horses to be nearest finish.
Held up racing 2-wide 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls off lead entering straight, ran on well to be nearest finish.
Made no show.
Towards rear till making up some progress final 250 M. Never nearer.
Never far off to home turn where he failed to hold place.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Found no extra when headed 150 M.
Mostly 6th or 7th to home turn. Plugged on final 200 M.
Among rear group into straight. Stayed on final 250 M.
Never a factor.
Tracked leader to straight where he soon came to challenge. Found no extra 200 M and faded steadily.
6th or 7th into straight where he ran on well to challenge closing stages, having every chance.
Never troubled leaders.
Always well there. Quickened to lead or dispute lead inside final 200 M. Just caught last stride.
Midfield to straight where he ran on strongly from the 250 M to snatch victory short of line.
Ran 3rd or 4th to straight. Kept on till finding no extra close home.
At back to straight where he made up considerable ground to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, towards rear and was greenly throughout.
Pushed to lead soon after start, holding 1-1/2Ls advantage turning in. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always there. Ran on steadily in straight to miss 2nd narrowly near finish.
Led briefly early, then remained prominent before re-gaining advantage 200 M. Held on well to finish.
Never able to feature. (Bled.)
Behind midfield. Slightly improved to 5th far side. Made no show inside 200 M.
Midfield early from widest draw, soon dropped to the rear group. No improvement.
Towards rear. 5-wide turning in. Made up a little ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tardy start, steadied 1000 M, towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield home turn. Made up further ground final 200 M.
Always prominent. Kept on well but unable to threaten the winner.
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Made steady headway from Rock. Weakened upon straightening.
Wide behind midfield. Made moderate progress early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield. Made headway on outside going up Rock. Soon faded upon straightening.
Prominent to Rock then gradually weakened.
Towards rear. Made modest progress in straight.
Just better than midfield when hampered and dropped to last few home bend. Recovered some late ground in straight.
Behind leader. Found nothing under pressure home bend. Soon dropped out.
Led till overhauled closing stages.
Slowly away. Remained well back. Produced good late impression in straight.
Around midfield. Quickened into straight to hit front briefly inside 200 M but not match winner's late burst of speed.
Midfield. No room over 200 M out before finishing off race well.
Waited with. Swung wide into straight. Finished well to snatch victory close to home.
Jumped well but was taken back to behind midfield. Made good progress home bend to be 4th into straight. Kept on without threatening.
Towards rear. Improved from 500 M to be midfield turning in. Hung in early straight. Ran on well 200 M out to assert authority approaching 100 M.
Held 4th to 700 M. Made no show thereafter.
Midfield. Dropped back from 800 M.
Soon led. Was joined 1500 M and headed 700 M. Faded rapidly.
Well there. Joined the lead 1500 M, taking slender advantage 700 M. Found no extra when headed near 450 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Checked and lost position home bend. Stayed on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Quickened well rounding home bend to take lead 400 M. Held on when headed 100 M out.
Held 3rd until dropping to midfield 500 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly, towards rear. Made up a little ground home bend. Stayed on.
Soon last. Advanced from 650 M to be prominent home turn. Stayed on.
Towards rear. Made some progress 500 M to be 5th turning in. Ran on early straight but soon found no extra. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Behind leaders most of way. Faded home bend.
Midfield. Hampered turning in. One-paced in straight.
Never nearer.
Very slowly away. Travelled in last few. Commenced run into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Held up outside lead. Came to tackle leader upon straightening but only one-paced.
Prominent. Dropped out home bend.
Wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Midfield early. Behind leaders far side. Quickened in straight to draw level inside 200 M but denied close home.
Led. Momentarily headed passing 200 M but fought on gamely to retain advantage final stages.
Never nearer.
Soon towards rear. Made no improvement.
Midfield or worse. Wide along the back straight and rounding the home bend. No extra in straight.
Worse than midfield. Closer order before straightening. One-paced to the line.
Led or disputed lead. Headed after straightening and then gradually dropped out. (Bled.)
Slowly away, then travelled around midfield. Good headway rounding home bend and 4-wide into straight. Kept on well to the line.
Better than midfield. Lost position and dropped to midfield rounding the home bend. Kept on one pace in straight. (Hung out rounding the latter part of home turn and in the straight.)
Ridden to lead or dispute lead. Headed 250 M. Kept on one pace until weakened final stages.
Bounded in the air, soon at back. Made some ground early in the straight until one-paced concluding stages.
Towards the rear. Steadied and shifted in to find running after the 200 M. One-paced to the line.
Travelled kindly behind leaders. Hit front 250 M and soon went clear. Won unextended.

From an outside gate steadied and shifted across behind other runners to take up a position closer to the rail but towards the rear. Gradually improved closer to midfield along the back straight. Kept on one pace in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and then inconvenienced. Soon settled better than midfield. Ran on steadily in straight but winner too strong.
Away well to lead from wide gate on inside, never more than 1L clear, overhauled by winner 200 M out, no extra.
Dwelt6 slightly on exiting, settled 1.5Ls off pace racing 2-wide, still well placed entering straight but soon under pressure and dropped right out final 300 M.
Settled 3.5Ls off pace on inside, checked 500 M out, 2.5Ls down 200 M out, ran on well to be nearest finish.
Held up in rear 6Ls off pace, still rear entering stretch, ran on through beaten horses final 200 M.
1L off pace and 3-wide until home turn when under strong driving, soon dropped right out.
Never better than 4-wide in the run and without cover but always prominent, no worse than 2Ls off pace, stayed on well straight, just failed.
Always 4-wide and about 3Ls off lead, entered straight widest of all, one-paced to line.
2.5 to 3Ls off pace and 3-wide throughout until 400 M out when under pressure, no threat in straight.
Settled on inside about 2Ls off pace throughout, kicked on in straight to lead 200 M out, all out.
Rear early on, held up 2 and 3-wide 4Ls off pace down back straight until home stretch, 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off very strongly down centre of track, just failed.
Keen early on racing 2-wide, 2.5Ls off pace, checked 500 M out, not come on closing stages.
Sent to the front out wide, gradually shifting across to be 2-wide at 800 M. Ceded lead at 600 M to be on leader's hindquarters, kept on quite well until passed by placegetters close home.
Prominent out wide early, steadily dropped to 3-wide in midfield passing Rock. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Prominent 3rd behind leaders on rail. Dropped out inside final 200 M.
4-wide in midfield or slightly behind. One-paced in home straight, was steadied after the 200 M.
Began farily, worked forward to dispute lead on rail from 800 M. Held slender advantage from 650 M, overhauled by quinella pair close to finish.
Jumped awkwardly, 3-wide at the back. Ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Niggled along better than midfield. Became unbalanced when awkwardly placed near 600 M. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Began fairly, ridden along to be forward of midfield, 2 or 3Ls off pace. Kept finding final 200 M, just denied near the line.
Away smartly, quickly taken back to rear. Some 7Ls off lead on straightening, made gradual ground through field final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Outpaced near rear on fence. Never seen with a chance.
Midfield early, soon outpaced and dropped towards rear. Switched out on straightening, ran on determinedly down centre of track to snatch race final strides.
Around midfield most of the way, made a little late headway. (Skin allergy on both sides of neck.)
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off pace until straight, not come on final 300 M.
Settled 1L off pace racing 2-wide, led 200 M out, stayed on well.
2.5 to 3Ls off pace on inside throughout, ran on well in stretch without ever looking like catching winner.
Raced 3 and 4-wide through early stages, under strong pressure when widest entering straight (7-wide), ran on to be nearest finish.
Slowest into stride and 7Ls off pace on inside early on, 5Ls down 600 M out, no pace final 250 M.
Raced 3-wide 1 to 2Ls off pace, still in with every chance approaching 200 M out before dropping away very tamely. (Lame.)
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace, improved 500 M out straight though 4-wide on the turn into home straight, not reach leaders.
Soon led on inside by 1L, pinched 2Ls out of pursuers entering straight, overhauled 200 M out, no extra.
Slowish into stride, 5Ls off pace on inside, entered straight racing 3-wide, forced to switch outside 200 M out when 2Ls down, ran on strongly final 200 M.
Held up in rear 7Ls off pace early on, 5Ls down 600 M out, became further detached in straight.
No speed early on and settled 5Ls off pace on inside, improved on straightening up to be 3Ls off 200 M out, ran on well final 200 M to be nearest finish.
Raced 4-wide and without cover 3 to 4Ls off pace until 400 M out, became further detached after that point. (Sore.)
Held up on inside 3Ls off pace, briefly threatened 200 M out when 1L down but not reach principals.
Sent on to settle in 2nd racing 2-wide, under pressure entering straight and soon folded.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off speed, slightly nearer turning for home but never posed much of a threat.
3 to 4Ls off lead racing 3-wide, sent on 700 M to dispute lead racing 5-wide, led briefly 200 M out but overhauled 100 M out and no extra.
Held up on inside 2Ls off pace, 1L down entering straight, stayed on gamely under strong pressure to lead on line.
Made running but never more than 1L clear until straight, overhauled 200 M out, no extra.
Between 2 and 3Ls off pace until and 3-wide, turned into straight racing 4-wide and under pressure, no response thereafter.
Raced in rear 3-wide and 6Ls off pace, moderate late headway through beaten rivals in straight.
Always within striking distance racing 2-wide and 2Ls off pace until straight, no impression final 300 M.
Settled 3 to 4Ls off lead racing 2-wide, stayed on well in stretch to lead 100 M out, denied victory by bob of heads.
Last early and remained in rear into straight. Doing best work inside final 200 M.
Always there. Quickened to lead passing 200 M. Kept on strongly to line.
Worse than midfield into straight. Kept on till failing to get a clear run close home.
In touch to straight. Kept on to reach 2nd 100 M. Out-paced towards finish.
Well there to straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Ridden to take up running from start. Was headed 200 M and faded steadily.
Made no show.
Never on terms despite running on a bit closing stages.
Well there before dropping to midfield 600 M. Renewed effort and kept on close home.
Never far off to straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Was midfield and held wide into straight. Stayed on well to snatch 2nd placing on post.
Towards rear. Raced wide before finding cover near 800 M. Very limited progress.
Behind midfield. Steady progress from 1200 M to be 6th rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to assert authority inside final 100 M.
Held 3rd to 450 M out. Faded.
Left awkwardly and was checked soon after start. Remained in the rear group before recovering ground steadily final 450 M.
Pushed along from widest draw and took lead before joined at 600 M. Headed 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Settled midfield or behind. Made ground steadily from 7th early straight.
Mostly 4th before weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Midfield. Made no show from home turn.
Bounded in the air at start, remained in rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Towards rear. Made progress from 800 M to be midfield turning in. Kept on without threatening.
Held 5th to final turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Jumped well. Sat outside leader before joining the lead 600 M. Gained brief advantage 200 M but was soon headed. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind to half-way. Weakened.
Prominent till no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Gradually faded passing 250 M.
Led early, settling behind leader. Shared pace into straight gaining some 1L advantage passing 200 M but soon overhauled.
Well back. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Rear. Snuck up on rails turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite steadied over 150 M out.
Never nearer.
Behind midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. One-paced closing stages.
Midfield. No clear passage early in straight. Finished well to assert authority final stages.
Soon led. Joined early in straight. Dropped out passing 200 M. (Bled.)
Midfield. Made modest progress over 200 M out. One-paced near finish.
Behind midfield. Ran on final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Close up far side. Gradually dropped to midfield home bend. Faded further into straight.
Soon tracked leader. Hit front soon after straightening going some 2Ls clear 200 M out. Flattered and caught final strides.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running and led till headed passing 400 M. Checked 200 M out. Kept on for placing.
Prominent to 400 M then gradually faded.
Never nearer.
Prominent. Ran on final 250 M to snatch victory final strides despite hanging in.
Never nearer.
Never better than midfield.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced freely in midfield. Dropped out in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent early. Mostly in midfield. Found nil under pressure in straight.
Around midfield throughout.
Midfield. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Soon took up running and led till narrowly headed into straight. Faded closing stages.
Rear. Made up late ground closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up behind leaders, racing keenly far side. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always well there 3 or 4-wide. Quickened to hit front passing 200 M. Hung on well.
Raced wide. Headway around field home bend to be midfield briefly. No further impression.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Midfield or behind. Made up late ground closing stages.
Missed the break. Soon recovered to rear of field. Gained midfield turning in. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight.
Wide in midfield to 200 M then weakened.
Better than midfield. Gained 4th into straight. Lost touch passing 200 M.
Jumped best. Settled in 2nd on rails. Every chance when shared pace early in straight. No extra closing stages.
Shifted across field gradually and took up a rail run to lead. Headed about the 400 M and then was checked. Unable to recover and dropped out in straight.
At back. Shifted to the outside to improve rounding the home bend. Made up some ground in straight.
Midfield 4-wide without cover. Commenced run from 700 M to take lead before straight. Every chance until passed by placegetters inside final 100 M.
Settled behind midfield. Switched away from fence and move clear on home turn. Held up early in straight, then ran on well to the line when into clear after the 300 M.
Soon better than midfield. Awkwardly placed for some distance after the 800 M and dropped back to 2nd last into the straight. Ran past weakened runners concluding stages.
Well there, disputed lead rounding home bend. Gave ground steadily inside 400 M.
Better than midfield. Crept closer but wide rounding the home bend. Kept on one-paced in straight until dropping out passing 200 M.
Well there on fence. Gave ground steadily from 200 M.
Towards rear. Wide along back straight and rounding home bend. Made some improvement around 900 M but soon tailed off from 500 M.
Midfield. Wide along the latter part of back straight and rounding the home bend. Crept close from 600 M. Kept on until weakened steadily 200 M out.
Well there, tracked leader from 1300 M. Lost position before straightening and steadily dropped out.
Soon settled on rail towards rear. Moved closer rounding home bend. Made sustained run when into open 200 M out and gained upper hand inside 100 M. Held on well to fend off challenge from runner-up.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Commenced run from 600 M. Ran on well alongside winner in straight until no extra close to the line.
Settled worse than midfield. Gradually improved from 900 M to be behind leaders on straightening. Kept on well until no extra final 100 M.
Slow away. Settled towards rear, racing 3-wide. Hung out in straight. Ran on well until one-paced final 200 M.
Bounded in the air, lost considerable ground. In rear far side racing wide with cover. Widest straightening. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Away best from widest gate. Crossed gradually to lead on rail, never more then 1L clear. Overhauled by winner 250 M out but kept on well, just lost 2nd near finish.
Pushed forward early. Pulled hard 4-wide without cover 800 M. 3rd turning in, soon weakened.
Prominent, racing 2-wide until straightening. No response under pressure. Dropped out.
Pushed along to take 2nd, racing 3-wide 800 M. No extra in straight, dropped right out.
Always midfield, racing 2-wide. One-paced in straight.
Held up behind midfield, racing 4-wide until straightening. Ran on steadily to snatch 2nd final strides but unable to threaten the winner.
Held up in last few inside. In rear turning in, shift to centre of track, made up some late ground.
Towards rear. One-paced to the line. Never a factor.
On jumping, unbalanced and stumbled. Driven to midfield inside. Dropped out home bend. Gave further ground in straight.
Settled in last two. Widest home bend. Made up good ground outside in straight without threatening placegetters.
Midfield, racing 3-wide. Checked rather severely just after straightening. Shifted out to find running, one-paced to the line.
Pushed along to take a box seat on rail behind leader. Quickened turning in and took advantage 250 M. Won gamely.
Jumped awkwardly and unbalanced rider, dropped to rear on fence from wide draw. Much to do entering straight, ran on well through field on inner but no threat to the winner.
Not far off, wide without cover along the back. Dropped out tamely 300 M out.
Always well back and 5 or 6-wide. Tailed off into straight.
Well there early, then steadily dropped to midfield 4 or 5-wide. Hung out on the bend and unable to make ground in the straight.
Began awkwardly, hard ridden but outpaced towards rear. Unbalanced on straightening, made up some ground final 150 M.
Ridden to be 3-wide 3Ls off pace. Kept on very much same pace in the straight.
Jumped fairly, pressed on to track leader on fence 850 M out. Began to struggle inside 400 M, gave ground further final 200 M. (Lame off fore.)
Pushed along to be prominent, 2Ls behind winner. Improved within 1L off winner rounding home turn. Unable to keep up with winner in the straight, lost a minor placing close home.
From widest draw covered a lot of ground wide without cover in midfield. Hung out badly on home turn, gave ground from straightening.
2-wide behind midfield. Moderate headway near 200 M, soon one-paced.
Smartly away from wide gate, always in command, crossed over to reach rail passing 800 M. Sprinted clear on straightening to register easy pillar to post win.
Ridden but failed to muster early speed, near rear on rail before creeping to midfield 600 M out. One-paced then tired closing stages.
Pulled hard early, towards rear. Shifted out abruptly 1000 M. Widest entering straight. Never a factor.
Better than midfield on rail. Away from rail turning in but could not find running. Shifted in 200 M. One-paced.
Difficult to lead into stall. Stood, flat-footed and refused to jump. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled around midfield 4-wide without cover. Hung in badly when under pressure in straight. One-paced to the line.
Slow to begin, driven along to midfield. Dropped out in straight.
From widest gate, caught wide in rear, bumped and then 6-wide entering straight. Ran on through beaten horses final stages.
Away well. Prominent with cover. 3-wide turning in. In straight, though hung in, quickened to snatch 2nd on the line.
Hampered and checked. Midfield 3-wide. Kept on well without quickening down centre of track.
From an outside gate caught wide early. Outside leader at 2nd from 1000 M. Quickened inside 300 M but missed 2nd narrowly near finish.
Bounded in the air, steadied and became badly unbalanced about 1000 M. Raced very greenly in rear throughout.
Pushed to follow leader inside early. Niggled along at 3rd from 600 M. Soon faded after turning in.
Made all. Jumped awkwardly and shifted in abruptly. Led 2-wide early. Went clear 800 M. Held on well to finish.
Came out badly. Keen early and shifted in to close rail. Closer order early straight. No extra final 200 M.
Pulled early, ridden back to behind midfield racing 2-wide with cover. Shifted out straightening but made no show.
Slowly away. Settled towards rear 3-wide. Shifted out in early straight to find running but found no extra.
Settled around midfield racing 3-wide following the winner. Crept closer home turn. Made gradual ground outside in straight.
Settled in the last few but wide without cover. Driven along widest from 600 M. Made up some ground rounding home bend, soon dropped right out.
Always midfield, racing 2-wide. Shifted out turning in and ran on steadily down centre of track. One-paced final 200 M.

From widest gate, steadied and shifted across behind other runners to take up a position closer to the rail but at the rear. Last turning in. Shifted out to find running in straight. Quickened to be nearest at finish.
Pushed to track leaders on rail. Still better than midfield under pressure upon straightening. Gradually dropped out.
Always 2-wide just behind leaders, travelling well until straightening. Failed to respond under pressure. Gave ground abruptly from 300 M.
Slowly away, then was inconvenienced and checked. Dropped to the rear group. Closer order home turn. No extra in straight.
Away best, led or disputed lead. 2-wide and 2nd home bend. Took minor advantage early straight. Headed 200 M. Kept on well but unable to match strides with the winner.
Slow to begin. Midfield on rail. Steadied about 200 M and shifted out to 3-wide. Ran on well under pressure but unable to threaten the first two.
Led or disputed lead early on inside. Narrow advantage into straight. Soon headed and weakened final stages.
Tardy start. Behind midfield racing 2-wide. Ran on a bit in straight. Found no extra final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Dropped to the rear 1000 M. Still at back 600 M. Widest turning in. Made up some late ground.
Better than midfield, racing 3-wide without cover before turning in. Kicked on down centre of track to hit front 200 M. Kept on well to finish.
4th 1400 M and was among mid-division turning into straight. Plugged on final 200 M.
Was 5th rounding home bend before disputing for 2nd on straightening. Gave ground steadily closing stages.
Towards rear before making some late impression close home.
Awkward after start and was last to straight. Never a factor.
Refused to settle and pulled his way forward from 1200 M. Soon hung out badly and ran off. Drifted in to take lead 800 M before hanging out badly again approaching home turn, losing all his chance.
Well there to straight. Kept on to be 2nd 300 M. Found one-paced close home.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Well there early. Soon in midfield and remained there to straight. Came under pressure 300 M and ran on strongly to take command passing 100 M.
Never on terms despite improving a bit from the 250 M.
Soon took up running and was 2nd 800 M. Regained lead before home turn and kept on till finding winner too strong final 100 M.
Worse than midfield into straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
In rear to straight when he made up considerable ground along rails.
Mostly midfield to home turn. Ran on a bit on straightening. Found no extra final 150 M.
